Not a single Republican in recent history has dominated the field in a GOP primary like we are today.

| | Angela Alsobrooks is the pro-choice candidate Marylanders need on the floor of the Senate [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63723997/407777155/-347688492?sourceid=1050104&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDc5MTlkNi1jNmY5LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=viQi9tvbxjN0zuGdSbdFZP6GNCsDmAK7Z3J0rDZpIFg=&emci=ee7919d6-c6f9-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=f47919d6-c6f9-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) Peter, did you catch the Senate endorsement we announced earlier this month? Democrats are defending almost twice as many seats as Republicans, including open seats we _know_ Republicans would love to flip. To save our Senate majority, we not only need to support incumbents gearing up to defend their seats, but we need to protect blue seats by electing Democratic pro-choice candidates in critical open races as well. That's where Prince George's County Executive **Angela Alsobrooks (MD-SEN)** comes in. **[More on Angela in a moment, but first: Can we count on your support for Democratic pro-choice women in must-win races for open seats this cycle? Donate now.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63724005/407777163/-347688492?sourceid=1050104&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDc5MTlkNi1jNmY5LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=viQi9tvbxjN0zuGdSbdFZP6GNCsDmAK7Z3J0rDZpIFg=&emci=ee7919d6-c6f9-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=f47919d6-c6f9-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)** Angela has devoted her career to serving Marylanders — and making history while doing it. As the _first_ woman elected to be Prince George's County state's attorney and the first woman _and_ the first Black woman elected to the office of county executive in Maryland history, Angela is the quintessential EMILYs List candidate — she's a groundbreaker AND a change maker.

While serving in these roles, Angela has been both an advocate and activist for accessible education and health care, support for survivors of domestic violence, and justice reform. And as a lifelong Marylander, she's used her office to fight for her community and amplify their voices _every step of the way_.

Next November, Marylanders will be electing a new senator to an open seat — and this is a _critical_ blue hold if we want to hang on to the Senate majority. Angela faces a tough primary against a well-known opponent, and we're proud to give her our full support. ****Donate now to help elect Democratic pro-choice women like Angela who can *win* critical blue-hold races and save our _razor-thin_ Senate majority:**

**[https://emilyslist.org/go/Elect-More-Women-This-May](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63724007/407777164/-347688492?sourceid=1050104&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDc5MTlkNi1jNmY5LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=viQi9tvbxjN0zuGdSbdFZP6GNCsDmAK7Z3J0rDZpIFg=&emci=ee7919d6-c6f9-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=f47919d6-c6f9-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)**** Thank you,

clean_body: | | | Angela Alsobrooks is the pro-choice candidate Marylanders need on the floor of the Senate Peter, did you catch the Senate endorsement we announced earlier this month? Democrats are defending almost twice as many seats as Republicans, including open seats we know Republicans would love to flip. To save our Senate majority, we not only need to support incumbents gearing up to defend their seats, but we need to protect blue seats by electing Democratic pro-choice candidates in critical open races as well. That's where Prince George's County Executive Angela Alsobrooks (MD-SEN) comes in. Angela has devoted her career to serving Marylanders — and making history while doing it. As the first woman elected to be Prince George's County state's attorney and the first woman and the first Black woman elected to the office of county executive in Maryland history, Angela is the quintessential EMILYs List candidate — she's a groundbreaker AND a change maker. While serving in these roles, Angela has been both an advocate and activist for accessible education and health care, support for survivors of domestic violence, and justice reform. And as a lifelong Marylander, she's used her office to fight for her community and amplify their voices every step of the way. Next November, Marylanders will be electing a new senator to an open seat — and this is a critical blue hold if we want to hang on to the Senate majority. Angela faces a tough primary against a well-known opponent, and we're proud to give her our full support. **Donate now to help elect Democratic pro-choice women like Angela who can win critical blue-hold races and save our razor-thin Senate majority: Thank you, Jessica Mackler (she/her/hers) Senior Vice President of Campaigns, EMILYs List ****** | ---|---|--- EMILYs List is a community of over five million members that helps elect Democratic pro-choice women to office. | Paid for by EMILYs List and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Andy Beshear
subject: Some of my favorite photos from our bus tour
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
Over the weekend, my team and I headed out for a three-day bus tour of Kentucky. Peter,

Over the weekend, Lt. Gov. Jacqueline Coleman, Rocky Adkins and I headed out for a three-day, 13-stop bus tour across Kentucky to kick off the general election and meet Kentuckians in their hometowns – from Paducah to Prestonsburg to Newport!

The energy on the road was incredible. Thousands of Kentuckians turned out with their friends, kids and neighbors because we know that with four more years we can continue to make progress for our Commonwealth. I want to share a few of my favorite photos from each stop. **Day One:**

We rallied with hundreds of supporters at the Freight House in Paducah, toured the new Pratt Paper mill in Henderson, were blown away by an excited crowd in Owensboro, met with UAW workers at Metalsa – a growing business in Elizabethtown that has been manufacturing truck frames for Ford for the past two decades – and finished the day in Bowling Green at an event that the local paper said “gave new meaning to standing room only.”

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63724188/407780476/-1941741592?refcode=em23_230523_bustou_fnd_gq_act___ab_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230523_bustou_fnd_gq_act___ab_ettx&utm_medium=email&noskip=true&refcode2=36f1e9fe-c7f9-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNmYxZTlmZS1jN2Y5LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YMfLg88T8tVuwrs4dpOM5st0tKXJz9JPYEUq2yOMLec=)

**Day Two:**

Despite the rain, hundreds and hundreds of Kentuckians came out to see us as we made stops in Lexington, Morehead, Ashland, Pikeville, and Prestonsburg to celebrate the progress we’ve made in the last three and a half years, and to hear our plans for reelection! We even had high school students on their way to prom, and a bride stopped by on her wedding day.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63724189/407780477/-1941741592?refcode=em23_230523_bustou_fnd_gq_act___ab_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230523_bustou_fnd_gq_act___ab_ettx&utm_medium=email&noskip=true&refcode2=36f1e9fe-c7f9-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNmYxZTlmZS1jN2Y5LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YMfLg88T8tVuwrs4dpOM5st0tKXJz9JPYEUq2yOMLec=)

**Day Three:**

The last day of the tour kicked off in Louisville where we opened our first campaign field office of the cycle on Baxter Avenue – with over 200 volunteer signups – and then rallied with supporters at The Palm Room! We ended the tour in Northern Kentucky, with a line of Kentuckians that wrapped around the block to get into the New Riff Distillery for our final stop.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63724190/407780478/-1941741592?refcode=em23_230523_bustou_fnd_gq_act___ab_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230523_bustou_fnd_gq_act___ab_ettx&utm_medium=email&noskip=true&refcode2=36f1e9fe-c7f9-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNmYxZTlmZS1jN2Y5LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YMfLg88T8tVuwrs4dpOM5st0tKXJz9JPYEUq2yOMLec=) One of my favorite parts of my job as governor is being able to connect with Kentuckians from all over our Commonwealth. This bus tour made it clear that we have started this race with momentum, energy, and excitement. But to keep this up, we have to work every single day between now and November to ensure a win on Election Day.

**[Peter, you are a critical part of this campaign, and I'm grateful for any support you're willing to give. If you're able to, will you chip in to my re-election campaign now to help us keep up our momentum? Your support will help us win this tough race in November so we can keep moving Kentucky forward.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63724191/407780479/-1941741592?refcode=em23_230523_bustou_fnd_gq_act___ab_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230523_bustou_fnd_gq_act___ab_ettx&utm_medium=email&noskip=true&refcode2=36f1e9fe-c7f9-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNmYxZTlmZS1jN2Y5LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YMfLg88T8tVuwrs4dpOM5st0tKXJz9JPYEUq2yOMLec=)**

Hope to see you out on the road soon!

clean_body: Over the weekend, my team and I headed out for a three-day bus tour of Kentucky. Peter, Over the weekend, Lt. Gov. Jacqueline Coleman, Rocky Adkins and I headed out for a three-day, 13-stop bus tour across Kentucky to kick off the general election and meet Kentuckians in their hometowns – from Paducah to Prestonsburg to Newport! The energy on the road was incredible. Thousands of Kentuckians turned out with their friends, kids and neighbors because we know that with four more years we can continue to make progress for our Commonwealth. I want to share a few of my favorite photos from each stop. Day One: We rallied with hundreds of supporters at the Freight House in Paducah, toured the new Pratt Paper mill in Henderson, were blown away by an excited crowd in Owensboro, met with UAW workers at Metalsa – a growing business in Elizabethtown that has been manufacturing truck frames for Ford for the past two decades – and finished the day in Bowling Green at an event that the local paper said “gave new meaning to standing room only.” = Day Two: Despite the rain, hundreds and hundreds of Kentuckians came out to see us as we made stops in Lexington, Morehead, Ashland, Pikeville, and Prestonsburg to celebrate the progress we’ve made in the last three and a half years, and to hear our plans for reelection! We even had high school students on their way to prom, and a bride stopped by on her wedding day. = Day Three: The last day of the tour kicked off in Louisville where we opened our first campaign field office of the cycle on Baxter Avenue – with over 200 volunteer signups – and then rallied with supporters at The Palm Room! We ended the tour in Northern Kentucky, with a line of Kentuckians that wrapped around the block to get into the New Riff Distillery for our final stop. = One of my favorite parts of my job as governor is being able to connect with Kentuckians from all over our Commonwealth. This bus tour made it clear that we have started this race with momentum, energy, and excitement. But to keep this up, we have to work every single day between now and November to ensure a win on Election Day. = Hope to see you out on the road soon! Andy = | | Andy is fighting to make the Bluegrass State the best place it can be for generations to come, and he needs you on board. Will you chip in today to Andy's re-election campaign? = PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR Andy Beshear for Governor PO Box 4278 Louisville, KY 40204 United States

name: Adam Schiff
subject: BREAKING: Resolution introduced to censure and fine me $16 million. It could come up for a vote as soon as tomorrow.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=2306%2E5257348%2Er5nLbD ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek,

Just days ago, Kevin McCarthy’s ally, Rep. Anna Paulina Luna of Florida,
filed a motion to expel me from Congress. For investigating and impeaching
Trump. And for holding him accountable during my service on the January
6th Committee.

She’s just changed her tactic, and now, she wants to censure and fine me
$16 million dollars. And it could come up for a vote as soon as tomorrow
or Thursday.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=may2023_abs_em.tUimEk&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC60_20230523_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=2306%2E5257348%2Er5nLbD ]Rep. Anna Paulina Luna @RepLuna I just filed a privileged resolution, H. Res.
437, to censure, condemn, & fine Rep. Adam Schiff $16 million (1/2 the cost of
Russia investigation) for his egregious abuse of trust. I, with my GOP
colleagues, look forward to an imminent vote to hold this feckless man
accountable.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=may2023_abs_em.TpLEiB&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC60_20230523_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=2306%2E5257348%2Er5nLbD ]I need you to stand with me, because I won’t back down from these
baseless attacks. But I need your help to fight back – please rush $10 to
our campaign right now.

This is a new low, even for these MAGA extremists. And if it seems crazy,
it is — the lunatics have definitely taken over the asylum. But sadly, we
need to take it seriously.

And it’s just the latest move to try to exact political payback against me
for holding Trump accountable.

First, Kevin McCarthy removed me from the House Intelligence Committee.
Then, he told a crowd of his supporters that I must “never” be a U.S.
Senator. And now, one of his allies is trying to expel me from Congress
entirely, or fine me millions.

All because I had the audacity to stand up to Trump when they lacked the
courage.

But if they think this will get me to back down,
Derek, they’re sorely mistaken.

I’m not going to back down when it comes to protecting the rule of law.

I’m not going to back down on defending our democracy.

I’m not going to back down on holding Donald Trump and his MAGA enablers
accountable.

Not now. Not ever.

The stakes of our race are too high to back down — so I hope you won’t
either:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=may2023_abs_em.TpLEiB&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC60_20230523_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=2306%2E5257348%2Er5nLbD ]We need to continue our work to defend our democracy against those who
would destroy it. Will you rush in a donation of $10 to have my back
against these right-wing attacks?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=may2023_abs_em.zFhEHH&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC60_20230523_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1007&akid=2306%2E5257348%2Er5nLbD ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=may2023_abs_em.-ikdjF&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC60_20230523_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1008&akid=2306%2E5257348%2Er5nLbD ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=may2023_abs_em.giYyqq&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC60_20230523_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1009&akid=2306%2E5257348%2Er5nLbD ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=may2023_abs_em.3BVBtQ&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC60_20230523_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1010&akid=2306%2E5257348%2Er5nLbD ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1019?c0=may2023_abs_em.VrKnFM&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC60_20230523_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1011&akid=2306%2E5257348%2Er5nLbD ]EXPRESS DONATE $250

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=may2023_abs_em.tUimEk&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC60_20230523_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1012&akid=2306%2E5257348%2Er5nLbD ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Thank you,

— Adam

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=may2023_abs_em.tUimEk&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC60_20230523_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1013&akid=2306%2E5257348%2Er5nLbD ]Adam Schiff for Senate Banner

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1032?c0=may2023_abs_em.FKV_Cj&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC60_20230523_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1014&akid=2306%2E5257348%2Er5nLbD ]DONATE MONTHLY

name: Moms for Katie Porter
subject: Peter we need to keep the lights on this month
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MOMS IN OFFICE
body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]
Peter,
We’ll be honest – running for Congress is expensive, especially in California, the nation's most populous state! This is why candidates like Katie Porter count on our support.
From voter outreach to growing a movement and building successful campaigns, those costs can add up quickly.
The election in 2024 may seem far away, but we have a lot of work to do now to secure the resources that we need.
Our own fundraising has been steadily declining since January and it’s unsustainable for our organization — if things don’t turn around, we may not have the funds to continue this important work.
Can you chip in now ahead of our end of the month deadline? Every dollar truly makes a difference for us. We are counting on you this month to help us secure the funds we desperately need to keep going. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsforkatie]
RUSH A DONATION [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsforkatie]
Thank you for everything!
Simona Grace
Founder and Executive Director

clean_body: [] Peter, We’ll be honest – running for Congress is expensive, especially in California, the nation's most populous state! This is why candidates like Katie Porter count on our support. From voter outreach to growing a movement and building successful campaigns, those costs can add up quickly. The election in 2024 may seem far away, but we have a lot of work to do now to secure the resources that we need. Our own fundraising has been steadily declining since January and it’s unsustainable for our organization — if things don’t turn around, we may not have the funds to continue this important work. Can you chip in now ahead of our end of the month deadline? Every dollar truly makes a difference for us. We are counting on you this month to help us secure the funds we desperately need to keep going. [] RUSH A DONATION [] Thank you for everything! Simona Grace Founder and Executive Director Moms in Office #momsforkatieporter DONATE [] [] [] [] Moms in Office 13351 Riverside Drive #265 Sherman Oaks, CA 91423 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: . name: SmartAsset
subject: Average Retirement Savings By Age: Are You Normal?
body:
Many Americans worry they’re not saving enough for retirement, and rightfully so.

| | | |
---
|
# Average Retirement Savings By Age: Are You Normal?
---
| Research behind how much Americans save, and who feels most confident about their plan
---
| | |
---
| Many Americans worry they’re not saving enough for retirement, and rightfully so.

The National Institute of Retirement Security reports: Approximately 40 million households have no retirement savings.1

It’s never too late to get started. Although results are never guaranteed and risks are involved, [well-managed investments may potentially compound over time.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c667986%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Q3bUjezUWCjePPqK8cgS2A&sysid=1)

Fidelity reported in May 2022 that the average 401(k) balance for those who've been saving for over 10 years averaged over $380,000.2

[Find out the recommended savings for your age here.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c667987%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xC%2fcyaAPxe%2f%2fU3yyUhbDLw&sysid=1)

Of course, saving for retirement is different for everyone. If you feel like you're behind in savings, want to make sure you're on track, or want to find investment vehicles to help you save more, talking to an advisor can help you [set and execute a retirement plan.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c667988%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9VgfNVBjleFu0%2bgAfFi26w&sysid=1)

Not sure where to start? We created [a free quiz](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c667989%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6H5wMd6ema1DW8QyaUnosg&sysid=1) to help Americans find vetted financial advisors who serve your area, obligated to work in your best interest. It's never too late to get your finances straight.

[Get your financial advisor matches today »](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c667980%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UYuoH%2bU3AT0H6HLI39hqvQ&sysid=1)
---
|
---

Get retirement ready. Take this no-cost quiz to get matched with up to 3 vetted financial advisors serving your area.

---

2\. [Building Financial Futures", Fidelity (May 2022).](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c667983%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=VcSeN9RE%2fipIT3%2bLW6s%2fsw&sysid=1)

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: Thank you, President Trump!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Team Graham, Inc
body:
If you are proud of the conservative policies President Trump implemented during his presidency, will you stand with me and help put him in the White House again? |
Fellow American,

President Trump accomplished more in four years than most other presidents accomplish in a political lifetime.

He was one of the most consequential presidents in American history - **and that's why I still stand by his side, Fellow American.** There is no comparison between what President Trump was able to accomplish and what Biden has attempted over these past two years.

If you are proud of the conservative policies President Trump implemented during his presidency, [**will you stand with me and help put him in the White House again?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61837123:szFHkJDYN:m:1:877327319:9ED0806950AB31CE543DF32E787689DD:r)

| [**STAND WITH TRUMP ->**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61837123:szFHkJDYN:m:1:877327319:9ED0806950AB31CE543DF32E787689DD:r)
---

**Remember his successes Fellow American?**

**First** - He grew a strong economy. For four years we were experiencing the best economic opportunity in modern American history. We had low taxes, record-low unemployment, and lowered regulations on businesses.

**Second** - he made America - and the rest of the world safer. The leader of ISIS caliphate, Abu Bakr al-Baghdadi, and Qasem Soleimani of Iran, met their fate under his leadership.

Not to mention, the historic peace agreement between the United Arab Emirates and Israel, securing our Southern Border, and withdrawing from the disaster known as the Iran nuclear deal.

**Third** - I was proud to help him confirm over 200 district and circuit court judges, along with three incredibly talented United States Supreme Court justices - Neil Gorsuch, Brett Kavanaugh, and Amy Coney Barrett. These justices are already delivering conservative victories like overturning Roe v. Wade.

For four years, President Trump delivered for Americans and we were all better off for it. Now it's our time to help him and **help our nation get back on track.**

It's time to show our appreciation. **[Will you make a split contribution to help President Trump return to the White House and then make sure he has a Republican Senate when he gets there?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61837123:szFHkJDYN:m:1:877327319:9ED0806950AB31CE543DF32E787689DD:r)**

[**STAND WITH TRUMP ->**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61837123:szFHkJDYN:m:1:877327319:9ED0806950AB31CE543DF32E787689DD:r)
---

I am grateful for President Trump's leadership and his successes for our country. We need him, and a Republican Senate in Washington - [**will you help Team Graham accomplish both?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61837123:szFHkJDYN:m:1:877327319:9ED0806950AB31CE543DF32E787689DD:r)

Thanks,

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61837123:szFHkJDYN:m:1:877327319:9ED0806950AB31CE543DF32E787689DD:r)
Lindsey Graham

[**STAND WITH TRUMP ->**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61837123:szFHkJDYN:m:1:877327319:9ED0806950AB31CE543DF32E787689DD:r)
---

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61837124:szFHkJDYN:m:1:877327319:9ED0806950AB31CE543DF32E787689DD:r)
For text updates from Team Graham, **[click this link to subscribe!](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61837124:szFHkJDYN:m:1:877327319:9ED0806950AB31CE543DF32E787689DD:r)**

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61837125:szFHkJDYN:m:1:877327319:9ED0806950AB31CE543DF32E787689DD:r)
In the United States Senate, South Carolina's Lindsey Graham has earned a reputation as a conservative, a problem-solver, and a leader who gets things done. He is a great friend to our men and women serving in uniform, a respected voice on national security matters, a leading advocate for cutting the out-of-control spending in Washington, and a champion for confirming conservative judges.

| [** Support Senator Graham! **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61837125:szFHkJDYN:m:1:877327319:9ED0806950AB31CE543DF32E787689DD:r)
---

We want to make sure you're a proud member of Team Graham, and we don't want to bother you. To receive only the most important emails, please [click here.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61837126:szFHkJDYN:m:1:877327319:9ED0806950AB31CE543DF32E787689DD:r) We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, please [click here](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oszFHkJDYN).

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61837127:szFHkJDYN:m:1:877327319:9ED0806950AB31CE543DF32E787689DD:r) | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61837128:szFHkJDYN:m:1:877327319:9ED0806950AB31CE543DF32E787689DD:r) | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61837129:szFHkJDYN:m:1:877327319:9ED0806950AB31CE543DF32E787689DD:r) | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61837130:szFHkJDYN:m:1:877327319:9ED0806950AB31CE543DF32E787689DD:r)

name: Nathan, American Federation for Children
subject: Sign this card to Governor DeSantis?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Federation for Children
body:
Friend, this victory is monumental and should be recognized as such. That’s why our team has put together this thank you...

| | | ****
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5s3bq42g6ocdcggsn6ong946v19jht4j7hivdj8_)
---
| | **ALERT: GOVERNOR DESANTIS SIGNS EDUCATION FREEDOM FOR EVERY FAMILY INTO LAW** **[_Sign our card to Governor DeSantis thanking him for expanding school choice to every family in Florida._](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9q1op3o0thk7cb59j0jo2ei5o2igop0fnkh1q4o_)** **SIGN HERE:**
---
[**X ––––––––––**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zapnjh7j9l1i0b7u3ngsk0h0io7p55g6gtldqgfg_)
---
| | Hi Friend, I’m Nathan Cunneen, a communications strategist here at the American Federation for Children. Before this, I was a school choice beneficiary in Florida, spending eleven years as a recipient of the Florida Tax Credit Scholarship program. Access to a quality education changed my life, allowing me to be the first person in my family to graduate from college. That’s why I’m so excited to see Governor DeSantis expand school choice to every family in Florida so they can receive the life-changing education I did. **This victory is monumental and should be recognized as such.** Our team has put together this **[_thank you card_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zm8o6eb9caa2viru8aciif6nu2e13guj06k9kmtg_)** to Governor DeSantis and the Florida Legislature for a job well done. **[_Friend, will you sign our card and thank them for their hard work?_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z51enl59am1pihsbbqi1pj2mockbcsnddq8p96do_)**
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zr486962vmrlvm19vvsoiknl8j34nemu9ta57kao_)
---
| | Friend, I’m proud to work with the American Federation for Children and help lead the movement to fund students like me, instead of broken systems. Please take a second to support our critical work by **[_signing a card_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqltrj8mhmn0gj0q7dfu1mq3raj37r91q202h608_)** to Governor DeSantis and the Florida Legislature. Thank you,
Nathan Cunneen
Communications Strategist
American Federation for Children
---

name: SmartAsset
subject: Average Retirement Savings By Age: Are You Normal?
body:
Many Americans worry they’re not saving enough for retirement, and rightfully so.

| | | |
---
|
# Average Retirement Savings By Age: Are You Normal?
---
| Research behind how much Americans save, and who feels most confident about their plan
---
| | |
---
| Many Americans worry they’re not saving enough for retirement, and rightfully so.

The National Institute of Retirement Security reports: Approximately 40 million households have no retirement savings.1

It’s never too late to get started. Although results are never guaranteed and risks are involved, [well-managed investments may potentially compound over time.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zt2ftjcjc0jam003f8d1ijprfuqlehq8jbh7ej6g_rp22sh2s8i66o71cjh64ob1cjh2bs)

Fidelity reported in May 2022 that the average 401(k) balance for those who've been saving for over 10 years averaged over $380,000.2

[Find out the recommended savings for your age here.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z63c85s1494ft769a04aq1lfjpcjlbe03vfeu968_rp22sh2s8i66o71cjh64ob1cjh2bs)

Of course, saving for retirement is different for everyone. If you feel like you're behind in savings, want to make sure you're on track, or want to find investment vehicles to help you save more, talking to an advisor can help you [set and execute a retirement plan.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zc1psqhqf7e55dgo9kpasenpv6rvai3msm0ftp80_rp22sh2s8i66o71cjh64ob1cjh2bs)

Not sure where to start? We created [a free quiz](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0m48jtnno181756l3llmustu6p03r6a68kocfeo_rp22sh2s8i66o71cjh64ob1cjh2bs) to help Americans find vetted financial advisors who serve your area, obligated to work in your best interest. It's never too late to get your finances straight.

[Get your financial advisor matches today »](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ztqqam0kic2etfnj3q346fpd0oelaqcm1ftb1f88_rp22sh2s8i66o71cjh64ob1cjh2bs)

Biden has presided over sky-high inflation, massive interest rate hikes, and unprecedented government spending.

name: Don Huffines
subject: Abolish Occupational Licenses
body:
In order to achieve unimaginable prosperity and liberty in Texas, we must eliminate occupational licensing and trust the interests of millions of producers and consumers through voluntary exchange in the free market.
No images? [Click here](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-e-zwudky-yuddtktydi-p/) [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zwudky-yuddtktydi-r/) **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE** Press Manager
Contact: [Press@HuffinesLiberty.com](mailto:Press@HuffinesLiberty.com)
## **Abolish Occupational Licenses**
## _" To achieve unimaginable prosperity and liberty in Texas, we must eliminate occupational licensing and trust the interests of millions of producers and consumers through voluntary exchange in the free market."_
[](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zwudky-yuddtktydi-y/) DALLAS, TX, May 23, 2023 -- Occupational licensing in Texas has largely become an exercise in economic protectionism for those engaged in occupations. This approach developed in the Roman Empire and became established in Western culture during the Medieval Period. Rather than the ancient approach, which focused on consumer safety, protection of property, and restitution, occupational licensing today primarily focuses on increasing the wages of those in regulated occupations. This shift has resulted in higher consumer costs, reduced competition and job creation, and reduced dynamism in the Texas economy.An example of this is the case of Ron Hines, a Texas veterinarian who dispenses advice to pet owners online because his veterinary practice is limited because of a disability. In 2012, the Texas State Board of Veterinary Medical Examiners attempted to close his online advice service even though there were no allegations of harm to animals. Instead, the damage appears to have been the competition he represented to other veterinarians. His case is still pending before the courts more than a decade later.In [a review of 38 occupational groups](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zwudky-yuddtktydi-j/) licensed or otherwise regulated by the Texas Department of Licensing and Regulation (TDLR), the Huffines Liberty Foundation found that consumers, workers, and the Texas economy would be better off if 28 were deregulated. Health, safety, and economic concerns associated with these occupations would be better addressed by informed consumers using voluntary market measures and existing laws outside of occupational codes.Reducing occupational licensing is about more than economics, though; it is also about liberty. Consider Shelley Luther and her employees, whose licenses were threatened by Texas Gov. Greg Abbott when she reopened her salon during the COVID shutdown. Or the 17 restaurants and bars whose licenses were suspended in June 2020 for operating above government-imposed capacity limits.The Texas Legislature should eliminate the licenses for the 28 occupations identified in this study. Yet there are many other regulated occupations in Texas besides those at TDLR, such as teachers, plumbers, electricians, real estate agents and brokers, liquor store operators, and auto dealers. [Read Paper](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zwudky-yuddtktydi-t/) The Huffines Liberty Foundation is a 501(c)(3) non-profit, non-partisan research institute. Our mission is to advance the cause of **liberty** , **prosperity** , and **virtue** in the State of Texas by educating and equipping citizens so they may hold their elected officials accountable and better informed to tackle the toughest challenges.###
### _Help us advance liberty and prosperity in Texas:_
[Donate](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zwudky-yuddtktydi-h/) [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zwudky-yuddtktydi-k/)[](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zwudky-yuddtktydi-u/)[](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zwudky-yuddtktydi-o/) | [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zwudky-yuddtktydi-b/) | [ Share ](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-fb-zwudky-yuddtktydi-x/) | [ Tweet ](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-tw-zwudky-yuddtktydi-f/) | [ Forward ](https://huffineslibertyfoundation.forwardtomyfriend.com/t-yuddtktydi-17329976-zwudky-l-z)
---|---|---
[www.HuffinesLiberty.com](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zwudky-yuddtktydi-n/)[info@HuffinesLiberty.com](mailto:info@huffinesliberty.com)
(214) 526-3000 The Huffines Liberty Foundation is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization. Contributions are tax-deductible.
By completing forms on this website, you agree to receive marketing and communications from the Huffines Liberty Foundation. [Preferences](https://huffineslibertyfoundation.updatemyprofile.com/t-zwudky-17329976-yuddtktydi-v) | [Unsubscribe](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-u-zwudky-yuddtktydi-e/)

body:
The FBI launched the investigation with ZERO justification.

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=3217433af1f346afaeb0e541f36ccb99&_e=CHArKFqNa9YEpmKm6sAGtQhNMc4toiQvR5PAGtjFJn01ohCCi9cvQdeO8vowWvYPOEEMm9apkrsKflug9ZAnhI5Yo8bbUhojKIf64bYyBZedJg4raTQ112XRRAxwqEN4MLAFatBVImtd7l8eI7XeDcNEgdkB_I6wHoTXQM4Pc3aVlILkL7euuVv44VgyESl9zQOzqDQdwWWDx18cESIjAD52T6YMnxOoLZESEVaScop0ckrWjx-sakHemYB7Uted)

Hello Friend,

The Durham Report reveals what we knew all along - **Russiagate is a political crime syndicate, the FBI rigged our elections, and they unlawfully targeted President Trump.**

_The FBI launched the investigation with**ZERO justification**._ Even CNN has to report that on their fake news website.

It was 5 years ago that I led the House investigation into Russiagate with Devin Nunes. Our report from then says the exact same thing as the Durham Report. The FBI had ZERO justification for going after President Trump. But for 5 years, the fake news media lied to the American public.

**Make no mistake:** The DOJ and FBI conspired with the fake news media to bury the truth.

America cannot let this happen again.

After serving under President Trump, I created the Kash Foundation. **The Kash Foundation provides legal aid to veterans, American-first patriots, and whistle-blowers fighting to expose the Deep State corruption.** We fund litigation grants for individuals who have been wronged, release documentation exposing government corruption, and call out each government operator that betrayed their oath of office.

I am on a mission to _**defeat**_ the Government Gangsters who robbed the American people of justice.

Now more than ever, I am counting on your support.

One year.

| | Friend, **Today marks one year since the tragic massacre at Robb Elementary School in Uvalde, Texas. ** One year since 19 children and two adults were murdered while in their own school. We’re all too familiar with the epidemic of gun violence that plagues our communities and nation. So many young people's futures have been shattered by these senseless acts of violence. [Enough is enough. Urge Congress to strengthen our gun safety legislation through the Bipartisan Safer Communities Act now.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63735141/407844089/-1395873812?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NmMxZWQ1MS0zYmZhLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=37NVacXe2reOgAU_ZM-MrLDS1ob7Db91_5Ioinr_N70=&emci=5c36bc68-79f9-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=46c1ed51-3bfa-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=6787172) Through the Bipartisan Safer Communities Act, Congress can strengthen our gun safety legislation by:
* keeping guns out of dangerous hands

body:

The debt ceiling fiasco playing out in Washington is only the beginning.
Because what started in the 1970s (when Nixon took America off the gold standard) is now coming to a head.
The average American lifestyle is _**more expensive than ever before**_. And **it 's going to KEEP getting worse as our dollar loses its purchasing power.**
This should horrify everyone. However, people who will rely on retirement savings within the next twenty years, __should especially be worried!__
_Is there something you can do?_
YES! # Wednesday, May 24, 2023
---|---
**Good morning!** In today's edition, we’re writing about Ron DeSantis’ announcement of his presidential campaign, Tom Brady’s minority stake in the Las Vegas Raiders, and a professor attacking pro-life students and reporters. Let's all take a moment to appreciate aircraft mechanics on Aviation Maintenance Technician Day: thanks for making flyovers safe for everyone. ✈️ If this is your first time reading The Flyover, [sign up here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz79OwzAQgPGnsbdGF9_ZqQdvqFtZGSP_ObeHnBoFE8TbI7HS9ZO-4fd2Xa9Rmjxur3HjMGpfYx5y8Ar2ZOhkcDW6hMpsGDWH2Z3JIyCc9T3U5GtOpUTH0fns0RYbrYt2KW4mqFqCAYNgDc2AM8FELjufclqST2kpoAi4yOj79N7lMe5c208_eJ9y33QL_6MyF4WXr7EpfCHQeygf39KafLpFEdy2KO3vHc8pvwEAAP__iuxLCg) and make sure you don't miss our next edition. ## Ron DeSantis is Running for President
Ron DeSantis is set [to officially announce](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L2SpCAUQOGnwQwLLqAYEGxi1ptuaPFz7b67CJawbc3bT83EE5_k1PfnsT08ZSrP3_5A1_e6-djpjZswHDQHtcGQ3I4IqAZ0crJ6UUIJO7ycxUlaA17JtM9hN9YsexLTEo2VCpQcyIEAJQxoKZTUYtRTnJYQwxyWEOYkmBaYqNdr_Fup9Bfu-aO-8RpjPYbsXr2fjalfDFYG633fYwmx4N2-OoP1rJk6xcZgBQGaY8bYqRYG61ULT9h86dT4eWGjhKWTzzxQ4tEfp6dn4Zhr4cf_9o9fsXhrwNrhcum8KWdq08y0eB6e8vdQ_9nnMwAA__9zCWe9) his candidacy for President tonight, and he's going to do it alongside a major supporter: Elon Musk. The announcement will take place tonight on _[Twitter Spaces](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LHO3CAQBOCnwR2n9YLxuXCRhu5Pm9LCsP5NgsEye4fu7SOnTvcVI81ofn0tXy6mmL9_uoNm3sriPMc3LTBI1BLVgl2YNyIk1dHcm6eeFCh4dvu8DW5U2E8KJnIm-KCMcsH4VT1HDz50cUZABQPqHlSv4aGNN9Pq13Gd1nUMIDRQiFyux-8SM--0pU950_Xw5ejSvDOfVagfAq1A21p7vKrjEtznDgi0lcv1EWgztSrQniVFjv7mXSzQwnD7VqDqMscqz4tqDJQ5uiRdzuWVPR2UWR6v-kdyi8x0yb00yUU2x34XaEdAPU3KAIwCbXfN4WwxpVjNKDR8Hy6mf6P5_x_-DQAA__8LZXKQ),_ an audio platform within Twitter's app, and it will consist of a wide-ranging conversation between DeSantis and Musk. Musk is stopping short of a traditional endorsement, but he's expressed support for DeSantis--especially his no-nonsense approach to traditional media bias. Casey DeSantis, the governor's wife, released a teaser video yesterday previewing the campaign's focus. ## Another IRS Whistleblower Emerges

clean_body: Ron DeSantis is set to officially announce his candidacy for President tonight, and he’s going to do it alongside a major supporter: Elon Musk. Ron DeSantis is set to officially announce his candidacy for President tonight, and he’s going to do it alongside a major supporter: Elon Musk. | | | | | | Wednesday, May 24, 2023 ---|--- Good morning! In today's edition, we’re writing about Ron DeSantis’ announcement of his presidential campaign, Tom Brady’s minority stake in the Las Vegas Raiders, and a professor attacking pro-life students and reporters. Let's all take a moment to appreciate aircraft mechanics on Aviation Maintenance Technician Day: thanks for making flyovers safe for everyone. ✈️ If this is your first time reading The Flyover, and make sure you don't miss our next edition. How did we do today? mailto:editor@jointheflyover.com?subject=Feedback for The Flyover and tell us exactly what you think. We read every email and value your feedback! Want to follow along on Facebook? . If you enjoy the Flyover and want it to keep showing up in the morning, please take a moment to check out today's sponsor: . We appreciate the clicks! | Ron DeSantis is Running for President Ron DeSantis is set his candidacy for President tonight, and he's going to do it alongside a major supporter: Elon Musk. The announcement will take place tonight on , an audio platform within Twitter's app, and it will consist of a wide-ranging conversation between DeSantis and Musk. Musk is stopping short of a traditional endorsement, but he's expressed support for DeSantis--especially his no-nonsense approach to traditional media bias. Casey DeSantis, the governor's wife, released a teaser video yesterday previewing the campaign's focus. Check it out . Another IRS Whistleblower Emerges A second IRS agent is on the Hunter Biden tax fraud case. The agent was a part of the that was dismissed after the first whistleblower came forward, and he'll testify--along with his former supervisor--behind closed doors to the House Ways and Means Committee on Friday. The new whistleblower claims that he repeatedly raised internal alarms about the Biden investigation but was ignored by leadership. This isn't the only trouble Hunter Biden is facing this week: the mother of his child asked a judge to arrest Hunter for in his child support case. Tom Brady Becomes NFL Owner Tom Brady isn't ready to move on from football. He's a minority stake in the Las Vegas Raiders, and that makes him just the third NFL player ever to own part of a franchise. Majority owner Mark Davis says he's "excited for Tom to ." Brady is also starting up a broadcast booth career: he signed a 10-year, $375 million deal to join Fox's NFL crew. ➤ A 19 year-old man crashed a U-Haul truck into a White House security barrier, jumped out, and started waving a Nazi flag. He was quickly arrested and charged with threatening the president, among a host of other serious offenses. () ➤ A Democrat in the Georgia state legislature is torching her own party for prioritizing teachers' unions and illegal immigrants over poor children: "It 's ironic. I'll say every election year, I hear 'Black Lives Matter.' But do they? I see every other minority being prioritized except Black children living in poverty that can't read." () ➤ Larry Ellison , the founder of Oracle, is pledging millions to Tim Scott's presidential campaign. Ellison is worth $115 billion and is counted by Scott as "one of his mentors." () ➤ The Biden campaign spent three times as much on digital ads in May than Donald Trump has spent in all of 2023—including over $1 million in the first week. () ➤ Marjorie Taylor Greene (R-GA) was the highest bidder in an auction held during a House GOP weekly meeting. The item she won for $100,00? A tube of chapstick previously owned by Speaker Kevin McCarthy (and a dinner with fundraisers, according to Greene’s team). The money from the auction will be contributed to House GOP election efforts. () Flying together with: Sometimes you just - I know we do. With all that is going on in the world, you deserve to relax with a fine cocktail. With the Flyover's partner - - we will make it easy. Whether you have had a hard day, are celebrating something special, or just want to relax with a cocktail - The Flyover highly recommends you give Flaviar a taste. Flaviar is the world's largest premium spirits club. If you enjoy the finer things at fair prices, Flaviar is for you. Whether you like Bourbon, Scotch, Rum, Gin, Rye... Flaviar has the world's favorite spirits from the comfort of your own home. And Flaviar makes it easy and affordable. Not 100% sure? and check out all the combinations and pre-created tasting boxes. Flaviar makes it as easy as 1, 2, 3. Getting premium spirits direct to your door has never been easier. to see how! ➤ Adeline Johnson , a female track athlete for the Branson School in CA, gave a thumbs down after missing high school state qualification by one place; she lost to a boy competing as a girl. () ➤ Boxers Terence Crawford and Errol Spence Jr. have agreed to fight for the undisputed welterweight title. It's one of the most anticipated boxing matchups since the Mayweather/Pacquiao fight in 2015. () ➤ Carmelo Anthony has announced his retirement from the NBA. He was an NCAA champion, Olympic gold medalist, and a 10-time all-star, but he joins Charles Barkley as one of the greatest NBA players to never win an NBA title. name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: How you can help me get a prime spot on the debate stage
disclaimer_text:
Paid for
by Vivek 2024
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWE7vLJDN1

Vivek 2024

If we want to make the debate stage in August, we need to
secure unique donors to our grassroots campaign.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWE7vLJDN1

Fellow American -

I have a clear vision for how to
win the White House in 2024: a grassroots, bottom-up campaign
made of people just like you.

We're about to hit a major
campaign milestone - 35,000 unique donors in just months of
campaigning. Unlike my opponents who have years of politicking
under their belts, we started with NOTHING and have built this
movement.

So here's what I am asking of you
today: will you be one of the unique donors I need to get a prime
spot on the debate stage? Make it a small donation - every
dollar makes a huge difference when it comes to planning our
"Great Uprising."

As I have traveled the country,
I'm more convinced than ever that our best days are actually,
truly - not in some cheesy politician kind of way - but actually
ahead of us. That we are not in some inevitable national decline.

Be a part of our movement, Fellow
American, by becoming our 35,000th donor!

Thank you,

Vivek Ramaswamy

JOIN THE MOVEMENT
→

GET TO KNOW VIVEK:

Vivek is an
American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and
New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside
Corporate America's Social Justice Scam, along with his second
book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit,
and the Path Back to Excellence.

He has been a
prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory
practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he
calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes
with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do
through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a
first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he
often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that
"If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be
outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an
accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the
valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate
summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his
J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund,
then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where
his team developed five drugs that went on to become
FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded
Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct
aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and
others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth
of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the
voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading
companies to focus on excellence over politics.

STAND WITH VIVEK
➞

Paid for
by Vivek 2024

Contributions to Vivek 2024 are
not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax
purposes.

Funds received in response to
this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits.
Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals
without green cards, and federal government contractors are
prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to
collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and
name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200
in an election cycle.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/iWE7vLJDN1

with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

name: Sen. Sydney Batch via Blue Amp Action
subject: North Carolina Republicans are trying to ram through an unpopular, extremist abortion ban. The entire North Carolina Senate Democratic Caucus will continue to fight for reproductive rights
body:
Abortion rights in North Carolina
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T091536c8-9251-4dbe-81aa-971623837eea/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **_FIRST:_** North Carolina Republicans rushed through an extreme abortion ban. **_THEN:_** Our Democratic Governor Roy Cooper VETOED this harmful legislation. **_NOW:_** Republicans in the legislature just voted to override the Governor’s veto. This harmful legislation doesn’t represent the will of the people, and it doesn’t represent North Carolina values. That is why I—and the entire North Carolina Senate Democratic Caucus—will continue to fight for reproductive rights. [**We aren’t done fighting. Can you split a $5 donation between North Carolina Senate Democrats and Blue Amp Action to fight back against these extreme Republicans and their attacks on reproductive rights?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3d637374-e9fd-49b2-92cb-dbcb9361284c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for standing with us, _Sydney Batch_ _NC Senate District 17_
---

---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tef5090a8-e908-4ae0-b371-b70b82138753/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: Cancer Alley
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1787869?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Tell President Biden to STOP a new petrochemical factory in CANCER ALLEY!** **[Friend, please sign the petition now!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1787870?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) ** Sprawling fields of grimy pipes snaking between giant metallic structures. Noxious odors, smoke, and clouds of pollution hanging in the air. These toxic facilities have no place near our communities or wildlife. But a new proposed plastics factory in Louisiana would stretch more than 2,400 acres along the Mississippi River, **poisoning people already living in a region with ASTRONOMICAL cancer rates! ** The products this plant will churn out aren’t any better for your health or the environment. The plastics will break down into microplastics that fill the oceans and contaminate our food, water, and air. As the _**PLASTICS APOCALYPSE**_ worsens, wildlife can DIE by mistaking plastic waste for food. **The power to STOP this toxic plant rests with President Biden, but we need YOUR HELP to convince him. [FIGHT the plastics crisis and STOP this toxic plant before it’s built-in Cancer Alley!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1787871?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** | [ADD YOUR SIGNATURE](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1787872?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
The company spearheading this toxic plant is called Formosa Plastics. For years, Formosa**illegally released BILLIONS of plastic pellets into local waterways** in Texas. And the very proposed factory we’re discussing here was barred from operating in Taiwan, where Formosa is headquartered. Why should we trust that the proposed mega-factory will be any better?
Chemical pollution has been linked to **respiratory damage, liver, brain, or heart problems, and cancer** \-- yet Formosa is still willing to add more toxic pollution to a predominately Black and low-income community that’s already on the frontlines of corporate greed.**[Please, Friend, tell President Biden to STOP Formosa before it’s too late. Sign by 11:59 pm TONIGHT!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1787873?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) **
[ADD YOUR SIGNATURE](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1787872?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Marcie Keever
Oceans and vessels program director,
Friends of the Earth**
|

name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: Maybe I’m beating a dead horse
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jake Ellzey for Congress
body:
I thought I'd see a HUGE response to my first annual GOP Speaker's Survey, but it hasn't happened.

| |
---
| | | **THE 1ST ANNUAL SPEAKER'S SURVEY
MAY 2023**
---

Patriot,

I thought I'd see a HUGE response to my first annual GOP Speaker's Survey, but it hasn't happened.

This input is desperately needed to shape the party's strategy for this MUST-WIN election. Joe Biden and the liberal media hate that we are so closely involved with our grassroots base. This survey is the type of thing that gives him nightmares.

You don't have to write anything fancy, just tell me what matters to you.

So, I'm inviting you one LAST time today.

---
| **OFFICIAL INVITATION**

**Will you participate in my first annual GOP Speaker's Survey?

DEADLINE: MAY 2023
GOP PARTY ID: 01891
EMAIL: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zkvc46ohpdb64jet4udltbgc29jgb53qrullg45g_rp22sh2s8i66o71cjgm2o36cph2bs "dpwillis67@gmail.com")**

Please, I'm hoping we can rely on your expertise sooner rather than later.

-Speaker McCarthy

Congressman Dan Goldman, aka Silverspoon, aka Schiff Jr., is lying when he says I bought and paid for FBI whistleblowers.

name: Charles Booker
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
2022 was an incredible year for Democrats, Peter.

We held the Senate, minimized losses in the House, and made inroads in
places we didn’t expect. In Kentucky, we over performed 2020 margins in
over half of all counties.

And through the highs and lows, we built a movement together. We engaged
young people and shared hope for progress with millions. We built lasting
infrastructure for the progressive movement and created new voters engaged
in the Democratic process.

Despite our loss on Election Day, we can be proud of what we accomplished
together. And I am excited to see what’s next for this team.

But right now, I have to ask again for your help. In order to close out
the campaign and move on to the next chapter of our work together, we have
some campaign debt to take care of. [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18965?t=1001&akid=3263%2E346206%2EV_yG_r ]If you’re able, could you make a
contribution today to help us?

Our campaign was uncompromising. When we were making spending decisions in
the final days, that meant we prioritized communicating with as many
Kentucky voters as possible. We ran a bold campaign and we made bold
decisions. And unfortunately for us, that means we have a bit of a hole in
our budget and hope you can help us.

Thank you for anything you can do. I’m looking forward to what’s next.

Charles

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230524-3263-footer&t=1002&refcode2=3263_346206_V_yG_r&akid=3263%2E346206%2EV_yG_r

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3263%2E346206%2EV_yG_r

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
clean_body: 2022 was an incredible year for Democrats, Peter. We held the Senate, minimized losses in the House, and made inroads in places we didn’t expect. In Kentucky, we over performed 2020 margins in over half of all counties. And through the highs and lows, we built a movement together. We engaged young people and shared hope for progress with millions. We built lasting infrastructure for the progressive movement and created new voters engaged in the Democratic process. Despite our loss on Election Day, we can be proud of what we accomplished together. And I am excited to see what’s next for this team. But right now, I have to ask again for your help. In order to close out the campaign and move on to the next chapter of our work together, we have some campaign debt to take care of. [ ]If you’re able, could you make a contribution today to help us? Our campaign was uncompromising. When we were making spending decisions in the final days, that meant we prioritized communicating with as many Kentucky voters as possible. We ran a bold campaign and we made bold decisions. And unfortunately for us, that means we have a bit of a hole in our budget and hope you can help us. Thank you for anything you can do. I’m looking forward to what’s next. Charles Contribute to Charles Booker:

name: Andy Kim
subject: This is no way to honor their sacrifice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress
body:
This debt ceiling fight will end up hurting Americans one way or another. Republicans are holding the country hostage unless they can slash programs that help vulnerable people. If no agreement is reached and America defaults, people will lose access to benefits and services, they depend on – including our military servicemembers and veterans.

We need leaders who won't use our servicemembers or our veterans as bargaining chips. That's why we're working so hard to take back the House majority. The GOP has a tight grip, but together we are more powerful.

Can you donate $6 to help secure a majority that puts people over politics? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-andy-kim?refcode=2023-05-24-debtceiling-dod&recurring=&amount=6&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=17ada1a8-32fa-ed11-907c-00224832eb73]

A default would mean payments millions of military servicemembers and veterans rely on would be reduced or delayed. And without an agreement, 84% – more than 600,000 members of Department of Defense personnel could be furloughed.

In a few days, we will honor those who have lost their lives in service to our country, and the threat of cuts, delays, and furloughs is no way to honor their sacrifice.

Our veterans and military servicemembers have sacrificed so much for us and for our nation. They've had our backs, now it's time our actions more than our words say that we have theirs.

As the ranking member of the Subcommittee on Military Personnel, I am committed to ensuring that our servicemembers and their families don't lose the benefits and services they depend on.

It is disheartening to watch Congressional Republicans prioritize partisan politics over the welfare of our country's heroes. They hold a slim majority and have used it to place our country in an impossible situation where no matter what happens, people suffer. The cruelty seems to be the point.

We need a majority that recognizes the value of service. If we all work together, we can break through the GOP's grip on the House and take back the majority. Can you chip in now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-andy-kim?refcode=2023-05-24-debtceiling-dod&recurring=&amount=6&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=17ada1a8-32fa-ed11-907c-00224832eb73]

In the meantime, I'm working with whoever I can toward a smart and compassionate debt ceiling solution that puts people over politics.

More soon,

Andy

clean_body: This debt ceiling fight will end up hurting Americans one way or another. Republicans are holding the country hostage unless they can slash programs that help vulnerable people. If no agreement is reached and America defaults, people will lose access to benefits and services, they depend on – including our military servicemembers and veterans. We need leaders who won't use our servicemembers or our veterans as bargaining chips. That's why we're working so hard to take back the House majority. The GOP has a tight grip, but together we are more powerful. Can you donate $6 to help secure a majority that puts people over politics? [] A default would mean payments millions of military servicemembers and veterans rely on would be reduced or delayed. And without an agreement, 84% – more than 600,000 members of Department of Defense personnel could be furloughed. In a few days, we will honor those who have lost their lives in service to our country, and the threat of cuts, delays, and furloughs is no way to honor their sacrifice. Our veterans and military servicemembers have sacrificed so much for us and for our nation. They've had our backs, now it's time our actions more than our words say that we have theirs. As the ranking member of the Subcommittee on Military Personnel, I am committed to ensuring that our servicemembers and their families don't lose the benefits and services they depend on. It is disheartening to watch Congressional Republicans prioritize partisan politics over the welfare of our country's heroes. They hold a slim majority and have used it to place our country in an impossible situation where no matter what happens, people suffer. The cruelty seems to be the point. We need a majority that recognizes the value of service. If we all work together, we can break through the GOP's grip on the House and take back the majority. Can you chip in now? [] In the meantime, I'm working with whoever I can toward a smart and compassionate debt ceiling solution that puts people over politics. More soon, Andy Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: $5 [] $15 [] $25 [] $50 [] Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress.

**About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

In Michigan, Gretchen Whitmer and our Democratic majorities in the House and Senate are wasting no time getting things done. **[We need to double down today to strengthen our majorities in Michigan to keep up the work, so can we count on you to pitch in whatever you can right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63729474/407821718/-99881904?refcode=EM_FR_230524FR_N_TW_90DO_5_NG_N_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzcvMS85MDA5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMWE2YWM1MC0zNGZhLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=27c_yn0sM84tOFNi8WgqBeCzJIhkWrYmRe5RUQllDH8=)**

While right-wing opponents like to aim their attacks at Gretchen Whitmer, we want to remind you of what we’ve been able to accomplish in just a few months.

Gretchen Whitmer and our Democratic majorities in the House and Senate have:
* Repealed the state's 1931 abortion ban as well as its sentencing guidelines
* Passed a law that would amend the Elliott-Larsen Civil Rights Act (ELCRA) and codify into law protections against discrimination based on gender identity or sexual orientation
* Expanded workers' rights and passed tax cuts that put money back in the pockets of Michiganders

Meanwhile, GOP-led legislatures are dragging their states backward by stripping rights and passing right-wing laws.

The choice is clear here. We need a legislature that will continue to get things done, not pick partisan fights and pass laws that set us back.

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Please, Peter, give me a chance to explain
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Right now, we’re short of where we need to be to fill our budget needs.
#

Good morning, Peter.
In just a moment, I am going to ask you to make your first online contribution to my campaign for Senate. Please give me a chance to explain why this request — especially today — is so important.
Here is the truth:
One week from today, we close the books on our May fundraising deadline.
When it’s over with, we’re going to take a hard look at the budget and make some difficult early decisions.
They’re decisions about field offices, staffing, early events and more. Not the sexiest decisions in the world, but things we need to do to build a foundation for a campaign that can win.
Right now, we’re short of where we need to be to fill our budget needs. So we’re really hoping you can help us close that gap before it’s too late.
And when we win this race, please know it was the choice you made — today — to give that helped us make it happen. So please:
[**Can you contribute $5, $10 or whatever you can afford to my campaign today? The amount of the donation isn’t nearly as important as the donation itself, because it all adds up when we’re all chipping-in.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-1-may23.79Akcp&refcode=em230524-1&t=1&akid=654%2E734936%2EFTZTgm)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._

name: Jim Jordan
subject: let me be 100% honest with you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
If you know anything about me

| |

---
| | | This is Jim Jordan.

If you know anything about me, you know I don't beat around the bush. If I'm worried about something, you'll hear about it. Immediately.

So let me be 100% honest with you right now.

I just spoke with Majority Leader Steve Scalise and he told me we're in quite a bind: **1)** _Inside Elections_ released their first set of House Ratings and they have us TIED with the Democrats for control of the House **2)** The latest FEC reports show Democrats OUTRAISED Republicans by $12,000,000+... **3)** _**[We still need fifteen-hundred strong Conservatives to make a small donation right away or our Republican Majority will be in SERIOUS JEOPARDY.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z8u8lem0l16tdghoet64b7snaslrmu92fgsusu5g_rp22sh2s8i66o71cjgmeor2clh2bs "We still need fifteen-hundred strong Conservatives to make a small donation right away or our Republican Majority will be in SERIOUS JEOPARDY.")**_
---
| | | [I'M PERSONALLY ASKING: CAN YOU HELP?](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zrpmv8pthsh9o6gdrehcnej22v32ohmet06n1m6g_rp22sh2s8i66o71cjgmeor2clh2bs "I’M PERSONALLY ASKING: CAN YOU HELP?")
---
Listen, House Democrats exploited every ounce of their power to cover for Joe Biden and misled the public during every crisis they created together.

_If they outraise us and manage to destroy our Majority, the American People will never get ..._
* **ANSWERS** on Biden's weak response to Chinese aggression
* **ANSWERS** on President Trump's corrupt indictment
* **ANSWERS** on how Big Tech interfered with our elections
* **ANSWERS** on Democrats colluding with Big Tech to silence critics
* **ANSWERS** on Biden officials treating parents as domestic terrorists

The American People deserve answers, but getting them depends entirely on Republicans holding the House Majority. If we lose our Majority, we will lose all of the progress we made.

We need the support of our grassroots donors to prevail. **Without it, we might as well throw in the towel.**

_**[As I write this, we're falling critically behind the Democrats' fundraising efforts. name: Jim Jordan
subject: let me be 100% honest with you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
If you know anything about me, you know I don't beat around the bush.

| |

---
| | | This is Jim Jordan.

If you know anything about me, you know I don't beat around the bush. If I'm worried about something, you'll hear about it. Immediately.

So let me be 100% honest with you right now.

I just spoke with Majority Leader Steve Scalise and he told me we're in quite a bind: **1)** _Inside Elections_ released their first set of House Ratings and they have us TIED with the Democrats for control of the House **2)** The latest FEC reports show Democrats OUTRAISED Republicans by $12,000,000+... **3)** _**[We still need fifteen-hundred strong Conservatives to make a small donation right away or our Republican Majority will be in SERIOUS JEOPARDY.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zer983cqmsndsflqu5e4t3k4ubkt3ak3dac8e2p0_rp22sh2s8i66o71cjgm1pb1c9h2bs "We still need fifteen-hundred strong Conservatives to make a small donation right away or our Republican Majority will be in SERIOUS JEOPARDY.")**_
---
| | | [I'M PERSONALLY ASKING: CAN YOU HELP?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdhr919pmse0n9t2eq8hj5cfm5jmhapddou7ufoo_rp22sh2s8i66o71cjgm1pb1c9h2bs "I’M PERSONALLY ASKING: CAN YOU HELP?")
---
Listen, House Democrats exploited every ounce of their power to cover for Joe Biden and misled the public during every crisis they created together.

_If they outraise us and manage to destroy our Majority, the American People will never get ..._
* **ANSWERS** on Biden's weak response to Chinese aggression
* **ANSWERS** on President Trump's corrupt indictment
* **ANSWERS** on how Big Tech interfered with our elections
* **ANSWERS** on Democrats colluding with Big Tech to silence critics
* **ANSWERS** on Biden officials treating parents as domestic terrorists

The American People deserve answers, but getting them depends entirely on Republicans holding the House Majority. If we lose our Majority, we will lose all of the progress we made.

We need the support of our grassroots donors to prevail. **Without it, we might as well throw in the towel.**

_**[As I write this, we're falling critically behind the Democrats' fundraising efforts. I'm counting on you to make a small donation to help us catch up before our critical deadline.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjhg8drfrrk76p0mj2u9eqn4ac18e9clg5prem8o_rp22sh2s8i66o71cjgm1pb1c9h2bs "As I write this, we’re falling critically behind the Democrats’ fundraising efforts. I’m counting on you to make a small donation to help us catch up before our critical deadline.")**_

Time is of the essence and I'm really counting on you.

For America,

Jim Jordan

---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9g61qi7vdooqugkiqkpgl67m8jnfj3opg41mero_rp22sh2s8i66o71cjgm1pb1c9h2bs "Jim Jordan")
---

name: Chuck Schumer
subject: Your name is missing…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hi friend, it’s Chuck Schumer. I’m reaching out because I just checked our May membership list, and **I didn't see your name.**

Look: We absolutely _cannot_ let MAGA Republicans roll back all of our progress. We’ve come _way_ too far, and there is _way_ too much at stake to let the Senate fall back into the hands of Mitch McConnell and the GOP.

But that’s exactly what could happen if we don’t have _every_ Democrat with us in this critical fight -- and that includes YOU. **So please, I’m personally asking:**

name: Ashley Ehasz
subject: One year ago
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ehasz for Congress
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63731198/407828365/-945033547?refcode=fl_em_fr_20230524uvalde_ae_act_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTU3NzYyNC0zNmZhLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eh7rpVecdpKYIPj618oYEy2xF0ypnr9Ep4bP_btFY8Y=)
---
Hello, Today is a sad day. One year ago, our country lost 19 children and two adults to gun violence following a violent mass shooting at Robb Elementary School in Uvalde, Texas. **Gun violence is now the leading cause of death for kids in America. It's beyond unacceptable — I didn't risk my life overseas for our children to live in fear like this here at home.** Simply put, the increasing level of gun violence we’ve seen in our country is an attack on our freedom and the American way of life. As a combat veteran, I understand what it means to bear arms, and I’ve witnessed firsthand the traumatic toll of using weapons of war. No one should be made to feel unsafe — whether in a school, a church, or a grocery store. But recent events have proven that even moments that happen in everyday life — like knocking on the wrong door or turning into the wrong driveway — can lead to a deadly shooting. It is a disgrace to the families of Uvalde, Nashville, Sandy Hook, Parkland — the list could go on — that the bloodshed continues. **Republicans are more scared of the NRA than the carnage in our schools. But I'm a combat veteran — the NRA doesn't scare me.** If elected, I will work endlessly to support an assault weapons ban, hold gun manufacturers accountable, and do everything in my power to protect our communities and keep our children safe. Thanks for hearing me out. Ashley P.S. Yes, it’s the guns.
| | Ashley Ehasz is a U.S. Army veteran, Apache helicopter pilot, and proudly pro-choice Democrat running to unseat Republican Brian Fitzpatrick and represent Pennsylvania’s 1st Congressional District to defend our democracy, restore reproductive rights, tackle corporate greed, advocate for bold gun safety measures, and fight for working families across southeast PA.

I didn’t give Crooked Joe Biden his nickname lightly... _he truly is the most corrupt politician in the history of our country._

**Comer presses FBI over alleged informant file claiming Biden accepted bribes while VP** [Source: _New York Post_]
