name: Mayor Lee Harris
subject: We’re supporting immigrant families
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lee Harris for Mayor, Rajiv Singh, Esq
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/leeharris2022?refcode=email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/leeharris2022?refcode=email]
May 24, 2022
Dear friend,
In Shelby County Government, we have been working hard to make sure our community is welcoming to immigrant families. Last week, we had an opportunity to visit with one of our community’s most active non-profits on this front, Refugee Empowerment Program (R.E.P).
R.E.P provides after-school programming for hundreds of immigrant families every day. They are particularly focused on supporting the children of refugees who have arrived in Memphis and Shelby County. This is critical and important work, as many of these families are fleeing persecution in their home countries.
If you want to learn more about R.E.P, please visit their website at repmemphis.org [https://repmemphis.org/] . My administration, along with Commissioners Henri Brooks, Brittany Thornton, and other Commissioners have been pleased to support their efforts. Also, while we were there for this visit, we got a little video. You can view the video below.
https://vimeo.com/829539396 [https://vimeo.com/829539396]
As always, we are making the case in Memphis and Shelby County for
progress. This is a beautiful, diverse place. This is home.
All the best to all of you,
Lee Harris
Shelby County Mayor

---
Peter,
At the end of March – the first quarterly deadline of the year – we really turned on the jets and finished the quarter strong. And I have you to thank for that. I asked you for your support – and you came through.

I sincerely appreciate all of your help.

As you can see below, we’re going to need every donation we can get, so I am not going to be shy about asking for your help.
[](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=03111d9868&e=84ee529f47)
We’re finding ourselves almost a million behind Aspen Adam, and the liberal Democrats have committed millions upon millions of dollars to target my district.

They want me out, and they want it bad.

The only way that we will stop them is if grassroots conservatives like you, come together to say NO to their radical woke money.

[**So as we face our May Mid-Month deadline, can I ask you to chip in a quick donation to help us get back some momentum?**](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=9b3c5262a2&e=84ee529f47)

name: Conservative Intel
subject: Socialism vs. Free-Market Capitalism
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsleEmJDNy

The debate about socialism and free-market capitalism is growing
louder across the globe.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osleEmJDNy

The
debate about socialism and free-market capitalism is growing
louder across the globe.

While
proponents of capitalism celebrate the economic growth that is
created by private enterprise and individual freedom, advocates
of socialism claim they have a more compassionate system because
of its egalitarian nature.

But which
one has a more positive effect on human flourishing?

To answer
this question, the Hoover Institution gathered a
multi-disciplinary group of its world-renowned scholars to
investigate the historical record and assess the outcomes of both
systems.

And the
results are eye-opening.

From what
I'm told, you are someone who would be interested in hearing
these results, and that's why I'm emailing you today.

We
recently launched a new two-part online course called Socialism
and Free-Market Capitalism: History and Outcomes to outline the
findings of the project. And I want to invite you to take it for
FREE as my guest.

Inside
these 7 lessons you'll discover:

Why communism failed and liberal democracy prospered

Why political freedom and prosperity go hand in hand

How nations in the Indo-Pacific region view China and why many
are seeking their own paths between socialism and capitalism.

You
can activate your free online course right now by using this
secure link:
https://resources.hoover.org/hp-history-and-outcomes-signup

When
you do, you'll receive Lesson 1 by email within minutes.
Subsequent lessons will be emailed to you every 5 days until the
course is completed.

Please use this link to get instant access to your free online
course today!

Thank
you,
Greg

Greg
Stamps | Online Development

Hoover Institution | Stanford University

With
its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the
Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research
organization that seeks to improve the human condition by
advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national
security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred
years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have
produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the
United States and around the world.

Hoover Institution 434 Galvez Mall Stanford University Stanford
CA USA 94305

with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: It’s been one year since Uvalde
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We will never forget the innocent victims of this horrific tragedy
#

Friends -
On May 24, 2022--one year ago today--19 students and two teachers left for Robb Elementary School in Uvalde, Texas and never came home after a shooter opened fire in their classroom.
Families have been torn apart due to this tragedy. Nineteen fourth graders will never have the chance to grow up. Uvalde is a community forever changed.
We will never forget the innocent victims of this horrific tragedy whose lives and futures were stolen from them.
This unspeakable tragedy injected new urgency into our growing movement to end gun violence. Congress worked swiftly to pass the Bipartisan Safer Communities Act last year, and one month after Uvalde, President Biden signed it into law. It is the most significant federal gun safety legislation in nearly thirty years.
But friends, gun violence is now the leading cause of death for children in our nation. Our schools should be the safest places in our communities, full of learning and exploration—not the scenes of nightmares. While the Bipartisan Safer Communities Act was an important step towards a safer future, this legislation won’t bring back these children, or any of the 45,000 Americans who die from gun violence each year. There’s still much more we must do to end the multifaceted gun violence epidemic in our country.
With our continued efforts, I truly believe we can make our country a safer place, a better place—a nation where children don’t fear for their lives. I won’t rest until that future becomes a reality. Thank you for continuing to stand with me in this important fight.
Sincerely,
Gabby Giffords
* * *

**GIFFORDS PAC works to reduce gun violence and save lives by empowering voters with information and supporting candidates who will fight for safer gun laws. Make a donation today.**

We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=5761%2E3935704%2EPgBZ2U) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

**I 'm running for President of the United States!**

_I believe we live in the greatest country on God 's green Earth, Friend.
I believe that America can do for ANYONE what she has done for me.
And I believe I am living proof that America is a Land of Opportunity, not a land of oppression._

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63734326/407840514/-665437442?refcode=em-5.24.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYmEyYTE1MC0zYWZhLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v3ETPkywOyHHiLpMkPn0_z137ru0IbsrUl0aAJcq0IE=)

Friends,

I’m writing to ask you to send a donation to Eric Sorensen's reelection effort in IL-17. Let me explain why:

If you don't know, Eric's district is quickly emerging as ground zero in our shared efforts to retake the House.

Right now, Republicans are raising and spending record sums to flip key districts like Eric's. He was recently named one of their "top targets" in the coming election, and they're already going into attack mode against him.

**National Republicans have launched a wave of digital ads attacking him. This is the earliest we've seen the Republicans dump cash into attack ads in years.**

Peter, Eric’s only been in office for five months, but has already proven to be a strong champion for working families in Illinois and across the country.

We cannot afford to let his seat fall into GOP hands, but the reality is that his campaign will need to raise millions to win. I know how challenging that can be, but it's so important that we continue to show strength.

Today, I'm hoping for as many grassroots donations as possible to give Eric the boost needed to counter the attacks headed his way.

**[Can you send an $3 donation to Eric's campaign in IL-17? We can’t beat these attacks without you, and it would mean the world to Eric to have your support during this time.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63734332/407840518/-665437442?refcode=em-5.24.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYmEyYTE1MC0zYWZhLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v3ETPkywOyHHiLpMkPn0_z137ru0IbsrUl0aAJcq0IE=)**

clean_body: | = Friends, I’m writing to ask you to send a donation to Eric Sorensen's reelection effort in IL-17. Let me explain why: If you don't know, Eric's district is quickly emerging as ground zero in our shared efforts to retake the House. Right now, Republicans are raising and spending record sums to flip key districts like Eric's. He was recently named one of their "top targets" in the coming election, and they're already going into attack mode against him. National Republicans have launched a wave of digital ads attacking him. This is the earliest we've seen the Republicans dump cash into attack ads in years. Peter, Eric’s only been in office for five months, but has already proven to be a strong champion for working families in Illinois and across the country. We cannot afford to let his seat fall into GOP hands, but the reality is that his campaign will need to raise millions to win. I know how challenging that can be, but it's so important that we continue to show strength. Today, I'm hoping for as many grassroots donations as possible to give Eric the boost needed to counter the attacks headed his way. = | = Thanks so much, Tammy Duckworth | Eric Sorensen is a meteorologist born and raised in Rockford, IL representing IL-17 in Congress. He’s seen firsthand the importance of establishing trust with the community, and he’s determined to use his expertise as a climate communicator to fight for Illinoisans on environmental justice and more in Washington. body:
#
Peter — Jon Hamm's got a message for Missouri. [**See it in our latest ad:**](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33435?refcode=em20230524-3166&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3166%2E614464%2EWm8Ipr)

**_[Click here to watch a special message to Missouri from Jon Hamm, then chip in $10 or more to help me replace Josh Hawley in the U.S. Senate »](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33435?refcode=em20230524-3166&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3166%2E614464%2EWm8Ipr)_**
Any born-and-raised Missourian will tell you: This is the Show Me State.
But the only thing Josh Hawley has shown us during his time in the U.S. Senate is how to be a fraud and a coward — from skittering away from the same mob he raised his fist for outside the Capitol on January 6th to using his own power to strip away rights for everyday people in Missouri and all across the country.
**This election is our opportunity to defeat him.** Hawley won his last race with only 51% of the vote. In the years since, his approval has dropped to just 42% — and in Missouri’s last Senate race during a presidential election, the margin was only 2.7%.
That doesn’t mean it’s going to be easy — after all, GOP insiders at the NRSC haven’t stopped attacking me since the day I got into this race — but we really can win this.
**[So Peter, will you help us defeat Josh Hawley and flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat by adding your first donation of $10 or more to my grassroots campaign today? Your support right now gives us the resources to keep delivering this message to voters every day between now and Election Day.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33435?refcode=em20230524-3166&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=3166%2E614464%2EWm8Ipr)**

It’s about time Missourians had a U.S. Senator who will actually stand up and look out for them — not a fraud who’s obsessed with defining what it means to be a man.

Lucas

**About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. name: Tina Smith
subject: Uvalde
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
One year later |
#
One year ago, the Robb Elementary School shooting in Uvalde, Texas claimed the lives of 19 innocent children and two dedicated teachers. That horrific attack stunned the country and irreparably changed the fabric of our nation. The loss of young lives, brimming with potential, and the heartache endured by their families and friends have left an indelible mark on all of us. The memories of that day are still fresh in my mind. And the mass shootings that continue to happen in communities every day — as well as politicians who say there’s nothing we can do to stop this — fills me with a frustration that’s hard to put into words. Too many of our communities have been devastated and families’ lives shattered. We can — we must — pass common-sense laws that keep guns out of the hands of criminals and dangerous individuals. We owe it to the memory of those we lost and to the survivors who have endured unimaginable trauma to continue fighting for meaningful change. I won’t stop fighting to end the gun violence crisis in America, not for one second. **Our children deserve a future where their safety and well-being are prioritized over petty politics and campaign cash from the gun lobby.** I know you won’t stop fighting for change, either. Together we can forge a path toward safer communities and end the scourge of gun violence. So don’t give up, because we need you, and I’ll be right there with you in the fight. — Tina
---
Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
---
Tina Smith for Minnesota
PO Box 14362
St. Paul, MN 55114
United States

name: Adam Schiff
subject: A partisan farce
disclaimer_text: Paid for by UNITEDemocrats PAC
body:
McCarthy has already removed me from the Intelligence Committee. Now, it sounds like he’s interested in kicking me completely out of Congress.

| Peter, the Trump administration’s hand-picked special prosecutor just released a report that failed to find the deep state conspiracy theory Trump promised. Instead, Durham’s effort to discredit the FBI resulted in two failed prosecutions, and brought no new meaningful insight to an inquiry performed by the DOJ’s inspector general years earlier.

No one could be more disappointed than Trump and his chief enabler, House Speaker Kevin McCarthy. So it’s no surprise that McCarthy chose to deflect questions about whether George Santos should resign while facing 13 felony charges — **_and instead suggested live on Fox News that the GOP should remove me from Congress entirely. All because Durham’s investigation was a bust._** [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63735340/407844323/84499239?amount=10&refcode=UD_20230524_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ4YzFlZDUxLTNiZmEtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ZOCK5whte0Y39IInmMszOP2_B1c65wlxVzn2dgmZSRg=) _“It really raises the question about Adam Schiff...What he put America through, and**openly lied** to us? And now it’s proven in this as well? It raises a lot of questions about his, just his character, his standing inside of Congress, and **whether he should even be in Congress.”**_ — GOP Speaker Kevin McCarthy McCarthy has already removed me from the Intelligence Committee. Now, it sounds like he’s interested in kicking me completely out of Congress.

McCarthy’s constituents in California lack clean air and clean water, and lack access to broadband, and have hospitals closing down — but he can’t be bothered to do anything about it. He’s too busy trying to please the extreme MAGA crowd.

Well, if Kevin McCarthy won’t represent his constituents in the House, I will represent them in the Senate.

Now, it sounds like he’s interested in kicking me completely out of Congress. | Peter, the Trump administration’s hand-picked special prosecutor just released a report that failed to find the deep state conspiracy theory Trump promised. Instead, Durham’s effort to discredit the FBI resulted in two failed prosecutions, and brought no new meaningful insight to an inquiry performed by the DOJ’s inspector general years earlier. No one could be more disappointed than Trump and his chief enabler, House Speaker Kevin McCarthy. So it’s no surprise that McCarthy chose to deflect questions about whether George Santos should resign while facing 13 felony charges — and instead suggested live on Fox News that the GOP should remove me from Congress entirely. All because Durham’s investigation was a bust. = “It really raises the question about Adam Schiff...What he put America through, andopenly lied to us? And now it’s proven in this as well? It raises a lot of questions about his, just his character, his standing inside of Congress, and whether he should even be in Congress.” — GOP Speaker Kevin McCarthy McCarthy has already removed me from the Intelligence Committee. Now, it sounds like he’s interested in kicking me completely out of Congress. McCarthy’s constituents in California lack clean air and clean water, and lack access to broadband, and have hospitals closing down — but he can’t be bothered to do anything about it. He’s too busy trying to please the extreme MAGA crowd. Well, if Kevin McCarthy won’t represent his constituents in the House, I will represent them in the Senate. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Adam Schiff and UniteDemocrats will go through immediately: | = = = The harder that MAGA Republicans fight us, the more important it is that we fight back. name: State Freedom Caucus Network
subject: Life Wins in SC
body:
Your must-watch video of the week came out of South Carolina, where the legislature finally passed the Heartbeat Bill. A previous version of the legislation was blocked by the state Supreme Court, but with the court’s new conservative majority, the state will deliver a majority victory for unborn life. | | [Unsubscribe](http://links.statefreedomcaucus.co/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=1b6c04157c924c98ad4a6127d8bd1e6c&_s=cc0de74b60454a0aa81ffa951d9ee3d3&_t=EeCnbN4GAeZ-3Wrg3vc6heeQwSH7qp2L9IEFweTr4hpGnZIdQYYYYzDW7tmK_IGFMpH1oeL09iXHHhgh5TNzmz4_Ef8EK3NwQIx-kF2W65I%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.statefreedomcaucus.co/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=1b6c04157c924c98ad4a6127d8bd1e6c&_s=cc0de74b60454a0aa81ffa951d9ee3d3&_t=EeCnbN4GAeZ-3Wrg3vc6heeQwSH7qp2L9IEFweTr4hpGnZIdQYYYYzDW7tmK_IGFMpH1oeL09iXHHhgh5TNzmz4_Ef8EK3NwQIx-kF2W65I%3D)

|
---
Friends, Your must-watch video of the week came out of South Carolina, where the legislature finally passed the Heartbeat Bill. A previous version of the legislation was blocked by the state Supreme Court, but with the court's new conservative majority, the state will deliver a majority victory for unborn life. Democrats went ahead with a last ditch attempt to block the bill by offering 1,000 amendments to try and wear the other side down but the caucus stood strong for life. At the conclusion of 25 hours of debate, SC Freedom Caucus member Rep. Melissa Oremus delivered an incredible speech standing up for the right to life. She spoke from the heart about having a baby at age 16 and left every Democrat in a stunned silence. Watch the entire thing. **Arizona:** Despite having to deal with Katie Hobbs who has used the veto pen more times in one year than any Arizona governor in history, the AZ Freedom Caucus has managed to put together an extremely productive legislative session. As we explained in our last email, AZFC Chair Sen. Jake Hoffman led the way to negotiate a budget with the governor that protects the state's school voucher program (which Hobbs vowed to repeal) and delivered tax relief to the tune of over $260 million, all of which infuriated her fellow Democrats. The AZFC also successfully pushed forward a one-time $250-per-child tax rebate for Arizona families and even attached language to the legislation preventing Gov. Katie Hobbs from being able to take credit for passing it. If that didn't make Democrats look silly enough, they even at one point got them to reverse course and vote against a bill to protect tamale cooks that had passed with bipartisan support to prevent Hobbs from having her veto overridden. name: Shift WA
subject: The Seattle Times exposes itself
body:
We know that mainstream media sources in our state too often operate as a communications arm of the Democrat Party. | | [](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61840583:skF1yJDEN:m:1:2610672541:36A72D1E74A3993D9130B78549381BDF:r "Shift
Washington")
---
|
Friends, We know that mainstream media sources in our state too often operate as a communications arm of the Democrat Party. These same media outlets rarely criticize the dominant Democrat politicians in our state, and they often omit key facts from a story to cover for the far Left. A recent article in the Seattle Times highlighted how this type of bias finds its way into how reporters chose to describe a highly controversial new law passed by the state Legislature. For those who have not followed the debate, Senate Bill 5599 allows the state to hide transgender medical procedures for minors without parental consent. It removes parents' ability to intervene by allowing the state to hide the location of children from their parents. Democrats in Olympia passed this law just as nations like Sweden, Finland, England, and Norway have all backtracked from their embrace of transgender procedures on minors. Looking at the evidence of the devastating impact of so-called "gender-affirming" care on their youth, these nations have now passed laws protecting minors from what are now recognized as highly experimental and dangerous procedures. But Washington Democrats do not believe minors must be protected from experimental, life-altering medical procedures. No - for them, minors must be protected from the parents who might object to the irreversible damage. And the Seattle Times blindly agrees. Here's the story they ran: Look at both the headline and the lead paragraph to see how some local media see this debate. "Protected from parents." Let that sink in. For quite a while, The Seattle Times has revealed its extreme bias. But running this story to provide Democrats' cover on such a controversial subject exposes just how far they are willing to go to make excuses for the far Left. We here at Shift WA recognize that you can no longer trust mainstream media outlets to provide voters with the whole story during election season. That's why we are again working to put together a voters' guide with questions to ask candidates. **During the next few days, we 'll be asking for your assistance selecting questions to ask. [But we need your help in other ways.](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61840584:skF1yJDEN:m:1:2610672541:36A72D1E74A3993D9130B78549381BDF:r)** Our efforts depend entirely on the support of readers like you. **_[Will you consider contributing $100, $50, or even $25 today?](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61840584:skF1yJDEN:m:1:2610672541:36A72D1E74A3993D9130B78549381BDF:r)_** **_[Your contribution will be put to good use.](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61840584:skF1yJDEN:m:1:2610672541:36A72D1E74A3993D9130B78549381BDF:r)_** Thank you, The Shift WA team | [ DONATE ](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61840585:skF1yJDEN:m:1:2610672541:36A72D1E74A3993D9130B78549381BDF:r)
---
|
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com) and sent from Shift Washington. If you would like to send this message to some of your friends, you can [click here](http://click.shiftwa.org/forwardthis/ft.php?mID=14208181&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&ch=49000b887de404a22f48ed48dd2d4356&schema=echo3) to do so.

You can also stay up to date on our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following us on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/shiftwa/) & [Twitter](https://twitter.com/ShiftWA). If you believe you received this message in error or no longer wish to receive emails from Shift Washington, [click to unsubscribe](http://click.shiftwa.org/p/oskF1yJDEN).

That's why I'm running. I'm done with politics that divide us. And I know a lot of us feel the same way.
**Our campaign for Michigan's 1st Congressional District is off to a strong start. And speaking with Mike and voters across the district is part of how we build on that.**

Thanks for all your support – it's making a difference,
Callie Barr
Candidate for Michigan's 1st Congressional District

name: Melinda Shaw
subject: Thrown in jail for taking a criminal off the streets?
body:
My name is Melinda Shaw, and I’m the proud wife of Deputy Michael Shaw

| |
---
| | Dear Friend, My name is Melinda Shaw, and I’m the proud wife of Deputy Michael Shaw of the Bladen County Sheriff’s Office.
---
| | That’s Michael and me with our children in the picture I’ve included. **I know we've never met – but if you would move heaven and earth to protect your family, then I pray that you'll understand why I'm writing to you today.** As you may know, it’s a difficult and dangerous time to be in law enforcement. Officers across America have targets on their back just for wearing the uniform... it seems every time I read the news, another police officer has been gunned down during a routine traffic stop or ambushed during a call.
---
|
---
| | So, I knew full well the dangers of Michael’s job. We both did – though that never stopped me from worrying every time he left the house for work. I never imagined our worst nightmare would come at the hands of the local district attorney. You see, on October 8, 2021, Michael was involved in a **high-speed chase with a career criminal which resulted in Michael using minor – and necessary force – to apprehend the felon and now, my husband being charged with crimes that could put him in prison for many years... for doing his job.** It started when he made a traffic stop of a criminal named William Cain, a convicted felon whom Michael had arrested before. During the stop, Michael saw firearm ammunition in Cain’s glove compartment and that there were several missing rounds. As a convicted felon, Cain was prohibited from possessing ammunition – so naturally, Michael was concerned the suspect was also illegally carrying a firearm. Suddenly, Cain hit the gas and took off. Michael and his partner sprinted for their squad cars and followed. The criminal led them on a dangerous 11+-mile high-speed chase before crashing into a dark pond in a rural, unlit area. I’m thankful no one was hurt in the chase, but what came next is equally horrifying for my family. **You see, Michael and his partner apprehended Cain as he came up the bank of the pond and then tried to arrest him, but Cain decided to resist arrest while still near the bank of the water and a struggle ensued.** Finally, Michael and his partner were able to handcuff him at the edge of the pond after Michael was forced to use necessary strikes to subdue him. There was no serous injury, only lacerations. Cain was now in custody and the threat to Michael – and the community — was over. But three weeks later, the local prosecutor charged Michael with felony assault for that very minor use of necessary force. **If he’s found guilty, Michael could spend many years in prison. Locked away from our three children, Hunter (30), Anna Grace (24) and Harlie (13).** Friend, as a mother and the wife of a police officer, I’m used to planning for the worst. But I was in complete shock when we learned about the criminal charge. I used to imagine having to tell our children that daddy had been seriously injured and was in the hospital. Or that worse, he wasn't coming home. But how do you tell your children that daddy isn't coming home because our very own government is the one prosecuting him for doing his job? _My mind races at night thinking about what I will do if Michael is sent to prison.__ _ So right now, I'm trying to stay focused on the biggest problem we're facing: how are we going to pay for Michael's defense? Defending an officer in a case like this can cost hundreds of thousands of dollars. But raising three children on one police officer’s salary means we don't have that kind of money in our bank account. The answer to our prayers came when we received a call from Jason Johnson, President of Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF), who had heard about Michael's case. LELDF defends good officers, like my husband, who have been unfairly prosecuted for split-second, use-of-force decisions in the line of duty. They have generously offered to help pay for Michael's legal defense. But first they have to raise money for a trial, which will require many dozens of hours of legal research, expert witnesses, legal motions and all sorts of advocacy efforts. To be honest, Friend, I’m not used to asking for help. But today I'm going to take a deep breath and ask you one of the hardest questions I've ever asked another person: [**Will you help LELDF fight for my husband by making a donation of any amount today?**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z4i8lbbb7kfff7e5orar5ptn9ov9eob4vcpjbbvg_rp22sh2s8i66o71cjimco32cph2bs) Your gift is tax-deductible. And it will help us pay for Michael's trial and help other innocent law enforcement officers who've been unfairly charged, too. My friend, I know we've never met. But I hope you'll find it in your heart to help LELDF fight for my husband. [**Whether you can send $10 or $100, your contribution could be the difference**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zrak8rieur5oqbo4hgq40knfer76t4fe9r404l3g_rp22sh2s8i66o71cjimco32cph2bs) between letting my husband rot in prison for ten years for a crime he didn't commit... or keeping him at home with his family where he belongs. After the hell we’ve been through, my family will be forever grateful for your contribution and support. People like you remind me that there is still good in this world. May God bless you.
---
| | Gratefully,
---
Melinda Shaw
---
P.S. My husband, Deputy Michael Shaw, is a decorated law enforcement officer who spent almost two decades defending our community against dangerous criminals. Now, our llocal prosecutor is threatening to put him in prison after Michael did what he was trained to do to apprehend a known felon. [**Please help LELDF fight for Michael’s freedom so he can continue fighting for the safety of our community and stay with his family where he belongs.**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z2iti9nnphdd166jh27tj62k5hs5h6ipddkj253o_rp22sh2s8i66o71cjimco32cph2bs) Thank you in advance for your support.
---
[**Support LELDF**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ze1i5kerc26d2a8um223f1nbfole59d790kbf3v0_rp22sh2s8i66o71cjimco32cph2bs)
---
| | _More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit www.leldf.org. And remember - Blue Lives Matter!_
---
**[Make a contribution to support LELDF today!](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zkg0bmrdpftnr8ii68a6p9h3jb65ge2vr5qo16oo_rp22sh2s8i66o71cjimco32cph2bs)**

clean_body: My name is Melinda Shaw, and I’m the proud wife of Deputy Michael Shaw | | | | Dear Friend, My name is Melinda Shaw, and I’m the proud wife of Deputy Michael Shaw of the Bladen County Sheriff’s Office. | | That’s Michael and me with our children in the picture I’ve included. I know we've never met – but if you would move heaven and earth to protect your family, then I pray that you'll understand why I'm writing to you today. As you may know, it’s a difficult and dangerous time to be in law enforcement. Officers across America have targets on their back just for wearing the uniform... it seems every time I read the news, another police officer has been gunned down during a routine traffic stop or ambushed during a call. | | | So, I knew full well the dangers of Michael’s job. We both did – though that never stopped me from worrying every time he left the house for work. I never imagined our worst nightmare would come at the hands of the local district attorney. You see, on October 8, 2021, Michael was involved in a high-speed chase with a career criminal which resulted in Michael using minor – and necessary force – to apprehend the felon and now, my husband being charged with crimes that could put him in prison for many years... for doing his job. It started when he made a traffic stop of a criminal named William Cain, a convicted felon whom Michael had arrested before. During the stop, Michael saw firearm ammunition in Cain’s glove compartment and that there were several missing rounds. As a convicted felon, Cain was prohibited from possessing ammunition – so naturally, Michael was concerned the suspect was also illegally carrying a firearm. Suddenly, Cain hit the gas and took off. Michael and his partner sprinted for their squad cars and followed. The criminal led them on a dangerous 11+-mile high-speed chase before crashing into a dark pond in a rural, unlit area. I’m thankful no one was hurt in the chase, but what came next is equally horrifying for my family. You see, Michael and his partner apprehended Cain as he came up the bank of the pond and then tried to arrest him, but Cain decided to resist arrest while still near the bank of the water and a struggle ensued. Finally, Michael and his partner were able to handcuff him at the edge of the pond after Michael was forced to use necessary strikes to subdue him. There was no serous injury, only lacerations. Cain was now in custody and the threat to Michael – and the community — was over. But three weeks later, the local prosecutor charged Michael with felony assault for that very minor use of necessary force. If he’s found guilty, Michael could spend many years in prison. Locked away from our three children, Hunter (30), Anna Grace (24) and Harlie (13). Friend, as a mother and the wife of a police officer, I’m used to planning for the worst. But I was in complete shock when we learned about the criminal charge. I used to imagine having to tell our children that daddy had been seriously injured and was in the hospital. Or that worse, he wasn't coming home. But how do you tell your children that daddy isn't coming home because our very own government is the one prosecuting him for doing his job? My mind races at night thinking about what I will do if Michael is sent to prison. So right now, I'm trying to stay focused on the biggest problem we're facing: how are we going to pay for Michael's defense? Defending an officer in a case like this can cost hundreds of thousands of dollars. But raising three children on one police officer’s salary means we don't have that kind of money in our bank account. The answer to our prayers came when we received a call from Jason Johnson, President of Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF), who had heard about Michael's case. LELDF defends good officers, like my husband, who have been unfairly prosecuted for split-second, use-of-force decisions in the line of duty. They have generously offered to help pay for Michael's legal defense. But first they have to raise money for a trial, which will require many dozens of hours of legal research, expert witnesses, legal motions and all sorts of advocacy efforts. To be honest, Friend, I’m not used to asking for help. But today I'm going to take a deep breath and ask you one of the hardest questions I've ever asked another person: Your gift is tax-deductible. And it will help us pay for Michael's trial and help other innocent law enforcement officers who've been unfairly charged, too. My friend, I know we've never met. But I hope you'll find it in your heart to help LELDF fight for my husband. between letting my husband rot in prison for ten years for a crime he didn't commit... or keeping him at home with his family where he belongs. After the hell we’ve been through, my family will be forever grateful for your contribution and support. People like you remind me that there is still good in this world. May God bless you. | | Gratefully, Melinda Shaw P.S. My husband, Deputy Michael Shaw, is a decorated law enforcement officer who spent almost two decades defending our community against dangerous criminals. Now, our llocal prosecutor is threatening to put him in prison after Michael did what he was trained to do to apprehend a known felon. Thank you in advance for your support. | | More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit www.leldf.org. And remember - Blue Lives Matter! | | | ---|---|--- © Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | 2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303 American Defense News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

>
I still remember the day when I met Katie. My consumer law class was early in the morning, meaning a lot of students had their heads down, trying to avoid being called on. But not Katie. She was determined and ready to go. When the first answer she gave wasn’t her strongest, she came to my office hours and said, “Please keep calling on me. I am going to learn to do this.”
Getting to know her, I saw her bone-deep commitment to making a difference in people’s lives.
Years later, then-Attorney General of California Kamala Harris secured a settlement of $18 billion from our country’s biggest banks for their predatory lending practices. She called me asking if I knew anyone who could serve as an “independent monitor” and make sure the big banks paid up. I recommended Katie for this massive undertaking, and boy did she deliver. She served as a watchdog over Wall Street banks, held their feet to the fire, and ensured California families received the billions they were owed.
When Katie decided to run for Congress in 2018, I was very happy to support her. I knew that we needed more people like her in Washington — who understood the real experiences that working families faced, who had the courage to stand up to big corporations and special interests, and who would fight to make our government work for everyone, not just the rich and powerful.
A Democrat hadn’t represented her district for decades, but she knew exactly how to personally connect with voters, build a strong movement, and win. She flipped that seat, and she’s been winning for working people ever since.
Simply put, Katie delivers. She’s smart and she isn’t afraid. She stands up to Wall Street and Big Pharma, she holds fossil fuel companies accountable, and she fights to protect our rights. She is exactly who Californians need as their next senator, and I’m very happy to support her.
[_**We need her (and her whiteboard) in the Senate. She’s running a people-powered campaign just like ours, and I’d be so grateful if you could split a $15 donation between our campaigns today to support our fight for working families in the Senate. Every dollar makes a difference as Katie builds her grassroots team.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63752767/407907991/-158906450?amount=15&refcode=EMZ13Z_TAN_E_20230524_V1S1_F&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZmExNjkzNC02MWZhLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6BiohQXRxkleBi1QoJV7rq8iK7IxJ8b0WlsX8vNhwFo=)
Thanks for being a part of this,
Elizabeth

We'll miss you, but you can always [unsubscribe](https://action.elizabethwarren.com/p/mro2ZCtYVU2VH5ECFYaTwQ2?unsubscribedata=w6ttQ4CHSd5nmKxQBsfIreznoj5bFdX4p6LbcxmsAvs1jlEHPqTXjm%2FTboJcbrhiPd4F9jfecMnQwFwouMOMGTdasUWfbiUdrLz2OeZaW5p6UkUDBuWuD22Iryn2rSTemb%2BvBw%2FiwaxAq4uGl%2BciWOcQhYKPEwvaeDzNjrfQcvO0AaR196jxLitJIasTMJ21nUhmx0zp4ckBagRw%2BnAu0FMYiw37ntefyt%2FNc6TvY42OjwyX0dSq%2Fhua6KIbax8XyVwGgRqO9%2BPdBcBhfZWLoIRlzsi5BFtgB%2BuQJEvIt1Hl4rmB%2B4cHuEbH7NAOf%2BPcjMe6xSny6YPYOo1dU53VnwzmitQDMuLYYmFE9%2BEUltYiwiSe1RQVVqJAM9YVPyqUaukJVpmp%2FXUUctav%2FmB8OvQ5GlbVPhvKl3A6J3Rp9JY%3D).
clean_body: I still remember the first time I met her. | | | As a law professor, I had the privilege of getting to know so many brilliant, hardworking students over the years. And now I have the honor of supporting one of them for U.S. Senate. Her name is Katie Porter. Maybe you’ve seen how she wields a whiteboard. Maybe you’ve heard the tough questions she asks Wall Street CEOs. And maybe you’re ready to help send this courageous champion to the Senate, so she can keep fighting for families in California and across the country. = | If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = I still remember the day when I met Katie. My consumer law class was early in the morning, meaning a lot of students had their heads down, trying to avoid being called on. But not Katie. She was determined and ready to go. When the first answer she gave wasn’t her strongest, she came to my office hours and said, “Please keep calling on me. I am going to learn to do this.” Getting to know her, I saw her bone-deep commitment to making a difference in people’s lives. Years later, then-Attorney General of California Kamala Harris secured a settlement of $18 billion from our country’s biggest banks for their predatory lending practices. She called me asking if I knew anyone who could serve as an “independent monitor” and make sure the big banks paid up. I recommended Katie for this massive undertaking, and boy did she deliver. She served as a watchdog over Wall Street banks, held their feet to the fire, and ensured California families received the billions they were owed. When Katie decided to run for Congress in 2018, I was very happy to support her. I knew that we needed more people like her in Washington — who understood the real experiences that working families faced, who had the courage to stand up to big corporations and special interests, and who would fight to make our government work for everyone, not just the rich and powerful. A Democrat hadn’t represented her district for decades, but she knew exactly how to personally connect with voters, build a strong movement, and win. She flipped that seat, and she’s been winning for working people ever since. Simply put, Katie delivers. She’s smart and she isn’t afraid. She stands up to Wall Street and Big Pharma, she holds fossil fuel companies accountable, and she fights to protect our rights. She is exactly who Californians need as their next senator, and I’m very happy to support her. = Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth = | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren for Senate All content © 2023 Warren for Senate, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

name: Mike Pompeo
subject: Don’t Stop Now
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
We have a lot of work to do if we plan to kick the radical Democrats out of office.

| |
---
| | | | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c667941%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Du0ajPd0hUizNEMeXFLDIA&sysid=1)
---

Patriot:

**Our time to win is NOW, so we can’t let off the gas pedal.**

We have a lot of work to do if we plan to kick the radical Democrats out of office.

Through CAVPAC, I am committed to advancing the issues and candidates our nation needs now more than ever.

We need a renewed dedication to accountability, personal responsibility, and results. We must not become the left-following celebrity leaders with their brand of identity politics - those whose fragile egos refuse to acknowledge reality - blame shifters and excuse-makers.

_**No more following those who preach one set of values and live another.**_

---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c667942%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HwKKSN82awUuvYajmiFslA&sysid=1)
---
| | | [Support Principled Conservatives >> Donate Now](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c667943%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TNSP3xTs%2b064JsDeTR44cA&sysid=1)
---

The American people have made it clear. It is not enough for us to say we are different from liberals - _**we need to be different,**_ defined by our commitments in word and deed. We need true believers who understand the stakes of the fight and who are unafraid to act in the face of external aggression and internal erosion.

I believe - and I know you do too - that when you are entrusted with a miracle, you defend it. And when you start a mission, you are obligated to see it through. And more than anything, I believe that a conservative return to what matters - faith in God and a renewed commitment to freedom, equality, and our founding values will ensure that the American miracle remains powerful and durable for our children - and our children’s children.

**The fight has already started. **

We need conservatives and conservative leadership that can win it. I will be in this fight supporting America First conservatives armed with the mettle and moral might to defend our American values.

_**If you're still in this fight with me,[join me in supporting principled conservatives who are defined by their commitments in word and deed.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c667944%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JiPreHIJPiKIViIKqvrelA&sysid=1 "join me in supporting
principled conservatives who are defined by their commitments in word and
deed.")**_

God Bless You and God Bless America,

---

name: Ted Cruz
subject: The Durham Report is STUNNING
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate**
body:
| | | [](http://trk.tedcruz.)
---
Fellow Conservative, I’ve been at the forefront in the charge to expose the weaponization of our legal system. And time and time again, I’ve called out the Department of Justice and the FBI, the Democrats, and the corporate media for the bogus Trump-Russia collusion hoax.

Last week, special counsel John Durham’s extensive 300+ page report was finally released. **It reveals that the Crossfire Hurricane investigation into President Trump was a politically-motivated and completely bogus SCAM from the very beginning.** **Even CNN now admits that this entire affair was a WITCH HUNT!** We must fight back to EXPOSE and STOP the weaponization of the DOJ and FBI. 🚨 [_**Rush an emergency contribution to support our efforts >>>**_](http://trk.tedcruz.-XczH4p5aIm2o2Ev4fUcQ)
---
[**DONATE NOW**](http://trk.tedcruz.)
---
The DOJ and FBI were all too willing to ignore the evidence at hand. It was a grotesque abuse of power.

From the Durham Report:
---
_“The Crossfire Hurricane investigators did not and could not corroborate any of the substantive allegations contained in the Steele reporting.” _
---
This entire affair was a fundamental assault on our democracy from the very beginning – the Democrats were on a mission to destroy their opponents, and they enlisted law enforcement at the highest level to do it. It is absolutely heartbreaking to see our legal system politicized and weaponized by the left. **The Democrats and their corporate media shills can attempt to discredit the Durham Report all they want. **
** **
_**We ARE NOT going to let them get away with it!**_ [**_It’s time for EVERY American patriot to stand up for the rule of law._**](http://trk.tedcruz.) For Liberty, **
**

Friend,
In January, our team outlined budgets and goals for each month that are used to keep our yearly numbers on track. We just got out of a finance meeting, and it looks like we’re falling short of where we need to be for May.
Even in an off year, we work hard to ensure we can have Keith’s back. He’s fighting back against special interests and keeping his promise to help everyone afford their lives and live with safety, dignity, and respect.
We’re going to be brutally honest, though. To get this month back on track, we need to raise $9,800 by next Wednesday. Nearly halfway through the year, there’s too much at stake to fall short now.
But here’s some good news: According to our records, you’re still eligible to take advantage of your PCR. That means you can make a $50 donation (or $100 for couples) to our campaign right now and receive a **FULL REFUND.**
[**Can we count on you to claim your PCR by tonight? Each and every dollar raised will get us closer to our budget target.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63739616/407860584/1102460105?refcode=body&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS85MDI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZGEwYzc3ZC00MWZhLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dE6m2TNAZ47hWym2z-2yofiI1BmSV3TYOmZhDq5p1lo=)

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Will abortion be legal in Virginia next year? This sleeper primary could give the state’s conservative governor just the anti-choice Democrat he needs to attack women’s health care.
body:
Protect abortion in Virginia
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T042560e0-0b96-416d-860e-63f895a43988/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, [**We need to stop Virginia Governor Glenn Youngkin's sick, right-wing agenda RIGHT NOW.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdce6a975-7ba9-43ed-8bf4-2900dc1f4f46/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Youngkin just released a one-minute ad to announce his intention to run for President. It's great stuff, ya know, if you can get past how he fawns over Ronald Reagan, a man who's been dead nearly 20 years and not President since 1989 (pssst, you've had 3 GOP Presidents since, the most recent guy's name rhymes with "rump"), and the fact he quotes Reagan on standing up to Russia, while his party has lined up at Vladimir Putin's bedside._ **_THE KEY_ :_Youngkin's pushing a crazy right-wing agenda in a state he tricked into thinking he was a moderate. We certainly can't let any Dems enable Youngkin, as he goes full authoritarian on abortion. Yet, a Democrat, Joe Morissey, who was twice disbarred as state prosecutor and charged with "delinquincy of a minor" for a relationship with a seventeen year old receptionist at his law firm, is supporting Youngkin._** **Morissey's the only "pro-life" (read: anti-choice) Democratic state senator who supports Youngkin's anti-abortion bill. In addition to Youngkin, Republicans control the state house and we only have a one-seat, pro-choice margin in the state house, at risk in November. ****But we can fix it. ****June 20th, Virginia has its primaries, and we have an outstanding Democratic candidate challenging Morissey, former State Delegate Lashrecse Aird. ** **This AP piece describes how just about every elected Democrat in VA is supporting Aird:** [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7c8b7b8d-4ba3-4a38-934b-a92cd916fcfd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _**We don't know how the November general election will go, we could lose pro-choice seats, and we only have that one seat margin.**_ **_So why not double that margin, one month from today, to a 2 vote pro-choice VA State Senate majority, by removing so-called Democrat Morrissey and replacing him with Aird? She's made abortion rights the centerpiece of her campaign with a "Roe Not Joe" tour around the district._** **_Youngkin's greedy for power, so he'll fight harder for a profane, full abortion ban in Virginia to boost his presidential run. Yet, he can't do it without the votes. _** [**_Again, the primary is June 20th, but early voting has already begun! __Will you join Blue Amp's "Roe Not Joe," effort by supporting former Delegate Lashrecse Aird with $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to protect abortion in Virginia and the country from Youngkin?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7c6b0f5e-3f00-4239-b507-8abbcb1ce6db/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _We must stop anti-abortion extremists, be they "Democrats" like Morrissey or Republicans like Youngkin._ Cliff
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
|
---

1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---

---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4a3b7c70-6ac4-4f3f-b4cb-d21e95cacccd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can._ | | or

name: JAMES JUDGE
subject: Public schools are attacking our children
body:
| | | |
---
| Friends,
Our children are under attack by far-left Marxist revolutionaries, who are pushing their degenerate ideologies in our schools. Every day, children across America are being exposed to violent and pornographic materials in school libraries, funded by you and I, the taxpayer. Citizens Defending Freedom is fighting back. On top of ensuring that a pornographic book called "This Book is Gay," which teaches childrens "the ins and outs of gay sex" and "how to come out as LGBT" has been removed from schools in Hillsborough County, Florida, we have also launched an offensive against a second, lesser known series of books. "Assassination Classroom" is a series of books about students murdering their teachers. Those books contain not only graphic violence, but also strong sexual imagery. Citizens Defending Freedom is proud to announce that after an intense protest campaign by members of our organization, in coordination with our efforts to put pressure on the school through the media, the Osceola County School District in Florida has removed the "Assassination Classroom" series from all of its school libraries. This is the second Florida county that has removed these thanks to our tireless efforts. [Read about our work](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mJO6g6W5qVW0NoC0iLPmDyjOgI9uL_5uHZ6QqB5YCSXxUE-iYB-58IbrXVJz00Wno9cbp1iQOkG-9nuUWPI18Dg_XZok9hYueGrkRL1ssmYiznLEgi_029eLdcTniEHQRICaCdjwM5EyvxJUuaNKGvd8rNC4sgb-PqnJM4RineiU16_mxKhC0yt2sqaLqlt5BNbz0ZN4oMN4AHPIWzF4wII5PsER8PHPKJrsJqsxj8hLwtmu3MkXDR7B2AUWBnEzkyuEDVDnKcsG7nMdrTm9g-UCGSEJr2HQ&c=aJnKs60Eza9KbxvQ0iFOrMTUPabX56CjdFeNU0CuxgzbWujavnRPaA==&ch=WSA9wzrIArhsnAPzbOc-Hw33YPnuPiTGT6DQ4M6aY245ANuTXucW3A==) in The Daily Wire. In furtherance of our work, we are starting a [$50,000 fundraising campaign](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mJO6g6W5qVW0NoC0iLPmDyjOgI9uL_5uHZ6QqB5YCSXxUE-iYB-58IbrXVJz00Wn91s5mMn0B1H2sBceEZUqdFHZJz6ijlqB8WmmM4Ms3GbB6UpG--SMcuqBseRz82qJWsvQpxFQu6aiX-76gTi0Z6tHael2DPGTroEXKYMumNTAPEWSDhVvrGm7Maf3xo1Bn1MAA6IAJtY=&c=aJnKs60Eza9KbxvQ0iFOrMTUPabX56CjdFeNU0CuxgzbWujavnRPaA==&ch=WSA9wzrIArhsnAPzbOc-Hw33YPnuPiTGT6DQ4M6aY245ANuTXucW3A==) to put money towards our watchdog efforts in our children's schools. Our plan is to raise $50,000 over the next month so Citizens Defending Freedom chapters nationwide can take the fight to their local school boards, and ensure that smut isn't falling into the hands of children. [We need your generous support today to make this goal a reality](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mJO6g6W5qVW0NoC0iLPmDyjOgI9uL_5uHZ6QqB5YCSXxUE-iYB-58IbrXVJz00Wn91s5mMn0B1H2sBceEZUqdFHZJz6ijlqB8WmmM4Ms3GbB6UpG--SMcuqBseRz82qJWsvQpxFQu6aiX-76gTi0Z6tHael2DPGTroEXKYMumNTAPEWSDhVvrGm7Maf3xo1Bn1MAA6IAJtY=&c=aJnKs60Eza9KbxvQ0iFOrMTUPabX56CjdFeNU0CuxgzbWujavnRPaA==&ch=WSA9wzrIArhsnAPzbOc-Hw33YPnuPiTGT6DQ4M6aY245ANuTXucW3A==). Action is long overdue on this critical issue. [With your help, we can reach our $50,000 goal for the month and keep battling to hold the Marxists who have overrun our schools in check](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mJO6g6W5qVW0NoC0iLPmDyjOgI9uL_5uHZ6QqB5YCSXxUE-iYB-58IbrXVJz00Wn91s5mMn0B1H2sBceEZUqdFHZJz6ijlqB8WmmM4Ms3GbB6UpG--SMcuqBseRz82qJWsvQpxFQu6aiX-76gTi0Z6tHael2DPGTroEXKYMumNTAPEWSDhVvrGm7Maf3xo1Bn1MAA6IAJtY=&c=aJnKs60Eza9KbxvQ0iFOrMTUPabX56CjdFeNU0CuxgzbWujavnRPaA==&ch=WSA9wzrIArhsnAPzbOc-Hw33YPnuPiTGT6DQ4M6aY245ANuTXucW3A==). [By contributing $10, $25, $50, $100, $250 or more to our efforts today, you are ensuring that public schools will be held accountable for peddling pornographic and violent material to our children](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mJO6g6W5qVW0NoC0iLPmDyjOgI9uL_5uHZ6QqB5YCSXxUE-iYB-58IbrXVJz00Wn91s5mMn0B1H2sBceEZUqdFHZJz6ijlqB8WmmM4Ms3GbB6UpG--SMcuqBseRz82qJWsvQpxFQu6aiX-76gTi0Z6tHael2DPGTroEXKYMumNTAPEWSDhVvrGm7Maf3xo1Bn1MAA6IAJtY=&c=aJnKs60Eza9KbxvQ0iFOrMTUPabX56CjdFeNU0CuxgzbWujavnRPaA==&ch=WSA9wzrIArhsnAPzbOc-Hw33YPnuPiTGT6DQ4M6aY245ANuTXucW3A==).
Thank you in advance for your generous support.
---

James P. Judge National Spokesman Citizens Defending Freedom

subject: What's next for me...
body:
and an exciting offer just for you. | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/e402a479da3a/whats-next-for-me?e=f6564bbe3b)
---
|
---
|
---
## My next move...

Cable TV as a trusted medium is dying right in front of our eyes. Now more than ever, the voices that matter the most don't come from one particular network, they come from all over, including from content creators, independent media, and people just like you who are working together to make change.
**That's why, in case you haven't heard yet, I'm launching a brand new show later this summer and I want to bring you into the process.** Today, I'm excited to announce [the Sean Spicer community on Locals.](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=650da6dfd7&e=f6564bbe3b)
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=c37184eafe&e=f6564bbe3b)
If you join the Sean Spicer community right now, you’ll get access to unreleased previews of the new show and behind-the-scenes looks at the development process. Doesn’t that make you want to [become an annual VIP at seanspicer.locals.com?](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=8ed005a5bb&e=f6564bbe3b)
More than that, I’ll be sharing video updates on the election, exclusive commentary pieces, live Q&As, and more.
Just for my newsletter subscribers, you can get a 1-month free trial on an annual VIP subscription if you sign up today. [Use the promo code NEWSLETTER when you sign up at seanspicer.locals.com](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=1e6bfed330&e=f6564bbe3b). See you over there!

name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: What are we working on? An update from your favorite think tank
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/leadershipacademy-8133052?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,
**Have you ever wondered, "What does the Mississippi Center for Public Policy do?" or "What in the world is a think tank?"** Well, I'm here to tell you.

The Mississippi Center for Public Policy is a non-partisan, non-profit think tank. We are an organization that researches and educates the public about the benefits of individual liberty, low taxes, and light regulation. As an award-winning think-tank, we help turn ideas into powerful policy solutions that make a meaningful difference in our state.
---
|
---
| According to research done by ALEC, the American Legislative Exchange Council, Mississippi's economic prospects are now brighter than ever. **The policies that the Mississippi Center for Public Policy has successfully advanced are having a direct and positive impact on our state! Mississippi now ranks at 22 out of the 50 states.** Click below to read for yourself!
---
| [Read the ALEC report here!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=4568ed6511&e=5703353baa "Read the ALEC report here!")
---
| **The Mississippi Center for Public Policy has been the driving force for the changes that are lifting up our state.** From campaigning to cut the state income tax to deregulating the labor market to our campaign to combat Critical Race Theory, we are moving the dial!
---
| [Read our publications here!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=e30b866511&e=5703353baa "Read our publications here!")
---
| But we are also focused on the long game. That's why we invest in the next generation of leaders.

**Last year, we launched the Mississippi Leadership Academy, a five-part program designed to equip college students, high school seniors, and young professionals with the skills and knowledge necessary to be effective change-agents in our state.** Our first year was highly successful, with 15 full-time students coming monthly to hear professionals in the conservative movement speak, every student graduating at the end of the program, and 1/3 of the students were placed into internships and jobs with the professionals they met through the program! We will be promoting our program for the second year soon!
---
|
---
| Our Spring Speaker Series brought high profile speakers to Mississippi, and include Riley Gaines, Betsy DeVos, Alex Epstein, and Rafael Mangual, among others! Our speakers have highlighted issues that our state faces, from educational freedom to crime.
---
|
---
---
|
---
---
| We have just recently launched our "Liberty Wins" series, a new audio/visual campaign that highlights good policies in Mississippi and America. **Too often the media only points out the negative aspects of our state and our country.** In this new series, we want to show how freedom is still winning in America. We will be posting weekly videos, as well as writing op-eds, highlighting free-market policies and individual liberties.
---
| **A small organization, the Mississippi Center for Public Policy punches above its weight.** Our legal arm, the Mississippi Justice Institute, defends individual liberty, litigating to protect the rights of individuals enshrined in both the Mississippi and the US constitution.

Forward this to a friend, spread the word, if you would like to be added to our mailing list where you can receive updates every few months, please email me your mailing address and we can get you added. We are looking forward to what the future brings and what we can do to make the Magnolia State better for everyone!
---
|
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=1c77c111ec&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| | |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=dd24c7c6c0) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=dd24c7c6c0).

_Copyright © 2023 Mississippi Center for Public Policy, All rights reserved._
---

name: Emily Busch
subject: It’s been one year since Uvalde
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EMILY BUSCH FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | | [](http://links.emilyformichigan.com/u/click?_t=e92c5e294c1440b880a7ffdf88c24a48&_m=497758cfe6ad404f80274ac57a2abc75&_e=4YC7GENaYFN3dG3BnQCLyXp_HDN5gRuw1nwUmqd-J_l3RCdOTXZhYDxmYiZODNSD3u8-8u2dD4FcRFF9RRpFSIz6YIJd5qIfF1167HP-VwRKT0W6AKI08zw2GdDjM0k1IRYdBQZeY3eH3fJ9N65w9Sn99-NnXxsmo7HNGNuawsvPXBoIiDDS6At3wZI4PF62x-9l2zMW4XE7fNAoL38Yyw%3D%3D) It’s been one year since 19 children and two teachers were killed in the tragic Robb school shooting.It’s been one year, and not much has changed in America. Since Uvalde, countless mass shootings have taken place across the country, each one steadily increasing in fatalities. This year, we’re on track to have an average of 1 (sometimes 2!) mass shootings a day. How much more must we endure for legislators to wake up and actually take action, rather than providing thoughts and prayers?Gun violence is an epidemic in America. Since Columbine, our nation has endured over 380 mass shootings in schools alone. That’s hundreds of children gone, hundreds of parents left to grieve, and too many tragedies.**We need to take action now.** We need to take concrete steps toward passing sweeping gun reform legislation such as enhanced background checks, closing gun show loopholes, banning assault rifles, and investing in mental health services.In the wake of the Oxford shooting, myself and several others successfully advocated for historic common-sense gun safety legislation at the state level. It’s possible to make change, we just need leaders who will take the initiative to enact it. Think of how many lives we could save if Congress were able to pass legislation that prevents future tragedies.As we reflect on a painful day in our nation’s history, let us recommit ourselves to the fight against gun violence.In solidarity,Emily Busch PAID FOR BY EMILY BUSCH FOR CONGRESS.

---
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). Don't want to receive these emails anymore? [Unsubscribe](http://links.emilyformichigan.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=e92c5e294c1440b880a7ffdf88c24a48&_s=497758cfe6ad404f80274ac57a2abc75&_t=DGokZN8AZyFTjAXQRgrKMayfAa1UF4YauiP1GCgKfqzKKSLfmpP7hHyeuztiLmTcbee4QY67AqbSsCBw0mDP3ptyxXVg7HP8Eas76IVtplE%3D)
---
Emily Busch,

name: Jim Jordan
subject: Important you read this upon receipt
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress

**About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

subject: Mom SUES Over School’s Secret Transgender Club
body:
https://secure.americafirstpolicy.com/parent-lawsuit-em-1-av/?utm_source=prospecting&utm_medium=ha-email&utm_campaign=20230524_e000155-afpi_parent-lawsuit-em1-av_av_values&utm_content=av&recurring=true&amount=

Peter,

The America First Policy Institute (AFPI) recently filed a landmark lawsuit that could be the final blow in the battle to defend parental rights and stop the radical Left from corrupting our children in schools...

...my team and I need your help IMMEDIATELY to win.

That’s why I’m asking you to rush in an emergency donation of $25, $35, or $50 today. (https://secure.americafirstpolicy.com/parent-lawsuit-em-1-av/?utm_source=prospecting&utm_medium=ha-email&utm_campaign=20230524_e000155-afpi_parent-lawsuit-em1-av_av_values&utm_content=av&recurring=true&amount=)

Recently, my team and I at the America First Policy Institute (AFPI) filed a lawsuit against a Colorado school district for keeping parents out of important decisions for their children in their school and for grooming impressionable students to undergo sex changes.

In case you missed our official announcement on Fox News’ The Faulkner Focus, let me quickly outline the details of our case:

In May of 2021, two young girls were invited by their art teacher to join and attend meetings of their school-sponsored GSA Art club; later, to find out GSA stood for Gender and Sexuality Alliance art.

Immediately after attending, one of the girls announced to her family that she would be transitioning to become a boy, DESPITE never having expressed any interest in changing her gender.

The other girl experienced severe depression, which culminated in a suicide attempt in December 2021.

This corrupt, activist teacher even tried to convince these girls to cover up and lie to their parents about what was being discussed in these GSA art club meetings.

But that’s not all!

The school even encourages and allows children to adopt different names and pronouns at school and not tell their parents.

Now, Peter, this case isn’t just about this ONE school district.

This case is about sending a message to activist teachers, administrators, and school boards nationwide that this gross abuse of parental trust will NOT be ignored, and it will NOT be tolerated.

This case promises to be a long and expensive fight, and the truth is...

We can’t win this without your help.

Would you consider chipping in just $25 to ensure that we have all the resources we need to fight back and WIN? (https://secure.americafirstpolicy.com/parent-lawsuit-em-1-av/?utm_source=prospecting&utm_medium=ha-email&utm_campaign=20230524_e000155-afpi_parent-lawsuit-em1-av_av_values&utm_content=av&recurring=true&amount=)

Peter, let me introduce myself and tell you more about my background.

My name is Pam Bondi.

I served as Florida’s Attorney General and later defended former President Donald J. Trump during his impeachment trial in 2019.

Since then, I have joined AFPI as the Chair of the Constitutional Litigation Partnership.

And now, I’m leading the charge to defend parental rights in our schools.

I wouldn’t be asking you if we didn’t TRULY need your support.

So, before I sign off on this crucial message, would you consider sending in an emergency donation of $25 or more? (https://secure.americafirstpolicy.com/parent-lawsuit-em-1-av/?utm_source=prospecting&utm_medium=ha-email&utm_campaign=20230524_e000155-afpi_parent-lawsuit-em1-av_av_values&utm_content=av&recurring=true&amount=)

Fname, thank you in advance for your support!

For Freedom,

Pam Bondi, Chair

Constitutional Litigation Partnership,

America First Policy Institute

Copyright (C) 2023 American Victory 2024. All rights reserved.
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.
Our mailing address is:
American Victory 2024

Jamaica, New York 11432
USA

You can update your preferences (https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/profile?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=d0a5d6e084&e=84ee529f47&c=d7e6d5f8ea) or unsubscribe (https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=d0a5d6e084&e=84ee529f47&c=d7e6d5f8ea)

body:
Proud neo-Nazis are walking the halls of Congress

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63741688/407868549/966991095?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxM2NjMjA0Ni00NWZhLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1xqaISc__QgPW9HuIvzBvXMhBC-AA-TJS8fdV2Mx1XA=&emci=85771062-44fa-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=13cc2046-45fa-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=43402272) | Peter, I’m leading the charge to censure GOP Rep. Paul Gosar – and the reason is deeply personal. name: Biz, NDRC President
subject: When people ask me about the future of our democracy, I tell them this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
|
---

Team, whenever I’m asked about ongoing threats to our country’s democracy, I always say this:

**“I would feel a lot more pessimistic if the NDRC didn’t exist.”**

Since 2017, the NDRC’s grassroots movement has helped achieve the fairest congressional maps in a generation, defeated dangerous election deniers, helped elect dozens of Democracy Defenders across the country, and more. This work has made our democracy a fairer place.

**Still, the anti-democratic forces within the Republican party that seek to undermine our elections are not backing down. That’s why I’m asking our grassroots supporters to recommit to the NDRC’s fight for fairness as we enter the next phase of our work.[_Will you join us with a donation today?_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63741861/407869352/526184756?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230523_FR_5AA_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYyNTk5N2NhLTQ1ZmEtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=pi2bC3NzMe7NleBIXDmB6xQqq-MlydvMYMzpJhMg9Jo=)** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
