Friend,
Every Republican elected official should be UNITED in outrage at what the Deep State has done to me and the America First movement.
**But sadly, some Republicans want to shy away from the topic, because they say they get tired of all the Deep State “drama.”**
Friend, the weaponization of the FBI is one of the single biggest threats to our free Republic.
My home has been raided. I was framed as a Russian asset. My family and associates have been intimidated. My private communications have been spied on. I’ve even been indicted and arrested – despite committing NO CRIME.
And it’s not _just_ me... Everyday, hardworking, freedom-loving patriots are also being targeted for holding views that go against the Deep State.
**That’s not _“drama.”_ That’s a declaration of war on everything we value as Americans.**
_If these politicians get fatigued from a bit of “drama,” then the Deep State will eat them alive. They will not rise to the challenge to defend our Republic, and most importantly, defend YOU._
But even though the Deep State has put me through hell, I am ready to do it again! Because I love our country, and I will _NEVER_ let it get destroyed.
_It’s no surprise that we’re leading the primary by 50 POINTS. Voters know that during these dark times, we need courage – not cowardice – in the White House._
The time has now come to solidify our lead so that we can turn our focus 100% to beating Crooked Joe Biden and DISMANTLING the Deep State.

clean_body: . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . | | | Friend, Every Republican elected official should be UNITED in outrage at what the Deep State has done to me and the America First movement. But sadly, some Republicans want to shy away from the topic, because they say they get tired of all the Deep State “drama.” Friend, the weaponization of the FBI is one of the single biggest threats to our free Republic. My home has been raided. I was framed as a Russian asset. My family and associates have been intimidated. My private communications have been spied on. I’ve even been indicted and arrested – despite committing NO CRIME. And it’s not just me... Everyday, hardworking, freedom-loving patriots are also being targeted for holding views that go against the Deep State. That’s not “drama.” That’s a declaration of war on everything we value as Americans. If these politicians get fatigued from a bit of “drama,” then the Deep State will eat them alive. They will not rise to the challenge to defend our Republic, and most importantly, defend YOU. But even though the Deep State has put me through hell, I am ready to do it again! Because I love our country, and I will NEVER let it get destroyed. It’s no surprise that we’re leading the primary by 50 POINTS. Voters know that during these dark times, we need courage – not cowardice – in the White House. The time has now come to solidify our lead so that we can turn our focus 100% to beating Crooked Joe Biden and DISMANTLING the Deep State. Let’s finish the job we started, dismantle the Deep State, and MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! Thank you, | Donald J. at Florida?

It's because he HATES what we're doing in the Sunshine State.

While he pushes the woke agenda, we're fighting back with
freedom.

Joe
Biden is taking the country in the wrong direction. But I know I
can turn it around.

The
American people know it, too. That's why they are ALREADY voting
with their feet. Our population is booming in the free state of
Florida.

Now, I want to put that choice on the ballot-but I need your
support.

We
sometimes take freedom for granted. You should not do that after
the last few years. It is contested, and we have seen it wither
on the vine in many places in our country.

But
Florida was different. We chose facts over fear. We chose
education over indoctrination. We chose law and order over
rioting and disorder. Florida was a refuge of sanity when the
world went mad.

We
held the line when freedom hung in the balance.

We
showed that we can - and must - revitalize America.

I
believe freedom is worth fighting for, and as your next President
I promise I will never stop fighting for your freedom. Will you
fight alongside me?

YES, I'M READY TO WIN

And
we can win, Friend.

I'll make sure we have an economy that works for working
families, a secure border that works for our nation, and so much
more. The battle won't be easy and will require a lot of toil and
sweat to get it all done. I'm excited to share my agenda for
America with you over the course of this campaign.

But
here's why I'm writing you today, Friend: I want to ask you to
become a Launch Day Donor to my presidential campaign and join
our first team tele-townhall.

I
promise you, unlike other campaigns, our grassroots fundraising
program is built on the principle that our donors are a part of
our team, not our personal piggybank.

I
vow to treat you with respect: No smoke and mirrors, no fake
matches, and no lies.

Can
I count on you?

DONATE NOW

In
Freedom,

Ron
DeSantis

P.S
I want to show you my appreciation for standing with me from Day
1 of this campaign. It's why my team prepared gifts to thank our
Day 1 donors.

If
you chip in $47 by midnight on 5/25, we'll send you a
limited-edition Day 1 membership card and an invite to our
first-ever team tele-townhall.

Make sure you get yours now at this secure link:
https://dsnts.com/aexHpu

Meet Ron DeSantis

A native Floridian with
blue-collar roots, Ron attended Dunedin High School and worked
his way through Yale University, where he graduated with honors
and was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also
graduated with honors from Harvard Law School. While at Harvard,
he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During
his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq as an adviser to a
U.S. Navy SEAL commander in support of the SEAL mission in
Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military
decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service
and the Iraq Campaign Medal.

Ron
also served as a federal prosecutor, where he targeted and
convicted child predators. He was elected to Congress in 2012 and
advocated for congressional term limits and a balanced budget
amendment. He also spearheaded oversight efforts to expose
malfeasance in the IRS and in agencies involved in abusing their
authority during the manufacturing of the Russia collusion
conspiracy theory. Congressman DeSantis was also a leading
champion for America's veterans and helped enact reforms to the
VA and place an emphasis on mental health.

Ron
is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award winning television
host. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters,
Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as
charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes.
Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without
"green cards"), federal government contractors, and national
banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best
efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address,
occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose
aggregate contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. The
maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600
($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple
using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary &
$6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute
$10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident
(i.e., green card holder).

This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not
being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose
of making this contribution.

I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card
and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued
to another person.

I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this
contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization,
national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal
contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President

subject: City of Kent Council President Bill Boyce Endorses Carmen Goers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carmen for Congress]( "Paid for by Carmen for Congress")
body:
“I know she will bring a wealth of knowledge and experience to the position.” | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/0ac49316fd79/im-announcing-my-run-for-us-congress-in-the-8th-congressional-district-13550599?e=0e51d1e991)
---
| | [ ](https://mcshanellc.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ac7c5348d309f6a3d3cffd39b&id=f3b2d03dc8&e=0e51d1e991)
---
| | Peter,
---
| **I’m excited to announce that City of Kent Council President Bill Boyce has endorsed my campaign to serve the people of Washington in Congress!**

Councilmember Boyce has been elected to serve the people of Kent for eleven years and also currently serves as the Chair of the Sound Cities Association Public Interest Committee.
---
| [ ](https://mcshanellc.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ac7c5348d309f6a3d3cffd39b&id=ee536e13f1&e=0e51d1e991)
---
| **Councilman Boyce shared the following statement: **

_"I am proud to endorse Carmen Goers for her congressional race in the 8th Congressional District. Carmen is dedicated to serving our district, and I know she will bring a wealth of knowledge and experience to the position. As a Veteran, I also know that Carmen is committed to helping our military families and ensuring they have the resources they need. Carmen's decades of community service and dedication to small businesses are what we need in Washington, DC. I look forward to helping Carmen in her campaign."_

**_I am immensely honored to receive the endorsement of Council President Bill Boyce_. **Council President Boyce's leadership has greatly benefited our community, and I am humbled to have earned his trust.

I’m grateful for Councilmember Boyce’s recognition of my dedication to champion the interests of Washingtonians, and his confidence in my ability to effectively serve the people while making a positive impact in Congress.

As a future Congresswoman, I look forward to collaborating with Councilmember Boyce and other Washington leaders to make sure the voices, interests, and needs of the people are addressed at the federal level.

**[Peter, to succeed in serving as a Congresswoman of the people, I will need to amass a war chest to face off against the DC Lobbying Cartel.](https://mcshanellc.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ac7c5348d309f6a3d3cffd39b&id=45862c7364&e=0e51d1e991) [Chipping in even $20 today will strengthen my ability to triumph for Washingtonians:](https://mcshanellc.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ac7c5348d309f6a3d3cffd39b&id=d01f0db834&e=0e51d1e991)**
---
| [ENDORSE GOERS FOR CONGRESS](https://mcshanellc.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ac7c5348d309f6a3d3cffd39b&id=c4e390dfaa&e=0e51d1e991 "ENDORSE GOERS FOR CONGRESS")
---
| [CONTRIBUTE TODAY](https://mcshanellc.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ac7c5348d309f6a3d3cffd39b&id=537d6eafc5&e=0e51d1e991 "CONTRIBUTE TODAY")
---
| For Washington,
---

name: Debby Burnett
subject: Let’s honor them
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Burnett for Colorado
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2300-db-action?refcode2=logo [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2300-db-action?refcode2=logo]
Nothing I can say will bring back the nineteen children and two adults murdered in the shooting at Robb Elementary School a year ago, mend the physical and mental scars of the survivors, or heal the community still struggling in the aftermath.
What I say here does matter, though, because we must do more to prevent tragedies like this from happening.
As a gun owner who believes in responsibility, I'm going to say it: We still have a long way to go toward gun laws that make sense.
We need leaders willing to act with the courage of their convictions, and frankly, the polling data shows that Americans, including Coloradans, agree we need common-sense gun safety laws.
It’s common sense that we should have background checks on all gun sales.
It’s common sense that a person with a violent criminal record shouldn’t be able to purchase a gun.
It’s common sense that American parents should feel safe dropping their kids off at school, not live with the gut-wrenching fear that they might not make it home alive.
If you agree, I hope you’ll join me in committing to fight for continued progress and standing up to the extremist special interests that continue to profit from gun violence.
Let’s honor those lost with action,
Debby
Dr. Debby Burnett is running to represent Colorado’s 3rd District in Congress. As a veterinarian of 20+ years, she’s worked with farmers and ranchers across our district to improve their lives and their livelihoods. As the mother of a 16-year-old, she knows how to get 20 things done at once. And as a rural Coloradan who owns a small agriculture business, she understands what the people of western and southern Colorado need -- and that’s why she’s stepping up to give them a real voice in Congress.
CONTRIBUTE » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2300-db-action?refcode2=btn_biobox]
Paid for by Burnett for Colorado
Debby Burnett, PO Box 1761, Gunnison, CO 81230
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/mImAYSx62Eavny28XjqzSg2?unsubscribedata=vYEV6MkuucQb4DDKy4d9SVMICX6A5Z501q4isAxNdvjOFGv4br3YEVsHStQdhHvfU6%2FNgcxgQgUNPQ%2Bbuw%2BXGuXNIBVG0sg6Juru9E98KB6E1tbqtPIXaFGYNOayKMb7dpIhrvolB1pnLIURT%2FJq%2FsmS6lrU9qRijDUXoaro%2FF36KLZpSVby1Zf0x8But%2BrZh7b9Wd69edisydATcStJUlzSEzHUp9OFrfAwk4bCjQq%2B0aQby4GoXcd0R07yBdEstyB2P%2Bv5w%2BEAkkCwBceGaRa0GmUW3aWodVG1wm22yF7FQkkiCnS%2BAmacRl7wvqgRKcC5z76LgzS8BXicQEzEl8sSzQQlEadob%2Fw5Z67FNh0OQeh75izNeFA7tr%2FG2k62%2BQK9uhHu6YyYvasuqAsWJ69Gi2Vcy198kZ06zbdNhamLzO6kNoUzs4EauHdX23iA .

name: Mark Lamb
subject: Eight days before Christmas we lost our son to a drunk driver
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Lamb for Senate
body:
Yet, because of our conservative politics, Mother Against Drunk Driving has uninvited my wife and I from speaking at one of their events.
[Unsubscribe](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_s=2211464d784e434eabde887ebb66b5cd&_t=Aiaxj7jJbzZISc1RoFgQyiHY14ve01EKy3DXvVpRB_oNeLtSJHzIe2uN58K68RV-9FzUgbxg8aY2kQ8Ufoy9XH7I0O6JmXj0VGbzrz8p6CU%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_s=2211464d784e434eabde887ebb66b5cd&_t=Aiaxj7jJbzZISc1RoFgQyiHY14ve01EKy3DXvVpRB_oNeLtSJHzIe2uN58K68RV-9FzUgbxg8aY2kQ8Ufoy9XH7I0O6JmXj0VGbzrz8p6CU%3D)

[](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=2211464d784e434eabde887ebb66b5cd&_e=jEIYdVr8Nk1qMiL2bxUuKxRxfJYTDhWbcHK0U861mN_-94rO_LE6d9XW1V-9MOIQgq3WWA_Jrd_4JQJu1kuKknuKJm9Yl0Bwqw6ZLz6F77-xLu-7XZvlZRE1YLaIQD2q8QSK37p2GFXL2z6rD55NMIKW6NSjJ_n_gvbhTiHUY0r3wujIMj6SOhvZ228nazbraTHXyV7boRM5emHnn2IS6ZMoPhkuJKrShoZlxWuOuZRgTDa3V4RUmMhX-EpKnh1TIx0K6PraFUIRe4UcZK1g5B7mrUMh0J_NQ4s3UP72OoQ0fWfZMeX4uUenjrb2b_PQOiiRP2_P7QaAlUPjoBsVlLRJF3cRB8ODCe1c-TSFJSryd6UVOh9_ZcngmID6gFyHH7m5DYOHA8kX3PbbCXzOwg%3D%3D)
|
Fellow Conservative,

In December, my wife Janel and I lost our son, our granddaughter, and our soon-to-be daughter-in-law at the hands of a drunk driver. **I would have never let their tragic story become a part of my campaign were it not for the insane, woke policies of a select few executives at Mothers Against Drunk Driving.**

First, corporate America succumbed to the pressure of the woke left and disavowed conservatives. Now, it seems that nonprofit organizations, like Mothers Against Drunk Driving, are following suit.

**Let me read you in on what happened and why I’m reaching out with this story today.**
Recently, my wife and I accepted an invitation to be keynote speakers at a **Mothers Against Drunk Driving** event this July in Phoenix.

**We would have been the perfect fit.** Not only are we a law enforcement family, but we lost our kids to a drunk driving accident eight days before Christmas 2022.

Both Janel and I were looking forward to sharing our story. In my capacity as Pinal County Sheriff and as a father, the invitation meant so much. So, **you can imagine our disappointment and utter shock over the weekend when we got a call uninviting us as the keynote speakers**.

**The decision to revoke our invitation was purely political.**

**[I need your help to send a message to organizations, like MADD, who are bending to pressure from WOKE, far-left activities and canceling anyone who disagrees with their looney-tune out of left-field rhetoric.](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=2211464d784e434eabde887ebb66b5cd&_e=jEIYdVr8Nk1qMiL2bxUuKxRxfJYTDhWbcHK0U861mN_-94rO_LE6d9XW1V-9MOIQgq3WWA_Jrd_4JQJu1kuKknuKJm9Yl0Bwqw6ZLz6F77-xLu-7XZvlZRE1YLaIQD2q8QSK37p2GFXL2z6rD55NMIKW6NSjJ_n_gvbhTiHUY0r3wujIMj6SOhvZ228nazbraTHXyV7boRM5emHnn2IS6ZMoPhkuJKrShoZlxWuOuZRgTDa3V4RUmMhX-EpKnh1TrmFmphv6CGKaHXtRiim87dKbswWBaYTTLozvXVWooGvNOoXcoCRk5fgX_Kl1k86QSnjTIZ5c3OdJU2kK9vSYuD1Ahp0K9wTPabfHDhLCMkirP3yH9n7S3Jz0heSfzAlOuxToq-WJ9KLgrxWr6dOYgQ%3D%3D)**

[**ADD YOUR NAME TODAY**](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=2211464d784e434eabde887ebb66b5cd&_e=jEIYdVr8Nk1qMiL2bxUuKxRxfJYTDhWbcHK0U861mN_-94rO_LE6d9XW1V-9MOIQgq3WWA_Jrd_4JQJu1kuKknuKJm9Yl0Bwqw6ZLz6F77-xLu-7XZvlZRE1YLaIQD2q8QSK37p2GFXL2z6rD55NMIKW6NSjJ_n_gvbhTiHUY0r3wujIMj6SOhvZ228nazbraTHXyV7boRM5emHnn2IS6ZMoPhkuJKrShoZlxWuOuZRgTDa3V4RUmMhX-EpKnh1ToLFJWkbsPqCOrNKT3UJnxlYg8ugOSS2krKMmcE7QJZ2xFzj9Onya9j_WaB0Y2m0XrSpQJ-2UjQ49ogeZ2KASHAjIwyfRhiTD8Rz_sPk-f_Gj8kak2HCtUyWyihMbLYNA_-bRXbPxTH2XcR8lJ8vZvQ%3D%3D)

It appears that MADD executives bowed to the pressure of a few far-left activists and decided they would cancel me rather than offend a few of their progressive supporters. **Let me be crystal clear:** the people who aired their grievances against me with MADD don’t know me or my wife; **they succeeded in getting me cancelled by simply saying they were offended by some of the political positions I hold.**

**This would _never_ happen to a Democrat candidate for the United States Senate.**

**We must send a message that we won’t tolerate this anymore**.

Organizations like **Mothers Against Drunk Driving shouldn’t be political.** Period, end of story. But since they decided to get political, you need people like me who are going to set them back on the path of straight and narrow.

clean_body: Yet, because of our conservative politics, Mother Against Drunk Driving has uninvited my wife and I from speaking at one of their events. | | Fellow Conservative, In December, my wife Janel and I lost our son, our granddaughter, and our soon-to-be daughter-in-law at the hands of a drunk driver. I would have never let their tragic story become a part of my campaign were it not for the insane, woke policies of a select few executives at Mothers Against Drunk Driving. First, corporate America succumbed to the pressure of the woke left and disavowed conservatives. Now, it seems that nonprofit organizations, like Mothers Against Drunk Driving, are following suit. Let me read you in on what happened and why I’m reaching out with this story today. Recently, my wife and I accepted an invitation to be keynote speakers at a Mothers Against Drunk Driving event this July in Phoenix. We would have been the perfect fit. Not only are we a law enforcement family, but we lost our kids to a drunk driving accident eight days before Christmas 2022. Both Janel and I were looking forward to sharing our story. In my capacity as Pinal County Sheriff and as a father, the invitation meant so much. So, you can imagine our disappointment and utter shock over the weekend when we got a call uninviting us as the keynote speakers. The decision to revoke our invitation was purely political. It appears that MADD executives bowed to the pressure of a few far-left activists and decided they would cancel me rather than offend a few of their progressive supporters. Let me be crystal clear: the people who aired their grievances against me with MADD don’t know me or my wife; they succeeded in getting me cancelled by simply saying they were offended by some of the political positions I hold. This would never happen to a Democrat candidate for the United States Senate. Please accept my invitation today to We must send a message that we won’t tolerate this anymore. Organizations like Mothers Against Drunk Driving shouldn’t be political. Period, end of story. But since they decided to get political, you need people like me who are going to set them back on the path of straight and narrow. Losing a child is one of the hardest things me and my wife have ever experienced. By uninviting us to speak at one of their events, executives at MADD may as well have just poured salt in our wounds. name: Masha A., DLCC.org
subject: I’ll be blunt…
body:
We must give state Dems the resources to defend our majorities, hold the GOP accountable, and win. That starts with hitting our critical $150,000 May fundraising goal before our deadline in one week. | | |
---
| | Masha here, Senior Director of Direct Response at the DLCC. [In a moment I’m going to ask you to chip in $7](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zawayJU7NskUpAoU2FWeYrEVrmg704gBEN_dmOvXSpLBIdN27BOWSunPOLHGLlwQWMBB4CCeivSC0inRcCVM1To5fOAdY8xAq952AEsqLj6-ZiWyzCfIUxV7dhhOmAfk2a7PLM5dRbt8tEhNq9EMe5w94_qhX42Q04CBF6Z3LcKq3Aw8usIFAixcu_QkxIJ8NRVSBfDK8WEYHGB5hsBn3tVV6PSt3scfwZgu5BFEYy92EVlzvVwwwvRhmWUeprRPh_cZ24eE86Awm86lsZ7Oy6tbQhfxdIgP6XlBWwLzB8HfMp4SC_C5VJL0z5vPZsg_-htW4ywhfJduGHcarCqkKA_7ATb0ZPKZ8ixXrx21YTJ-ptEk3QrY_CAOLg6Sk63CgpcfO5QRFnbaM3F53j4aW6utrOwcaqstwWBnA14mvuI8UX6pgD0xAu2ikuzodjE7hllZSCZ0Nq2Er1KmqT-5zSOglFRXZuaCgIDzIkAx_N9yF6AnuC54xkaTp9i506h_7-mzKmcWNvHjajMSV6D0-f/3wg/mGNI2T4ERuGQ7Znf-8us2g/h0/RMcmKCnQc11pXlVta8-9zFDPDL1vHDtSGU0pvJoq4tI) – but first, let me explain why your gift today is so important. Over the next few weeks, Democrats are facing special elections in key states:
* In the Maine House, Democrats have the opportunity to defend a critical seat or risk the GOP chipping away at our majority.
* In Tennessee, two members of The Tennessee Three, Rep. Jones and Rep. Pearson, are running for their seats again after they were expelled from the House.
* And, in the New Hampshire House, where our margin is _razor-thin_ , there are two critical elections.**Democrats could flip the chamber _this year._**
****
It’s essential that we give state Democrats the resources they need to win against their extreme opponents, defend our majorities, and hold the GOP accountable. **That starts with hitting our critical**$150,000** May fundraising goal before our deadline in _one week._ ** [ Every donation will have _three times the impact_ to elect state Democrats nationwide →](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zawayJU7NskUpAoU2FWeYrEVrmg704gBEN_dmOvXSpLBIdN27BOWSunPOLHGLlwQWMBB4CCeivSC0inRcCVM1To5fOAdY8xAq952AEsqLj6-ZiWyzCfIUxV7dhhOmAfk2a7PLM5dRbt8tEhNq9EMe5w94_qhX42Q04CBF6Z3LcKq3Aw8usIFAixcu_QkxIJ8MueAfujSpmSoAFA15UbbxUrcZrx8AUkwxPbJvTxKQbMADvs6vsJyWzfVbZNPDhg1Vvt9MKiElhkPv7eVIV-DmZLPxnNI1lbV-UVIJzSsjanLX4hUacBgnDw4UMBe_5KtlqxFu8dpVl0ejFPirI9ZTGm0KTHE0xmwxHxYjKX-4FSh9WpmBQXPb0Bb8gA0qh2SK8NioCI_c-Oa74RWmE-1cXSWdhrWjV3a4J0iJiKGfpezga-mX-vY18FTizwMGYug55NnWw32ftxTrjyVStOsAZ99c5H6cwlaa9laE0VIuaLAglhCbSZnmbJvoJmG7tIpJvsNpf6j4_lq8jdkWp9zvO/3wg/mGNI2T4ERuGQ7Znf-8us2g/h1/gStWAVNEnUVdWUnDcS9nSyqyRnQ9ckZ9CHJMoyWbc_c) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

We’re not in a position where we can afford to fall short of a single fundraising goal. Republicans are pouring _huge sums of money_ into the states to try and gain ground after Democrats’ victories in the midterms, so we need to hit every goal to stay competitive. But it’s going to take one last big push to crush May’s fundraising goal.
If we fail to hit our end-of-month goal, we risk having to scale back our efforts ahead of a crucial election year. **Unfortunately, as of 11:30 AM, we’re only 68% of the way to our May goal – that’s why we need Democrats from your community to step up today.**
[ Make a triple-matched donation of $7 or more before midnight on May 31st, and it’ll have three times the impact to expand Democratic power in statehouses nationwide → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zawayJU7NskUpAoU2FWeYrEVrmg704gBEN_dmOvXSpLBIdN27BOWSunPOLHGLlwQWMBB4CCeivSC0inRcCVM1To5fOAdY8xAq952AEsqLj6-ZiWyzCfIUxV7dhhOmAfk2a7PLM5dRbt8tEhNq9EMe5w94_qhX42Q04CBF6Z3LcKq3Aw8usIFAixcu_QkxIJ8PlwVbf4bOV7oK28wPJttmyC7ac6Se_HTPj4goMHrEf04gYrUMM9r0m4mj-p7BNo98fPfVZml2hNSD-OJ6HSv-E5ul5PCbthIkhqkLaXitSwkpAMllgatHKLSsE1RctHWDMyM3qVt8ElPdNOLNaqzfomTRE_HDZDwSJc2PkYESjwPTOEjGtBB8TGTW_FeswQEpJvz7w_BoGaOpLhVmeapzZK7coiKWuOaBQIEVvl1p6lzr1Xx3D5aq1VAptBynH_wyNy-aRi9YitojIu5njSvhZJBI3cF0VcTSD5E4aiLjwavZsf00qFycB0nLzNkR_tcAD0xSd8YlpE2mx43FLDkl2/3wg/mGNI2T4ERuGQ7Znf-8us2g/h7/lcOSrsb_DBOoYZcnXN7eqTjPcSH8SPUjZdu5SdF3wiM)

clean_body: We must give state Dems the resources to defend our majorities, hold the GOP accountable, and win. That starts with hitting our critical $150,000 May fundraising goal before our deadline in one week. | | | | | Masha here, Senior Director of Direct Response at the DLCC. – but first, let me explain why your gift today is so important. Over the next few weeks, Democrats are facing special elections in key states: In the Maine House, Democrats have the opportunity to defend a critical seat or risk the GOP chipping away at our majority. In Tennessee, two members of The Tennessee Three, Rep. Jones and Rep. Pearson, are running for their seats again after they were expelled from the House. And, in the New Hampshire House, where our margin is razor-thin , there are two critical elections.Democrats could flip the chamber this year. It’s essential that we give state Democrats the resources they need to win against their extreme opponents, defend our majorities, and hold the GOP accountable. That starts with hitting our critical$150,000 May fundraising goal before our deadline in one week. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | We’re not in a position where we can afford to fall short of a single fundraising goal. Republicans are pouring huge sums of money into the states to try and gain ground after Democrats’ victories in the midterms, so we need to hit every goal to stay competitive. But it’s going to take one last big push to crush May’s fundraising goal. If we fail to hit our end-of-month goal, we risk having to scale back our efforts ahead of a crucial election year. Unfortunately, as of 11:30 AM, we’re only 68% of the way to our May goal – that’s why we need Democrats from your community to step up today. Together, Masha Anderson Senior Director of Direct Response, DLCC ** | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the DLCC are not tax deductible. | The Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee and Grassroots Victory PAC are dedicated to winning and defending Democratic majorities in state legislatures across the country. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of our grassroots network. Emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our supporters. Please add us to your address book or safe senders list to ensure timely election updates. We're fighting to elect Democrats and advance a progressive vision in the states. Our success depends on grassroots donors like you. Ninety-eight percent of our donors give less than $200, and two-thirds give less than $20. To make a contribution, please . name: Indiana Democratic Party
subject: We stand with President Biden
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
|

Peter, Republicans in Congress are trying to hold our country hostage, threatening to send the American economy spiraling unless they get their way. Meanwhile, Democrats and President Biden are standing strong and pushing back against the GOP’s radical agenda. At the Indiana Democratic Party, we stand behind President Biden and his push to make sure that important programs like Medicare and Social Security remain funded in the face of Republican threats to default on our debt. [**Will you show your support by donating to our movement to support these causes? Every dollar goes a long way.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63743239/407874860/1643342139?refcode=230524-Biden&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjM3OWYzYy00YmZhLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tdFUcyUNRgkiJ1oBk886lN51oCjDElU1NbHbLYyIRLY=) We need to show Republicans in Congress that they can’t threaten to tank our economy just to get their radical policy ideas passed. name: Team Vance
subject: quick message
disclaimer_text: Paid for by JD Vance For Senate Inc
body:
Joe's done for

|
---
Only a brief message for you today. But it's a critical message.

There's a lot to feel good about: Job growth is up, unemployment is down, and inflation is coming under control. Bills signed into law by President Biden are tackling climate change, improving our nation’s infrastructure, lowering the price of prescription drugs, and reviving domestic manufacturing.
And yet, there's still so much to do – from restoring reproductive freedom to reducing gun violence to combatting disinformation and more. **To make sure Chrissy can hear directly from you, Derek, Team Chrissy has put together a short priorities survey. Peter,
---
With the future of our country on the line, the 2024 elections are expected to be the most expensive in history.
---
[](https://links.ciscomaniforarizona.com/u/click?_t=e146ab27d8454e4aa5fa55bf190d8558&_m=3929d988b08c4bbda6fa21c78a759f00&_e=q6dfnZeWMHVfNR4NOU0mnZgUXK4gVAQv_12sq_JKV65oOIV955m8jh2XKw2B4TOGSll0i3eoPIoHIrqq-wOsworU7WdGFdRoO_mH2Mt7cjbeMonlsvjA3gvVwxi6C56wj-XNvCM_RrZuGYbz-tSMYKf_WmQbj0PSpDcj8DjFWtz6euParkpEX_1ICpFP7rzTj4IhSXnPiRUsmglKSo1O9gvjWPduFiRHrBtprIqLts33yfl_LdzlXPlnYOCUmfo8aNV6-Jd0CTqZHOW9OAbM0xYHBzNQ0ayM8niENCDN0eq_9vLaMUSV6rCPNi2ZlpmDKTCO9Ed4LpaUUU3FkW7L-ogsOhKIxra3i3U0JdaLJoAtgEXOCDBE4mmjpvgKDFO3MHPnsiuPvehcDg3wkRopZqpjTgE_xWC8cY4hbSLCtB5hbivggEf8GaQ4nDNSiQUNPuzXks6U4OD9X1kraiuB-Q%3D%3D)
---
Since Joe Biden won Arizona by less than half a percentage point in 2020, this state has once again become a top battleground.
---
_Considering the high correlation between presidential and House outcomes and since Biden would have carried this district in 2020, he will**HAVE** to win this district to win in 2024._
---

clean_body: We have to be ready to combat the Left’s multi-million dollar attack ads. | Peter, With the future of our country on the line, the 2024 elections are expected to be the most expensive in history. Since Joe Biden won Arizona by less than half a percentage point in 2020, this state has once again become a top battleground. Considering the high correlation between presidential and House outcomes and since Biden would have carried this district in 2020, he willHAVE to win this district to win in 2024. That’s why it’s critical that we have the resources to combat the D.C. Democrat’s multi-million dollar lying attack ads to defend this seat and END Biden’s disastrous presidency. Democrats need a net gain of only 5 seats to regain the House majority and this district is their top target. Arizona’s 6th district could impact who controls the House in 2025. That means we will be forced into an expensive battle in this race as the Democrats focus all their efforts and their massive warchest on derailing my campaign in this battleground district. Add in that our state and district will also impact the results of the Presidential election and we can expect an influx of multi-million dollar attacks aimed directly at us. We can’t afford to waste any time building up our defenses to ensure we are ready to FIGHT BACK to defend our narrow majority. And with your continued support, the D.C. | | In 2017, Republicans blew a $2 trillion hole in the deficit to slash taxes for wealthy Americans and corporations. At the time, I warned that Republicans would eventually force working families to pay for their tax giveaway to the rich. Unfortunately, now I'm being proven right. Six years later, Republicans are trying to pay for their tax handouts, and as usual, it'll be working families that have to foot the bill. Everything from food assistance for children, to affordable housing, job training programs and more, are on the chopping block. **Instead of forcing billionaires and corporations to pay their fair share, Republicans want to slash the programs that help feed children.** We have to fight back. We cannot let Republicans get away with holding our country hostage. [**Join the movement: sign the petition today to tell Republicans to stop holding our country hostage.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63744011/407877836/256785857?contactdata=sGqM7j18li+D0o6ZDwNZtzzMz2jiQGC+h6UAo1zJNRXay1SLX5XlEfzLzYYjF1FQYE9dLqd9mSQHWvOYBR4iUUNPQZMjtqnbh0fKrARCrvI=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Njg2ZGYzNS00Y2ZhLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sy8D6TI_xHEcUikLm0zFj4HKfA--p_BpeAT76FWsUOU=&emci=c49fb16d-a0f9-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=4686df35-4cfa-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=9818364) [Sign the Petition](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63744012/407877837/256785857?contactdata=sGqM7j18li+D0o6ZDwNZtzzMz2jiQGC+h6UAo1zJNRXay1SLX5XlEfzLzYYjF1FQYE9dLqd9mSQHWvOYBR4iUUNPQZMjtqnbh0fKrARCrvI=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Njg2ZGYzNS00Y2ZhLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sy8D6TI_xHEcUikLm0zFj4HKfA--p_BpeAT76FWsUOU=&emci=c49fb16d-a0f9-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=4686df35-4cfa-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=9818364) Nothing unites Republicans like cutting taxes for the rich and taking food away from kids to pay for it. A default will be catastrophic for American families, but Republicans don't care. They're willing to use our country as a bargaining chip to get what they want. clean_body: | | | | In 2017, Republicans blew a $2 trillion hole in the deficit to slash taxes for wealthy Americans and corporations. At the time, I warned that Republicans would eventually force working families to pay for their tax giveaway to the rich. Unfortunately, now I'm being proven right. Six years later, Republicans are trying to pay for their tax handouts, and as usual, it'll be working families that have to foot the bill. Everything from food assistance for children, to affordable housing, job training programs and more, are on the chopping block. Instead of forcing billionaires and corporations to pay their fair share, Republicans want to slash the programs that help feed children. We have to fight back. We cannot let Republicans get away with holding our country hostage. Nothing unites Republicans like cutting taxes for the rich and taking food away from kids to pay for it. A default will be catastrophic for American families, but Republicans don't care. They're willing to use our country as a bargaining chip to get what they want. Republicans are playing with fire, but it's the American people who will get burned. We've seen this countless times before. I'm sick of it. And I know you are too. Together we can create a future that works for everyone, not just the wealthy few. Ron | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate. | This email was sent by Wyden for Senate P.O. body:
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=194%2E791427%2EPSGY4H)
One $5 donation.
That's what we're asking you to give today to stand with Ilhan Omar and our campaign. We'll explain more in just a second, but if that's all you need to read, please use this link:
**[https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/May24](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-may23.dqks1K&refcode=em230524-1-may-tb-ntl&t=2&akid=194%2E791427%2EPSGY4H)**
Here's the situation:
As you probably know, in all of Ilhan's previous campaigns she's fought back against millions of dollars in outside spending to win.
Super PACs and dark money groups pulled out all the stops — we're talking bigoted ads flooding the airwaves, digital ads on social media and Youtube, attack mailers in every mailbox — the whole nine yards.
If we're going to have the resources to fight back again and avoid getting pummeled by the attack ads, the lies, and the special interest dollars that pay for them, we need to invest in our campaign early. Because we know they're coming — it's just a matter of time.
Your $5 donation today will go a long way toward making sure we have what it takes — are you in?
**[Please use this link and chip in $5 or anything you can to stand with Ilhan and our people-powered campaign today.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-may23.dqks1K&refcode=em230524-1-may-tb-ntl&t=3&akid=194%2E791427%2EPSGY4H)**

name: Jim Jordan
subject: let me be 100% honest with you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
If you know anything about me, you know I don't beat around the bush.

| |

---
| | | This is Jim Jordan.

If you know anything about me, you know I don't beat around the bush. If I'm worried about something, you'll hear about it. Immediately.

So let me be 100% honest with you right now.

I just spoke with Majority Leader Steve Scalise and he told me we're in quite a bind: **1)** _Inside Elections_ released their first set of House Ratings and they have us TIED with the Democrats for control of the House **2)** The latest FEC reports show Democrats OUTRAISED Republicans by $12,000,000+... **3)** _**[We still need fifteen-hundred strong Conservatives to make a small donation right away or our Republican Majority will be in SERIOUS JEOPARDY.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=35bf4f0054e84e819b2a8ad9b2b3ce8f&_e=3cgAMkk6L4GPebKXy7kiGO_nSQ7Hr9mzYN2-yQMuUJDuYITRU1_zEU5D-OHb7bWmc7ElC4SHGPcJ-Ucc0Xvsrmz_k-v_8m6qMaSt77udmix7DJ7p8MbGhJltyapoacL1HpeEMYYXfpwN05-xS5DwfHhpt_PVt0cjZs-VKUidCShkeuC691OSsQHFaKbk9a7JOpc8-ZMw3h6RUsYA5FhyNix-4jJqj1HuGRDRdDG4MB_BWBwJnm0qH__vRD1V4A3TZu4I0SR97DvUKsqz4zKIPPx3t_Spj6yhK2FGtlcI4qyhD4_pGePMERhcVW9qsaNqf0Tkz1vQNxLly1ONIoAHtXNRo1mw-5rhgqx2bEyqfd8xcW-ecU8jU-1goxjJ8t-82wlbxmUKpIYY_XcAHcv04-0UmMhLp2dSTP5NFzzr-JZxazYr8dTDeZwoAnwetbmP "We still need fifteen-hundred strong Conservatives to make a small donation right away or our Republican Majority will be in SERIOUS JEOPARDY.")**_
---
| | | [I'M PERSONALLY ASKING: CAN YOU HELP?](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=35bf4f0054e84e819b2a8ad9b2b3ce8f&_e=3cgAMkk6L4GPebKXy7kiGO_nSQ7Hr9mzYN2-yQMuUJDuYITRU1_zEU5D-OHb7bWmc7ElC4SHGPcJ-Ucc0Xvsrmz_k-v_8m6qMaSt77udmix7DJ7p8MbGhJltyapoacL1HpeEMYYXfpwN05-xS5DwfHhpt_PVt0cjZs-VKUidCShkeuC691OSsQHFaKbk9a7JOpc8-ZMw3h6RUsYA5FhyNix-4jJqj1HuGRDRdDG4MB_BWBwJnm0qH__vRD1V4A3TZu4I0SR97DvUKsqz4zKIPPx3t_Spj6yhK2FGtlcI4qzd5ylpUa_o8WDeGLIfsBUIySd02ezl3LfvNZzExRC_jS_p6iih-BXwRM8yYigWab8QHssoGhYXoryRwpSsMaRvnjqe4uC9pJLy-kt6NWf1P2uxhuVmJlFGpEhPvGLKp_oIIS0HOQRJbInxyOYvt3xz "I’M PERSONALLY ASKING: CAN YOU HELP?")
---
Listen, House Democrats exploited every ounce of their power to cover for Joe Biden and misled the public during every crisis they created together.

_If they outraise us and manage to destroy our Majority, the American People will never get ..._
* **ANSWERS** on Biden's weak response to Chinese aggression
* **ANSWERS** on President Trump's corrupt indictment
* **ANSWERS** on how Big Tech interfered with our elections
* **ANSWERS** on Democrats colluding with Big Tech to silence critics
* **ANSWERS** on Biden officials treating parents as domestic terrorists

The American People deserve answers, but getting them depends entirely on Republicans holding the House Majority. If we lose our Majority, we will lose all of the progress we made.

We need the support of our grassroots donors to prevail. **Without it, we might as well throw in the towel.**

_**[As I write this, we're falling critically behind the Democrats' fundraising efforts. I'm counting on you to make a small donation to help us catch up before our critical deadline.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=35bf4f0054e84e819b2a8ad9b2b3ce8f&_e=3cgAMkk6L4GPebKXy7kiGO_nSQ7Hr9mzYN2-yQMuUJDuYITRU1_zEU5D-OHb7bWmc7ElC4SHGPcJ-Ucc0Xvsrmz_k-v_8m6qMaSt77udmix7DJ7p8MbGhJltyapoacL1HpeEMYYXfpwN05-xS5DwfHhpt_PVt0cjZs-VKUidCShkeuC691OSsQHFaKbk9a7JOpc8-ZMw3h6RUsYA5FhyNix-4jJqj1HuGRDRdDG4MB_BWBwJnm0qH__vRD1V4A3TZu4I0SR97DvUKsqz4zKIPPx3t_Spj6yhK2FGtlcI4qx_8vsmgrAfiVCwPAHErSrQCTnULCl_i5KvhAmgpWtvrN01MyDi49MUg8gw7LHISSEQAL2aYl2uj-1-ifhmxd-nf-YLgEekA82i8WFp4UWIxKNn-JvwFBZmFif8AT2fd_p6vWQi1mLUJ9BMNyCc_OwX "As I write this, we’re falling critically behind the Democrats’ fundraising efforts. I’m counting on you to make a small donation to help us catch up before our critical deadline.")**_

Time is of the essence and I'm really counting on you.

For America,

Jim Jordan

name: Sign the Petition | Left Action
subject: Sign your name: Tell Special Counsel Jack Smith to indict Trump
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Tell Special Counsel Jack Smith to Bring Criminal Charges against Trump >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf18979f0-bd01-44d6-8b20-423ea381307b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5e433ce6-ed10-4025-adaa-b759ae7ce743/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Multiple [reports](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc3c1bbc2-36d7-4244-b80d-cf46a00a73d7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) say that Special Counsel Jack Smith is wrapping up his investigation into Trump's mishandling of classified documents, and that a decision whether to indict is imminent. [**Add your name, and tell Smith to do it.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T60a79a3a-2ad4-4c49-ba91-a008ed0ecff8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) The evidence is overwhelming that Trump broke the law, and even [Trump's own former attorneys say he is likely heading to jail](https://default.salsalabs.org/T642521c0-21a2-4dac-a48e-a068bb3da982/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) \-- if Smith charges him. Make no mistake, there is enormous pressure on Smith not to do it, with Republicans already attacking him, and Trump's cultish followers sending threat after threat. So please join with us in letting Smith know that there is strong support for criminal charges, and that we will have his back if he goes that route. [**Add your name: Tell Special Counsel Jack Smith to Bring Criminal Charges against Trump.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tce172266-44f0-47fd-80ca-e83532e12f1e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te27d2238-a1aa-4173-b47d-87e3dcb9b390/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you, Left Action _[P. S. - if you no longer wish to receive updates, use the unsubscribe link below]_

|

body:
Jahana under attack by McCarthy | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63744508/407879893/-1295403277?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzQ3NDAzYi00ZGZhLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2Im1myPLT5iqhquWWjS8LaN_-Xdq_PU6LVCoj6ToQGE=&emci=2190e473-78f6-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=3347403b-4dfa-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=15529135) | The House Republican campaign arm (National Republican Campaign Committee) has launched a massive digital ad campaign against 35 vulnerable Democrats, and Frontliner Jahana Hayes is at the top of that list! body:
Those ‘MAGA Republicans trying to crash the economy’ | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/65c582a71652/im-announcing-my-run-for-us-congress-5813090?e=d6699466fe)
---
| | [ ](https://gregwheeler.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3bf2f6e69e02578a82344bfc7&id=e7a8a6e7f1&e=d6699466fe)
---
| Peter,
---
| | Joe Biden said House Republicans are _“Seeking to cause a default to purposely crash the economy ahead of his re-election efforts”. _

The raging pundits pushing the narrative for the Radical Left and Biden Administration won’t tell you that the Republican bill [H.R. 2811](https://gregwheeler.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3bf2f6e69e02578a82344bfc7&id=737cb7824d&e=d6699466fe), the _Limit, Save, Grow Act of 2023_ , **actually raises the debt ceiling by $1.5 trillion dollars!**

**The bill ALSO cuts spending by requiring:**
* Federal bureaucratic expenditures returned to pre-COVID amounts
* Approval from Congress prior to pricey executive regulations being funded
* Exclusion of the $80 billion IRS expansion
* Able-bodied Americans to work
* Rejection of the $550 billion student loan bailout
* Unused COVID relief monies being rescinded

[Meanwhile Radical Left Congress members, including my incumbent opponent, want the debt ceiling lifted without limits or negotiated spending cuts!](https://gregwheeler.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3bf2f6e69e02578a82344bfc7&id=e9f15b6a02&e=d6699466fe)

Refusing to negotiate, the Radical Left are fear-mongering Americans over government support programs being nixed.
---
| [ ](https://gregwheeler.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3bf2f6e69e02578a82344bfc7&id=83e453e40c&e=d6699466fe)
---
| These acts of desperation show a Radical Left in panic mode over thoughts of backlash and embarrassment if radical spending projects are canceled.

**Meanwhile, they want us _to forget_ reports that the largest fraud in U.S. history was the theft of as much as $80 billion in COVID relief funds.** _But I remember, don’t you?!_

As a Congressional candidate with an accountant and attorney background, I applaud House Republicans who are committed to weeding out wasteful spending in efforts to tackle our national debt!

_[**Peter, I’ve put together a petition to show that we stand together with House Republicans determined to address our national debt crisis!**](https://gregwheeler.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3bf2f6e69e02578a82344bfc7&id=2046546f18&e=d6699466fe)_ [**Join me in taking a stand to:**](https://gregwheeler.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3bf2f6e69e02578a82344bfc7&id=e6640518a6&e=d6699466fe)
---
| [CUT WASTEFUL SPENDING »](https://gregwheeler.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3bf2f6e69e02578a82344bfc7&id=91c7734319&e=d6699466fe "CUT WASTEFUL SPENDING »")
---
| [TACKLE OUR NATIONAL DEBT »](https://gregwheeler.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3bf2f6e69e02578a82344bfc7&id=403d378358&e=d6699466fe "TACKLE OUR NATIONAL DEBT »")

---
| Respectfully,

Today marks one year since the tragic shooting at an elementary school in Uvalde, Texas. Since that horrific day, our country has continued to experience mass shootings. Families have been torn apart, lives have been lost, and little progress has been made by Congress to put an end to mass shootings for good. | | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63745035/407881704/-393140909?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZWZiZjU0Ni00ZWZhLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6wUSSIx8R_1D7MEKvWtgawSAZj2DWI-40yMXh3w1smc=&emci=82a74f40-4efa-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=eefbf546-4efa-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=28008880) Team – Today marks one year since the tragic shooting at Robb elementary school in Uvalde, Texas. Since that horrific day, our country has continued to experience mass shootings. Families have been torn apart, lives have been lost, and little progress has been made by Congress to put an end to mass shootings for good. Wiley’s been a vocal advocate for common-sense gun safety legislation, but he needs to know you’re with him. body:
Her QAnon opponent from 2022 is back on the ballot.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63745639/407884134/2113282052?refcode=EM_FR_230524Majewski_SplitMK_SB_90DO_6_NG_N_logo&refcode2=b18e1145-50fa-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMThlMTE0NS01MGZhLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n4vdOim-ugJmuzrqzj5KXGi47XqkuTwlvAB1BsaRppY=) My dear friend and colleague Rep. Marcy Kaptur needs our help, Peter.

**Her 2022 opponent, QAnon extremist J. R. Majewski, is running again,** and with _Marcy’s district targeted as one of the most competitive in the nation for 2024,_ we can’t take this moment for granted.

In 2022, massive Republican super-PACs threw **millions in out-of-state dark money** toward attack ads to defeat Marcy, despite Majewski’s ties to QAnon, lying about his military service during his campaign, and actively denying the 2020 election results.

[**_Peter, can I count on you to split $5 right now between my campaign and Marcy’s to give her the boost she needs to stop extremist J. R. Majewski from flipping this seat in 2024?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63745640/407884135/2113282052?refcode=EM_FR_230524Majewski_SplitMK_SB_90DO_6_NG_N_l1&refcode2=b18e1145-50fa-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMThlMTE0NS01MGZhLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n4vdOim-ugJmuzrqzj5KXGi47XqkuTwlvAB1BsaRppY=)

We need Marcy’s leadership, Peter. As **_the longest-serving woman in the House,_** Marcy has always been dedicated to preserving the Great Lakes, advocating for working families and our incredible veterans, and rebuilding Ohio’s crumbling infrastructure. Her proven track record shows she knows how to get things done, and that scares the Republicans.

Marcy’s **one of just five** Democratic incumbents running in a district that Trump won in 2020. Democrats only need to flip five seats to break the Republican majority, so holding onto frontline seats like Marcy’s is critical. _This is a make-it-or-break-it race._

That’s our average online donation.

Our program relies on small dollar donors, just like you, pitching in just $16 at a time, whenever you can.

We understand that not everyone can give much, and we understand that not everyone can give often, but we’re humbly asking for your support at least one time this year, to help set us up to keep Georgia blue in 2024.

[**_Will you pitch in just $16 right now to help us run the program that will keep Georgia blue?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63745750/407884411/710125701?refcode=20230524.1_GADems_5AT&amount=16&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzQ0MTJkMi01MGZhLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h7qrenyvC67huIae7R9l_iNxCZsiEOzJHniDFRUq3dI=)_

Every donation, no matter how large, is instrumental for keeping Georgia blue, and unlike our GOP opponents, we don’t rely on big checks from the Koch network. We rely on small dollar donors just like you to keep our lights on.

Without you, we couldn’t run our voter protection hotline, couldn’t talk directly with persuadable voters across the state, and couldn’t organize enthusiastic volunteers across the state to get out and elect Democrats.

[**_Please, pitch in right now toward our $16 donor drive right now to show our team just how important this grassroots network is.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63745751/407884412/710125701?refcode=20230524.1_GADems_5AT&amount=16&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzQ0MTJkMi01MGZhLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h7qrenyvC67huIae7R9l_iNxCZsiEOzJHniDFRUq3dI=)**_

name: Judicial Watch Corruption Chronicles
subject: Another Illegal Immigrant Protected by Local Sanctuary Laws Charged with Violent Crimes
body:
In yet another disturbing example of the devastation caused by open
border policies, an illegal immigrant who entered the U.S. as a child
a decade ago has been charged with first-degree rape, kidnapping and
armed robbery in a county that proudly offers migrants sanctuary.

[alt_text]

[*****]
May 24, 2023

[article-image]
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63488&L=29591&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaWxsZWdhbC1pbW1pZ3JhbnQtcHJvdGVjdGVkLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jb3JydXB0aW9uK2Nocm9uaWNsZXMmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=fae01e9596b07354cf3c6c6b5272e2fb16095e898ca4fa7b6f2eb77eb3ed82ee]

In yet another disturbing example of the devastation caused by open
border policies, an illegal immigrant who entered the U.S. as a child
a decade ago has been charged with first-degree rape, kidnapping and
armed robbery in a county that proudly offers migrants sanctuary. The
20-year-old, Jose Roberto Hernandez-Penal, is accused of raping a
woman and robbing her friend this month at a Maryland park after
threatening the women with a machete. Days earlier police say he raped
a 15-year-old girl at the same park in Montgomery County, which has
long protected illegal aliens from federal authorities.

| Hi Peter, it’s Brian Lemek here, activist and founder of Stop Gun Violence PAC.

**Today marks 1 year since the horrific massacre in Uvalde, Texas, where an 18-year-old gunman opened fire on an elementary school using an AR-15.**

He took the lives of 19 children and 2 teachers. 21 lives in total, 21 families forever changed.

We can’t allow these senseless tragedies to continue in our communities. We must take action to pass gun safety legislation and ban military-grade assault weapons. [_**This begins with people like you, Peter. We are working to build an unstoppable movement and invest $1 million in gun violence prevention champions at all levels of government. Will you join us in pushing for an assault weapons ban?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63746053/407885510/995910605?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ0NTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjgzZWJkY2MtNTFmYS1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=82nEAfTVQF_OdtqY4lnuL0Op1VrT27QCkV2fjdxl660=&emci=f63ebdcc-51fa-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=f83ebdcc-51fa-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=7937656)

name: Greg Casar
subject: Uvalde.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GREG CASAR FOR CONGRESS
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63746441/407886956/1120393829?refcode=em-wrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjQwOWJjNC01M2ZhLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aMUx8GrxZRhqcawfzDwUYwE78K5J__EoJMNgrNd9MmQ=&emci=f1329ebe-53fa-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=06409bc4-53fa-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=6830379)
Peter,

**One year ago today, the community of Uvalde was rocked by the deadliest shooting at a Texas public school in the history of our state.**

19 children and two teachers at Robb Elementary School were gunned down by a shooter armed with an AR-15 assault rifle, the same weapon of war used in countless mass shootings every year in our country.

It was a devastating day for our state and our nation. Our schools are supposed to be safe havens for children to learn and grow—not a place parents fear sending their children each day.

One year later, the Uvalde community remains in grief—but also feels a deep sense of anger and frustration that their elected leaders have failed to act in their name.

_Camille Phillips - Texas Public Radio_
Uvalde parents and community members have marched in the streets of San Antonio, Austin, and Washington, D.C. demanding that their lawmakers in the Texas Legislature and Congress pass gun violence legislation – such as a ban on the assault-style weapons used in Uvalde, or at minimum, other strong safety legislation.

Instead, all they’ve gotten from right wing officials were debates about “door safety” and bills to add even more guns to our public schools. Just like every other mass shooting, Republican lawmakers continued to parrot the words of the NRA and gun manufacturers—and refused to put the most basic gun safety legislation up for a vote. It’s shameful.

**But we aren’t giving up. I’ll continue to fight everyday alongside my colleagues to pass legislation to tackle the gun violence epidemic.** Things like an assault weapons ban, universal background checks, red flag laws, and closing gun loopholes – these are common sense, broadly popular solutions to reduce gun violence that we could pass today if Republicans didn’t stand in the way.

**Today, on the one-year anniversary of this horrific tragedy, I’ll be thinking about the families and friends of the 21 victims lost in Uvalde below. And I’ll continue to raise their voices as we fight for reforms in their memory:**

Nevaeh Alyssa Bravo
Jacklyn Jaylen Cazares
Makenna Lee Elrod
Jose Manuel Flores Jr.
Eliahna Amyah Garcia
Uziyah Sergio Garcia
Amerie Jo Garza
Xavier James Lopez
Jayce Carmelo Luevanos
Tess Marie Mata
Maranda Gail Mathis
Alithia Haven Ramirez
Annabell Guadalupe Rodriguez
Maite Yuleana Rodriguez
Alexandria Aniyah Rubio
Layla Marie Salazar
Jailah Nicole Silguero
Eliahna Cruz Torres
Rojelio Fernandez Torres
Irma Linda Garcia
Eva Mirele

Thank you,

-Greg
****
Greg Casar
Congressman
Texas Congressional District 35

body:
It’s urgent. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63746593/407888620/17860314?refcode=ea.08855e76-54fa-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ms=ea.08855e76-54fa-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDg4NTVlNzYtNTRmYS1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=RhdGTCrGTY_qmC9eqMu0mvaBpoKH_kPu2mvoNP1sSBc=)
---
This is important, Peter.

I'm a Public Service Commissioner, former Mayor, and a proud Mississippian running to replace Tate Reeves. He's one of the most unpopular governors in the nation, and he's neck-deep in the biggest corruption scandal in state history.

Simply put, I need your help.

May's end-of-month deadline is almost here. It's also another major public filing deadline. _All eyes_ will be on us. And with less than six months left until Election Day, we can’t afford to mess up.

[I know we can defeat Reeves, but we don’t stand a fighting chance without our grassroots supporters. Can I count on you to chip in toward our $30,000 online goal?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63746594/407888622/960250762?refcode=ea.08855e76-54fa-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ms=ea.08855e76-54fa-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDg4NTVlNzYtNTRmYS1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=RhdGTCrGTY_qmC9eqMu0mvaBpoKH_kPu2mvoNP1sSBc=)

Look, we’re not just up against a politician who, for years, put his bottom line before our state and the good folks who call it home. We’re also up against his rich and powerful special interests buddies who fuel his campaign war chest.

I want to show them that we’ve got the power of the people in our corner. And so far we’re doing a mighty good job.

We've already received thousands of donations from individuals ready to replace Tate Reeves. But we can’t afford to slow down at such a pivotal moment of the campaign.

I know we can crush our May fundraising goal! If you could chip in right now, we'll reach it. And if we reach it and have another strong month, we'll show everyone that we have the firepower to bring real change to Mississippi.

[So that's why this is important. Can I count on you to chip in (any amount) to help us replace Tate Reeves and move Mississippi forward?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63746595/407888623/960250762?refcode=ea.08855e76-54fa-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ms=ea.08855e76-54fa-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDg4NTVlNzYtNTRmYS1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=RhdGTCrGTY_qmC9eqMu0mvaBpoKH_kPu2mvoNP1sSBc=) | **[Donate $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63746596/407888624/960250762?amount=5&refcode=ea.08855e76-54fa-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ms=ea.08855e76-54fa-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDg4NTVlNzYtNTRmYS1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=RhdGTCrGTY_qmC9eqMu0mvaBpoKH_kPu2mvoNP1sSBc=)** | **[Donate $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63746597/407888625/960250762?amount=10&refcode=ea.08855e76-54fa-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ms=ea.08855e76-54fa-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDg4NTVlNzYtNTRmYS1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=RhdGTCrGTY_qmC9eqMu0mvaBpoKH_kPu2mvoNP1sSBc=)** | **[Donate $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63746598/407888626/960250762?amount=25&refcode=ea.08855e76-54fa-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ms=ea.08855e76-54fa-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDg4NTVlNzYtNTRmYS1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=RhdGTCrGTY_qmC9eqMu0mvaBpoKH_kPu2mvoNP1sSBc=)**

clean_body: It’s urgent. | = This is important, Peter. I'm a Public Service Commissioner, former Mayor, and a proud Mississippian running to replace Tate Reeves. He's one of the most unpopular governors in the nation, and he's neck-deep in the biggest corruption scandal in state history. Simply put, I need your help. May's end-of-month deadline is almost here. It's also another major public filing deadline. All eyes will be on us. And with less than six months left until Election Day, we can’t afford to mess up. = Look, we’re not just up against a politician who, for years, put his bottom line before our state and the good folks who call it home. We’re also up against his rich and powerful special interests buddies who fuel his campaign war chest. I want to show them that we’ve got the power of the people in our corner. And so far we’re doing a mighty good job. We've already received thousands of donations from individuals ready to replace Tate Reeves. But we can’t afford to slow down at such a pivotal moment of the campaign. I know we can crush our May fundraising goal! If you could chip in right now, we'll reach it. And if we reach it and have another strong month, we'll show everyone that we have the firepower to bring real change to Mississippi. = | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = I can’t thank you enough, Brandon Presley = | | = = Follow along: Paid for by Brandon Presley Campaign Brandon Presley Campaign P.O. Box 208 Nettleton, MS 38858 Click here to

name: =?utf-8?Q?Caleb=20Heimlich?=
subject: Join us and Spokane County Treasurer Michael Baumgartner
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
Come see Michael at our Spokane Heart of the Party and our 46th Annual Dinner! | | | [ ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=76f293b9a9&e=6a281f566d)
---
| |
---
| Dear Peter,

I am thrilled to announce that Spokane County Treasurer Michael Baumgartner, a steadfast Republican leader with an impressive record of public service, will be joining us at two of our upcoming events: As the Master of Ceremonies at our 46th Annual Dinner in Bellevue, and as a special guest at our 5th Annual 'Heart of the Party' Reception in Spokane! Before becoming the Spokane County Treasurer, Michael Baumgartner served as a Washington State Senator from the 6th Legislative District, most notably serving as the Vice-Chair of the important Ways and Means Committee.

Before his time in elected office, Michael was a US State Department Officer in Iraq and a counternarcotics advisor in Afghanistan. His global perspective, formed by extensive travel to over 80 countries, makes him an invaluable asset to our party. Michael is a public servant through and through and we appreciate his strong dedication to our state, country, and Republican Party.

I hope you are just as excited as I am to join fellow Republicans and Michael at one, or both, of these upcoming events! Please click on the links below to find more details and register today!
---
|
---
| 🌟 **46th Annual Washington State Republican Party Dinner:** Michael emceed our 2022 Annual Dinner and was such a crowd favorite that we had to bring him back again this year! If you missed last years' dinner - be sure to come to this one! This event promises to be one of our best yet as we honor the outstanding leadership of Congresswoman Cathy McMorris Rodgers, and welcome Congressman Burgess Owens (UT-04) as a keynote speaker.

_**Event Details:**_
**Date:** Friday, October 27th
**Time:** 6 PM | VIP & General Receptions, 7 PM | Dinner
**Location:** Hyatt Regency Bellevue, Bellevue, WA
**Tickets:**[Click here!](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=272b807e64&e=6a281f566d)
---
| [Get Tickets Now! [46th Annual Dinner]](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=3ff1975ef7&e=6a281f566d "Get Tickets Now! \[46th Annual Dinner\]")
---
| 🌟 **Heart of the Party - Spokane:** We invite you to join us, alongside Spokane County Treasurer Michael Baumgartner and Congresswoman Cathy McMorris Rodgers, at our 5th Annual 'Heart of the Party' Reception in Spokane. This event is your opportunity to engage with local elected officials, candidates, and fellow Republicans from the Spokane Area at the Beacon Hill Event Center.

_**Event Details:**_
**Date:** Tuesday, June 27
**Time:** 6 PM - 8 PM (VIP Roundtable at 5 PM)
**Location:** Beacon Hill Event Center, Spokane, WA
**Tickets:** [Click here!](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=36c3479d0d&e=6a281f566d)
---
| [Get Tickets Now! [Spokane Heart of the Party]](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=df7ae9ba76&e=6a281f566d "Get Tickets Now! \[Spokane Heart of the Party\]")
---
| [Join us at a Heart of the Party Reception Near You!](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=af0f8dfead&e=6a281f566d "Join us at a Heart of the Party Reception Near You!")
---
| | These events give us an opportunity to celebrate what makes our party great, but they are also very important to helping fund the important work of the WSRP as we try to maintain one of the largest field programs in the country, reach new voters with our messaging, and implement new programs like Ballot Collection that will bring our party to victory this year and next. Don't miss this chance to connect, celebrate, and work together towards a stronger Washington State.

In partnership with you,

Caleb Heimlich
Chairman
Washington State Republican Party
---
| | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/wsrp/michael-baumgartner-announcement-1341116?e=6a281f566d)
---
| _Copyright © 2023 Washington State Republican Party, All rights reserved._

His global perspective, formed by extensive travel to over 80 countries, makes him an invaluable asset to our party. Michael is a public servant through and through and we appreciate his strong dedication to our state, country, and Republican Party. I hope you are just as excited as I am to join fellow Republicans and Michael at one, or both, of these upcoming events! Please click on the links below to find more details and register today! | | 🌟 46th Annual Washington State Republican Party Dinner: Michael emceed our 2022 Annual Dinner and was such a crowd favorite that we had to bring him back again this year! If you missed last years' dinner - be sure to come to this one! This event promises to be one of our best yet as we honor the outstanding leadership of Congresswoman Cathy McMorris Rodgers, and welcome Congressman Burgess Owens (UT-04) as a keynote speaker. Event Details: Date: Friday, October 27th Time: 6 PM | VIP & General Receptions, 7 PM | Dinner Location: Hyatt Regency Bellevue, Bellevue, WA Tickets: | [Get Tickets Now! [46th Annual Dinner]]( "Get Tickets Now! \[46th Annual Dinner\]") | 🌟 Heart of the Party - Spokane: We invite you to join us, alongside Spokane County Treasurer Michael Baumgartner and Congresswoman Cathy McMorris Rodgers, at our 5th Annual 'Heart of the Party' Reception in Spokane. This event is your opportunity to engage with local elected officials, candidates, and fellow Republicans from the Spokane Area at the Beacon Hill Event Center. Event Details: Date: Tuesday, June 27 Time: 6 PM - 8 PM (VIP Roundtable at 5 PM) Location: Beacon Hill Event Center, Spokane, WA Tickets: | [Get Tickets Now! [Spokane Heart of the Party]]( "Get Tickets Now! \[Spokane Heart of the Party\]") | "Join us at a Heart of the Party Reception Near You!" | | These events give us an opportunity to celebrate what makes our party great, but they are also very important to helping fund the important work of the WSRP as we try to maintain one of the largest field programs in the country, reach new voters with our messaging, and implement new programs like Ballot Collection that will bring our party to victory this year and next. Don't miss this chance to connect, celebrate, and work together towards a stronger Washington State. name: Katie Porter
subject: My top priority
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
The power of special interests is at an all time high.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=23499%2E3422442%2Ere4WZF)
Derek, let me tell you exactly what the number one problem I plan to solve in the Senate is: the influence of billionaires and the most powerful corporations.
Washington caters to the desires of billionaires and the most powerful corporations, and leaves families behind. That corruption has eroded the integrity of all our political institutions, especially Congress.
The power of special interests in Washington is at an all-time high, and while Republicans have been the worst offenders of this, some members of both parties share responsibility.
Our next Senator should be fighting for Californians, not corporations.
**I’m proud to be the only candidate in this race who has never taken a dime of corporate PAC money.** I’m one of just a handful of Congressmembers who doesn’t accept federal lobbyist contributions. It’s my job to fight corruption, and I know how to stand up against powerful interests in Washington.
**[I’m counting on grassroots supporters to power our campaign. Can you make a contribution today to help power our campaign?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230524-1?amount=5&refcode=EMAH24_1_PRI_20230524_V1_F&refcode2=23499_3422442_re4WZF&akid=23499%2E3422442%2Ere4WZF)**
**[Donate $5 ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230524-1?amount=5&refcode=EMAH24_1_PRI_20230524_V1_F&refcode2=23499_3422442_re4WZF&akid=23499%2E3422442%2Ere4WZF)**
I’m so appreciative of your support.
Katie

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAH24_1_PRI_20230524_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=23499_3422442_re4WZF&akid=23499%2E3422442%2Ere4WZF)**

name: Nick Melvoin
subject: What’s with the games, Congress?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nick Melvoin for Congress - FEC ID #C00831289
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63748411/407892887/2045957508?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQxNjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODUxNWYxOTMtNTVmYS1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=C6pbG2fBFqUifJcoEyq3zi30pSQv_lTUgDgHolwPzoA=&emci=c1130f3a-9af9-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=8515f193-55fa-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=10481059)
---

| | Peter – As the effects of climate change get worse, the government's ability to respond needs to get _a lot_ better – and Congress just isn't getting the job done. **We don't have time to waste delaying important investments in American infrastructure today, because we need a solid foundation to build on tomorrow.** That's the perspective I've brought to my role as chair of the infrastructure committee for the Los Angeles Unified School District, and it's a cornerstone of my plans for when I get to Congress. Here's a quick recap: **First, I worked on electrifying the fleet of buses** and moved forward with adding 24 new electric charging stations to support LAUSD's electric bus fleet. And just two weeks ago, we took steps to add 180 electric buses to the district fleet. Those buses will cut our carbon emissions by more than 750,000 tons each year, as well as save the district $2 million per year. Those buses and the supporting electrical infrastructure represent a tremendous and essential step forward, positioning our city to lead the country into the future, rather than play catch up. Then, after I stood on the blistering asphalt at schools in our California sunshine,**I advocated for an immediate response to expand shading structures and cooling areas on school campuses.** I quickly realized the problem is that even simple solutions like putting up a shade sail are being held up by state regulations. But rather than throwing up my hands, I found legislators to carry legislation to ease these regulations; that bill should be on the Governor’s desk in coming weeks. We need that shade sail today, _and_ we need longer term investments that will set us up in the future. **I pushed LAUSD to lead the way to a greener future for our kids, families, and school communities and have invested millions of dollars into schools to rip up asphalt and add grass and trees and learning gardens – and that tenacity and creativity is coming with me to Congress.** When I'm in office, there will be no partisan games. I'll build on last year's bipartisan infrastructure bill to make sure we can address the emergency for communities now, while building a better world for the future. _Nick_ | Express Donate: If you've clean_body: | | | | Peter – As the effects of climate change get worse, the government's ability to respond needs to get a lot better – and Congress just isn't getting the job done. We don't have time to waste delaying important investments in American infrastructure today, because we need a solid foundation to build on tomorrow. That's the perspective I've brought to my role as chair of the infrastructure committee for the Los Angeles Unified School District, and it's a cornerstone of my plans for when I get to Congress. Here's a quick recap: First, I worked on electrifying the fleet of buses and moved forward with adding 24 new electric charging stations to support LAUSD's electric bus fleet. And just two weeks ago, we took steps to add 180 electric buses to the district fleet. Those buses will cut our carbon emissions by more than 750,000 tons each year, as well as save the district $2 million per year. Those buses and the supporting electrical infrastructure represent a tremendous and essential step forward, positioning our city to lead the country into the future, rather than play catch up. Then, after I stood on the blistering asphalt at schools in our California sunshine,I advocated for an immediate response to expand shading structures and cooling areas on school campuses. I quickly realized the problem is that even simple solutions like putting up a shade sail are being held up by state regulations. But rather than throwing up my hands, I found legislators to carry legislation to ease these regulations; that bill should be on the Governor’s desk in coming weeks. We need that shade sail today, and we need longer term investments that will set us up in the future. I pushed LAUSD to lead the way to a greener future for our kids, families, and school communities and have invested millions of dollars into schools to rip up asphalt and add grass and trees and learning gardens – and that tenacity and creativity is coming with me to Congress. When I'm in office, there will be no partisan games. I'll build on last year's bipartisan infrastructure bill to make sure we can address the emergency for communities now, while building a better world for the future.
