name: Chloe Cole
subject: I need your help to protect children from gender-affirming care
body:
I guess I’m what you’d call a “cautionary tale.”

| |
---
| |
# FROM THE DESK OF CHLOE COLE
---
|
---
Dear Friend,My name is Chloe.
---
| | You don’t know me but I’m hoping you saw me on Fox News talking to Tucker Carlson.There are lots of powerful people who don’t want my story to get out, so I’m so grateful that Mr. Carlson had me on as a guest.
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zaihgtc2btr8iuoboqjsr69r7b9j7sadnrq8sasg_rp22sh2s8i66o71cjhm4o32chh2bs)
---
| | I guess I’m what you’d call a “cautionary tale.”You see, I’m one of those girls who was deceived by the transgender movement. I’m 18 years old now but here is a picture of what I looked like before the transgender movement got me. And one from after -- when they had turned me into a “boy.”
---
| | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zsfpseuvuudvbbkevto5ioidaipecbntq2oc8pi0_rp22sh2s8i66o71cjhm4o32chh2bs)
---
** _Before transitioning_**
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqcr5195oe5c6jb3pam7oi5lmfimide8c2r4mg50_rp22sh2s8i66o71cjhm4o32chh2bs)
---
**_After transitioning_**
---
| | [**Even though we don’t know each other, I’m writing you today hoping you’ll help me stop the** **horror of what happened to me, from happening to other children and their parents.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztv5ai81hqjnngfsojh4diit5b9tc7anvv1de1do_rp22sh2s8i66o71cjhm4o32chh2bs) It all started when I was 11 years old and growing up in Northern California. I was growing embarrassed and confused once my body started changing.I was also shy and didn’t socialize easily – and I didn’t feel comfortable talking about any of this with my parents.But I found ‘friends’ on the internet who told me if I was uncomfortable with my body, I was probably a boy trapped in the wrong body.And the more I agreed with them, the more they celebrated me.I was getting the message loud and clear: if I was a girl who became a boy, I’d be valued and loved even more.Before long I was telling my parents I was transgender.They had no idea what to do. My poor parents were scared and desperate and took me to “experts” who convinced them that if they failed to act quickly, I would surely commit suicide.**The gender clinic gave my parents an ultimatum: “Would you rather have a dead daughter or a living son?”** Given those choices, my parents would have signed anything the doctors put in front of them if it meant “saving” me. When they signed those forms, it wasn’t informed parental consent. It was a desperate decision made under extreme duress.And so, at age 13, I was fast-tracked for medical transition from a girl into a boy. [**Will you help me fight so these radical doctors and hospitals can’t prey on another scared, confused, lonely child like they did me?**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqal5pco116q7mauukhklm4iabim4n5aujhtapfg_rp22sh2s8i66o71cjhm4o32chh2bs) The doctors started giving me weekly testosterone injections...they injected me with an experimental drug used to chemically castrate sex offenders......and finally, they removed my breasts in a radical double mastectomy.I was fifteen years old.And of course, none of this made me any happier or less confused.If you’re like most people I tell my story to... right about now you’re probably thinking, “HOW did it ever get this far?” And the answer is simple.The “experts” lied to my parents -- and to me -- every step of the way.They claimed I would never get “better” unless I medically transitioned – when the truth is that the vast majority of children who think they’re transgender grow out of it with absolutely no chemical or surgical intervention. They claimed their consent forms covered all the risks of pumping testosterone and puberty blockers into my 13-year-old body......while their forms left out dozens and dozens of known risks.They never told us that there isn’t one single scientific study on the effects these treatments have on young children. And they never, ever, were straight with me about what it would mean to let them remove my breasts.When I woke up from that surgery, I was shocked at how mangled my body was. And now years after the surgery, I still wear bandages every day to cover the oozing, unhealed scars.At age 18, I’m just beginning to understand what it will mean to never nurse my child -- if I’ll ever be able to have children at all. For the rest of my life, my voice will sound like a man’s, my body will look like a boy’s, and who knows what cancers, cardiac problems, bone problems, and more are lurking around the corner.And my parents feel like they’ve failed me on every level imaginable.I can’t go back. I can’t change what happened. But I can change what happens to the THOUSANDS of kids just like me who are falling prey to the predatory transgender movement and unscrupulous abusive medical “experts.” [**And YOU can help me.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4nc4b4t8i0e2qqkk6589fmk6tqmla7l6pt5teb0_rp22sh2s8i66o71cjhm4o32chh2bs) More and more children are mutilated and abused every day.**There’s even a doctor who advertises her mutilation surgeries on TikTok to draw young kids in.** And it won’t stop until someone fights back.When I turned 18, I decided that someone would be me. I had no idea how I would do it, but I’d seen enough T.V. to know I needed a lawyer. I also didn’t know how hard it would be to find someone willing to take my case in liberal California. didn’t even know what a liberal was until they started slamming doors in my face!Finally, someone told me to call Harmeet Dhillon at the Center for American Liberty.
---
| | And the first time we spoke, I felt something I hadn’t felt in a long time -- hope.Because Harmeet is a fighter like me. She didn’t tell me we’d never win against the giant medical industry.She didn’t tell me the transgender issue was too sensitive to touch.She told me my fight mattered.
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2cvu02rde6ti600kcc47jj2p8drcg4crs5aglm0_rp22sh2s8i66o71cjhm4o32chh2bs)
---
| | Not only because of what had happened to me -- but also because we could STOP it from happening to other children. And so together with Harmeet Dhillon’s non-profit -- the Center for American Liberty -- I’ve launched a case against the radical doctors and hospital who preyed on me......and who continue to prey on children -- maybe even in your family.As I’ve mentioned several times -- I’m 18-years-old.On my own, I’d never have the money to pay for a giant court case like this. That’s one of the ways these radicals are taking over everything. They know regular people like me don’t have the money to fight them in court.But that’s exactly why Harmeet started the Center for American Liberty. The Center for American Liberty brings together attorneys who want to fight for what’s right and matches them with people like me who would have had nowhere else to turn.Right now, the Center for American Liberty has landmark cases going like:
---
* _Brach v. Newsom_ \-- to stop California from shutting down private and religious schools...
* _Ngo v. Roce City Antifa_ \-- to get justice for Andy Ngo after he was beaten by Antifa thugs and liberal politicians did NOTHING...
* _O’Handley v. Padilla_ \-- to stop Big Government from using Big Tech to silence people they disagree with...
* And now my case... _Chloe Cole v. Kaiser Permanente_.

---
The Center for American Liberty is a nonprofit. They have big cases but that doesn’t mean they have the big money that their opponents have.[**That’s why I hope you’ll consider helping us by rushing back a small tax-deductible donation of $25 or more.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2aoe5un1spvdeiq4f0kajbv59f9vr1nc45gkueg_rp22sh2s8i66o71cjhm4o32chh2bs) There are big forces at work who want to get rich no matter who they hurt.Alone we’re no match for them. [**But if everyone I’m writing to can contribute just $25, or if you’re able, maybe more -- $35, $50, $75, $100, $200, or even $500**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zg8taguoku0vk2gmcgklsvgli3i85sg4ap54qv48_rp22sh2s8i66o71cjhm4o32chh2bs), we can beat these monsters who are using scared, confused and lonely children to make a buck. For exposing them, I’ve been called a “liar.” I’ve even been told de-transitioners like me don’t exist. But when we beat them in court and stop them from hurting any more children with their lies and mutilations,I will be proud to face them and say:**_“You may have taken away my childhood, and forever changed my future -- but I exist. I exist.”_** Thank you for reading this letter from a complete stranger. I hope I can call you a friend now. And thank you for whatever help you can send to the Center for American Liberty. **[Whether it’s $25, $35, $50, $75, $100, $200, or even $500 or more...](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z16tdqejb6o8jckhufg8s2algedbdsjpdpprlcho_rp22sh2s8i66o71cjhm4o32chh2bs)** every bit moves us closer to stopping these monsters.
---
| | Thank you,Chloe Cole

It’s been a long, painful road but I’m finding happiness and purpose as I fight to make sure what happened to me NEVER happens to another child. **[Please help me with your tax-deductible gift of $25 or more.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0d2tdob2eq1279012faib17u5tfmibtqf4g8sn0_rp22sh2s8i66o71cjhm4o32chh2bs) **Thank you so much for your help. --Chloe

clean_body: I guess I’m what you’d call a “cautionary tale.” | | | | FROM THE DESK OF CHLOE COLE | Dear Friend,My name is Chloe. | | You don’t know me but I’m hoping you saw me on Fox News talking to Tucker Carlson.There are lots of powerful people who don’t want my story to get out, so I’m so grateful that Mr. Carlson had me on as a guest. | | | I guess I’m what you’d call a “cautionary tale.”You see, I’m one of those girls who was deceived by the transgender movement. I’m 18 years old now but here is a picture of what I looked like before the transgender movement got me. And one from after -- when they had turned me into a “boy.” | | Before transitioning | After transitioning | | It all started when I was 11 years old and growing up in Northern California. I was growing embarrassed and confused once my body started changing.I was also shy and didn’t socialize easily – and I didn’t feel comfortable talking about any of this with my parents.But I found ‘friends’ on the internet who told me if I was uncomfortable with my body, I was probably a boy trapped in the wrong body.And the more I agreed with them, the more they celebrated me.I was getting the message loud and clear: if I was a girl who became a boy, I’d be valued and loved even more.Before long I was telling my parents I was transgender.They had no idea what to do. My poor parents were scared and desperate and took me to “experts” who convinced them that if they failed to act quickly, I would surely commit suicide.The gender clinic gave my parents an ultimatum: “Would you rather have a dead daughter or a living son?” Given those choices, my parents would have signed anything the doctors put in front of them if it meant “saving” me. When they signed those forms, it wasn’t informed parental consent. It was a desperate decision made under extreme duress.And so, at age 13, I was fast-tracked for medical transition from a girl into a boy. The doctors started giving me weekly testosterone injections...they injected me with an experimental drug used to chemically castrate sex offenders......and finally, they removed my breasts in a radical double mastectomy.I was fifteen years old.And of course, none of this made me any happier or less confused.If you’re like most people I tell my story to... right about now you’re probably thinking, “HOW did it ever get this far?” And the answer is simple.The “experts” lied to my parents -- and to me -- every step of the way.They claimed I would never get “better” unless I medically transitioned – when the truth is that the vast majority of children who think they’re transgender grow out of it with absolutely no chemical or surgical intervention. They claimed their consent forms covered all the risks of pumping testosterone and puberty blockers into my 13-year-old body......while their forms left out dozens and dozens of known risks.They never told us that there isn’t one single scientific study on the effects these treatments have on young children. And they never, ever, were straight with me about what it would mean to let them remove my breasts.When I woke up from that surgery, I was shocked at how mangled my body was. And now years after the surgery, I still wear bandages every day to cover the oozing, unhealed scars.At age 18, I’m just beginning to understand what it will mean to never nurse my child -- if I’ll ever be able to have children at all. For the rest of my life, my voice will sound like a man’s, my body will look like a boy’s, and who knows what cancers, cardiac problems, bone problems, and more are lurking around the corner.And my parents feel like they’ve failed me on every level imaginable.I can’t go back. I can’t change what happened. But I can change what happens to the THOUSANDS of kids just like me who are falling prey to the predatory transgender movement and unscrupulous abusive medical “experts.” More and more children are mutilated and abused every day.There’s even a doctor who advertises her mutilation surgeries on TikTok to draw young kids in. And it won’t stop until someone fights back.When I turned 18, I decided that someone would be me. I had no idea how I would do it, but I’d seen enough T.V. to know I needed a lawyer. I also didn’t know how hard it would be to find someone willing to take my case in liberal California. didn’t even know what a liberal was until they started slamming doors in my face!Finally, someone told me to call Harmeet Dhillon at the Center for American Liberty. | | And the first time we spoke, I felt something I hadn’t felt in a long time -- hope.Because Harmeet is a fighter like me. She didn’t tell me we’d never win against the giant medical industry.She didn’t tell me the transgender issue was too sensitive to touch.She told me my fight mattered. | | | Not only because of what had happened to me -- but also because we could STOP it from happening to other children. And so together with Harmeet Dhillon’s non-profit -- the Center for American Liberty -- I’ve launched a case against the radical doctors and hospital who preyed on me......and who continue to prey on children -- maybe even in your family.As I’ve mentioned several times -- I’m 18-years-old.On my own, I’d never have the money to pay for a giant court case like this. That’s one of the ways these radicals are taking over everything. They know regular people like me don’t have the money to fight them in court.But that’s exactly why Harmeet started the Center for American Liberty. The Center for American Liberty brings together attorneys who want to fight for what’s right and matches them with people like me who would have had nowhere else to turn.Right now, the Center for American Liberty has landmark cases going like: Brach v. Newsom \-- to stop California from shutting down private and religious schools... Ngo v. Roce City Antifa \-- to get justice for Andy Ngo after he was beaten by Antifa thugs and liberal politicians did NOTHING... O’Handley v. Padilla \-- to stop Big Government from using Big Tech to silence people they disagree with... And now my case... Chloe Cole v. Kaiser Permanente. The Center for American Liberty is a nonprofit. They have big cases but that doesn’t mean they have the big money that their opponents have. There are big forces at work who want to get rich no matter who they hurt.Alone we’re no match for them. , we can beat these monsters who are using scared, confused and lonely children to make a buck. For exposing them, I’ve been called a “liar.” I’ve even been told de-transitioners like me don’t exist. But when we beat them in court and stop them from hurting any more children with their lies and mutilations,I will be proud to face them and say:“You may have taken away my childhood, and forever changed my future -- but I exist. I exist.” Thank you for reading this letter from a complete stranger. I hope I can call you a friend now. And thank you for whatever help you can send to the Center for American Liberty. every bit moves us closer to stopping these monsters. | | Thank you,Chloe Cole | | | P.S. This is a photo of me now. It’s been a long, painful road but I’m finding happiness and purpose as I fight to make sure what happened to me NEVER happens to another child. Thank you so much for your help. --Chloe | | | | The Center for American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. © The Center for American Liberty | PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177 | Trump Train News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

body:
Representative Greene wasn’t even using a dog whistle — it was a bullhorn, putting a racist target on my back to her MAGA supporters. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTv5FkIr5c7zcon0qk2h8W8tnozhyg6PuRooCwWhX9ZW_NzGSSEVcEYPrAxWdADMM6RQZgSQeQkiWFbUdnIu172ri7XnWd096tIDyyzXvvNkOIALyI1gBBawMJvm0fSTFXEQBdTlu55RX9fZjV0uvzBm5sdRqmU0bYPC-Q24pXMi8BXvxv25XUc-6pKEC9YLlZswJXRw3zvxDllClZyvCjYeHUN-oPYDNkpEGQb0kenLuh5hvbtRfRmp3Qk0cywpRmfV67ToMoWWDRG_Yaijg1LSHxVriDpQfMZcuBX1tq4I9k/3wg/9gVC8ZRLTiugsYHwQ9d-8A/h0/-BoZXBwA9OiOXl58XFH663PjO9TIPteTTiL0SM1SON8)
---
Hey Friend, it’s Congressman Jamaal Bowman. I just want to make one thing clear: In her press conference in front of countless reporters Marjorie Taylor Greene said something incredibly dangerous — calling me “aggressive” and saying she feels “threatened” by me. **Representative Greene wasn’t even using a dog whistle — it was a bullhorn, putting a racist target on my back to her MAGA supporters.** It echoes what happened with Emmett Till and with Mike Brown, and unfortunately this country has a history of characterizing Black men who are outspoken, who stand their ground, or who push back as being “threatening” or “intimidating.” Marjorie Taylor Greene is a white supremacist. Describing somebody’s beliefs — which are clear for everybody to see — isn’t “like calling a person of color the n word,” no matter what false equivalencies she might draw. This behavior is dangerous and reckless — but we can’t let it stop our movement for progressive change. [**We must ALL continue to speak truth to power, and I’ll keep standing up to right-wing extremists. clean_body: Representative Greene wasn’t even using a dog whistle — it was a bullhorn, putting a racist target on my back to her MAGA supporters. | | | Hey Friend, it’s Congressman Jamaal Bowman. I just want to make one thing clear: In her press conference in front of countless reporters Marjorie Taylor Greene said something incredibly dangerous — calling me “aggressive” and saying she feels “threatened” by me. Representative Greene wasn’t even using a dog whistle — it was a bullhorn, putting a racist target on my back to her MAGA supporters. It echoes what happened with Emmett Till and with Mike Brown, and unfortunately this country has a history of characterizing Black men who are outspoken, who stand their ground, or who push back as being “threatening” or “intimidating.” Marjorie Taylor Greene is a white supremacist. Describing somebody’s beliefs — which are clear for everybody to see — isn’t “like calling a person of color the n word,” no matter what false equivalencies she might draw. This behavior is dangerous and reckless — but we can’t let it stop our movement for progressive change. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Thank you for being on our side in this fight. Peace and love, Jamaal Bowman Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . body:
We have to start beating the Democrats at their own game. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/c60956b082c4/new-ad-encouraging-republicans-to-use-mail-in-ballots?e=6ec25014bb)
---
| |
---
| |
---
| Peter,

_**We have our work cut out for us.**_ We just finished reviewing the latest turnout numbers from last week's primary and they're not good.
**The Democrats have already locked in hundreds of thousands of votes for their candidates in 2023 by signing up their supporters for mail-in ballots**. If we don't move fast, we're not going to have a chance in November.

**That's why we're working every day to get our message out that we have to close the mail-in gap in order to win.**
---
| [ ](https://winagain.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4d23cb6a962c3894367acf5d9&id=d67ee0c07d&e=6ec25014bb)
---
Check out our new ad
| Peter, we need your help to get this info out to every Republican in the state. **_If we ever want to win again in Pennsylvania, we have to beat the Democrats at their own game._ **Unfortunately, we're going up against an army of well-funded far-left groups, and we can't do it alone.
_**Can you help us stand up to the Democrats' mail-in ballot machine? **_

Arnaud Armstrong

clean_body: We have to start beating the Democrats at their own game. | | | | | | | | Peter, We have our work cut out for us. We just finished reviewing the latest turnout numbers from last week's primary and they're not good. The Democrats have already locked in hundreds of thousands of votes for their candidates in 2023 by signing up their supporters for mail-in ballots. If we don't move fast, we're not going to have a chance in November. That's why we're working every day to get our message out that we have to close the mail-in gap in order to win. | Check out our new ad | Peter, we need your help to get this info out to every Republican in the state. If we ever want to win again in Pennsylvania, we have to beat the Democrats at their own game. Unfortunately, we're going up against an army of well-funded far-left groups, and we can't do it alone. Can you help us stand up to the Democrats' mail-in ballot machine? | "I'll Fight Back" | Thank you for your support, Arnaud Armstrong Executive Director Win Again PAC | | | | | | | | | | | | | Paid for by Win Again PAC. Peter, it’s Nancy Mace (the high school drop-out got her start as a Waffle House Waitress). [**I need a quick moment of your time.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=f0c58e699138412283fc4e2f2bb9b3f9&_e=TZES4WM5Pxu-SIxRb5EHrJj1PuEkRsL4EosdHF4KjT-FgET1BKhQkoSopchgV9vSCP9u-Mbe3qYhGTQc3rjgCnJety9kO5MLnsqHk82UQEJy6d90u0Yc3PaxIwQm0ARDCC9e1NuiYavujel-cV_zgzWMBLO8qvP9qyYkyzmqKwYUHwSsziTQXi06pmzSWCB_xwZC-RoMFhGEzYnGjD8KptanDROSnwGKpdTRIE-rNmShr3Gu_F7G2P4mck5f3ZbYOH9biKbNV1QggvaiG2KuAYmHxA2d-tLM5tu3qcOmtLpsI7D-BwfZoVITZg9_buB7eH92OQ1DzjWpg6JLnCG1RhUg0Fgdzxbx_gAC48YMWIWoowuDr20GStq2ul7UxueK8OnxjskSaboasUugNrubH5IV7jku3kZSrF_A-CKCAg0%3D)

**The short version:**
I’m up against the clock on my fundraising goal and will miss it unless you take action immediately. Remember, I’m running in a district we barely flipped in 2020, and fighting tooth and nail to keep in red. [**I need to know if I can count on you to help in the next 15 minutes.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=f0c58e699138412283fc4e2f2bb9b3f9&_e=TZES4WM5Pxu-SIxRb5EHrJj1PuEkRsL4EosdHF4KjT-FgET1BKhQkoSopchgV9vSCP9u-Mbe3qYhGTQc3rjgCnJety9kO5MLnsqHk82UQEJy6d90u0Yc3PaxIwQm0ARDCC9e1NuiYavujel-cV_zgzWMBLO8qvP9qyYkyzmqKwYUHwSsziTQXi06pmzSWCB_xwZC-RoMFhGEzYnGjD8KptanDROSnwGKpdTRIE-rNmShr3Gu_F7G2P4mck5f3ZbYOH9biKbNV1QggvaiG2KuAfDn5-IS3l_HRt9yKUqptwU-IBGWPvXWAq8AeDdTCR_oR-f9G5nBE8uGOJSjutssTmUZ6PYX_b4sN5VvsAURyBpmbvZIQPgC_85AYTsuewIfZhoMEIrXDv9lEwohGp8EG0Wh_UsBB98Zo8Z8dluYwIM%3D)

**The long version:**
This is what I didn’t want to have to send you, Peter. I know how bad things are right now. People are struggling to afford rent, buy groceries, and fill up their tank at the gas pump.

I’ve been there. Like a lot of Americans, I struggled to make ends meet, living paycheck to paycheck. At 17 years old, I dropped out of high school and started waitressing at the local Waffle House to put food on the table.

I didn’t grow up with millions in the bank, and a silver spoon in my mouth. My dad was an Army General and my mom a schoolteacher. My parents taught me the key to success, **work**. And working is what I’ve been doing since I was 17.

Congress is in desperate need of someone to come in and shake things up – someone who understands having to make the choice between gas or groceries because you only have enough dollar bills in your wallet to cover one or the other. _Someone who knows what it’s like to earn a living and make sacrifices._

So now you see why I had to email you today and ask for your immediate support. [**My fundraising deadline is coming up quickly and I’m behind. Will you tap the secure link and make an emergency donation to my campaign to send a hard-working, every-day American to Washington to fight for you?**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=f0c58e699138412283fc4e2f2bb9b3f9&_e=TZES4WM5Pxu-SIxRb5EHrJj1PuEkRsL4EosdHF4KjT-FgET1BKhQkoSopchgV9vSCP9u-Mbe3qYhGTQc3rjgCnJety9kO5MLnsqHk82UQEJy6d90u0Yc3PaxIwQm0ARDCC9e1NuiYavujel-cV_zgzWMBLO8qvP9qyYkyzmqKwYUHwSsziTQXi06pmzSWCB_xwZC-RoMFhGEzYnGjD8KptanDROSnwGKpdTRIE-rNmShr3Gu_F7G2P4mck5f3ZbYOH9biKbNV1QggvaiG2KuAWoIbLNZHxs4EwuLQM7U8m_wPq47s0SrnQoIW7FzkZa-hLiEWULVL2Yd9RL1SR1SkjV1ixHIvvGPtYV3rZWw6116svtmMYKDkCCedHvRnJVRBL1wKEw-Bs-wFH_IhyojWuJQoBkZR7nr-GtljX40sJU%3D)

[** EMERGENCY DONATION ➞ **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=f0c58e699138412283fc4e2f2bb9b3f9&_e=TZES4WM5Pxu-SIxRb5EHrJj1PuEkRsL4EosdHF4KjT-FgET1BKhQkoSopchgV9vSCP9u-Mbe3qYhGTQc3rjgCnJety9kO5MLnsqHk82UQEJy6d90u0Yc3PaxIwQm0ARDCC9e1NuiYavujel-cV_zgzWMBLO8qvP9qyYkyzmqKwYUHwSsziTQXi06pmzSWCB_xwZC-RoMFhGEzYnGjD8KptanDROSnwGKpdTRIE-rNmShr3Gu_F7G2P4mck5f3ZbYOH9biKbNV1QggvaiG2KuAbIQuSQgmA0HYun7NtUS5zvNJpwtC5ppkNB_jDhjAO7rBzfTuCgtTuIcc3xfN7TEHsZvwkFF-csidz-jJYK6WdZ4gb8Pyyfd3VPCR_WeYX_q3wWdqAU8gbZ2yR1H1x5vPcqDx4Gwb9ksgxSIp8gU9o4%3D)
Keep in mind, Peter, in 2019 this seat was filled by an entrenched far-Left member. Now, Pelosi and her cronies are desperately trying to flip it regain their majority. If Republicans are going to keep the House, then it’s ESSENTIAL this seat stays in RED.

We can’t let the Left buy back this seat – _**the Lowcountry is not for sale!**_

If Pelosi regains the majority, she will go wild...

[**Which is why I need your immediate help. Can you spare any amount towards my re-election campaign today?**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=f0c58e699138412283fc4e2f2bb9b3f9&_e=TZES4WM5Pxu-SIxRb5EHrJj1PuEkRsL4EosdHF4KjT-FgET1BKhQkoSopchgV9vSCP9u-Mbe3qYhGTQc3rjgCnJety9kO5MLnsqHk82UQEJy6d90u0Yc3PaxIwQm0ARDCC9e1NuiYavujel-cV_zgzWMBLO8qvP9qyYkyzmqKwYUHwSsziTQXi06pmzSWCB_xwZC-RoMFhGEzYnGjD8KptanDROSnwGKpdTRIE-rNmShr3Gu_F7G2P4mck5f3ZbYOH9biKbNV1QggvaiG2KuAUCHnn4W7DFAMpTtyH5tKaUWri0IKaxkupfp-vEpd90noAgwzL5C5SahUqJuEtcATBGHyAWWdcXqFgAo-LWf-yP4bTS9Ax0NvrLx_R6bhNR39Iu6pfErEue4Hn3w35_u9JW3MW-ACWeCSCycHsfXE3g%3D)

[** EMERGENCY DONATION ➞ **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=f0c58e699138412283fc4e2f2bb9b3f9&_e=TZES4WM5Pxu-SIxRb5EHrJj1PuEkRsL4EosdHF4KjT-FgET1BKhQkoSopchgV9vSCP9u-Mbe3qYhGTQc3rjgCnJety9kO5MLnsqHk82UQEJy6d90u0Yc3PaxIwQm0ARDCC9e1NuiYavujel-cV_zgzWMBLO8qvP9qyYkyzmqKwYUHwSsziTQXi06pmzSWCB_xwZC-RoMFhGEzYnGjD8KptanDROSnwGKpdTRIE-rNmShr3Gu_F7G2P4mck5f3ZbYOH9biKbNV1QggvaiG2KuAY59_yz9O1Ta9sFxEIHfPNOzuc8DEQlBPutCsi7CNncPAGsnOzaBNHfe3R-YJ79PDfjjQvN5IrVkXQtwyCGc42BJi0pYiRg_76sN1bkmkuviwo1uuKCOC72rsRkfPJXfoa1teUDzB770CuZuD2tWxdo%3D)
[**Help me take our country back and restore REAL values to Washington.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=f0c58e699138412283fc4e2f2bb9b3f9&_e=TZES4WM5Pxu-SIxRb5EHrJj1PuEkRsL4EosdHF4KjT-FgET1BKhQkoSopchgV9vSCP9u-Mbe3qYhGTQc3rjgCnJety9kO5MLnsqHk82UQEJy6d90u0Yc3PaxIwQm0ARDCC9e1NuiYavujel-cV_zgzWMBLO8qvP9qyYkyzmqKwYUHwSsziTQXi06pmzSWCB_xwZC-RoMFhGEzYnGjD8KptanDROSnwGKpdTRIE-rNmShr3Gu_F7G2P4mck5f3ZbYOH9biKbNV1QggvaiG2KuAXmQ03IXpXoAH5rk4jMvVff6BJ57UM9SkaUoAUo9M45P_B_gwNAaZGIwrAmbChvmTTvd7Ac0BU1jpkHW4y67Oh0E33lW0NH2Afx5DxrbuZ-59XReNf6IM4jL4TxJnhXvRFHoNHcFXHM-XKRRIugdNYI%3D)

Thank you and God bless,

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=f0c58e699138412283fc4e2f2bb9b3f9&_e=TZES4WM5Pxu-SIxRb5EHrJj1PuEkRsL4EosdHF4KjT-FgET1BKhQkoSopchgV9vSCP9u-Mbe3qYhGTQc3rjgCnJety9kO5MLnsqHk82UQEJy6d90u0Yc3PaxIwQm0ARDCC9e1NuiYavujel-cV_zgzWMBLO8qvP9qyYkyzmqKwYUHwSsziTQXi06pmzSWCB_xwZC-RoMFhGEzYnGjD8KptanDROSnwGKpdTRIE-rNmShr3Gu_F7G2P4mck5f3ZbYOH9biKbNV1QggvaiG2KuAblbXGY9bkVZhP3HDnEq7uemv2YcXoYHL7NfHuI-yVhrUpWeWGS7dHM34YY4JtNIm0Msj_16bc8jRhXif5mGiBlwMBr3atV0I68zowZ5za7H-XSBe_t56pwzyuKUgrjJ8dRLsPtYZp3nd91nPizZTj8%3D)
Nancy Mace

P.S. I know money is tight, but truly one dollar can make a difference in a campaign like mine because these races come down to the last minute, the last dollar, and the last vote. So, if you only have a dollar to spare, please know how thankful I am for your support, and I hope to continue to make you proud in Congress.

| | |
# About Nancy
---
Congresswoman Nancy Mace grew up in the Lowcountry. She is the daughter of a retired Army General and retired school teacher. She is a proud mother of two, the first female to graduate from The Citadel’s Corps of Cadets, and a tough conservative who wants to save our country from the radicals who hate America! In 2020, she took SC-01 back from the Democrats and now, is fighting tooth and nail to keep it Red. [**JOIN NANCY**](go.txting.io/mEWDMy)

clean_body: I know money is tight, but truly one dollar can make a difference in a campaign like mine because these races come down to the last minute, the last dollar, and the last vote. | | Peter, it’s Nancy Mace (the high school drop-out got her start as a Waffle House Waitress). The short version: I’m up against the clock on my fundraising goal and will miss it unless you take action immediately. Remember, I’m running in a district we barely flipped in 2020, and fighting tooth and nail to keep in red. The long version: This is what I didn’t want to have to send you, Peter. I know how bad things are right now. People are struggling to afford rent, buy groceries, and fill up their tank at the gas pump. I’ve been there. Like a lot of Americans, I struggled to make ends meet, living paycheck to paycheck. At 17 years old, I dropped out of high school and started waitressing at the local Waffle House to put food on the table. I didn’t grow up with millions in the bank, and a silver spoon in my mouth. My dad was an Army General and my mom a schoolteacher. My parents taught me the key to success, work. And working is what I’ve been doing since I was 17. Congress is in desperate need of someone to come in and shake things up – someone who understands having to make the choice between gas or groceries because you only have enough dollar bills in your wallet to cover one or the other. Someone who knows what it’s like to earn a living and make sacrifices. So now you see why I had to email you today and ask for your immediate support. Keep in mind, Peter, in 2019 this seat was filled by an entrenched far-Left member. Now, Pelosi and her cronies are desperately trying to flip it regain their majority. If Republicans are going to keep the House, then it’s ESSENTIAL this seat stays in RED. We can’t let the Left buy back this seat – the Lowcountry is not for sale! If Pelosi regains the majority, she will go wild... Thank you and God bless, Nancy Mace P.S. I know money is tight, but truly one dollar can make a difference in a campaign like mine because these races come down to the last minute, the last dollar, and the last vote. So, if you only have a dollar to spare, please know how thankful I am for your support, and I hope to continue to make you proud in Congress. | | | About Nancy Congresswoman Nancy Mace grew up in the Lowcountry. She is the daughter of a retired Army General and retired school teacher. She is a proud mother of two, the first female to graduate from The Citadel’s Corps of Cadets, and a tough conservative who wants to save our country from the radicals who hate America! In 2020, she took SC-01 back from the Democrats and now, is fighting tooth and nail to keep it Red. go.txting.io/mEWDMy | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Nancy Mace for Congress Nancy Mace for Congress | 295 Seven Farms Drive, Suite C-186, Charleston, SC 29492

body:
[**SIGN ON: Stop book bans. Defend our right to read!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63749874/407898002/35165902?source=direct_link&referrer=group-derek-marshall-for-congress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fpl_marshall2024%3Famount%3D10%26refcode%3Dpl_20230519_07%26noskip%3Dtrue&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWU5YzkxMC01OWZhLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6hMHW0TLNLNhtnBPDcNtp7dAgHw4W-7gUj_JGKdUCDo=&emci=8b1b1fc4-71f6-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=aae9c910-59fa-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=21617867)
Growing up in a conservative, rural area wasn’t always easy. I didn’t come out as gay until I was an adult.

That’s why it’s inspiring to LGBTQ+ folks like me to see our voices represented.

But according to PEN America, books by and about us have been banned hundreds of times from school libraries in just the last few years.

**I’m running for Congress to stop book bans and stand up for equality, against a Republican that opposes the Equality Act.

[Join my campaign and sign the petition today: Stop book bans. Defend our right to read!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63749875/407898003/35165902?source=direct_link&referrer=group-derek-marshall-for-congress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fpl_marshall2024%3Famount%3D10%26refcode%3Dpl_20230519_07%26noskip%3Dtrue&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWU5YzkxMC01OWZhLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6hMHW0TLNLNhtnBPDcNtp7dAgHw4W-7gUj_JGKdUCDo=&emci=8b1b1fc4-71f6-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=aae9c910-59fa-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=21617867)**

When far-right extremists ban books, they’re sending a powerful message to LGBTQ+ youth: you don’t belong here.

Gov. Ron DeSantis’s “Don’t Say Gay” law goes even further, telling us that no one should even talk about us.

Many book challengers admit they haven’t read the books they’re trying to ban - they just heard something they didn’t like.

Students seeking diverse voices shouldn’t face empty shelves. Our campaign sends a message to LGBTQ+ youth and all students: you belong, and your voices matter.

**[Take action and sign on today: stop book bans. Defend our right to read!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63749876/407898004/35165902?source=direct_link&referrer=group-derek-marshall-for-congress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fpl_marshall2024%3Famount%3D10%26refcode%3Dpl_20230519_07%26noskip%3Dtrue&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWU5YzkxMC01OWZhLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6hMHW0TLNLNhtnBPDcNtp7dAgHw4W-7gUj_JGKdUCDo=&emci=8b1b1fc4-71f6-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=aae9c910-59fa-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=21617867)**

Thanks for taking action,
Derek Marshall

[Donate Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63749877/407898005/-727517715?amount=10&refcode=pl_footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWU5YzkxMC01OWZhLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6hMHW0TLNLNhtnBPDcNtp7dAgHw4W-7gUj_JGKdUCDo=)

name: Chloe Cole
subject: Help me sue doctors who are harming kids
body:
I guess I’m what you’d call a “cautionary tale.”

| |
---
| |
# FROM THE DESK OF CHLOE COLE
---
|
---
Dear Friend,My name is Chloe.
---
| | You don’t know me but I’m hoping you saw me on Fox News talking to Tucker Carlson.There are lots of powerful people who don’t want my story to get out, so I’m so grateful that Mr. Carlson had me on as a guest.
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zned9mrjs1mnksae7eiom5tkafvaalm30phuurg8_rp22sh2s8i66o71cjhmco76cdh2bs)
---
| | I guess I’m what you’d call a “cautionary tale.”You see, I’m one of those girls who was deceived by the transgender movement. I’m 18 years old now but here is a picture of what I looked like before the transgender movement got me. And one from after -- when they had turned me into a “boy.”
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlfnr181gpdqmtur4f9al8f0k9dsbhs53ucfckeg_rp22sh2s8i66o71cjhmco76cdh2bs)
---
** _Before transitioning_**
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdsm2r7uu9f5n86jvlim4mdu7gc95e4471atdp0o_rp22sh2s8i66o71cjhmco76cdh2bs)
---
**_After transitioning_**
---
| | [**Even though we don’t know each other, I’m writing you today hoping you’ll help me stop the** **horror of what happened to me, from happening to other children and their parents.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfutgm6v860jg2j04i6pf4k468ii62o0igucnpd8_rp22sh2s8i66o71cjhmco76cdh2bs) It all started when I was 11 years old and growing up in Northern California. I was growing embarrassed and confused once my body started changing.I was also shy and didn’t socialize easily – and I didn’t feel comfortable talking about any of this with my parents.But I found ‘friends’ on the internet who told me if I was uncomfortable with my body, I was probably a boy trapped in the wrong body.And the more I agreed with them, the more they celebrated me.I was getting the message loud and clear: if I was a girl who became a boy, I’d be valued and loved even more.Before long I was telling my parents I was transgender.They had no idea what to do. My poor parents were scared and desperate and took me to “experts” who convinced them that if they failed to act quickly, I would surely commit suicide.**The gender clinic gave my parents an ultimatum: “Would you rather have a dead daughter or a living son?”** Given those choices, my parents would have signed anything the doctors put in front of them if it meant “saving” me. When they signed those forms, it wasn’t informed parental consent. It was a desperate decision made under extreme duress.And so, at age 13, I was fast-tracked for medical transition from a girl into a boy. [**Will you help me fight so these radical doctors and hospitals can’t prey on another scared, confused, lonely child like they did me?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zoaagas0rpsk1i9ncul0ft0vd6j4d3jchlmp4flo_rp22sh2s8i66o71cjhmco76cdh2bs) The doctors started giving me weekly testosterone injections...they injected me with an experimental drug used to chemically castrate sex offenders......and finally, they removed my breasts in a radical double mastectomy.I was fifteen years old.And of course, none of this made me any happier or less confused.If you’re like most people I tell my story to... right about now you’re probably thinking, “HOW did it ever get this far?” And the answer is simple.The “experts” lied to my parents -- and to me -- every step of the way.They claimed I would never get “better” unless I medically transitioned – when the truth is that the vast majority of children who think they’re transgender grow out of it with absolutely no chemical or surgical intervention. They claimed their consent forms covered all the risks of pumping testosterone and puberty blockers into my 13-year-old body......while their forms left out dozens and dozens of known risks.They never told us that there isn’t one single scientific study on the effects these treatments have on young children. And they never, ever, were straight with me about what it would mean to let them remove my breasts.When I woke up from that surgery, I was shocked at how mangled my body was. And now years after the surgery, I still wear bandages every day to cover the oozing, unhealed scars.At age 18, I’m just beginning to understand what it will mean to never nurse my child -- if I’ll ever be able to have children at all. For the rest of my life, my voice will sound like a man’s, my body will look like a boy’s, and who knows what cancers, cardiac problems, bone problems, and more are lurking around the corner.And my parents feel like they’ve failed me on every level imaginable.I can’t go back. I can’t change what happened. But I can change what happens to the THOUSANDS of kids just like me who are falling prey to the predatory transgender movement and unscrupulous abusive medical “experts.” [**And YOU can help me.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zq2a24jpb6rad47dj7nhd70q8njiqd2fvkni8ne0_rp22sh2s8i66o71cjhmco76cdh2bs) More and more children are mutilated and abused every day.**There’s even a doctor who advertises her mutilation surgeries on TikTok to draw young kids in.** And it won’t stop until someone fights back.When I turned 18, I decided that someone would be me. I had no idea how I would do it, but I’d seen enough T.V. to know I needed a lawyer. I also didn’t know how hard it would be to find someone willing to take my case in liberal California. didn’t even know what a liberal was until they started slamming doors in my face!Finally, someone told me to call Harmeet Dhillon at the Center for American Liberty.
---
| | And the first time we spoke, I felt something I hadn’t felt in a long time -- hope.Because Harmeet is a fighter like me. She didn’t tell me we’d never win against the giant medical industry.She didn’t tell me the transgender issue was too sensitive to touch.She told me my fight mattered.
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkpcati3kp4e80nplab5llak6uimuokvjholtmig_rp22sh2s8i66o71cjhmco76cdh2bs)
---
| | Not only because of what had happened to me -- but also because we could STOP it from happening to other children. And so together with Harmeet Dhillon’s non-profit -- the Center for American Liberty -- I’ve launched a case against the radical doctors and hospital who preyed on me......and who continue to prey on children -- maybe even in your family.As I’ve mentioned several times -- I’m 18-years-old.On my own, I’d never have the money to pay for a giant court case like this. That’s one of the ways these radicals are taking over everything. They know regular people like me don’t have the money to fight them in court.But that’s exactly why Harmeet started the Center for American Liberty. The Center for American Liberty brings together attorneys who want to fight for what’s right and matches them with people like me who would have had nowhere else to turn.Right now, the Center for American Liberty has landmark cases going like:
---
* _Brach v. Newsom_ \-- to stop California from shutting down private and religious schools...
* _Ngo v. Roce City Antifa_ \-- to get justice for Andy Ngo after he was beaten by Antifa thugs and liberal politicians did NOTHING...
* _O’Handley v. Padilla_ \-- to stop Big Government from using Big Tech to silence people they disagree with...
* And now my case... _Chloe Cole v. Kaiser Permanente_.

---
The Center for American Liberty is a nonprofit. They have big cases but that doesn’t mean they have the big money that their opponents have.[**That’s why I hope you’ll consider helping us by rushing back a small tax-deductible donation of $25 or more.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zc0d90h3h2eqf19m76hcp575kbia67vem9cbu448_rp22sh2s8i66o71cjhmco76cdh2bs) There are big forces at work who want to get rich no matter who they hurt.Alone we’re no match for them. [**But if everyone I’m writing to can contribute just $25, or if you’re able, maybe more -- $35, $50, $75, $100, $200, or even $500**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z11808vnbsqe8pmdo42ff84vuvtnpikjd7mku18g_rp22sh2s8i66o71cjhmco76cdh2bs), we can beat these monsters who are using scared, confused and lonely children to make a buck. For exposing them, I’ve been called a “liar.” I’ve even been told de-transitioners like me don’t exist. But when we beat them in court and stop them from hurting any more children with their lies and mutilations,I will be proud to face them and say:**_“You may have taken away my childhood, and forever changed my future -- but I exist. I exist.”_** Thank you for reading this letter from a complete stranger. I hope I can call you a friend now. And thank you for whatever help you can send to the Center for American Liberty. **[Whether it’s $25, $35, $50, $75, $100, $200, or even $500 or more...](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0b5ri6lf355rjaqg93ll5hoqfntnsul877os2jo_rp22sh2s8i66o71cjhmco76cdh2bs)** every bit moves us closer to stopping these monsters.
---
| | Thank you,Chloe Cole
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlphc2b2a8o0tt1blp8ic8i73cvsok01olqigtb0_rp22sh2s8i66o71cjhmco76cdh2bs)
---
| P.S. This is a photo of me now. It’s been a long, painful road but I’m finding happiness and purpose as I fight to make sure what happened to me NEVER happens to another child. **[Please help me with your tax-deductible gift of $25 or more.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z08mfpohgd56avt5ln6g0vqr4vemjc5en0n790v8_rp22sh2s8i66o71cjhmco76cdh2bs) **Thank you so much for your help. --Chloe
---

| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjcj80tabim0re9unau66466gedksak5k1gidlkg_rp22sh2s8i66o71cjhmco76cdh2bs)

clean_body: I guess I’m what you’d call a “cautionary tale.” | | | | FROM THE DESK OF CHLOE COLE | Dear Friend,My name is Chloe. | | You don’t know me but I’m hoping you saw me on Fox News talking to Tucker Carlson.There are lots of powerful people who don’t want my story to get out, so I’m so grateful that Mr. Carlson had me on as a guest. | | | I guess I’m what you’d call a “cautionary tale.”You see, I’m one of those girls who was deceived by the transgender movement. I’m 18 years old now but here is a picture of what I looked like before the transgender movement got me. And one from after -- when they had turned me into a “boy.” | | Before transitioning | After transitioning | | It all started when I was 11 years old and growing up in Northern California. I was growing embarrassed and confused once my body started changing.I was also shy and didn’t socialize easily – and I didn’t feel comfortable talking about any of this with my parents.But I found ‘friends’ on the internet who told me if I was uncomfortable with my body, I was probably a boy trapped in the wrong body.And the more I agreed with them, the more they celebrated me.I was getting the message loud and clear: if I was a girl who became a boy, I’d be valued and loved even more.Before long I was telling my parents I was transgender.They had no idea what to do. My poor parents were scared and desperate and took me to “experts” who convinced them that if they failed to act quickly, I would surely commit suicide.The gender clinic gave my parents an ultimatum: “Would you rather have a dead daughter or a living son?” Given those choices, my parents would have signed anything the doctors put in front of them if it meant “saving” me. When they signed those forms, it wasn’t informed parental consent. It was a desperate decision made under extreme duress.And so, at age 13, I was fast-tracked for medical transition from a girl into a boy. The doctors started giving me weekly testosterone injections...they injected me with an experimental drug used to chemically castrate sex offenders......and finally, they removed my breasts in a radical double mastectomy.I was fifteen years old.And of course, none of this made me any happier or less confused.If you’re like most people I tell my story to... right about now you’re probably thinking, “HOW did it ever get this far?” And the answer is simple.The “experts” lied to my parents -- and to me -- every step of the way.They claimed I would never get “better” unless I medically transitioned – when the truth is that the vast majority of children who think they’re transgender grow out of it with absolutely no chemical or surgical intervention. They claimed their consent forms covered all the risks of pumping testosterone and puberty blockers into my 13-year-old body......while their forms left out dozens and dozens of known risks.They never told us that there isn’t one single scientific study on the effects these treatments have on young children. And they never, ever, were straight with me about what it would mean to let them remove my breasts.When I woke up from that surgery, I was shocked at how mangled my body was. And now years after the surgery, I still wear bandages every day to cover the oozing, unhealed scars.At age 18, I’m just beginning to understand what it will mean to never nurse my child -- if I’ll ever be able to have children at all. For the rest of my life, my voice will sound like a man’s, my body will look like a boy’s, and who knows what cancers, cardiac problems, bone problems, and more are lurking around the corner.And my parents feel like they’ve failed me on every level imaginable.I can’t go back. I can’t change what happened. But I can change what happens to the THOUSANDS of kids just like me who are falling prey to the predatory transgender movement and unscrupulous abusive medical “experts.” More and more children are mutilated and abused every day.There’s even a doctor who advertises her mutilation surgeries on TikTok to draw young kids in. And it won’t stop until someone fights back.When I turned 18, I decided that someone would be me. I had no idea how I would do it, but I’d seen enough T.V. to know I needed a lawyer. I also didn’t know how hard it would be to find someone willing to take my case in liberal California. didn’t even know what a liberal was until they started slamming doors in my face!Finally, someone told me to call Harmeet Dhillon at the Center for American Liberty. | | And the first time we spoke, I felt something I hadn’t felt in a long time -- hope.Because Harmeet is a fighter like me. She didn’t tell me we’d never win against the giant medical industry.She didn’t tell me the transgender issue was too sensitive to touch.She told me my fight mattered. | | | Not only because of what had happened to me -- but also because we could STOP it from happening to other children. And so together with Harmeet Dhillon’s non-profit -- the Center for American Liberty -- I’ve launched a case against the radical doctors and hospital who preyed on me......and who continue to prey on children -- maybe even in your family.As I’ve mentioned several times -- I’m 18-years-old.On my own, I’d never have the money to pay for a giant court case like this. That’s one of the ways these radicals are taking over everything. They know regular people like me don’t have the money to fight them in court.But that’s exactly why Harmeet started the Center for American Liberty. The Center for American Liberty brings together attorneys who want to fight for what’s right and matches them with people like me who would have had nowhere else to turn.Right now, the Center for American Liberty has landmark cases going like: Brach v. Newsom \-- to stop California from shutting down private and religious schools... Ngo v. Roce City Antifa \-- to get justice for Andy Ngo after he was beaten by Antifa thugs and liberal politicians did NOTHING... O’Handley v. Padilla \-- to stop Big Government from using Big Tech to silence people they disagree with... And now my case... Chloe Cole v. Kaiser Permanente. The Center for American Liberty is a nonprofit. They have big cases but that doesn’t mean they have the big money that their opponents have. There are big forces at work who want to get rich no matter who they hurt.Alone we’re no match for them. , we can beat these monsters who are using scared, confused and lonely children to make a buck. For exposing them, I’ve been called a “liar.” I’ve even been told de-transitioners like me don’t exist. But when we beat them in court and stop them from hurting any more children with their lies and mutilations,I will be proud to face them and say:“You may have taken away my childhood, and forever changed my future -- but I exist. I exist.” Thank you for reading this letter from a complete stranger. I hope I can call you a friend now. And thank you for whatever help you can send to the Center for American Liberty. every bit moves us closer to stopping these monsters. | | Thank you,Chloe Cole | | | P.S. This is a photo of me now. It’s been a long, painful road but I’m finding happiness and purpose as I fight to make sure what happened to me NEVER happens to another child. Thank you so much for your help. --Chloe | | | | The Center for American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. © The Center for American Liberty | PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177 | American Action News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

body:
| | | If you'd like to unsubscribe,[click here.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl7NBjmTZL5F5oqdT0MFW4GLNp5FjRArZ2gECnWf63UZWzcCuYR-Es9PjYmAXR4JxZbuH_t8O228MjZNOxN7Lm2WoL5eKG3lZx13kI8WltFNPIBBn3Padm2MccTtqifUPnMwBTT_ErIdUv7HhU8flPUkgGRei-RS7m4Wkz9PZGhgJYOezr64tf-PZtD34Mz8vX0ScCqBp47Ps3tjuomThm-hwTskXhUO8uFG8Cp-7PpbZSAayHyrUogTF-jdJVcA8H56E6vU0yfcI9-z_UK0ElK4YUXJ2OE2SVV2ez6do9yPawjsr6WT95Qaa0u9A2LH9Hv6FckIaQKJWy-UW5ItDEq3WIcD6nRroxtODikdX2FsDRw3TegIo-a7gj4Uv2-Xz61UHL6RqMhqS-nAkZ71DCBKXsNP4x3VH2sm9mwlib7jQ/3wg/_ESpFm4VQIikGZ8CkTo1aw/h0/j0XMJFpJi6WKiUDVx9jNJu321EMVck9GUW73VJCYmcI) | | One year since the massacre at Robb Elementary School in Uvalde, Texas, it remains clearer than ever that we need leaders who will take decisive action to protect our communities from gun violence.

Having to tell my own kids about a shooting before they hear it from their classmates is something I feel all too prepared to do. Sadly, it’s just part of being a parent in America.

And I know many other parents have to grapple with the same, impossible discussions. We have to live with the fact that our kids live with the fear that they could be gunned down while in a place where they should feel safe.

It’s unacceptable that in America, kids get hunted in their classrooms while our elected officials have done little to stop it.

**[_To mark this somber occasion, will you sign your name here to recommit to fighting for common sense gun measures?_](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnlWwvEGwALt4Vh1fagEIRtOvEPcFAQxh8V5nNxHdPOd5Gd4Wcl0pfLp7BzUxAg4q99SMsoY5y9VZjPwyYVX-jH0y5y0VBbP6CiFiUiqamlq_7o_Daq1zirsaAIi9zdNlgCcjoniHKUw8ZV1Bo4oKfFePKdm20BFJqLs-eSO_XpMqnAW54tSZnpc11ZtslTVLz_fYUz5JS4NfIu9rLC6BYNh9MMiHAgL5OH2cWom4Qvix8Jtc7mmoI8LISYzy8HKPP8Ctpw5xujhkWnSxQzBqy9SACJzrgnqnGHV8DCyME8ERfdtiyROAEQw1N3PkW5fAOw/3wg/_ESpFm4VQIikGZ8CkTo1aw/h1/YHi2Ew_47-CjtdUdH0YVyCDiG-G4zST2_DwLqlgdRyM)**
| | [Sign On](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnlWwvEGwALt4Vh1fagEIRtOvEPcFAQxh8V5nNxHdPOd5Gd4Wcl0pfLp7BzUxAg4q99SMsoY5y9VZjPwyYVX-jH0y5y0VBbP6CiFiUiqamlq_3raxTpgfJfaIEvbvnkTfHcwm6skWh7cJgIvLZrCqbNfV9DGK0LUDSTZ9KjsRghrum0HkgJoAKHL2BzHGUK4u0FL7vrueA5JsBH-3wCJrQ5hfZeyXjhlJ3QbnqVB3GtTWcYlmCEb28E2azbAHjDZ7HOnp-K5RXt0ukCqWfpKV8a_3sgcdERPf85gs4k_5_TcFQiy8rdeajynl3usraVXxIM/3wg/_ESpFm4VQIikGZ8CkTo1aw/h2/wpoNaZ5mNOfIJxzeAotS3_sAIzIfiHYLp0viu7WIM-M)
---

As a pediatrician who has seen so many kids in the hospital with gunshot wounds, I launched Their Future in large part to fight back against the inaction I was seeing in Congress on issues that will impact our kids’ lives.

The truth is we don’t have time to wait on the biggest issues of the day. We’re at a breaking point, which is why I’m fighting every day to make tangible progress.

**My kids, and all of our children, deserve to live in a country without the constant fear of becoming another statistic in the never-ending list of school shootings. Each person — each child — lost is a life ended too soon and a future that will never come to fruition.

[_Sign on if you’re ready for action on gun violence→_](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnlWwvEGwALt4Vh1fagEIRtOvEPcFAQxh8V5nNxHdPOd5Gd4Wcl0pfLp7BzUxAg4q99SMsoY5y9VZjPwyYVX-jH0y5y0VBbP6CiFiUiqamlq_92mveyb2VPy4MdyVtjZahJHoR3WQhluH3_4bJHlDlnBTqqiWI1cahZqlMzmDe5tt50bVOtwSjPHcB1MBGPeJkLswdfhuAJ9izP3iPWT3RSMtVZZIag2BaFL3poSzW3eit_KX5azt4wmL9TFVI2rCSzWa5SU_E63BTOpOTv4z7U9kb_v5aOTnxtwtq-sf0Nbf94xAMSEvzmhjcrFV2NXeHM/3wg/_ESpFm4VQIikGZ8CkTo1aw/h3/BzqYhQ7j30poWb9mi129CAYE-5Ry4fQykKLhHkgH6qY)**

— Annie

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63750476/407900045/1924984212?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjBkN2ZjNDQtNWJmYS1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=iW11HhP18V6lCpSz_IVybsxsyKfFgC49NVVUxHp0kqo=)
Friend, I have an exciting announcement and I wanted you to hear it directly from me: **I’m running for Congress in Arizona's 1st Congressional District.**

Election experts are already calling this one of the country's most consequential House races, and I will need you with me to win. But first, I want to share more about who I am and why I can no longer sit on the sidelines.

**[Please take a moment to watch my launch video, and if you’re ready to take the next step, send $5, $35, or even $50 to join our movement to flip AZ-01 from red to blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63750477/407900046/-1026343047?refcode=em-5.24.23-seg1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjBkN2ZjNDQtNWJmYS1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=iW11HhP18V6lCpSz_IVybsxsyKfFgC49NVVUxHp0kqo=)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63750478/407900047/-1026343047?refcode=em-5.24.23-seg1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjBkN2ZjNDQtNWJmYS1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=iW11HhP18V6lCpSz_IVybsxsyKfFgC49NVVUxHp0kqo=)
I’ve lived in and served this Arizona community for 35 years -- as a broadcast journalist exposing crooks and holding the powerful accountable, and in a number of philanthropic efforts supporting Arizona’s youth.

Running for Congress was never on my radar, but that all changed in 2016 as I watched what was happening to the country we all love.

**I couldn't imagine that the United States -- the same place that took in my parents when they fled Fidel Castro’s communist dictatorship -- was on the verge of being held hostage by extremists who lie, cheat, and attack our liberties.**

The unfortunate truth is that the situation has only become more dire in recent years. Donald Trump is back on the ballot, and control of the House and Senate are at stake. In 2024, our reproductive freedoms, Medicare, Social Security, and our very right to vote are at risk of being taken from us.

**Here in Arizona's 1st District, my opponent David Schweikert has been one of the worst enablers of the MAGA agenda.**

He celebrated the dismantling of _Roe v. Wade_. He tried to overturn the 2020 presidential election for Trump. And all the while, he broke the law and abused taxpayer money for his personal gain.

I'm in this race because we can no longer put up with extremists who strip us of our rights and line their pockets at our expense. I'm running because we need leaders who will tell the truth and take the fight directly to politicians like Schweikert who put us where we are today.

**I know we can win, but this is not something I can do alone. Today, I'm asking for your fearlessness, your passion, and your energy.**

**[Join me. Send in $5, $35, or even $50 to become a Founding Donor of my campaign in AZ-01. I’m counting on you to be a part of this effort.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63750479/407900048/1924984212?refcode=em-5.24.23-seg1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjBkN2ZjNDQtNWJmYS1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=iW11HhP18V6lCpSz_IVybsxsyKfFgC49NVVUxHp0kqo=)** __If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:__ | ****[$10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63750480/407900049/1924984212?refcode=em-5.24.23-seg1-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjBkN2ZjNDQtNWJmYS1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=iW11HhP18V6lCpSz_IVybsxsyKfFgC49NVVUxHp0kqo=)**** | ****[$35](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63750481/407900050/1924984212?refcode=em-5.24.23-seg1-a&express_lane=true&amount=35&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjBkN2ZjNDQtNWJmYS1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=iW11HhP18V6lCpSz_IVybsxsyKfFgC49NVVUxHp0kqo=)****

clean_body: | = Friend, I have an exciting announcement and I wanted you to hear it directly from me: I’m running for Congress in Arizona's 1st Congressional District. Election experts are already calling this one of the country's most consequential House races, and I will need you with me to win. But first, I want to share more about who I am and why I can no longer sit on the sidelines. = = I’ve lived in and served this Arizona community for 35 years -- as a broadcast journalist exposing crooks and holding the powerful accountable, and in a number of philanthropic efforts supporting Arizona’s youth. Running for Congress was never on my radar, but that all changed in 2016 as I watched what was happening to the country we all love. I couldn't imagine that the United States -- the same place that took in my parents when they fled Fidel Castro’s communist dictatorship -- was on the verge of being held hostage by extremists who lie, cheat, and attack our liberties. The unfortunate truth is that the situation has only become more dire in recent years. Donald Trump is back on the ballot, and control of the House and Senate are at stake. In 2024, our reproductive freedoms, Medicare, Social Security, and our very right to vote are at risk of being taken from us. Here in Arizona's 1st District, my opponent David Schweikert has been one of the worst enablers of the MAGA agenda. He celebrated the dismantling of Roe v. Wade. He tried to overturn the 2020 presidential election for Trump. And all the while, he broke the law and abused taxpayer money for his personal gain. I'm in this race because we can no longer put up with extremists who strip us of our rights and line their pockets at our expense. I'm running because we need leaders who will tell the truth and take the fight directly to politicians like Schweikert who put us where we are today. I know we can win, but this is not something I can do alone. Today, I'm asking for your fearlessness, your passion, and your energy. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **= | = ---|--- = | = = | =** With courage, Marlene Galán-Woods | Marlene's campaign to flip AZ-01 is being built from the ground up with grassroots support! = To learn more about Marlene and how she's fighting for Arizona families, please visit: We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . PAID FOR BY MARLENE FOR CONGRESS Marlene for Congress 7904 E. Chaparral Road, Suite A110-472 Scottsdale, AZ 85250 United States

name: =?utf-8?Q?Russ=20Vought?=
subject: The FBI has been exposed
body:
We know it, you know it, and now the world knows it. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/citizensrenewingamerica.com/were-on-the-offensive-10357239?e=17913c7d6d)
---
| | |
---
| | | Friends,

America’s corrupt and unaccountable national security apparatus has become **weaponized against the American people**.

We know it, you know it, _and now the world knows it_.

Last week former FBI Special Agent Steve Friend (now a Senior Fellow at the Center for Renewing America) gave a bombshell interview to Fox News exposing the FBI’s appalling politicization and targeting of conservative and pro-life Americans.

**[URGENT: Help the Center for Renewing America stand up to the corrupt FBI](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=38873e38a8&e=17913c7d6d). **
---
| **WATCH: Whistleblower Exposes FBI Weaponization Against the American People**
---
| [ ](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=c0ccab267e&e=17913c7d6d)
---
| If you recall, Steve Friend was the _brave whistleblower_ who sacrificed his career to blow the whistle on the FBI’s mishandling of cases related to January 6th. As a direct result of his bravery, Steve was suspended from the FBI for months without pay. But it didn’t stop there..

→ His private medical information was leaked to the New York Times.
→ He was denied the opportunity to seek outside employment.
→ He had an illegal gag order placed on him.

Perhaps most shocking is Steve’s account of the FBI taking him off of investigating child pornography cases and instructing him to target school board parents instead. Watch his testimony 👇👇👇
---
| [ ](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=b068ce0f07&e=17913c7d6d)
---
| **[Support Steve and our work to hold the corrupt FBI accountable](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=cdfecd1de3&e=17913c7d6d).**

Steve’s persecution for telling the truth is sickening to think about, but that’s precisely why we asked Steve to join the Center for Renewing America and continue blowing the whistle on the corruption and weaponization against the American people he witnessed first-hand at the FBI.

Friends, I don’t say this lightly. Our work is critical to the future of our Republic. The FBI and other national security agencies have become weaponized against the American people.

We are beholden to no one. We don’t take money from special interests. Instead we rely on the [generous support](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=a80b9a62ec&e=17913c7d6d) of supporters just like you.
---
| Sincerely,

Russ Vought
President
Center for Renewing America
---
| | |
---
| | | | | | [](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=293ecf3677&e=17913c7d6d)
---
| | [](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=a76486e4ce&e=17913c7d6d)

300 Independence Ave. SE
Washington, DC 20003

You can [update your preferences](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=340a9f3c7d&e=17913c7d6d&c=85c8cc595c) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=340a9f3c7d&e=17913c7d6d&c=85c8cc595c).

name: Ayanna Pressley (via Working Families Party)
subject: Will you add your name to support the Equal Rights Amendment?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St
body:
For far too long, women and LGBTQIA+ folks have been relegated to second-class legal status. It’s high time we change that. | | | Peter, I’m proud to have led a historic resolution affirming the ratification of the Equal Rights Amendment and, in partnership with my sister-in-service Cori Bush, to have launched the first-ever Equal Rights Amendment Caucus in Congress. For far too long, women and LGBTQIA+ folks have been relegated to second-class legal status in America — our contributions ignored, erased, or rendered a footnote in history — and it’s high time we change that. **[Will you add your name right now to say that you support the Equal Rights Amendment?](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkf3VLciM-Z8uNbg2tzVUP8u7SaYkfSjQ_X4WBFY3l2UkbuTc_IhbPmFvPVJuawFC9kJ7eTWv_CVlul-n-6F4DP5rJkQVT9ILoKxHUpAvx-xuwvsRBHlY1fD2unQvTUAtu5igQgVSqbhJc6DstLKrjJRLYFxHiHE8xBg2TDOhURTYdO_YRxayjfA66xBCIILc9Zh_y8-jjUtgxVg8QNoPddilgmliZ05qwz1IGwrjlDJcg0-Iky850ULnUsqfQQziBsy66oL5Qf1rx3mjzVAnFts769gng036LRYNL1IQBO_24mI5iyRCTMNQyhTIQ96wQS706MxELAGcibQlgzENYmzyUlKgLHV7u8_B0zkSd5DFGTKmpWSDJTtT1VkFDNFCmE5g1eY6gvTbNaMJkdU-lYweVrC844iBypGzvHI--PA2R3KsI9BWulhgrYPl-WSy8/3wg/Xhj6VeEMTjO52_RJhuJPyQ/h0/LLNxGNKCzpNjpWQAAxRVAAwnPojDNKMxys3oJCaMfDY)** **[Add your name](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkf3VLciM-Z8uNbg2tzVUP8u7SaYkfSjQ_X4WBFY3l2UkbuTc_IhbPmFvPVJuawFC9kJ7eTWv_CVlul-n-6F4DP5rJkQVT9ILoKxHUpAvx-xuwvsRBHlY1fD2unQvTUAtu5igQgVSqbhJc6DstLKrjJRLYFxHiHE8xBg2TDOhURTYdO_YRxayjfA66xBCIILc-pQMA4tLPiLO8EntJnWxGAyWaI7E8Ma_mDK3d7QZDmlQrZgHMfSjBlRLTrj8IPus0sr_-6tSLND6UyZqOR82uxpy2xWi_3KXGOdgpFVfZPA3V2ePicFeb_mUljnNBclqEC3IUwArTQ7jnB42xHq_KBVf1IvKU2QVh8JZbkOKOzF7ObWIRKS49ifo992_G1SqR15YEXDqGc_KTVNCIqwN9RyfbXssWBNqdn_atrhW0aUtpfMQYsK_fwF3HDMZq-H10/3wg/Xhj6VeEMTjO52_RJhuJPyQ/h1/ocUku9_2vBbix5si2bsB2NGLRdwR3kXFLzwJlYwgrD8)** **The Equal Rights Amendment will help combat generations of gender-based disparities** and ensure that the humanity and dignity of all people is enshrined in the Constitution. 38 states have ratified the Equal Rights Amendment, but because of an arbitrary deadline established in the 1970s, it hasn’t been added to the Constitution. **There’s no time limit on equality, Peter.** That’s why I introduced a resolution that would remove the deadline for ratification and it’s why Cori and I started a caucus committed to realizing the promise of the Equal Rights Amendment. **[We need the ERA now. If you agree, join our broad coalition of folks across the country fighting for gender equality by signing your name now.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkf3VLciM-Z8uNbg2tzVUP8u7SaYkfSjQ_X4WBFY3l2UkbuTc_IhbPmFvPVJuawFC9kJ7eTWv_CVlul-n-6F4DP5rJkQVT9ILoKxHUpAvx-xuwvsRBHlY1fD2unQvTUAtu5igQgVSqbhJc6DstLKrjJRLYFxHiHE8xBg2TDOhURTYdO_YRxayjfA66xBCIILc_glmDpL-9unUvxAQeWQLX-XEL_pXP2DwORz1S8HFeSl7hGucjikDjhWKf7AAWJpy-p9f3WY67gyV81wJGHgqnIwXhw_tm6dgAXZOlEUroEijHjfew1HEB2OxFNLlwEe6uCWy5qk_eh27nz2-moKSdz5oTHRdH2DEeUpviREgkKCPiSqXTxO2OMc_wpUxO8wWlVnfj6T-CNFGBO5i2B-zRzvj221uPPJSNJGX1qYlL7bZuCKFe5Wlq--ozgkcPjcrY/3wg/Xhj6VeEMTjO52_RJhuJPyQ/h2/48vLIboujCulmgvtmhMZE5Dx5EpHH2GVB94koKmwzDc)** clean_body: For far too long, women and LGBTQIA+ folks have been relegated to second-class legal status. It’s high time we change that. | | | Peter, I’m proud to have led a historic resolution affirming the ratification of the Equal Rights Amendment and, in partnership with my sister-in-service Cori Bush, to have launched the first-ever Equal Rights Amendment Caucus in Congress. For far too long, women and LGBTQIA+ folks have been relegated to second-class legal status in America — our contributions ignored, erased, or rendered a footnote in history — and it’s high time we change that. The Equal Rights Amendment will help combat generations of gender-based disparities and ensure that the humanity and dignity of all people is enshrined in the Constitution. 38 states have ratified the Equal Rights Amendment, but because of an arbitrary deadline established in the 1970s, it hasn’t been added to the Constitution. There’s no time limit on equality, Peter. That’s why I introduced a resolution that would remove the deadline for ratification and it’s why Cori and I started a caucus committed to realizing the promise of the Equal Rights Amendment. In solidarity, Ayanna Pressley Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . **About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

subject: Republicans could've shown they had some ethics this week, as a vote was held to expel George Santos from Congress on grounds of being indicted on 13 counts of money laundering, theft of funds, fraud, etc... But naturally, a Democrat is going to have to chase him out of government.
body:
Expelling George Santos
| | | | |

| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfad3a36b-bf65-44c0-ac06-844058315b07/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| | | | | Peter, _Republicans could've shown they had some ethics this week, as a vote was held to expel George Santos from Congress. Yet, as their highest power is ...power, NOT ONE GOPer voted to toss a criminal. NOT. ONE._ [**_Former State Senator Anna Kaplan, a Democrat ready to take out Santos, had something to say about this_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2f7cff57-0a64-4a69-8b45-9d2b5a4fb30a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) as you can probably imagine: [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8414f21c-c901-4706-ac51-c76ae7d4b809/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_Kaplan knocked a Republican out of his NY State Senate, seat delivering Democrats a majority for the first time in decades. She co-sponsored bills to codify Roe and ban "ghost guns." _** [**_Santos, indicted on 13 counts of money laundering, theft of funds, fraud, etc., doesn't have the stuff to withstand a well-funded Kaplan. Will you give her $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to flip the seat and the House, sending Anna Kaplan to Congress and sending George Santos packing?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T063da1e6-df42-40c2-a46d-1502623b14aa/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for staying attuned to this race to make sure George Santos is gone from Congress one way or another._ Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. subject: Maybe I’m beating a dead horse

body:
I thought I'd see a HUGE response to my first annual GOP Speaker's Survey, but it hasn't happened.

| |
---
| | | **THE 1ST ANNUAL SPEAKER'S SURVEY
MAY, 2023**
---

Patriot,

I thought I'd see a HUGE response to my first annual GOP Speaker's Survey, but it hasn't happened.

This input is desperately needed to shape the party's strategy for this MUST-WIN election. Joe Biden and the liberal media hate that we are so closely involved with our grassroots base. This survey is the type of thing that gives him nightmares.

You don't have to write anything fancy, just tell me what matters to you.

So, I'm inviting you one LAST time today.

---
| **OFFICIAL INVITATION**

**Will you participate in my first annual GOP Speaker's Survey?

DEADLINE: MAY, 2023
GOP PARTY ID: 01891
EMAIL: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zu59hrvjj9lgkfll3e5qt2sdfe2ciprvcmp71lpg_rp22sh2s8i66o71cjhmaor0c1h2bs "dpwillis67@gmail.com")**

| | | [**YES**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zhj180d81etqc5rp1oe25gmdljbpulsktqt318o8_rp22sh2s8i66o71cjhmaor0c1h2bs)

Please, I'm hoping we can rely on your expertise sooner rather than later.

-Speaker McCarthy
