name: VoteVets
subject: Official VoteVets Survey: Disney vs DeSantis
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
Disney has been a strong ally to Veterans and Military Families for decades.
#
Derek —
Disney is really taking the fight to Ron DeSantis these days. And now that Ron’s officially announcing his campaign, that fight is going to be more visible than ever.
First, they made him look like a fool on the national stage when they outmaneuvered him.
Then, they turned the tables and took him to court.
And just days ago, they took a billion-dollar development and 2000 jobs off the table in Florida.
But Ron?
[](https://act.votevets.org/signup/230524_vv_survey_disney/?source=em230524-1-15?source2=9779.3013755.hPnqY6&akid=9779%2E3013755%2EhPnqY6)
**Actions have consequences.**
For our part, Disney has been a strong ally to Veterans and Military Families for decades. They employ thousands and thousands of Veterans. They provide millions in philanthropic support to Veterans organizations. They even donate hundreds of thousands of books to Military Families.
But DeSantis? He took votes against Vets in Congress. He’s made it harder for Active Duty Servicemembers and Veterans to access abortions. And he’s made life a living hell for the LGBTQ community in Florida — including countless Active Duty, Veterans, and their families.
But we’d like to know your take on this. So please, take our official survey:
**[Now that he is announcing for president, who do you support more: Disney or DeSantis?](https://act.votevets.org/signup/230524_vv_survey_disney/?source=em230524-1-15?source2=9779.3013755.hPnqY6&akid=9779%2E3013755%2EhPnqY6)**
| [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.votevets.org/signup/230524_vv_survey_disney/?source=em230524-1-15?source2=9779.3013755.hPnqY6&akid=9779%2E3013755%2EhPnqY6)
---
Knowing what our supporters think about the political landscape helps us be a more effective organization, so thank you in advance for taking our survey.
The team at VoteVets

PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS.ORG, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE’S COMMITTEE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here ](https://act.votevets.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=9779%2E3013755%2EhPnqY6).

And now that Ron’s officially announcing his campaign, that fight is going to be more visible than ever. First, they made him look like a fool on the national stage when they outmaneuvered him. Then, they turned the tables and took him to court. And just days ago, they took a billion-dollar development and 2000 jobs off the table in Florida. But Ron? Actions have consequences. For our part, Disney has been a strong ally to Veterans and Military Families for decades. They employ thousands and thousands of Veterans. They provide millions in philanthropic support to Veterans organizations. They even donate hundreds of thousands of books to Military Families. But DeSantis? He took votes against Vets in Congress. He’s made it harder for Active Duty Servicemembers and Veterans to access abortions. And he’s made life a living hell for the LGBTQ community in Florida — including countless Active Duty, Veterans, and their families. But we’d like to know your take on this. So please, take our official survey: | Knowing what our supporters think about the political landscape helps us be a more effective organization, so thank you in advance for taking our survey. The team at VoteVets PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS.ORG, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE’S COMMITTEE

name: Ron DeSantis for President
subject: Why I said yes to running for President
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
I wanted you to be one of the first people to know about this.

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2t9tapsspf7cgepqpvmpfscvacshvhpins12mgg_rp22sh2s8i66o71cjhm6pb2clh2bs)
---
Friend,

It's official: I'M IN.

**I'm running for President of the United States. **
---
| | [JOIN ME](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zt7j2sbifle5lme83kue08rlql6mhaa2d8gfuhp8_rp22sh2s8i66o71cjhm6pb2clh2bs)
---
Have you ever noticed how often Joe Biden tries to take potshots at Florida?

It's because he HATES what we're doing in the Sunshine State.

While he pushes the woke agenda, we're fighting back with freedom.

Joe Biden is taking the country in the wrong direction. But I know I can turn it around.

The American people know it, too. That's why they are ALREADY voting with their feet. Our population is booming in the free state of Florida.

Now, I want to put that choice on the ballot--but I need your support. ** **
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3jb3lvoceumn5e0pi47a0sfvsc21724f2ghoo10_rp22sh2s8i66o71cjhm6pb2clh2bs)
---
We sometimes take freedom for granted. You should not do that after the last few years. It is contested, and we have seen it wither on the vine in many places in our country.

But Florida was different. We chose facts over fear. We chose education over indoctrination. We chose law and order over rioting and disorder. Florida was a refuge of sanity when the world went mad.

We held the line when freedom hung in the balance.

We showed that we can -- and must -- revitalize America.

**I believe freedom is worth fighting for, and as your next President I promise I will never stop fighting for your freedom.** **[Will you fight alongside me?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5k1adoke6dq9f3fvlqi7cl865b9jp96bfkm4c8g_rp22sh2s8i66o71cjhm6pb2clh2bs "Will you fight alongside me?")**
---
| | [YES, I'M READY TO WIN](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zbk4eqpa83j2knmjkt7kmhhg1sovv8hbru6fcmt0_rp22sh2s8i66o71cjhm6pb2clh2bs)
---
And we can win, Friend.

I'll make sure we have an economy that works for working families, a secure border that works for our nation, and so much more. The battle won't be easy and will require a lot of toil and sweat to get it all done. I'm excited to share my agenda for America with you over the course of this campaign.

**But here 's why I'm writing you today, Friend: [I want to ask you to become a Launch Day Donor to my presidential campaign and join our first team tele-townhall.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8aq1010g00dpoaj7p7megop6u9umds2pk0tcor0_rp22sh2s8i66o71cjhm6pb2clh2bs "I want to ask you to become a Launch Day Donor to my presidential campaign and join our first Team Teletownhall.")**

I promise you, unlike other campaigns, our grassroots fundraising program is built on the principle that our donors are a part of our team, not our personal piggybank.

**_[I vow to treat you with respect: No smoke and mirrors, no fake matches, and no lies.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdquc893qassm9foavi2tj17rqdc3dirbo075rpo_rp22sh2s8i66o71cjhm6pb2clh2bs "I vow to treat you with respect: No smoke and mirrors, no fake matches, and no lies.")_**

Can I count on you?
---
| | [DONATE NOW](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z301u0slgm2obbutu5alh59gjndeperh0got1gvo_rp22sh2s8i66o71cjhm6pb2clh2bs)
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zsfbv2ll9cn8kjcodss5m5o1mi3r21egqa6qhs8g_rp22sh2s8i66o71cjhm6pb2clh2bs)
---
In Freedom,

Ron DeSantis
---
_P.S I want to show you my appreciation for standing with me from Day 1 of this campaign. It 's why my team prepared gifts to thank our Day 1 donors.

If you chip in $47 by midnight on 5/25, we'll send you a limited-edition Day 1 membership card and an invite to our first-ever team tele-townhall.

Make sure you get yours now at this secure link: **[https://dsnts.com/aexHpu](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zk3qmrmt5938pi5datc18inqe0vf0gqtg9m2uq78_rp22sh2s8i66o71cjhm6pb2clh2bs)**_
---
|

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zqqvo7hesnqebi57o2irn59f088pqdloa4g2mepg_rp22sh2s8i66o71cjhm6pb2clh2bs)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he graduated with honors and was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School. While at Harvard, he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq as an adviser to a U.S. Navy SEAL commander in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a federal prosecutor, where he targeted and convicted child predators. He was elected to Congress in 2012 and advocated for congressional term limits and a balanced budget amendment. He also spearheaded oversight efforts to expose malfeasance in the IRS and in agencies involved in abusing their authority during the manufacturing of the Russia collusion conspiracy theory. Congressman DeSantis was also a leading champion for America's veterans and helped enact reforms to the VA and place an emphasis on mental health.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award winning television host. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|
---
Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

name: Ron DeSantis for President
subject: No more speculation. I’M IN.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
I wanted you to be one of the first people to know about this.
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | | | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
Peter,

It's official: I'M IN.

**I'm running for President of the United States. **
---
| | [JOIN ME](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._zMELhx5Amug)
---
Have you ever noticed how often Joe Biden tries to take potshots at Florida?

It’s because he HATES what we’re doing in the Sunshine State.

While he pushes the woke agenda, we’re fighting back with freedom.

Joe Biden is taking the country in the wrong direction. But I know I can turn it around.

The American people know it, too. That’s why they are ALREADY voting with their feet. Our population is booming in the free state of Florida.

Now, I want to put that choice on the ballot—but I need your support. ** **
---
| [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._wuUUQ)
---
We sometimes take freedom for granted. You should not do that after the last few years. It is contested, and we have seen it wither on the vine in many places in our country.

But Florida was different. We chose facts over fear. We chose education over indoctrination. We chose law and order over rioting and disorder. Florida was a refuge of sanity when the world went mad.

We held the line when freedom hung in the balance.

We showed that we can — and must — revitalize America.

**I believe freedom is worth fighting for, and as your next President I promise I will never stop fighting for your freedom.** **[Will you fight alongside me?](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-8KpOSPssNAKSw "Will you fight alongside me?")**
---
| | [YES, I’M READY TO WIN](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
And we can win, Peter.

I'll make sure we have an economy that works for working families, a secure border that works for our nation, and so much more. The battle won’t be easy and will require a lot of toil and sweat to get it all done. I’m excited to share my agenda for America with you over the course of this campaign.

**But here’s why I’m writing you today, Peter:[I want to ask you to become a Launch Day Donor to my presidential campaign and join our first team tele-townhall.](http://trk.freedomfirstproject. "I want to ask you to become a Launch Day Donor to my presidential campaign and join our first Team Teletownhall.")**

I promise you, unlike other campaigns, our grassroots fundraising program is built on the principle that our donors are a part of our team, not our personal piggybank.

**_[I vow to treat you with respect: No smoke and mirrors, no fake matches, and no lies.](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-BCFUkg "I vow to treat you with respect: No smoke and mirrors, no fake matches, and no lies.")_**

Can I count on you?
---
| | [DONATE NOW](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
| [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
In Freedom,

Ron DeSantis
---
_P.S I want to show you my appreciation for standing with me from Day 1 of this campaign. It’s why my team prepared gifts to thank our Day 1 donors.

If you chip in $47 by midnight on 5/25, we’ll send you a limited-edition Day 1 membership card and an invite to our first-ever team tele-townhall.

Make sure you get yours now at this secure link: **[https://dsnts.com/aexHpu](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-0sIBKMx8r_Ys1vAsLA)**_
---
|

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he graduated with honors and was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School. While at Harvard, he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq as an adviser to a U.S. Navy SEAL commander in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a federal prosecutor, where he targeted and convicted child predators. He was elected to Congress in 2012 and advocated for congressional term limits and a balanced budget amendment. He also spearheaded oversight efforts to expose malfeasance in the IRS and in agencies involved in abusing their authority during the manufacturing of the Russia collusion conspiracy theory. Congressman DeSantis was also a leading champion for America’s veterans and helped enact reforms to the VA and place an emphasis on mental health.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award winning television host. Together, they’re the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|
---
Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

---
| Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
---
| This email was sent by: Ron DeSantis for President
PO Box 3696
Tallahassee, FL 32315

---
P.O. Box 523692, Springfield, VA 22152If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTQ0LTY0NTAwMDNmN2QyZjRmN2Q4NGUzYTRhODg3NWE0MmNiIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/fIdfE-bdJwH9KjPlOpH63Q) to unsubscribe.

There aren’t that many people in Congress who have a background like mine— and it shows.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63752449/407907048/-4707655?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTQzOGQ0Ni02MGZhLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Le-d3I2oqyoInWBXFuawGFyHMKDwuaGDG6oyuJIMmxQ=&emci=5d0dad0f-5dfa-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=5a438d46-60fa-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=19954364) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63752450/407907049/-1627345757?refcode=email_052423_debtceiling&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTQzOGQ0Ni02MGZhLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Le-d3I2oqyoInWBXFuawGFyHMKDwuaGDG6oyuJIMmxQ=) **** Team, The fact of the matter is there aren’t that many people in Congress who have a background like mine. And it shows. Right now, Kevin McCarthy and his fellow extremists are threatening to inflict devastating economic pain on every American family unless President Biden caves to an outrageous series of demands. If the GOP plunges us into a reckless default on the nation’s debt, it will cost millions of jobs and cruelly send people across our nation into poverty. **That’s simply not something you do if you truly understand how Congress’s actions affect the lives of real people.** _It’s not something you do, if, like me, you know what it’s like to work a register and wait tables to put yourself through school._ _It’s not something you do if you empathize with the struggle of everyday Americans who work paycheck to paycheck just to put food on the table for their kids._ _It’s not something you do if your reason for serving in Congress is about making people’s lives better — rather than simply exerting raw partisan power._ **So, listen, I want you to know that I will continue trying to lead by example — and fight for the everyday Americans whose needs so often go overlooked in Congress.** **[If that’s the kind of leadership you’d like to see in Washington, I could really use your help to make sure I can continue serving our community in Congress beyond this term. Instead of working together to strengthen our economy, our supply chain, and the U.S. dollar, Republicans are holding us hostage to the detriment of regular people like me. And I’m going to fight back, folks.
I know that the news is often grim and upsetting, but I want you to know that there is still plenty of reason for optimism that we can make progress together. And I will keep working to deliver that progress — because it’s what the people of Colorado’s 7th District sent me here to do.
Thank you,
Brittany Pettersen

body:
With this new law, virtually NO state in the south has access to safe and legal abortion. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63752712/407907859/-2095412496?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20230524_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2U4M2QyMmMtNjFmYS1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jTB1V0USiOZAOZ9rH7Kx2sGB4nQm80b9lTgRQzKQQcc=)
---
**Yesterday, South Carolina Republicans in the state legislature passed a 6-week abortion ban that is sure to be signed once it arrives at the Governor’s office. ** This is an extreme law that the right-wing has been fighting to pass since _Roe v. Wade_ was overturned last year — but was struck down by the state’s court. Whether or not the state’s supreme court strikes down this bill again, this extremist majority will continue to find ways to restrict abortion in the state — going against the will of the people and pushing through harmful, invasive legislation like this one. Women all over the country warned everyone that this would happen, and everyone said we were overreacting. **Now if this new law comes into effect, virtually NO state in the south has access to safe and legal abortion. ** The only way to put an end to this madness is by electing more women and pro-choice candidates who will vote to make abortion legal at the federal level. clean_body: With this new law, virtually NO state in the south has access to safe and legal abortion. | = Yesterday, South Carolina Republicans in the state legislature passed a 6-week abortion ban that is sure to be signed once it arrives at the Governor’s office. This is an extreme law that the right-wing has been fighting to pass since Roe v. Wade was overturned last year — but was struck down by the state’s court. Whether or not the state’s supreme court strikes down this bill again, this extremist majority will continue to find ways to restrict abortion in the state — going against the will of the people and pushing through harmful, invasive legislation like this one. Women all over the country warned everyone that this would happen, and everyone said we were overreacting. Now if this new law comes into effect, virtually NO state in the south has access to safe and legal abortion. The only way to put an end to this madness is by electing more women and pro-choice candidates who will vote to make abortion legal at the federal level. It’s up to us to make that happen. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks so much for your support, Katie HER Time PAC 2120 University Ave Berkeley, CA 94704 United States | mailto:team@her-time.com | Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

subject: Here’s how I’d fix things in Washington

body:
It’s time to stop complaining and actually fix the problem without apology.
[Unsubscribe](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=62ef9bbe196049cd972cedf712ebfbf9&_t=SXD-jnn2xlkrcIO38aMz7Q9cCYIEjjtLM6kw5gb9qA-e9thiXsHjKZkRoEs6eZkTa8s_tdcBQ5GLWxdrZeH8R-oFJH4enx2JUl6RrFzw69o%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=62ef9bbe196049cd972cedf712ebfbf9&_t=SXD-jnn2xlkrcIO38aMz7Q9cCYIEjjtLM6kw5gb9qA-e9thiXsHjKZkRoEs6eZkTa8s_tdcBQ5GLWxdrZeH8R-oFJH4enx2JUl6RrFzw69o%3D)

| [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=62ef9bbe196049cd972cedf712ebfbf9&_e=1s-kgjpt6iHk2LMsxcsX5UuL56QLyMIpbe5UL9gPvy1V36Ztiaj70aAQZXYHugI5_bMpHzcRnuIv-wLjPPSvP43vgqspv4viIGlzp2YMWrEFuEmwvmQozhh1Cw2Pg_g9OB_aaW5_k2Ldc6qypnJlY0GrQNwT3skvtk4nbLNqPdjEd-AmMeB8zLcAe3XNSjs3_77SMT_WeY-CLU6X2NfN9WO_eWd9rrDNrGPDCzKI5WPCMEScic8FW6RgBK_jPjSoYssjb6eWI5RjgyD-IJOabJI24CBaa3k0DjxT7IueW07kATUQHZkqmRsQGwAkLOQCsT6IFWFaozyWMuUlUgeM11H6CWABs3bxTmLGcIenInw%3D)
Peter -

Over the course of this election, I am laying my vision for an American national revival.

Here's one promise for you: I will end the weaponization of police power in America.

Time to stop complaining and actually *fix* the problem without apology.
1. Shut down + replace the FBI
2. Shut down + replace the IRS
3. Pardon all federal defendants prosecuted based on political motives. This includes Douglass Mackey & nonviolent January 6 defendants denied due process
4. Hold Congress accountable for taxpayer $$ used as hush money for sexual harassment claims
5. Publish the Jeffrey Epstein client list: the police state can't be weaponized to protect a select few.

Peter, if you agree, and want these policies debated on the main stage of the Republican Presidential Primary, then I need your help. **[Chip in $1 to build this movement toward our American revival.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=62ef9bbe196049cd972cedf712ebfbf9&_e=1s-kgjpt6iHk2LMsxcsX5UuL56QLyMIpbe5UL9gPvy1V36Ztiaj70aAQZXYHugI5_bMpHzcRnuIv-wLjPPSvP43vgqspv4viIGlzp2YMWrEFuEmwvmQozhh1Cw2Pg_g9OB_aaW5_k2Ldc6qypnJlY0GrQNwT3skvtk4nbLNqPdjEd-AmMeB8zLcAe3XNSjs3_77SMT_WeY-CLU6X2NfN9UVdQzYclXN54NOTvM-dUVw4p-hGUf2dFVKgvxl6RxnUsJzb85SM1rOi0TUhtUsufq-fIhJg3lEIphuA9vCZhCvc430pwCFLuDL_5-zLqK0kLihoAmzLAvsBztqbbELJ7MGqkNkAcjfx7UZAPyHkm7w%3D)**

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

name: falling behind [VPP]
subject: are we already losing momentum against Ted Cruz??
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
We’ll never be able to save the Senate at this rate...
| | **WE TOLD YOU:** Ted Cruz is one of the most vulnerable Republicans up for election. _He won his last election by JUST 2.6%!_

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

Friend,

clean_body: The Left is pulling out all the stops to flip our district BLUE next year | Friend, Opportunity Wisconsin , a left-wing group flooded our district’s airwaves with baseless attack Ads. The radical Left is already spending, organizing, and marching against me – they’re going to do everything they can to take this district next year and I need your help. The Leftists will try to dress up their demonstrations in a litany of ways, but we all know what their “activism” is really about – flipping this district BLUE in 2024 to retake the House. Despite our district being atoss up , I know that we will prevail in 2024 and help keep Conservatives in control of the House – so long as we have the support of great patriots like you, Friend. But if we lack the resources we need to match up with the Left on the airwaves AND on the ground – it’s going to be near impossible for us to win and defend our district next year. Your support is going to be CRUCIAL in saving our country from the radical Left, Friend. Thank you, Rep. | | Peter, I want to bring your attention to a critical issue that often goes unnoticed: **our massive northern border. ** During my recent appearance on Fox News, I discussed the alarming situation that the cartels exploit to bring illegal aliens into New York, all thanks to the lenient policies of Kathy Hochul and Joe Biden.

On Hochul's watch, illegal aliens are granted driver's licenses, allowing them to move freely throughout the country. Moreover, she prioritizes housing illegal aliens over our homeless veterans, even suggesting the use of New York college campuses for their accommodation. As a proud member of the Northern Border Security Caucus, I have taken a firm stand against Biden's open border crisis. House Republicans passed legislation this month that will...
* Complete the Border Wall
* Mandate E-Verify
* Stop Asylum Fraud
* Reinforce Border Patrol
* And much much more

[**SECURE OUR BORDER: RUSH IN >>> **](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=847cb8f4fb054cd88cbc1a99e6919d7a&_e=SSp8-aYx8XOmcDFKydXNJhEQPjicY10IObf8J1nzJb2xyoDCShdZ-qFTMxLdHiLIryoU1punoKKCAV1vTV3LY1S4k3jo0WgvLADD0HLZDsjp0Fb0FL0npBzy9j3idMRIU_R7QdGJX2JLMrjmDFjP9yTXwC6CSjvn419aWKHP3NCfouUHxRAjFOpPR8To5cI5V9Iapt3v5r6iUB6Tglb398aLlSqHLaspZkmZey9q3k1V-FME2xJaU1A5Ebpv7cHTcybr9Nr3uSfYmOiysMlwdaI2oC2GKSxoHloh4BTOeI0lbKGtqrkUTSNYOsHehvdH1OucEsiw6_Mo6RjlPixWGDthKdkOyNBKJpDt8TBnUJU%3D)

On Hochul's watch, illegal aliens are granted driver's licenses, allowing them to move freely throughout the country. Moreover, she prioritizes housing illegal aliens over our homeless veterans, even suggesting the use of New York college campuses for their accommodation. **About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Keeping up the heat in our communities
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Republicans are standing in the way of creating real progress that meets the real needs of our communities.
#
Peter,
Our grassroots movement is at the forefront of fighting for crucial and transformative change for our communities. Yet time and again, Republicans stand in the way of creating real progress that meets the real needs of our communities.
It's time to put the pressure on those with the tools to make change happen. Pramila is dedicated to holding Republicans accountable for using our broken status quo to uphold their own political and personal interests. **But it's up to stand with Pramila and keep up the heat in our communities.**
**Now more than ever, we have to stand up to the broken institutions that have harmed our communities for far too long.**[**Peter, w****ill you chip in $3 to continue powering our movement in our communities and in the halls of Congress?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/42202?source=em20230524-2518&t=1&akid=2518%2E420207%2EqyRdhl)
**[Donate](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/42202?refcode=em20230524-2518&t=20&akid=2518%2E420207%2EqyRdhl)**
If we want to shift our democracy towards one that favors compassion, care, and equality for all — we need to completely overhaul the archaic and ineffective systems that have halted our progress.
**That means ending the filibuster, ensuring everyone can vote and make their voices heard, and ensuring that everyone has access to quality health care, education, and more.** We have to use our collective power to show our opposition that we won't back down until we implement solutions to every crisis our communities face.
**Right now, we're building up our resources to keep up our momentum, but we need your support.**[**Will you help us keep up this good fight by making a contribution of $3 or more today?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/42202?refcode=em20230524-2518&t=21&akid=2518%2E420207%2EqyRdhl)
Together,
Jayapal HQ

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230524-2518-footer&t=22&refcode2=2518_420207_qyRdhl&akid=2518%2E420207%2EqyRdhl)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

Pramila is dedicated to holding Republicans accountable for using our broken status quo to uphold their own political and personal interests. But it's up to stand with Pramila and keep up the heat in our communities. Now more than ever, we have to stand up to the broken institutions that have harmed our communities for far too long. If we want to shift our democracy towards one that favors compassion, care, and equality for all — we need to completely overhaul the archaic and ineffective systems that have halted our progress. That means ending the filibuster, ensuring everyone can vote and make their voices heard, and ensuring that everyone has access to quality health care, education, and more. We have to use our collective power to show our opposition that we won't back down until we implement solutions to every crisis our communities face. Right now, we're building up our resources to keep up our momentum, but we need your support. Together, Jayapal HQ | | Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com

this November in Virginia

|

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63754172/407912233/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Mjg1Y2U2ZC02NWZhLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aEgZW79j5TqjLCarLL8-Vn4r9VxrPurYaEqAVppGmWo=&emci=0a4fd88f-95f9-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=5285ce6d-65fa-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=4568237)

| | We’ll be frank, Derek. If the GOP takes back the Virginia Senate and maintains control of the House of Delegates in November, the far-right will have full control over our efforts to make progress and safeguard protections for millions of Virginians. We want to take a moment to talk about just a few of the ways that Republicans will erase our progress if they were to gain control the General Assembly, **_[but before we do, can you chip in $5 or whatever you can right now to give us the resources we need to help Democrats win big in the fall?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63754173/407912234/61832116?refcode=mw_em_230524_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Mjg1Y2U2ZC02NWZhLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aEgZW79j5TqjLCarLL8-Vn4r9VxrPurYaEqAVppGmWo=)_** **Gun violence:** Between 2020 and 2021 under a Democratic majority in VA, we passed a flurry of popular laws aimed at preventing gun violence – including a red flag law and expanded background checks. Since then, _Virginia Republicans have proposed some of the loosest concealed handgun legislation we’ve ever seen._ **Reproductive Rights:** When Democrats had control of the General Assembly, they worked to enact the _Reproductive Health Protection Act_ – a law eliminating state interference in abortion care decisions. Now, far-right VA Republicans have declared they’ll do whatever is necessary to block access to abortion care – including banning abortion after just 15 weeks of pregnancy – or worse. **Voting Access:** Virginia Democrats have worked to ensure that all citizens have fair access to voting. From allowing Virginians to vote by mail, increasing early voting sites, and allowing same-day registration – Democrats have improved the accessibility of voting across the Commonwealth. Republicans' vision for access to voting includes elimination of ballot drop boxes, slashing the number of early voting sites, and rolling back access to mail-in ballots. Democrats have blocked these attempts so far, but if Republicans win both chambers this fall, they will have full control to make these measures law. **We cannot let the GOP regain control of the Virginia Senate and expand their control in the House of Delegates.** **_[Your contribution is the reason Senator Warner is able to travel across the Commonwealth, get out the vote, and spend his time working to elect strong Democrats to the General Assembly. Can you donate today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63754174/407912235/61832116?refcode=mw_em_230524_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Mjg1Y2U2ZC02NWZhLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aEgZW79j5TqjLCarLL8-Vn4r9VxrPurYaEqAVppGmWo=)_** This November, we have the opportunity to protect all the progress Democrats have worked so hard for here in Virginia. Let’s step up and make it happen. Thank you, Team Warner ****[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63754175/407912236/61832116?refcode=mw_em_230524_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Mjg1Y2U2ZC02NWZhLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aEgZW79j5TqjLCarLL8-Vn4r9VxrPurYaEqAVppGmWo=)****

Now, far-right VA Republicans have declared they’ll do whatever is necessary to block access to abortion care – including banning abortion after just 15 weeks of pregnancy – or worse. Voting Access: Virginia Democrats have worked to ensure that all citizens have fair access to voting. From allowing Virginians to vote by mail, increasing early voting sites, and allowing same-day registration – Democrats have improved the accessibility of voting across the Commonwealth. Republicans' vision for access to voting includes elimination of ballot drop boxes, slashing the number of early voting sites, and rolling back access to mail-in ballots. Democrats have blocked these attempts so far, but if Republicans win both chambers this fall, they will have full control to make these measures law. We cannot let the GOP regain control of the Virginia Senate and expand their control in the House of Delegates. = This November, we have the opportunity to protect all the progress Democrats have worked so hard for here in Virginia. Let’s step up and make it happen. Thank you, Team Warner **= | | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 United States | Click here to . | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1001&akid=325%2E35263%2EsvWmb8 ]TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE

URGENT DONOR GOAL

-------------------------------------

We need to hold on to Tammy Baldwin’s seat in Wisconsin if we want to
defend our Democratic Senate Majority.

Dangerous, right-wing Republicans are already lining up to run against
her, so we’re going to need all hands on deck to fight back against their
attacks.

That’s why we’re launching an online donor goal of 20,000 grassroots
donors by Wednesday night.

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-may23.WiYufF&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230524_PM1_V1_S11&t=1004&akid=325%2E35263%2EsvWmb8 ]Will you step up today and support Tammy’s reelection?

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-may23.WiYufF&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230524_PM1_V1_S11&t=1005&akid=325%2E35263%2EsvWmb8 ]DONATE

Peter —

Tammy is officially running for reelection to the Senate — and the
Wisconsin GOP is already going after her.

Look, the attacks are only going to ramp up from here. Senate Republicans
are desperate to regain the majority, and they’re hoping Wisconsin can be
their winning ticket.

Wisconsin has a record of elections won and lost by very close margins. In
2022, Wisconsin Democrats lost the Senate election by a margin of only 1%.

Just a few thousand votes could determine whether Tammy will be reelected
— which is why right-wing groups will spend big in our state. It’s only a
matter of time before a rush of Republican spending crashes into
Wisconsin.

We have to build the resources to protect and defend Tammy in this race,
and we can’t do it without this team.

body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63755461/407916366/62647395?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmEwNzMyOGItNjlmYS1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=SI7cP9xu9f7PcBEYIFaO95L4Z-a-wyGCuV6ZnYORuKw=) Team,

As you’ve probably heard, members of the Writer’s Guild of America West are currently on strike to protest unfair working conditions, including non-livable wages.

As streaming continues to dominate the entertainment industry, studio heads refuse to cut their own bottom line to update their payment structures, and as a result, the writers get squeezed.

**Laura proudly stands in solidarity with the writers as they fight for fair compensation, and recently showed her support by joining strikers on the picket line. Check out the photos she sent back to HQ!**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63755462/407916367/62647395?refcode=em-5.24.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmEwNzMyOGItNjlmYS1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=SI7cP9xu9f7PcBEYIFaO95L4Z-a-wyGCuV6ZnYORuKw=)

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63755463/407916368/62647395?refcode=em-5.24.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmEwNzMyOGItNjlmYS1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=SI7cP9xu9f7PcBEYIFaO95L4Z-a-wyGCuV6ZnYORuKw=)
Laura spent over two decades as a film producer and executive, so this is personal for her. **She knows that the industry is a very tough business and that the hardworking writers behind our favorite movies and shows deserve financial security and to share in the successes of their projects.**

Our district is home to many members of the entertainment industry and Laura will _always_ fight to ensure them a good livelihood. Everyone here at HQ is proud to work for such a strong supporter of organized labor – and we hope that you’re proud of her, too.

Thanks so much,

Team Laura

name: Eric Swalwell
subject: No Finding of Wrongdoing AGAIN
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
No Finding of Wrongdoing AGAIN |
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63755033/407915123/-1590518309?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjIzMjU0OC02OGZhLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SqrYrDdlQmla61Nk-9nKyqBICLeJP_3bKyPfpU5gjBU=&emci=24040bb5-5dfa-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=c6232548-68fa-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=7878003)
Dear Friend - Earlier this week the bipartisan House Ethics Committee closed an investigation of me based on a 2020 GOP allegation involving a campaign volunteer. For more than three years, Speaker McCarthy and MAGA Republicans tried to silence my advocacy in Congress by waging a public smear campaign. Nearly ten years ago I assisted the FBI in their counterintelligence investigation of this campaign volunteer. At the time, the case and my assistance, were briefed to Republican Speaker of the House John Boehner and two years later, Republican House Speaker Paul Ryan re-appointed me to the House Intelligence Committee. Neither Speaker questioned my actions nor politicized my cooperation. The FBI has repeatedly said I was never under suspicion of wrongdoing and praised my cooperation with their investigation. In spite of all this, a House Republican filed a complaint with the House Ethics Committee. The Committee had this case for more than two years. They had the power of subpoena. They received answers from me in response to requests for information. They closed the case and did not make a finding of wrongdoing. It’s time to move on. If the intent in bringing this complaint, taking me off the Intelligence Committee, and leveling false smears was to silence me, that is not going to happen. I will continue to be a voice on behalf of my constituents and a passionate defender of democracy. Your support has helped sustain me and my family during this time. Thank you,
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63755034/407915124/-1590518309?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjIzMjU0OC02OGZhLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SqrYrDdlQmla61Nk-9nKyqBICLeJP_3bKyPfpU5gjBU=&emci=24040bb5-5dfa-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=c6232548-68fa-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=7878003)
---
Democrat Eric Swalwell proudly represents California's 15th Congressional District. He needs your support in order to keep protecting what's important: our healthcare, our paychecks, our future, and our democracy.
Eric runs a people-powered campaign that relies on grassroots supporters like you, and if he's going to win re-election, he's going to need your help. If you'd still like to stop receiving emails, you can [unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/sSRynqGvEUuAD1QP3hBpsA2?unsubscribedata=FGDHlMfZPYHDPrPsksKIlA2ovtZhImCxJ51oQ9dd4SVFw0OfXiUAzC07nmPUbzzm2JaqiSXNzV40sEIsse1kmZgv7e8e5zNOFm70vBiajy7rL%2F4faUm%2F4tzoCg%2BhoG2CGaQ%2F37ecIvSMpfV2S%2FxisKBoKWUAKl9YHdfhX0rcWupqxu%2FUckixY%2FuiNyHub9kWaPivb7MW7R5nL6LuI8RQV6Ng0Zxa7EM8ziHNzj0LobKpR1PqLIZqPjVQCCJqrXp3anX8Fam5gdZ%2BoPin1n6ZgzOGq8QTuaa1RV7O%2FuH6XaJAPlRg%2FsND%2FtgEfSMf8K17G9dOeRSVFQFqsagZ1bTa7wZ3%2B3x0cbNCzxTNniBmp%2FJdzENrdzc%2FNariJ5PxO3ayva%2BXerluKLdecs%2B1yfC2m9k1EGZ5BAEX0FBwTGRBp0s%3D)

name: Allyson Damikolas
subject: It’s official: I’m running for Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Allyson for Congress
body:
Hi there,

My name is Allyson Muñiz Damikolas and I’m running for the U.S. Congress to represent the people in California’s 40th Congressional district.

I’m running because I’m a mother who is sick and tired of worrying about our kids getting shot in school.

I’m running because I’m a school board member who doesn’t want to have to choose between investing in more security equipment or new textbooks.

I’m running because I have two daughters who deserve the same rights as I do.

I’m also running because like you, I believe Congress CAN work for us, if we elect more people for the right reasons, who aren’t influenced by money or party bosses, and who just want to do the right thing and deliver for their communities.

And as I launch my campaign, I want you to know that I don’t take your help and support for granted. It genuinely means everything to me.

It's your help and support that matters to me the most.

I also happen to be running in a district that is a HUGE pick up opportunity for Democrats.

Ok, now that I’ve made that clear, I want to tell you a little bit more about me:

*I’m a mother. I’m also an engineer and a Tustin school board member.

*I’m a proud Latina who comes from a long line of Mexican Americans, who have lived in California for generations.

*My father was a marine and my mother worked as a cafeteria worker in our local public school.

Here’s the reality: career politicians like Young Kim will always put special interests OVER the people. They serve big pharma, the gun lobby, and the MAGA machine while leaving hardworking families behind.

I’m sick and tired of watching this happen.

As a Tustin school board member, I’ve worked tirelessly to make sure I do the utmost justice to the families and school children I represent. And that's what I’ll continue to do in Congress.

But I need your help to put me over the edge.

Your support today is critical for my campaign, friends.

Reporting strong fundraising early on will show the strength of our movement and let Young Kim know that the people in this district are standing up for ourselves and demanding change.
Can I count on you to chip in what you can and join our effort? >> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_email_2023q2?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2023.05.24_B1_announcement

Thank you for your early support. Like I said before, it means everything to me.

– Allyson

Paid for by Allyson for Congress
Allyson for Congress
PO Box 1813
Tustin, CA 92781-9998
United States

clean_body: Hi there, My name is Allyson Muñiz Damikolas and I’m running for the U.S. Congress to represent the people in California’s 40th Congressional district. I’m running because I’m a mother who is sick and tired of worrying about our kids getting shot in school. I’m running because I’m a school board member who doesn’t want to have to choose between investing in more security equipment or new textbooks. I’m running because I have two daughters who deserve the same rights as I do. I’m also running because like you, I believe Congress CAN work for us, if we elect more people for the right reasons, who aren’t influenced by money or party bosses, and who just want to do the right thing and deliver for their communities. And as I launch my campaign, I want you to know that I don’t take your help and support for granted. It genuinely means everything to me. It's your help and support that matters to me the most. I also happen to be running in a district that is a HUGE pick up opportunity for Democrats. Ok, now that I’ve made that clear, I want to tell you a little bit more about me: I’m a mother. I’m also an engineer and a Tustin school board member. I’m a proud Latina who comes from a long line of Mexican Americans, who have lived in California for generations. *My father was a marine and my mother worked as a cafeteria worker in our local public school. Here’s the reality: career politicians like Young Kim will always put special interests OVER the people. They serve big pharma, the gun lobby, and the MAGA machine while leaving hardworking families behind. I’m sick and tired of watching this happen. As a Tustin school board member, I’ve worked tirelessly to make sure I do the utmost justice to the families and school children I represent. And that's what I’ll continue to do in Congress. But I need your help to put me over the edge. Your support today is critical for my campaign, friends. Reporting strong fundraising early on will show the strength of our movement and let Young Kim know that the people in this district are standing up for ourselves and demanding change. Can I count on you to chip in what you can and join our effort? >> Thank you for your early support. Like I said before, it means everything to me. – Allyson Paid for by Allyson for Congress Allyson for Congress PO Box 1813 Tustin, CA 92781-9998 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

* * *
After a first term filled with historic wins, President Biden announced he’s seeking a second term.
**Remember:** President Biden has STRENGTHENED our democracy by protecting the sacred right to vote in free, fair, and secure elections.
But Trump winning back the White House poses a direct threat to everything we’ve accomplished since he was defeated in 2020.

name: Courier Newsroom
subject: Ron DeSantis and Elon Musk
body:
The 2024 presidential election has gone from a brisk walk to an all-out sprint.
# [](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/83?t=1&akid=1023%2E120351%2EVp-0EL)
Peter, this week the 2024 presidential election went from a brisk walk to an all-out sprint.
After months of teasing a run, tonight, Ron DeSantis will officially launch his Presidential campaign. In a dystopian twist, the announcement will be live-streamed on Twitter with his new buddy Elon Musk at his side.
[](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3717?refcode=em-20230524&t=2&akid=1023%2E120351%2EVp-0EL)
The bad news is that the unholy alliance between DeSantis, Musk, and Twitter is destined to kick up a misinformation sh*tstorm. But here’s the good news, Peter:
**The Courier Newsroom team is standing by ready to fight back. O****ur talented team of journalists stop the spread of misformation by bringing factual reporting to the online spaces where bad information thrives.**
[**With the 2024 presidential election in full swing, our work is more important than ever and we need your help so we can keep growing. Will you chip in $5 now to ensure they have the resources to keep up this critical work?**](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3717?refcode=em-20230524&t=3&akid=1023%2E120351%2EVp-0EL)
**[Chip in $5 »](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3717?refcode=em-20230524&t=4&akid=1023%2E120351%2EVp-0EL)**
**Let’s be real: Elon Musk’s Twitter isn’t the only powerful media organization to give a platform to a perpetrator of bad information.**
Recently, CNN hosted a town hall for Donald Trump. The event, watched by 3.3 million people, was littered with lies about voter fraud and false stolen election claims.
And as Ron DeSantis uses attacks on abortion and the LGBTQ community to push his extreme politics, outlets like CNN and the New York Times have published misleading headlines that fail to expose the bad information that’s driving his agenda.
At Courier Newsroom, we ensure readers know the real, unvarnished truth about these candidates and their campaigns — **but to contend with powerful information sources like Musk and the mainstream media we need the resources to spread our stories far and wide.**
[**As the 2024 cycle kicks into high gear, our reporters are working hard to hold bad actors, and presidential candidates, accountable. Our honest, accessible journalism is powered by grassroots donations from folks like you, so can we count on you to chip in $5 now?**](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3717?refcode=em-20230524&t=5&akid=1023%2E120351%2EVp-0EL)
**[Chip in $5 »](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3717?refcode=em-20230524&t=6&akid=1023%2E120351%2EVp-0EL)**
Thanks for your support,
The Courier Newsroom Team
**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=7&refcode2=1023_120351_Vp-0EL&akid=1023%2E120351%2EVp-0EL)**
Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/update-your-information)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=1023%2E120351%2EVp-0EL)

To give by check:
Courier Newsroom
Box 509
New York, NY 10032

name: OcasioCortez.com
subject: Join AOC tonight for an urgent organizing call!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Together, we’ll call key districts around the country.
#
The biggest legislative fight of the year has taken center stage after Treasury Secretary Janet Yellen announced that **the nation could default on its financial obligations as soon as next week** if Congress does not move to raise the national debt limit.
House Republicans are attempting to take the country hostage to push their extreme agenda. We must push back. **Which is why tonight we'll be taking action together!**
[Join Alexandria and Indivisible to call constituents in Republican districts won by Biden in 2020 — those who have the most to lose if MAGA extremists force us to default. We’ll ask constituents to call their Member of Congress and tell them to protect teachers, seniors, veterans, and disabled children. Join us tonight →](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/18814?c0=20230524.B7qwCP&c1=4383.Qc2sHQ&c2=P.nP3bTE&c3=_ORG_VOL_ORG.9usBxH&t=1&akid=4383%2E2526796%2EWQn-30)
**[RSVP to join at 5:30 PM ET tonight →](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/18814?c0=20230524.B7qwCP&c1=4383.Qc2sHQ&c2=P.nP3bTE&c3=_ORG_VOL_ORG.9usBxH&t=2&akid=4383%2E2526796%2EWQn-30)**
We cannot afford to fall victim to MAGA hostage-taking. They want to slash jobs for over 100,000 K-12 teachers and cut healthcare to seniors, veterans, and disabled children.
We simply want our country to pay its debts.
House Democrats have introduced a new tactic to get around Kevin McCarthy’s MAGA obstructionism: the discharge petition. The discharge petition would allow Democrats to bring a clean increase to the House floor without going through the Speaker — but **we need every Democrat plus 5 Republicans to sign on to achieve the votes necessary.**
[RSVP to phonebank tonight with Alexandria to key swing districts around the country!](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/18814?c0=20230524.B7qwCP&c1=4383.Qc2sHQ&c2=P.nP3bTE&c3=_ORG_VOL_ORG.9usBxH&t=3&akid=4383%2E2526796%2EWQn-30)[

These constituents were pragmatic enough to know that Biden was the only choice in the 2020 election. Help us encourage them to pressure their Representatives to choose the needs of the American people over party extremists.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/18814?c0=20230524.B7qwCP&c1=4383.Qc2sHQ&c2=P.nP3bTE&c3=_ORG_VOL_ORG.9usBxH&t=4&akid=4383%2E2526796%2EWQn-30)
**[RSVP here →](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/18814?c0=20230524.B7qwCP&c1=4383.Qc2sHQ&c2=P.nP3bTE&c3=_ORG_VOL_ORG.9usBxH&t=5&akid=4383%2E2526796%2EWQn-30)**
Default day could be as early as next Thursday. That is just 8 days away. We have a tiny window to act in order to protect seniors, veterans, teachers, and children.
We hope to see you tonight,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20230524?refcode=em20230524-4383-P_ORG_VOL_ORG&t=6&refcode2=4383_2526796_WQn-30&akid=4383%2E2526796%2EWQn-30)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20230524-4383-P_ORG_VOL_ORG&t=7&akid=4383%2E2526796%2EWQn-30)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=8&akid=4383%2E2526796%2EWQn-30) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=9&akid=4383%2E2526796%2EWQn-30) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=10&akid=4383%2E2526796%2EWQn-30)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=11&akid=4383%2E2526796%2EWQn-30)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=4383%2E2526796%2EWQn-30)

clean_body: | | | | I’m one of nine women to be endorsed... Peter, I am honored and humbled to share with you that I have been endorsed as a Rising Star Candidate by the Winning for Women PAC! This endorsement comes with an even greater challenge:the Democrats have already set their sights on ousting me from office,and we simply cannot afford to let them succeed. I need your support to fuel our campaign and ensure our continued success in Washington. | | Democrats are determined to take away our seat and undermine the progress we've made. Together, we can fight for a more prosperous future for Oregon and America. Thank you, Lori Chavez-DeRemer Congresswoman OR-05 | | | | | | | | | Even as a Congresswoman, Lori’s most important title is mom. That’s how she knows the issues your family faces, and that’s why she fights everyday to make life better for every Oregon family, and every American. Aside from that, all you need to know are the issues she’s fighting for in Congress: If that sounds like the kind of agenda you can get behind, If you’d prefer to give by check, please use the below address: Lori Chavez-DeRemer for Congress 13203 SE 172nd Ave Suite 166 #399 Happy Valley, OR 97086 Forward This message to FIVE FRIENDS AND FAMILY to spread the word on how to achieve a better future for Oregon and America → ** Also text “LORI” to 71800 or click here to receive all of Lori’s messages | | | | Lori Chavez-DeRemer 13203 SE 172nd Ave, Suite 166 #399, Happy Valley, OR 97086 \- =

subject: A public service pro in Virginia

body:
|

| | Peter —

I’m excited to share that we’re endorsing **Rick James** for the House of Delegates in Virginia’s 95th district!

**Rick James has put service over self for over four decades. His record of public service is exemplary, and I know that he’ll continue delivering for his community in the House of Delegates.**

Rick has served as an Airborne Combat Medic in the Army, an officer in the Norfolk Police Department, an educator at Tidewater Community College, and a legislative aide in the Senate of Virginia. That’s a _lot_ of public service!

[Virginia needs public service pros like Rick James. Democrats Serve is a national organization that backs Democrats running for office with frontline public service backgrounds, including first responders, firefighters, social workers, police officers, prosecutors, judges, public defenders, educators, and more.

Democratic candidates with professional experience serving their communities in government have a pragmatic approach to governing and know how to get things done, making for strong narratives and an ability to connect with voters uniquely.

However, when running for office, they often lack access to the professional campaign staff and wealthy donor networks that non-working class candidates do.

clean_body: We can’t let extreme MAGA Republicans like Ron DeSantis take our country backward. Open this email to help fight back: | | | Here we go, Peter: Ron DeSantis just filed to run for president. We need to be ready to fight back. As he kicks off his campaign, we need to ensure Americans across the country know how Ron DeSantis has pushed an extreme MAGA agenda that rips away freedoms from Floridians -- and now he wants to take it nationwide. He banned abortion in Florida before many women even know they’re pregnant -- and is forcing victims of rape or incest to show proof to be able to get access to health care; He made it easier for criminals to carry guns; AND he signed laws allowing books to be banned from schools and attacking LGBTQ+ youth. If you’re against banning books, criminals carrying guns, and the government telling women what decisions they can make about their own bodies, we need you in this fight right now, Peter: | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | It’s going to take all of us to defend democracy and our fundamental freedoms. Thanks for being in this fight, Team Biden-Harris | If you would like to unsubscribe from emails like these, Paid for by Biden for President.

name: Ron DeSantis for President
subject: Why I said yes to running for President
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
I wanted you to be one of the first people to know about this.

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhq5q4jr3av1vpisbslh9sjqph90a7fkda8pdf4o_rp22sh2s8i66o71cjjm4pr4sth2bs)
---
Friend,

It's official: I'M IN.

**I'm running for President of the United States. **
---
| | [JOIN ME](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhnms1a3db6r8pfnl1vh77vfh8ooc6fds8d2qfl0_rp22sh2s8i66o71cjjm4pr4sth2bs)
---
Have you ever noticed how often Joe Biden tries to take potshots at Florida?

It's because he HATES what we're doing in the Sunshine State.

While he pushes the woke agenda, we're fighting back with freedom.

Joe Biden is taking the country in the wrong direction. But I know I can turn it around.

The American people know it, too. That's why they are ALREADY voting with their feet. Our population is booming in the free state of Florida.

Now, I want to put that choice on the ballot--but I need your support. ** **
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3q5il3mqq3s01d5dm0m5439dat5mpft0gb6m7ro_rp22sh2s8i66o71cjjm4pr4sth2bs)
---
We sometimes take freedom for granted. You should not do that after the last few years. It is contested, and we have seen it wither on the vine in many places in our country.

But Florida was different. We chose facts over fear. We chose education over indoctrination. We chose law and order over rioting and disorder. Florida was a refuge of sanity when the world went mad.

We held the line when freedom hung in the balance.

We showed that we can -- and must -- revitalize America.

**I believe freedom is worth fighting for, and as your next President I promise I will never stop fighting for your freedom.** **[Will you fight alongside me?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3gj0h4lln58dsmultitd3pll5bn1s5c420e0l40_rp22sh2s8i66o71cjjm4pr4sth2bs "Will you fight alongside me?")**
---
| | [YES, I'M READY TO WIN](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1s8tigqe1p49v0hjhbt1lfrjb9528fuph253kpg_rp22sh2s8i66o71cjjm4pr4sth2bs)
---
And we can win, Friend.

I'll make sure we have an economy that works for working families, a secure border that works for our nation, and so much more. The battle won't be easy and will require a lot of toil and sweat to get it all done. I'm excited to share my agenda for America with you over the course of this campaign.

**But here 's why I'm writing you today, Friend: [I want to ask you to become a Launch Day Donor to my presidential campaign and join our first team tele-townhall.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z34sqo8b6k6rvusjnjdt2rsa55f5bjvqpnapdqtg_rp22sh2s8i66o71cjjm4pr4sth2bs "I want to ask you to become a Launch Day Donor to my presidential campaign and join our first Team Teletownhall.")**

I promise you, unlike other campaigns, our grassroots fundraising program is built on the principle that our donors are a part of our team, not our personal piggybank.

**_[I vow to treat you with respect: No smoke and mirrors, no fake matches, and no lies.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z326op8ji9kkhpf1h8ud9dn340p145ceu1ko4m6o_rp22sh2s8i66o71cjjm4pr4sth2bs "I vow to treat you with respect: No smoke and mirrors, no fake matches, and no lies.")_**

Can I count on you?
---
| | [DONATE NOW](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zj06le574b2uci17il8sdp26f8k8390rfm41455o_rp22sh2s8i66o71cjjm4pr4sth2bs)
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3mvscnfhqi9fe6mlcfkvmat8q0tcftl81etvcg0_rp22sh2s8i66o71cjjm4pr4sth2bs)
---
In Freedom,

Ron DeSantis
---
_P.S I want to show you my appreciation for standing with me from Day 1 of this campaign. It 's why my team prepared gifts to thank our Day 1 donors.

If you chip in $47 by midnight on 5/25, we'll send you a limited-edition Day 1 membership card and an invite to our first-ever team tele-townhall.

Make sure you get yours now at this secure link: **[https://dsnts.com/aexHpu](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zi0mo2hsu636d43i1b1122pq9ad2k48pmkb5i748_rp22sh2s8i66o71cjjm4pr4sth2bs)**_
---
|

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zagn5orq37leoilom5jladfl01bpgjq55ngejbs0_rp22sh2s8i66o71cjjm4pr4sth2bs)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he graduated with honors and was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School. While at Harvard, he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq as an adviser to a U.S. Navy SEAL commander in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a federal prosecutor, where he targeted and convicted child predators. He was elected to Congress in 2012 and advocated for congressional term limits and a balanced budget amendment. He also spearheaded oversight efforts to expose malfeasance in the IRS and in agencies involved in abusing their authority during the manufacturing of the Russia collusion conspiracy theory. Congressman DeSantis was also a leading champion for America's veterans and helped enact reforms to the VA and place an emphasis on mental health.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award winning television host. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|
---
Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

We will not be able to take back the Senate or fix our country without it. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=01aba0733ebd4c6fabac3860fb0f4395&_t=vpvZm8E8fenik5kcwLhw3p3zfF7Uj4zW_z5Xr2zmL2tP8j7a9Sp1OzEB6FCF7Lf3rNkMEkK7iniACZIS8L8vCvIZC9cVEx-2ymq3EfmL4fU%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=01aba0733ebd4c6fabac3860fb0f4395&_t=vpvZm8E8fenik5kcwLhw3p3zfF7Uj4zW_z5Xr2zmL2tP8j7a9Sp1OzEB6FCF7Lf3rNkMEkK7iniACZIS8L8vCvIZC9cVEx-2ymq3EfmL4fU%3D)

Peter,

I want to share some numbers with you...

* The Democrats hold a 2-seat majority in the Senate – 51-49 – with a tie-breaking vote in VP Kamala Harris.

* Republicans need to flip 2 Senate seats to win an outright majority.

* 23 Democrat-held Senate seats are on the ballot in 2024.

* Only 3 of those seats are rated as a TOSS UP.

* **My race in Ohio – against career Washington insider Sherrod Brown – is one of those toss-ups.**

I’m a husband, father, businessman and a conservative who came to this country when I was 5 and have lived the American Dream. I’m an outsider who will fix the mess insiders have made of this great country.

**The path back to a Republican Senate majority runs through Ohio** , and I need your help to build a nationwide grassroots campaign that can take on Brown and the left-wing special interests supporting him.

We need to start building now to win this critical can’t-lose race next year, [**which is why I’m asking you to join my campaign as a supporter today with just a $5 contribution.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=01aba0733ebd4c6fabac3860fb0f4395&_e=_pjwvYoRclaH5W5eWBPZNVaRDZQZn8RH8XGWfkn1MafvxZY7Xjef-iJyfWhiS7a3kxmiFt2dcWf9IB-JGlBwXNgrMUjFFalyoddNzrHR49HqUe0f--qnxjdw6jsXrmAMfjBAeAbgKoEtvDoklefi2Qse7xDHPYKuoCzanP_FmxwlKOimqWhmeOFv_oDkAEjUZHg6Dsk-PPAM-zCojYuhD-9fFqQBfhK02gdS2gYNGryR_Kvy3RLJvaMCc2yZ35sLvZDXReRAqx0peJVS7RG5PJX-su8FMg3ZszW0-4aKjch3e-wTK0_cLhIMVm8x-MmoVgGa367lDg7mPcE84079q4XQlTFOx8I1aBtEstlyWDLxYy72R53Tfu7O-_4uL5Kf__sFyeur0I3IAEanErhxBg%3D%3D)

[ ** Chip in $5 ➞ **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=01aba0733ebd4c6fabac3860fb0f4395&_e=_pjwvYoRclaH5W5eWBPZNVaRDZQZn8RH8XGWfkn1MafvxZY7Xjef-iJyfWhiS7a3kxmiFt2dcWf9IB-JGlBwXNgrMUjFFalyoddNzrHR49HqUe0f--qnxjdw6jsXrmAMfjBAeAbgKoEtvDoklefi2Qse7xDHPYKuoCzanP_FmxwlKOimqWhmeOFv_oDkAEjUZHg6Dsk-PPAM-zCojYuhD-9fFqQBfhK02gdS2gYNGryR_Kvy3RLJvaMCc2yZ35sLQCqlMl6Vt9VV0ymCuF0ZUFGU_mZa2F9M0dvXXRcuk5WU5V2_iBSstcKcfXS9sLoIv_zLiGMbK9qVRwZvp_JcjUviVfcm-V-gCndzUreYyq8cIjtgBt7PwPDbiD0B2G4P9KuRwlGJ1c_GIxK3DopWtA%3D%3D)
Your initial support today will help us build the foundation for victory tomorrow, with the endgame of restoring conservative leadership in Washington that will secure our borders, stand up to China, rescue our economy, and halt the woke agenda.

This is one of the seats **CONSERVATIVES MUST WIN** in 2024. We will not be able to take back the Senate or fix our country without it. [**Will you join me in this fight with a $5 contribution today?**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=01aba0733ebd4c6fabac3860fb0f4395&_e=_pjwvYoRclaH5W5eWBPZNVaRDZQZn8RH8XGWfkn1MafvxZY7Xjef-iJyfWhiS7a3kxmiFt2dcWf9IB-JGlBwXNgrMUjFFalyoddNzrHR49HqUe0f--qnxjdw6jsXrmAMfjBAeAbgKoEtvDoklefi2Qse7xDHPYKuoCzanP_FmxwlKOimqWhmeOFv_oDkAEjUZHg6Dsk-PPAM-zCojYuhD-9fFqQBfhK02gdS2gYNGryR_Kvy3RLJvaMCc2yZ35sLWcuhNrl7ZMsm2veLXMjRAWtfieEKZpd3iO6VEO2NxD1e6Itw1kgSkX7OtvzzSZv13T4h6suL5jT973mvNDynZ3RnEigovwXdL9yMPliS1UlfA_8PHoBHzElttfYNw90t9QlgfheM3asanlpyqdjwiQ%3D%3D)

**Meet Bernie Moreno:** | Bernie Moreno fights for the American dream because he’s lived it. Bernie was born in Bogota, Colombia. At age five, his American dream began when he moved to the United States with his family. Bernie became an American citizen at age 18.

Through his relentless work ethic and untamable entrepreneurial spirit, he turned the first car dealership that he purchased in 2005 into one of the largest dealership groups in America.

In 2016, Bernie recognized the value and transformational potential of blockchain technology, before it received mainstream attention, and moved much of his volunteer time and investment dollars into the space. In 2018 he co-founded ChampTitles, which grew to be quite successful as Bernie served as Chairman of the Board.

After a long, successful career, Bernie sold most of his business to begin focusing on his calling: protecting the American dream for another generation.

Solving our country’s problems requires common sense. In Washington, Bernie will fight to shrink government, protect our freedoms, stop the Chinese Communist party from taking our data and land, and always put America First.

Ohioans are done with politicians who talk a big game and do nothing. Bernie wants to go to D.C. to get work done – just like he always has.
