clean_body: This is one of the seats CONSERVATIVES MUST WIN in 2024. We will not be able to take back the Senate or fix our country without it. | | Peter, I want to share some numbers with you... The Democrats hold a 2-seat majority in the Senate – 51-49 – with a tie-breaking vote in VP Kamala Harris. Republicans need to flip 2 Senate seats to win an outright majority. 23 Democrat-held Senate seats are on the ballot in 2024. Only 3 of those seats are rated as a TOSS UP. My race in Ohio – against career Washington insider Sherrod Brown – is one of those toss-ups. I’m a husband, father, businessman and a conservative who came to this country when I was 5 and have lived the American Dream. I’m an outsider who will fix the mess insiders have made of this great country. The path back to a Republican Senate majority runs through Ohio , and I need your help to build a nationwide grassroots campaign that can take on Brown and the left-wing special interests supporting him. We need to start building now to win this critical can’t-lose race next year, Your initial support today will help us build the foundation for victory tomorrow, with the endgame of restoring conservative leadership in Washington that will secure our borders, stand up to China, rescue our economy, and halt the woke agenda. This is one of the seats CONSERVATIVES MUST WIN in 2024. We will not be able to take back the Senate or fix our country without it. name: Ron DeSantis for President
subject: THIS IS IT
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
I'm running for President of the United States.

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7s2rmg5qbebd8j13h49ufoe4unfhlbeqlobv8ho_rp22sh2s8i66o71cjjm4pb0cth2bs)
---
Friend,

It's official: I'M IN.

**I'm running for President of the United States. **
---
| | [JOIN ME](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0ps229qf2ec8kmbfco3hfl7jurkphdlt1k8lbf0_rp22sh2s8i66o71cjjm4pb0cth2bs)
---
Have you ever noticed how often Joe Biden tries to take potshots at Florida?

It's because he HATES what we're doing in the Sunshine State.

While he pushes the woke agenda, we're fighting back with freedom.

Joe Biden is taking the country in the wrong direction. But I know I can turn it around.

The American people know it, too. That's why they are ALREADY voting with their feet. Our population is booming in the free state of Florida.

Now, I want to put that choice on the ballot--but I need your support. ** **
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6upvhdtcbq86mepdqtoqrt4bkv2b42kv8tmqb88_rp22sh2s8i66o71cjjm4pb0cth2bs)
---
We sometimes take freedom for granted. You should not do that after the last few years. It is contested, and we have seen it wither on the vine in many places in our country.

But Florida was different. We chose facts over fear. We chose education over indoctrination. We chose law and order over rioting and disorder. Florida was a refuge of sanity when the world went mad.

We held the line when freedom hung in the balance.

We showed that we can -- and must -- revitalize America.

**I believe freedom is worth fighting for, and as your next President I promise I will never stop fighting for your freedom.** **[Will you fight alongside me?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ze40v7vpcjsgihcj887r1e3po5f9ns8447c7i4h0_rp22sh2s8i66o71cjjm4pb0cth2bs "Will you fight alongside me?")**
---
| | [YES, I'M READY TO WIN](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbkgmsjh33gei3s5l4l6tesj0crbohbjjb2phsu8_rp22sh2s8i66o71cjjm4pb0cth2bs)
---
And we can win, Friend.

I'll make sure we have an economy that works for working families, a secure border that works for our nation, and so much more. The battle won't be easy and will require a lot of toil and sweat to get it all done. I'm excited to share my agenda for America with you over the course of this campaign.

**But here 's why I'm writing you today, Friend: [I want to ask you to become a Launch Day Donor to my presidential campaign and join our first team tele-townhall.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsebh4mhv5sjqmg2ebi1ck25mgrggbes20n2fb28_rp22sh2s8i66o71cjjm4pb0cth2bs "I want to ask you to become a Launch Day Donor to my presidential campaign and join our first Team Teletownhall.")**

I promise you, unlike other campaigns, our grassroots fundraising program is built on the principle that our donors are a part of our team, not our personal piggybank.

**_[I vow to treat you with respect: No smoke and mirrors, no fake matches, and no lies.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zku65gqnth1h0s2o8ou2dnmjlpl03h7svl7jjung_rp22sh2s8i66o71cjjm4pb0cth2bs "I vow to treat you with respect: No smoke and mirrors, no fake matches, and no lies.")_**

Can I count on you?
---
| | [DONATE NOW](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqv30pno0bc9440k6tduvck037udutomsei65g30_rp22sh2s8i66o71cjjm4pb0cth2bs)
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zf5pgfqfbdaj31s63pcesd4i5u6khgtvt5scqteo_rp22sh2s8i66o71cjjm4pb0cth2bs)
---
In Freedom,

Ron DeSantis
---
_P.S I want to show you my appreciation for standing with me from Day 1 of this campaign. It 's why my team prepared gifts to thank our Day 1 donors.

If you chip in $47 by midnight on 5/25, we'll send you a limited-edition Day 1 membership card and an invite to our first-ever team tele-townhall.

Make sure you get yours now at this secure link: **[https://dsnts.com/aexHpu](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmvj66mi51ck2h66mattfj13gs9mgdj1ng8pmd68_rp22sh2s8i66o71cjjm4pb0cth2bs)**_
---
|

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlksi7od06qn744q8eq1kts694jc309oi5i0j5q8_rp22sh2s8i66o71cjjm4pb0cth2bs)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he graduated with honors and was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School. While at Harvard, he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq as an adviser to a U.S. Navy SEAL commander in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a federal prosecutor, where he targeted and convicted child predators. He was elected to Congress in 2012 and advocated for congressional term limits and a balanced budget amendment. He also spearheaded oversight efforts to expose malfeasance in the IRS and in agencies involved in abusing their authority during the manufacturing of the Russia collusion conspiracy theory. Congressman DeSantis was also a leading champion for America's veterans and helped enact reforms to the VA and place an emphasis on mental health.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award winning television host. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|
---
Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

---

PO Box 3696
Tallahassee, FL 32315

subject: Abortion is legal in Pennsylvania.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAPIRO FOR PENNSYLVANIA
body:
And as long as I’m Governor, it will stay that way.

If you’re anything like me, you’re sick and tired of extremist politicians and radical rulings trying to take away a woman’s right to make decisions over her own body.

So let me make one thing clear: **As long as I’m Governor, abortion will remain legal in Pennsylvania.**

But we know that the far right is not going to stop their attacks on the right to choose, so we cannot back down from defending our fundamental freedoms.

**It’s never been more important to keep standing up for the right to choose everywhere. For decades, right-wing extremists across the country have tried to roll back the right to choose. And since the Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_ , many on the far right want to pass a total abortion ban.

I’ve spent my career fighting to protect the rights of Pennsylvania’s women to make their own reproductive health care decisions – and I’m not going to stop now.

As Governor, I’m working to expand access to care and ensure it’s patients and doctors making those critical health care decisions – not politicians.

But it’s going to take all of us standing together to beat back the tide of anti-choice extremism and defend the right to choose for everyone.

**So Derek, will you chip in to help us keep up the fight and make sure Pennsylvania remains a pro-choice Commonwealth?**

If you’re anything like me, you’re sick and tired of extremist politicians and radical rulings trying to take away a woman’s right to make decisions over her own body. So let me make one thing clear: As long as I’m Governor, abortion will remain legal in Pennsylvania. But we know that the far right is not going to stop their attacks on the right to choose, so we cannot back down from defending our fundamental freedoms. It’s never been more important to keep standing up for the right to choose everywhere. So Derek, will you chip in to help us keep up the fight to protect abortion rights here in Pennsylvania? Friend,
Every Republican elected official should be UNITED in outrage at what the Deep State has done to me and the America First movement.
**But sadly, some Republicans want to shy away from the topic, because they say they get tired of all the Deep State "drama."**
Friend, the weaponization of the FBI is one of the single biggest threats to our free Republic.
My home has been raided. I was framed as a Russian asset. My family and associates have been intimidated. My private communications have been spied on. I've even been indicted and arrested - despite committing NO CRIME.
And it's not _just_ me... Everyday, hardworking, freedom-loving patriots are also being targeted for holding views that go against the Deep State.
**That 's not _" drama."_ That's a declaration of war on everything we value as Americans.**
_If these politicians get fatigued from a bit of "drama," then the Deep State will eat them alive. They will not rise to the challenge to defend our Republic, and most importantly, defend YOU._
But even though the Deep State has put me through hell, I am ready to do it again! Because I love our country, and I will _NEVER_ let it get destroyed.
_It 's no surprise that we're leading the primary by 50 POINTS. Voters know that during these dark times, we need courage - not cowardice - in the White House._
The time has now come to solidify our lead so that we can turn our focus 100% to beating Crooked Joe Biden and DISMANTLING the Deep State.
Let's finish the job we started, dismantle the Deep State, and MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!

name: Chloe Cole
subject: I'm a cautionary tale
body:
There are lots of powerful people who don't want my story to get out, so I'm so grateful that Mr. Carlson had me on as a guest.

| |
---
| |
# FROM THE DESK OF CHLOE COLE
---
|
---
Dear Friend, My name is Chloe.
---
| | You don't know me but I'm hoping you saw me on Fox News talking to Tucker Carlson. There are lots of powerful people who don't want my story to get out, so I'm so grateful that Mr. Carlson had me on as a guest.
---
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3c32c2337a324e1e94ed06208e0c775b&_e=pGehOQwLoaFSeeTKm50ISLCDR9PLiqQRBvFs4TtH5wrEWXJzZ6YVsr50lc_vxU4a8RAMD8F9LssgYLe2yq0M4d1amW7403_U6od1HmMEGTxVKfQbf-t4KU-ZyLQuuPs7nwh1lzRm23iIaVYxDaqel0LDWbIB2HyWfh_1o_WKqVTp-gQ8bs_MjxRHgAeB6Laxi7lbYlf-_m4hyklw6kHGnMBNxsuELTwFHCbSnjqT0drWmLRl9UPAiEQXQpV17v_HHSOs6NWQOw-cwzr1TYlJwYKedb6L-QZEfW2RcsdUc7oPvQ5Xoy5f72rkdgpf1thi2VvfPvGAOQCkmfZ_ZJzfapmg1jg4oZ7Qahv3NHbj7pY%3D)
---
| | I guess I'm what you'd call a "cautionary tale." You see, I'm one of those girls who was deceived by the transgender movement. I'm 18 years old now but here is a picture of what I looked like before the transgender movement got me. And one from after -- when they had turned me into a "boy."

| | [**Even though we don 't know each other, I'm writing you today hoping you'll help me stop the** **horror of what happened to me, from happening to other children and their parents.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3c32c2337a324e1e94ed06208e0c775b&_e=pGehOQwLoaFSeeTKm50ISLCDR9PLiqQRBvFs4TtH5wrEWXJzZ6YVsr50lc_vxU4a8RAMD8F9LssgYLe2yq0M4d1amW7403_U6od1HmMEGTxVKfQbf-t4KU-ZyLQuuPs7nwh1lzRm23iIaVYxDaqel0LDWbIB2HyWfh_1o_WKqVTp-gQ8bs_MjxRHgAeB6Laxi7lbYlf-_m4hyklw6kHGnF3DkunAddwW_652kb7KxWnp5QLPP5Ki71UUUUQuruKY0AIfnlFf8KPX46uatD54Zic3EdfhL6Jjf9zPXMN7vTqp-JhIapnSQL3RnqBOmOITW4I-jTC0Fs0zlMJ9zFLbHNkvHpTSAO-ux9dpZphYdDU%3D) It all started when I was 11 years old and growing up in Northern California. I was growing embarrassed and confused once my body started changing. I was also shy and didn't socialize easily - and I didn't feel comfortable talking about any of this with my parents. But I found 'friends' on the internet who told me if I was uncomfortable with my body, I was probably a boy trapped in the wrong body. And the more I agreed with them, the more they celebrated me. I was getting the message loud and clear: if I was a girl who became a boy, I'd be valued and loved even more. Before long I was telling my parents I was transgender. They had no idea what to do. My poor parents were scared and desperate and took me to "experts" who convinced them that if they failed to act quickly, I would surely commit suicide. **The gender clinic gave my parents an ultimatum: "Would you rather have a dead daughter or a living son?" ** Given those choices, my parents would have signed anything the doctors put in front of them if it meant "saving" me. When they signed those forms, it wasn't informed parental consent. It was a desperate decision made under extreme duress. And so, at age 13, I was fast-tracked for medical transition from a girl into a boy. [**Will you help me fight so these radical doctors and hospitals can 't prey on another scared, confused, lonely child like they did me?**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3c32c2337a324e1e94ed06208e0c775b&_e=pGehOQwLoaFSeeTKm50ISLCDR9PLiqQRBvFs4TtH5wrEWXJzZ6YVsr50lc_vxU4a8RAMD8F9LssgYLe2yq0M4d1amW7403_U6od1HmMEGTxVKfQbf-t4KU-ZyLQuuPs7nwh1lzRm23iIaVYxDaqel0LDWbIB2HyWfh_1o_WKqVTp-gQ8bs_MjxRHgAeB6Laxi7lbYlf-_m4hyklw6kHGnKamm4K-YfSigg2edipLnIJqXxXNFZFRNpF3Dm3sh1fh34_SVXV0zJIIuyUSXusObHZux4pPNyR91JNa2IzHzuxwx8EzRfQzWhuIJjr08ee4FA-uVW6q0QdRlgsIg68VtdheEhNyWiH-VRb5R3NQaxA%3D) The doctors started giving me weekly testosterone injections...they injected me with an experimental drug used to chemically castrate sex offenders... ...and finally, they removed my breasts in a radical double mastectomy. I was fifteen years old. And of course, none of this made me any happier or less confused. If you're like most people I tell my story to... right about now you're probably thinking, "HOW did it ever get this far?" And the answer is simple. The "experts" lied to my parents -- and to me -- every step of the way. They claimed I would never get "better" unless I medically transitioned - when the truth is that the vast majority of children who think they're transgender grow out of it with absolutely no chemical or surgical intervention. They claimed their consent forms covered all the risks of pumping testosterone and puberty blockers into my 13-year-old body... ...while their forms left out dozens and dozens of known risks. They never told us that there isn't one single scientific study on the effects these treatments have on young children. And they never, ever, were straight with me about what it would mean to let them remove my breasts. When I woke up from that surgery, I was shocked at how mangled my body was. And now years after the surgery, I still wear bandages every day to cover the oozing, unhealed scars. At age 18, I'm just beginning to understand what it will mean to never nurse my child -- if I'll ever be able to have children at all. For the rest of my life, my voice will sound like a man's, my body will look like a boy's, and who knows what cancers, cardiac problems, bone problems, and more are lurking around the corner. And my parents feel like they've failed me on every level imaginable. I can't go back. I can't change what happened. But I can change what happens to the THOUSANDS of kids just like me who are falling prey to the predatory transgender movement and unscrupulous abusive medical "experts." [**And YOU can help me.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3c32c2337a324e1e94ed06208e0c775b&_e=pGehOQwLoaFSeeTKm50ISLCDR9PLiqQRBvFs4TtH5wrEWXJzZ6YVsr50lc_vxU4a8RAMD8F9LssgYLe2yq0M4d1amW7403_U6od1HmMEGTxVKfQbf-t4KU-ZyLQuuPs7nwh1lzRm23iIaVYxDaqel0LDWbIB2HyWfh_1o_WKqVTp-gQ8bs_MjxRHgAeB6Laxi7lbYlf-_m4hyklw6kHGnAFGYcvsGBrKV8MrB3wlpECHvOO9KqTb8lKiC3-b_VXDtVRDuJZtMzTD47UTtbD0XsnSH-0IZOG8QMyfdUEnt75pn1c3fs6PGp9MzqytL-tO-N-smRdOYCutmiroszOI_aBa_zlBVTSpxYEtq4ArUoE%3D) More and more children are mutilated and abused every day. **There 's even a doctor who advertises her mutilation surgeries on TikTok to draw young kids in. ** And it won't stop until someone fights back. Roce City Antifa \-- to get justice for Andy Ngo after he was beaten by Antifa thugs and liberal politicians did NOTHING... O 'Handley v. Padilla \-- to stop Big Government from using Big Tech to silence people they disagree with... And now my case... Chloe Cole v. Kaiser Permanente. The Center for American Liberty is a nonprofit. They have big cases but that doesn't mean they have the big money that their opponents have. There are big forces at work who want to get rich no matter who they hurt. Alone we're no match for them. , we can beat these monsters who are using scared, confused and lonely children to make a buck. For exposing them, I've been called a "liar." I've even been told de-transitioners like me don't exist. But when we beat them in court and stop them from hurting any more children with their lies and mutilations,I will be proud to face them and say: " You may have taken away my childhood, and forever changed my future -- but I exist. I exist." Thank you for reading this letter from a complete stranger. I hope I can call you a friend now. And thank you for whatever help you can send to the Center for American Liberty. every bit moves us closer to stopping these monsters. | | Thank you, Chloe Cole | | | P.S. This is a photo of me now. It's been a long, painful road but I'm finding happiness and purpose as I fight to make sure what happened to me NEVER happens to another child. Thank you so much for your help. --Chloe | | | | The Center for American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. (C) The Center for American Liberty | PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177 {\\optouturi} | Conservatives Give 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

name: Senator Heidi Campbell
subject: “the most up-in-the-air race anyone can remember”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Campbell for Mayor
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230524_em_fr_b1_HC_initial [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230524_em_fr_b1_HC_initial]
Peter,
With Memorial Day weekend just around the corner, now is a great time to catch you up to speed on the Nashville mayor’s race before everyone falls into long-weekend mode.
We want to give you the quick hits on the Nashville mayor’s race, but we know that your personal time is valuable. If you can’t read the rest right now, we hope that you’ll still consider supporting my campaign for Nashville Mayor with a contribution of any amount today. >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230524_em_fr_b1_HC_initial]
SUPPORT HEIDI [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230524_em_fr_b1_HC_initial]
Here’s what you need to know, Peter:
1️⃣ Axios Nashville has called this race “perhaps the most up-in-the-air race anyone can remember.”
2️⃣ The only public poll has us LEADING the race, but so many voters are still undecided that we're almost certainly going to a runoff in September.
3️⃣ With the eyes of the nation on Nashville because of the events at the capitol, we need a caring, experienced leader who will stand up to the state's hostile takeover AND enact an agenda that will **make Nashville a great place to live, not just visit.**
Peter, with all the uncertainty surrounding this race, I want to make sure that Nashvillians know I’m fighting hard for our city.
We can’t come out on top without a powerful grassroots coalition behind us, Peter – especially when some of my opponents are self-funded millionaires. Can we count on you to join Team Heidi with a donation today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230524_em_fr_b1_HC_initial]
JOIN OUR WINNING TEAM [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230524_em_fr_b1_HC_initial]
With gratitude,
Heidi
Heidi Campbell is a Nashville native, Mom, former music industry executive and the first female mayor of the city of Oak Hill.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230524_em_fr_b1_HC_initial [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230524_em_fr_b1_HC_initial]
As mayor, Heidi established a track record for fiscal discipline, balancing the budget every year of her Mayorship, eliminating my own salary, and returning $2M to my city’s reserves.
Heidi was elected in November of 2020 to represent District 20 in the Tennessee State Senate. Since then, she’s been an outspoken advocate for science, the LGBTQ community, public education, local control, women's and kids' issues, Medicaid expansion, and the environment.
Heidi sponsored or co-sponsored over 100 pieces of legislation in her first year in the senate, including legislation to allow cities to offer paid family leave, increase funding for school counselors and reading interventionists, and make it easier to cast a vote.
Heidi is focused on sustainable infrastructure, economic development and job creation, fully funding our public schools and supporting educators, expanding access to affordable healthcare, investing in suicide prevention, making certain that vulnerable children in state custody are not falling through the cracks, and ensuring that every Tennessean - regardless of ethnicity, gender, sexual orientation, age or ability - can achieve the American Dream.
Election Day is Thursday, August 3, 2023.
Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to:
Campbell for Mayor
P.O. Box 330302
Nashville, Tennessee 37203
SUPPORT HEIDI [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230524_em_fr_b1_HC_initial]
Paid for by Campbell for Mayor
Chip Forrester, Treasurer
Paid for by Campbell for Mayor, Chip Forrester, Treasurer
Campbell for Mayor
PO Box 330302
Nashville, TN 37203
United States

name: Movement Labs
subject: The power of rural organizing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rapid Resist Action
body:
Rural progressives could transform the US.

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63758664/407928452/580016960?refcode=EM_FR_230524COBattlegroundrs4_ML_FULL_4_NG_N_LOGO&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS85MjA2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDQyMzdiZC03M2ZhLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f37nVdmPkXc6TkaDKUdK3AgCNy3hPtNe10Dn4jXdgQY=)
Team, here at Movement Labs, we’re pioneering the way to a nation that works for everyone.
Through exhaustive research and experimentation, we have found the path to building back long-term Democratic support in rural areas and winning a progressive future.
Our rural county organizing program increased Democratic success in the rural counties we had the resources to invest in by three points in 2022 – **enough to flip battleground states across the country.**
Now, we’re in the process of scaling up our program to do just that by investing in rural progressives throughout six key states: Arizona, Georgia, Michigan, Nevada, Pennsylvania, and Wisconsin.
**[We’ve raised roughly two-thirds of the $1.5 million we need to do it, and every dollar we’ve been given by thousands of grassroots donors across the nation has helped us get there. Will you donate $10 or more right now to help us close that gap and transform our nation?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63758665/407928453/580016960?refcode=EM_FR_230524COBattlegroundrs4_ML_FULL_4_NG_N_L1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS85MjA2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDQyMzdiZC03M2ZhLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f37nVdmPkXc6TkaDKUdK3AgCNy3hPtNe10Dn4jXdgQY=)**

Through exhaustive research and experimentation, we have found the path to building back long-term Democratic support in rural areas and winning a progressive future. body:
GOP extremists are leading the charge.

| |

Hi Peter, President Biden is under attack by GOP extremists in Congress. As you may have heard, Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene introduced articles of impeachment against President Biden. Her charges claim that President Biden has "deliberately compromised our national security" at the southern border. Since Rep. Greene seems to have forgotten, we'll remind you of a few key details that she left out.
* Marjorie Taylor Greene is **actively demanding to defund the FBI**
* She said that she '‘would’ve been armed’ and ‘would have won’ the **January 6 insurrection** if she and Steve Bannon were put in charge of it
* She **refused to accept the peaceful transition** of power in 2020

Marjorie Taylor Greene and her GOP allies have actively, knowingly, unabashedly put our country's national security at risk time and again. subject: Time for the Lions to come out!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Caroline Kane for Congress
body:
| | | | | [](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=85944ad20a&e=84ee529f47)
---
Peter,
I hope this email finds you well. I am writing to you today because I believe in the power of our community and the **urgent** need for change.
My name is Caroline Kane. I’ve been a successful businesswoman in the Houston area for the past 25 years. I thought I’d be in the private sector forever, but, it’s time for me to switch gears.
I live in Texas and have watched what has gone on in our state and country for too long from the sidelines.
As a conservative, I’ve watched as my district is represented by a Democrat for the past four years and I’ve watched too often as Republicans run for office and barely put up a fight.
**This year, I decided I can’t sit on the sidelines anymore. I don’t see anyone fighting against these people the way they need to be fought against, so I decided to do it myself.**
Congress needs someone who will fight for what matters to YOU, one who is not afraid to disrupt the system, and one who will be a fresh-face and new perspective to Washington.

[**It’s time we send LIONS to Congress, to solve modern-day challenges and get America back on track. That’s where I come in.**](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=d2a392d740&e=84ee529f47)
[](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=b9bf02c1f0&e=84ee529f47)
| [SEND A LION TO CONGRESS!](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=03b3e93f80&e=84ee529f47)
---
Simply put, we need a Great Restoration to combat The Great Reset.
This is the most critical juncture that we’ve faced in generations.
The people that are currently running our nation are not incompetent, though it does seem that way. They are extremely efficient at giving us the worst possible outcomes.
They are actively trying to dismantle America and destroy what it means to be an American.
This is bigger than our two-party system. This is bigger than anything that we have ever seen before. We are engaged in a spiritual battle for the soul of our nation.
If we don’t act now, in these next eighteen months, the nation that we grew up in will no longer exist.
That is not hyperbole — it is fact. They want to make us subjects rather than citizens.
Too many among us are still not aware of the actual agenda that controls the people in power. Many believe the current situation is simply a phase that we will pass through.
**Well, they couldn’t be more wrong.**
We must work hard to remove these people from power and elect true patriotic Americans, there will be no country left to govern, only a collection of people required to adhere, obey, and pay tribute.
I’m running for Texas’s 7th Congressional District — a seat that will help determine control of Congress in 2024. This is one of the most expensive media markets in the country and I really need you to stand with me.
[**Can I count on a donation of $5.00 or more today?**](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=4edcb2f57b&e=84ee529f47)
| [CHIP IN $5.00 AND HELP CAROLINE GET TO CONGRESS!](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=22b7d6a349&e=84ee529f47)
---
Every single day from now until the primary, I’m going to need to be reaching voters with my message.
Every single donation helps me get my name out to more people in the district so that we can actually WIN this race!
We need to restore this nation to its former glory, stand strong against the enemies who wish to ruin us and fight hard to save America.
We can’t rely on politicians and bureaucrats to get this done; this is going to be a movement led by the citizenry.
We live in the greatest country on earth. We cannot afford to lose it.
We, the people, must take our country back. This is our time.
Stand with me today and let’s win this district and save our nation!
| [DONATE $10.00](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=55e4e0ec2c&e=84ee529f47)
---
| [DONATE $50.00](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=bde55fff97&e=84ee529f47)
---
| [DONATE $100.00](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=aec588e552&e=84ee529f47)
---
| [DONATE MORE!](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=3c19b2c610&e=84ee529f47)
---
I’m ready to win. Are you ready to join me?
Let’s get this done!
Sincerely,
Caroline Kane
|
---
|
---
|
---

|

clean_body: The PA GOP made it official in last week’s primaries. = | Fellow activist, it’s official: the PA GOP still wants to destroy our democracy. = The PA GOP’s nominees to run the county-level operations of the 2024 elections include county election officials who disrupted last year's elections. Refusing to certify their counties’ vote counts, they forced the state to sue their counties to get accurate certified results. In Allegheny County, the PA GOP didn’t even bother fielding a primary challenger against the official who voted to help Trump overturn the 2020 election by not certifying the county’s 700,000+ votes. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = PS: Don’t forget to vote and encourage your friends, family, and community to do the same. In solidarity, Team NPP = | The New Pennsylvania Project was founded in May 2021 to expand Pennsylvania’s electorate, so it reflects the Commonwealth’s demographically changing population. In the next four years, NPP will engage and empower young residents and those living in underrepresented immigrant communities and communities of color. We register communities to vote, provide civic education about the issues that matter in their neighborhoods, and mobilize Pennsylvanians to vote in every election. = PA ELECTION DATES : Municipal/Local/Judicial Election: November 7, 2023 Last day to : October 23, 2023 Last day to : October 31, 2023 || || || New Pennsylvania Project PO Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. to receive fewer emails from us. to stop receiving any fundraising emails from us. | | Friend, SPOILER ALERT: The alphabet agencies in Washington are wasting taxpayer money...again. The United States Agency for International Development (USAID) is spending millions of dollars to study “[gender equity](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=b63131d599074ef8948d8cb68b387736&_e=K3e2zE_KcfVjIC23zxEKJojr5p80up-MvzsFmJ_Gm48Mocps6YIvnc508KpVA91_ANxzGp1Pf2uW3GujFs97qD13Cc7jbaglGyJtX3wVku7CyJQzaYvy-RmeXYOc6BPO8y2TfSJZPuZICLQVJeVKCFOjKSa_obybpFeTGW5BX9STJIFJ18r6qerB96QZ-o-y2wBuZIgmM1628ZmV0LGrD_gnyPGmwwKa78s5T94BhCNwUAfDU0pdWHjYGMrHJZpFVuq2wkGxwHvllc-UbkCWE1kXuK5DETGlnSVw6qTKwrrlGjmoQ8mQSQWfc_m-ths0OzNueos9JK7uWQlDNY69HQHhSANj3bzNUsofY7awr-GFI9PJ1YgqCkBJdQfSl7QDQ1U7Z9tLQjS_Gg6kCwGc0QzauGX09wfQb2cqK_hivyB_4DvPsYrZ0We3dZb1kJsj) and climate conflict.” You read that correctly. Instead of sticking to their mission of spreading democracy to other countries, they’re focused on force-feeding more line items from the woke agenda. I recently spoke with the administrator of USAID to confront these issues for my constituents. When I asked her about it, she said she didn't know what I was talking about because "they have a lot of literature and a lot of programs." Huh? It’s right there on your dadgum website. If a population is struggling to find food, why in the world would they be concerned about the net zero climate initiative? It’s also important you know that [this agency requested more than 3 billion dollars](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=b63131d599074ef8948d8cb68b387736&_e=K3e2zE_KcfVjIC23zxEKJhoE3F7tQSmbPzTIUV5Z8VdPlkApFkM7jOSN_vUp3LcqcVyPK5OMP5-xDyDGYLsZuvIaZbFBez5I_bJpxDY5DYB2FT079hvoXI_pf8b-n4Bxtrml1OvJ0JjUq729DFGrqTm7JNsxT-j69XwQod17j9OVK88QnyTm1Ue7djsuRP5lMKkARPueY9zuE4unh_vSt_hMuxJsHbXFzMWRReP6uWWku0YnhLEp6HZl4En4KKNv_znK5MPSFXkZAl1Ti5BhPRE_vAcB8eNUrVAVeg9mZxGqGMutMAen1_cEeMOApkphuVC47ioJlgfRnBDk3bCHJUEPcgCL2q0_fcNzJBzt_nXN7eB1KozI7OuNEgSq7EC-) to “advance gender equity” across the world—and they’re getting the check from hardworking Americans like you, many of whom don’t even agree with this leftist fluff. My colleagues on both sides of the aisle are guilty in this scenario. The left continues to pander to the woke mob while some gutless Republicans stand by watching it happen. People ought to be disgusted. This rotten waste of time, money and resources is a disgrace. Medicare will be bankrupt in no time, yet this is what we’re spending our tax dollars on. [**Will you show your support as I continue to stand up to these folks? We can’t let this slide.**](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=b63131d599074ef8948d8cb68b387736&_e=K3e2zE_KcfVjIC23zxEKJvXIUzHmIX0Jf_GCZNUnZBfRT4Wn-yBDVBC80gdEihpXY1_cC2tJkqruSYIpr4axc5MvE0Tup5V7C_np8gw2kh37tcAnLjXl-R6CXWdlDgCNJbUvDMmG4H8Gnq3YfQ65qbXh2SwLjhb4eVXfUyXSn-IJjFAOy6xxcaUgD-4Om4UKRYdXBw87XGNfcjfGlfvUIF79cS27s6vES2vvURv_JNYeN1yV4lPLnuUQUdC-okYpF7RoJkeiKuF0m-PRL2pmQ892Nbz3blanJtbyVTH32bW8HJ0GKg37to5DMCKOQPWqCtI7hhfsgNKk6QBHS6iMYJiTeAlOFXS8qdDJKM9j1yE%3D) Thank you for being here, Tim Burchett

[**May 24, 1844:** Samuel F.B. Morse sent the first telegraphic message over an experimental line from Washington, D.C., to Baltimore. The message “What Hath God Wrought?” was taken from the Bible as suggested by a young girl named Annie Ellsworth, the daughter of Morse’s close friend. ](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=8ce15970529c42b0936b9801fae0ad23&_e=TjEQpqPPITgptNAnQ4M-chrv-9tXsxAZij5ylKDYFG8gM3MPHbdZn4z3TWCnFE-B_f2B_4T9M-yKhsdB6gROZLzCF3on8UTUNVpnA_dppxrajwvExeOdWY7T9M8doZHiqGiDKnQwz7S8BL1QAQvXSgLeXMG18JV7jbt0sUMfs9B2i0FTVyNegCUFn7EyJ4Aga6uyC1MUBR-p0kd7ONme5QUmeGqyfLf_sgPnLMzworfmD6YVC951_gLcn6tdFImIAzRZ7TzzbcfPt1oUJKFFbFFlH2Vc5CeYnoWgFIpcwUb8rlVMmeUMXhLN3M62OeRixhA8cpPL66ekaXoMESkSYQ%3D%3D) **Source -[loc.gov](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=8ce15970529c42b0936b9801fae0ad23&_e=TjEQpqPPITgptNAnQ4M-chrv-9tXsxAZij5ylKDYFG8gM3MPHbdZn4z3TWCnFE-B_f2B_4T9M-yKhsdB6gROZLzCF3on8UTUNVpnA_dppxrajwvExeOdWY7T9M8doZHiqGiDKnQwz7S8BL1QAQvXSgLeXMG18JV7jbt0sUMfs9B2i0FTVyNegCUFn7EyJ4Ag0UHmhiGl-VMzzY2q6EiSX6UxlYQrwiGKmEdouNQNQVlMVwU9akWpgasssHOAuIF59R3JmhAIXk7i13A3__tlS5LnJLgwCd-vdrrJWV4tmAV7rPTE8cnBVe-t1vlJ2dIBmSMcr6jcEQCanV6jYUfyXA%3D%3D)[](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=8ce15970529c42b0936b9801fae0ad23&_e=TjEQpqPPITgptNAnQ4M-cpAiDddjqAlHq8Ab-st3s7Xsu35vUpoQ20DhEIGIkTAZE79oq4wZPBh2fcwfXYT2ZZ-I0hXILu_3vQTtZO5XfIU86Elt63QRvXSQy2cjp-6Fcwi7uNk3UepEocG6cIM5DKIWY_e64yb3TAhj3IiqxiPEg6G3TK_3Yaf25hdU4C34oSbJ80X3NMYJHxLjFDpakj7M4n8sU2BxeK--P3y67GyPYL8PrHekZDaW8uxVLBjY)**

**About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

**Ron DeSantis – the extreme governor of Florida – just officially announced his candidacy for president.**

DeSantis will only spread divisive rhetoric, policies that harm our communities, and a disregard for core values across the nation if he wins – _it is exactly what he’s done in Florida._

# **Billionaires Going Back to The Gold Standard?**
---
|
---
I want to bring your attention to these three men:

---
| | _**“You want things that are basically**_ _**anti-money... you want gold.”**_
---
_**“You want things that are basically**_ _**anti-money... you want gold.”**_

| |

| |

---
| | **“Let’s say inflation comes in and there is****a crash in the stock market for any reason****or the other, then****you will be very happy** _**you have a position in gold.”**_

body:
|
---

**_[Sign the Petition: Stop GOP Attacks on Voting Rights→](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63760210/407933184/1827347032?refcode=EM_NBI_DWSPAC_20230524_PT_1.1_0_3MO_vanity_NA_NA_votingrights&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODcwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTY3MWYxNy03OGZhLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LCLMVWYUvQ7PZtUKvdfifYZqEdIfwt6sqHPb-hGKgj4=&emci=88b78173-77fa-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=69671f17-78fa-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=5260669)_**
---

Peter,

Too many states have enacted strict voting laws since the 2020 election, attempting to strip away access to the ballot box and make it more difficult for voters to cast a ballot.

Americans deserve fair elections and to have a say on the important issues that affect our lives. Yet so far this year, 10 Republican-controlled state legislatures have signed 18 bills into law that aim to add new restrictions on elections and make it harder for young voters and voters of color to vote. And now, the conservative U.S. Supreme Court is following suit.

clean_body: | = = I know what it takes to win tough races, Peter: My last election in Nevada came down to just 7,928 votes – less than a single percentage point – and decided control of the entire Senate. I never could've won alone. It was only because of grassroots supporters like you that I was able to overcome $55 million in spending from Mitch McConnell and his allies, defy the odds, and keep Nevada and the Senate blue. But now, experts at FiveThirtyEight report that Nevada could once again decide Senate control – so the GOP is setting its sights on my friend and colleague, Sen. Jacky Rosen, as a top target for defeat. I've been in Jacky's position before, and let me tell you: She needs all the help she can get – as early as possible – to defend herself against the GOP’s attacks, run TV ads, and reach voters in every corner of Nevada. With The Washington Post calling Jacky one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection, we simply cannot afford to waste any time in supporting her campaign. But the end-of-month deadline is coming up fast, and unfortunately, Jacky is falling short of her critical goal. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Jacky Rosen and HER Time will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you, Peter. ¡La lucha sigue! The fight continues! Catherine HER Time PAC 2120 University Ave Berkeley, CA 94704 United States | mailto:team@her-time.com | Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

name: Mark Lamb
subject: The “Woke” insanity must stop
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Lamb for Senate
body:
We lost our son at the hands of a drunk driver, yet because we're conservatives, Mothers Against Drunk Driving won't let us address their conference.
[Unsubscribe](http://links.bestamericanow.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_s=228cd02611ef4cd680599924f61c89dc&_t=2aQmAf-aLs4Xu4Wwg_zCSBCpniXNCFzpVuclSuyUiEVPiiBXoYLPZFDmdEajm6zdvgOtKgCWXIJerE912fCtwCObgkD_HEwEXkTZPivqNJU%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.bestamericanow.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_s=228cd02611ef4cd680599924f61c89dc&_t=2aQmAf-aLs4Xu4Wwg_zCSBCpniXNCFzpVuclSuyUiEVPiiBXoYLPZFDmdEajm6zdvgOtKgCWXIJerE912fCtwCObgkD_HEwEXkTZPivqNJU%3D)

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=228cd02611ef4cd680599924f61c89dc&_e=5uMvKh3loCYztoMmXZC4Y1XRRhV69nkE7IEumT-ZHTi2ZXPdzYqmeYVuJtS0If8EbtU2eyr0ArGsTTEqntkxQ0t2lv9WBnM7uQNQkvj2COYwWpycnpQ0Xc0rsqUYjYdmPlogc7940Mxcbu45l_QBYNVFIQ1_4QNg7Tqvxs3-xhFFMOBamwON-ehs1z8pVullcc8AuDlLKsrSuPxFk6dM3Vq5r-_crul8AMt5nD4dyn4nDEMMa0FLh-LJaDlGql_St_y4mK_1TB-k97BYgTGhbM7JVco3g_hAOC3NujSYKzyP0R3nrbCWjCV5V5bv8poGLgVoV9oX8xX1Cz8guR6U7L8SbToYv9_iEW1BEZ9mwtv3_u-_TC6E3Tx9TsNtilPvZbybtQpLeqR3EB9owKYFnw%3D%3D)
|
Peter,

In December, my wife Janel and I lost our son, our granddaughter, and our soon-to-be daughter-in-law at the hands of a drunk driver. **I would have never let their tragic story become a part of my campaign were it not for the insane, woke policies of a select few executives at Mothers Against Drunk Driving.**

First, corporate America succumbed to the pressure of the woke left and disavowed conservatives. Now, it seems that nonprofit organizations, like Mothers Against Drunk Driving, are following suit.

**Let me read you in on what happened and why I’m reaching out with this story today.**
Recently, my wife and I accepted an invitation to be keynote speakers at a **Mothers Against Drunk Driving** event this July in Phoenix.

**We would have been the perfect fit.** Not only are we a law enforcement family, but we lost our kids to a drunk driving accident eight days before Christmas 2022.

Both Janel and I were looking forward to sharing our story. In my capacity as Pinal County Sheriff and as a father, the invitation meant so much. So, **you can imagine our disappointment and utter shock over the weekend when we got a call uninviting us as the keynote speakers**.

**The decision to revoke our invitation was purely political.**

**[I need your help to send a message to organizations, like MADD, who are bending to pressure from WOKE, far-left activities and canceling anyone who disagrees with their looney-tune out of left-field rhetoric.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=228cd02611ef4cd680599924f61c89dc&_e=5uMvKh3loCYztoMmXZC4Y1XRRhV69nkE7IEumT-ZHTi2ZXPdzYqmeYVuJtS0If8EbtU2eyr0ArGsTTEqntkxQ0t2lv9WBnM7uQNQkvj2COYwWpycnpQ0Xc0rsqUYjYdmPlogc7940Mxcbu45l_QBYNVFIQ1_4QNg7Tqvxs3-xhFFMOBamwON-ehs1z8pVullcc8AuDlLKsrSuPxFk6dM3Vq5r-_crul8AMt5nD4dyn4nDEMMa0FLh-LJaDlGql_S9OFkxXA2ZEAKHx0zqtASrxKKhQduLyWFDK3AiGiZjCzcaSXrc3VJFfwTVxBo4N0_rfiWX9AcR30MD7WpfNyie79BumXRIm7n-W6qEOHwsvCV94-5Ywf-WDFNjv0tvqWQQIlWaNfL4YHX7VR_Sr5ddQ%3D%3D)**

[**ADD YOUR NAME TODAY**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=228cd02611ef4cd680599924f61c89dc&_e=5uMvKh3loCYztoMmXZC4Y1XRRhV69nkE7IEumT-ZHTi2ZXPdzYqmeYVuJtS0If8EbtU2eyr0ArGsTTEqntkxQ0t2lv9WBnM7uQNQkvj2COYwWpycnpQ0Xc0rsqUYjYdmPlogc7940Mxcbu45l_QBYNVFIQ1_4QNg7Tqvxs3-xhFFMOBamwON-ehs1z8pVullcc8AuDlLKsrSuPxFk6dM3Vq5r-_crul8AMt5nD4dyn4nDEMMa0FLh-LJaDlGql_SdU48IbfAgfk316jeJpzgYcLMAyxn1SM28cAXIyD6Rd66pc3VYEKWHtbe62RxY9wGSyQjd8ir1UG_eYL3ru3Syfbu7dxsw1gNLFvsoonxQw9XjAcpBT9kXHXuqrHKtbG4ZwyjAYZod7iq_5qYbyJGFQ%3D%3D)

It appears that MADD executives bowed to the pressure of a few far-left activists and decided they would cancel me rather than offend a few of their progressive supporters. **Let me be crystal clear:** the people who aired their grievances against me with MADD don’t know me or my wife; **they succeeded in getting me cancelled by simply saying they were offended by some of the political positions I hold.**

**This would _never_ happen to a Democrat candidate for the United States Senate.**

Please accept my invitation today to **[sign my petition telling Mothers Against Drunk Driving that politicizing the deaths of drunk driving victims is just plain wrong.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=228cd02611ef4cd680599924f61c89dc&_e=5uMvKh3loCYztoMmXZC4Y1XRRhV69nkE7IEumT-ZHTi2ZXPdzYqmeYVuJtS0If8EbtU2eyr0ArGsTTEqntkxQ0t2lv9WBnM7uQNQkvj2COYwWpycnpQ0Xc0rsqUYjYdmPlogc7940Mxcbu45l_QBYNVFIQ1_4QNg7Tqvxs3-xhFFMOBamwON-ehs1z8pVullcc8AuDlLKsrSuPxFk6dM3Vq5r-_crul8AMt5nD4dyn4nDEMMa0FLh-LJaDlGql_SlknvRq5eWpr6QwV1bvfGXzkmVuVQ1TQUW-7nRvO5VMHdK9IqZmCcgmXkK1wPa7m-ukaXcnoYRTQNJxFsbeocz5gNX0gpVVYAV_IZWNArxRDPj3pNXQZbilrsl-M_Ryd4CnNgrgSW1ocLgR3HIK2xsQ%3D%3D)**

[**ADD YOUR NAME TODAY**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=228cd02611ef4cd680599924f61c89dc&_e=5uMvKh3loCYztoMmXZC4Y1XRRhV69nkE7IEumT-ZHTi2ZXPdzYqmeYVuJtS0If8EbtU2eyr0ArGsTTEqntkxQ0t2lv9WBnM7uQNQkvj2COYwWpycnpQ0Xc0rsqUYjYdmPlogc7940Mxcbu45l_QBYNVFIQ1_4QNg7Tqvxs3-xhFFMOBamwON-ehs1z8pVullcc8AuDlLKsrSuPxFk6dM3Vq5r-_crul8AMt5nD4dyn4nDEMMa0FLh-LJaDlGql_SB9x0zxr8wnrJWxEK1FONR1gGIQ4X47n5nQgWFhgfHN1efxc_QZyIBUw5gXl_IwuO6hux2LDeXWRF_hRldzrMKCSMbWnTNQ38DDCehI-DcRHqDsU3Z262Kjxo-GkBIO9V4motNsJZMR0hHKB0oVRT_w%3D%3D)

**We must send a message that we won’t tolerate this anymore**.

Organizations like **Mothers Against Drunk Driving shouldn’t be political.** Period, end of story. But since they decided to get political, you need people like me who are going to set them back on the path of straight and narrow.

**Losing a child is one of the hardest things me and my wife have ever experienced. By uninviting us to speak at one of their events, executives at MADD may as well have just poured salt in our wounds.**

This cancel culture is DISGRACEFUL. If you agree, **[then I need you to let me know you’re with me by singing my petition right now](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=228cd02611ef4cd680599924f61c89dc&_e=5uMvKh3loCYztoMmXZC4Y1XRRhV69nkE7IEumT-ZHTi2ZXPdzYqmeYVuJtS0If8EbtU2eyr0ArGsTTEqntkxQ0t2lv9WBnM7uQNQkvj2COYwWpycnpQ0Xc0rsqUYjYdmPlogc7940Mxcbu45l_QBYNVFIQ1_4QNg7Tqvxs3-xhFFMOBamwON-ehs1z8pVullcc8AuDlLKsrSuPxFk6dM3Vq5r-_crul8AMt5nD4dyn4nDEMMa0FLh-LJaDlGql_S4dMbppnB1dNABhOJMyGrapFH9s1ywFhYDIIG1sRlY7PBMI0Ame8oFjrG9nvllnbHjoSQNxh_VXLAlWFFDCvqOdGQObfwblZJxib_eZECFIhZ4mJaGcK1Ej4UPjRKssBhSn2Gl8aled_2VrzQnjeB3g%3D%3D)**.

Sincerely,
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=228cd02611ef4cd680599924f61c89dc&_e=5uMvKh3loCYztoMmXZC4Y1XRRhV69nkE7IEumT-ZHTi2ZXPdzYqmeYVuJtS0If8EbtU2eyr0ArGsTTEqntkxQ0t2lv9WBnM7uQNQkvj2COYwWpycnpQ0Xc0rsqUYjYdmPlogc7940Mxcbu45l_QBYNVFIQ1_4QNg7Tqvxs3-xhFFMOBamwON-ehs1z8pVullcc8AuDlLKsrSuPxFk6dM3Vq5r-_crul8AMt5nD4dyn4nDEMMa0FLh-LJaDlGql_SfBjy2W0vbeOOOyynvIqCJmTAr62rl2HFsjZ-IDw8ooTghEMxNb2I8_-VuxU-K-lKJ0ehTGz1fne4rH5_PuVQd2FVqx6cIjafnwlhAjKaNWsCPrvbVKuaIXHHeo-dD1atYLRihBmcovlaR1eRHZsC2g%3D%3D)

**Meet Sheriff Lamb:** | GOD. FAMILY. FREEDOM.

Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity.

Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. He was later promoted as a Detective to the Gang Enforcement Unit and in his first year was named Detective of the Year.

clean_body: We lost our son at the hands of a drunk driver, yet because we're conservatives, Mothers Against Drunk Driving won't let us address their conference. | | Peter, In December, my wife Janel and I lost our son, our granddaughter, and our soon-to-be daughter-in-law at the hands of a drunk driver. I would have never let their tragic story become a part of my campaign were it not for the insane, woke policies of a select few executives at Mothers Against Drunk Driving. First, corporate America succumbed to the pressure of the woke left and disavowed conservatives. Now, it seems that nonprofit organizations, like Mothers Against Drunk Driving, are following suit. Let me read you in on what happened and why I’m reaching out with this story today. Recently, my wife and I accepted an invitation to be keynote speakers at a Mothers Against Drunk Driving event this July in Phoenix. We would have been the perfect fit. Not only are we a law enforcement family, but we lost our kids to a drunk driving accident eight days before Christmas 2022. Both Janel and I were looking forward to sharing our story. In my capacity as Pinal County Sheriff and as a father, the invitation meant so much. So, you can imagine our disappointment and utter shock over the weekend when we got a call uninviting us as the keynote speakers. The decision to revoke our invitation was purely political. It appears that MADD executives bowed to the pressure of a few far-left activists and decided they would cancel me rather than offend a few of their progressive supporters. Let me be crystal clear: the people who aired their grievances against me with MADD don’t know me or my wife; they succeeded in getting me cancelled by simply saying they were offended by some of the political positions I hold. This would never happen to a Democrat candidate for the United States Senate. Please accept my invitation today to We must send a message that we won’t tolerate this anymore. Organizations like Mothers Against Drunk Driving shouldn’t be political. Period, end of story. But since they decided to get political, you need people like me who are going to set them back on the path of straight and narrow. Losing a child is one of the hardest things me and my wife have ever experienced. By uninviting us to speak at one of their events, executives at MADD may as well have just poured salt in our wounds. This cancel culture is DISGRACEFUL. If you agree, . Sincerely, Sheriff Mark Lamb Republican for U.S. Senate Follow Sheriff Lamb On Social Media Meet Sheriff Lamb: | GOD. FAMILY. FREEDOM. Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity. Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. He was later promoted as a Detective to the Gang Enforcement Unit and in his first year was named Detective of the Year. | Paid for by Mark Lamb for Senate

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature Needed: The birds and the bees can’t wait another 15 years
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1788640?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **It’s time to have “the talk”, Friend \-- about the birds and the bees.** You already know that we’re losing bees at an astonishing rate. _But did you know that populations of**75% of farmland songbirds** are also **PLUMETTING?** _ Yep, that’s right. Worldwide, there are roughly **2,000 species** of pollinating birds, including songbirds like orioles that are among some of the most beloved aviators who provide _important pollinating services to our ecosystems!_ Scientists are linking _**toxic neonics**_ as a driver of these devastating declines. But _**greedy Big Ag corporations**_ like Bayer-Monsanto won’t STOP selling these _**dangerous pesticides**_ to the public unless environmentalists like us demand accountability at the federal level. [**Please, Friend, will you speak up now and tell the EPA to BAN neonics -- before our birds and bees disappear forever?**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1788641?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [Sign Now](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1788642?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
At this very moment, harmful neonics are **DECIMATING** the insects that songbirds rely on for food. Insects are the basis of the web of life -- _**without enough insects, birds starve.**_
**The single biggest use of neonics is seed coatings.** _MILLIONS of acres_ of farmland are planted every year with neonic-coated seeds. _**ONE SINGLE SEED.**_ _**That’s all it takes to KILL a songbird.**_
Yet due to a current _loophole in federal pesticide regulations_ , seed coatings aren’t technically considered “pesticides,” so their use isn’t even tracked by the EPA. And even in smaller amounts, these toxic chemicals can **impair bird reproduction and disrupt critical migratory pathways.**
**HUMANS are harmed by neonics, too, Friend!** Research links them to __**neurological and nerve system damage**__ , particularly in infants! That’s concerning because they are among the most common pesticides found in baby food.
The EPA has __**FAILED**_ _to protect **birds, bees, people, and the planet** from neonic pesticides, while Big Ag continues to profit. **_Friend, will you sit back and allow Big Ag’s corporate greed to threaten our Earth by putting our health and our ecosystems at risk? Or will you step up today?_ [TAKE ACTION NOW: Join the fight AGAINST toxic pesticides and add your name to help SAVE our precious pollinators! >>](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1788643?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
[Sign Now](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1788644?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Thank you for doing your part in defending our pollinators and the planet!
Friends of the Earth**
|

May I have just a second of your time, please?

body:
To state the obvious, we all have a role to play if we're going to stop him from Making America Florida.

Friends -
A short while ago, Ron DeSantis officially filed paperwork to become a candidate for President of the United States.
To state the obvious, we all have a role to play if we're going to stop him from becoming president and Making America Florida.
That said, DeSantis' campaign operation starts with more than $100 million and President Biden needs our help to catch up. If that's all you need to hear, please contribute $3 directly to Joe Biden's campaign today. It will all add up.
[**https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/Biden2024**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden-newsom/?refcode=em230524-1-full&refcode2=1390_4767699_xnmfVo&akid=1390%2E4767699%2ExnmfVo)
Otherwise, here's why I am asking:
I am asking you to contribute $3 directly to Joe Biden's campaign because freedom is under attack in Florida.
I am asking you to contribute $3 directly to Joe Biden's campaign because they ban books in Florida, they restrict speech in Florida, they make it easier to buy guns and harder to vote in Florida.
I am asking you to contribute $3 directly to Joe Biden's campaign because Ron DeSantis signed a bill making abortion illegal in Florida at six weeks, and if it couldn't get worse, he requires victims of rape and incest to show documents proving their trauma.
So no. We are not going to "Make America Florida."
But Joe Biden cannot stop Trump AND DeSantis alone. He needs all of us. So I am asking.
[**Can you please rush a $3 contribution directly to Joe Biden's campaign? Do it today. Whatever amount you can afford. It will add up when we are all chipping in.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden-newsom/?refcode=em230524-1-full&refcode2=1390_4767699_xnmfVo&akid=1390%2E4767699%2ExnmfVo)

subject: Target is Evil
body:
What You Need To Know Today! No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-e-altfyk-trhiujldw-v/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-altfyk-trhiujldw-r/)
## **Good Morning and Happy Wednesday! **

The so-called Pride Collection from Target will come from Abprallen, a company out of the UK whose owner celebrates Satan.

clean_body: We’re seeing evidence of huge amounts of leftwing money flowing into TX...| | | | Fellow Conservative, This is urgent. I am asking for help. The left is pouring MILLIONS into Texas to try to take me down. It’s only been a few days since far-left Dem Colin Allred announced he’s running against me in 2024. But the massive Democrat fundraising machine is already churning out millions. There is a massive wave of cash flooding into his campaign in the 36 hours since he's announced. He's raised over $2 million in a day and a half. That is indicative of the tidal wave of cash that is going to come in- and we’re just getting started. The message is clear – Democrat donors are hellbent on flipping Texas Blue next year, and they’ll spend whatever it takes to make it happen. Please send an emergency donation today to help me FIGHT BACK and Keep Texas Red! - The corporate, mainstream media is already running cover for Allred. They’re describing him with words like “moderate,” “bipartisan,” and “middle-of-the-road.” But here is the truth: Look, if you're a leftist in Manhattan, San Francisco or Chicago, you're giving money to this guy, they all are... Why? Because Allred is a hardcore Democrat who voted with Pelosi 100% of the time. He voted for 87,000 new IRS agents to audit middle-income Americans. He voted for Biden’s assault on the U.S. oil and gas industry. He repeatedly voted for open borders. Colin Allred is too extreme for Texas, and I need your support RIGHT NOW to stop him. Thanks for your help at this crucial moment. For Liberty, Ted Cruz | | | Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate | | 815 A Brazos, PMB 550, Austin, TX 78701 | | | |

Team, one of my supporters texted me this photo this week of a top-tier t-shirt they came across while they were shopping at Marshalls: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63767774/407939817/-349209686?amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250&refcode=JMFC_20230524_EMDF_E1_T0_OP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85Njc2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDIzMjZjMi03ZmZhLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fRQH-hSFobTHsE3Tn2o1Am2pP9BDv3NR7TTeQUg5twQ=) **_$8.99?? C'mon!_**

Supporters didn't purchase shirts from my campaign just because they fit perfectly and have the best logo in the game — buying one was a donation to support our fight to save democracy from MAGA extremists and conspiracy theorists.

I have to say, that's worth a lot more than $8.99!

As humbling as this sale-rack-slap-in-the-face was, I'm still committed to fighting for democracy and making sure Congress spends time working on issues that families care about.

[**I guarantee that the national GOP is going to spend more than $8.99 to attack me and spread lies about my record. clean_body: Supporting democracy is worth more than that! | = Team, one of my supporters texted me this photo this week of a top-tier t-shirt they came across while they were shopping at Marshalls: = $8.99?? C'mon! Supporters didn't purchase shirts from my campaign just because they fit perfectly and have the best logo in the game — buying one was a donation to support our fight to save democracy from MAGA extremists and conspiracy theorists. I have to say, that's worth a lot more than $8.99! As humbling as this sale-rack-slap-in-the-face was, I'm still committed to fighting for democracy and making sure Congress spends time working on issues that families care about. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, = Jared Moskowitz Congressman, FL-23 | | Paid for by Jared Moskowitz For Congress P.O. name: Team Katie Porter
subject: Budget talk
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
This is where oversight comes in.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=23519%2E3422442%2ELmxX0d)
Derek, Congress has the duty to make sure your taxpayer dollars are well spent, and as a champion for oversight, **Katie will always fight for a budget that invests in things that make our economy strong, stable, and globally competitive.** Our tax dollars shouldn't be used to score political points. That means:
* Investing in things like insulin: when folks have insulin, they’re able to stay healthy and out of hospitals, saving our healthcare system money in the long run.
* Ending tax loopholes for big corporations.
* Investing in childcare, education, paid family leave—things that allow parents to stay in the workforce if they’d like to, and prepare future generations for success.
* Making sure there’s proper oversight over the defense industry.

**[Derek, Can you add your name in support of a budget that invests in a better future for our country?**](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/20230524-em-budget-that-invests-in-all/?source=EMAH24_2_BGT_20230524_V1_F&akid=23519%2E3422442%2ELmxX0d)
**[Add Your Name ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/20230524-em-budget-that-invests-in-all/?source=EMAH24_2_BGT_20230524_V1_F&akid=23519%2E3422442%2ELmxX0d)**
Onward,
Team Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAH24_2_BGT_20230524_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=23519_3422442_LmxX0d&akid=23519%2E3422442%2ELmxX0d)**

clean_body: Extreme Republican Ron DeSantis is running to be president, and we need the support of this grassroots team to fight back. | | | | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | If you would like to unsubscribe from emails like these, Paid for by Biden for President.

name: Sara (personal)
subject: How are you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Friends, this will be a short email, but it’s an important one to me.
How are you? (I’m really asking - I hope you’ll reply to this email and let me know!)
On my end - like many of you, I’m sure - it’s not all sunshine and rainbows.
We’re navigating bad-faith “negotiations” from the GOP on the debt ceiling, and the potential economic consequences of the government defaulting on its debt are terrifying in their enormity.
Donald Trump is bragging about how he “killed” Roe v. Wade and talking about a six-week abortion ban.
And, while this certainly has less of a national impact, I was so sad to say goodbye to my family dog recently, after 12 years of playtime and kisses - Sonny was a quirky and sweet pup, and we’ll all miss him very much.
But look: To me, doing this work - and doing it well - requires a persistent optimism. Things can be hard! Our country is facing real challenges on many levels, and every single person within it is navigating their own personal hardships, too - often unbeknownst to those around them.
When things feel tough, I think it’s so important to reconnect with those around us - to remember that while our individual challenges may differ, we are all in this human experience together.
And the only way we’re going to make progress - to lessen the hardship and challenge for not just ourselves but those around us and future generations - is to work together.
So that’s it - I just wanted to reach out, check in, and reconnect.
Reply to this email if you’d like, and let me know how things are in your world.
Thanks,
Sara

Hi Peter – The team at Emilia Sykes campaign HQ, here.

As all of us here on Team Emilia are gearing up to hit the ground running this summer, we wanted to loop you in on our internal campaign strategy for the upcoming months. _But we’re only sharing this with our top supporters, so please, do not forward this memo._
| **INTERNAL STRATEGY MEMO**

**Three areas of focus in our campaign to re-elect Emilia Sykes to Congress:**
1. **Deliver Emilia’s message to every corner of the district.** We need to make sure that every voter in Northeast Ohio understands Emilia’s message of change and knows the work she’s doing to deliver for OH-13 in Congress. [**Chip in to help us broadcast Emilia’s message >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63770236/407941605/-1747924743?refcode=em_fr_2023.05.24_b1_eshq_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzQ4NTViYS04MWZhLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sY7QYJkMmXa5W5G7Ysg_ayt2TtcWBA1lXOH996JrhGI=)

2. **Strengthen our on-the-ground operation.** Talking directly to Northeast Ohioans is essential to our path to victory. But to reach all of the voters we need to win, we have to expand our on-the-ground operation. [**Help us reach additional voters >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63770238/407941606/-1747924743?refcode=em_fr_2023.05.24_b1_eshq_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzQ4NTViYS04MWZhLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sY7QYJkMmXa5W5G7Ysg_ayt2TtcWBA1lXOH996JrhGI=)

3. **Fight back against Republican attacks.** National Republicans and their extreme special interest backers have already started funding misleading attack ads aimed at distorting our message and misleading Ohioans. It’s critical that we correct the narrative before it’s too late. [**Pitch in to help our campaign fend off these GOP attacks >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63770241/407941607/-1747924743?refcode=em_fr_2023.05.24_b1_eshq_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzQ4NTViYS04MWZhLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sY7QYJkMmXa5W5G7Ysg_ayt2TtcWBA1lXOH996JrhGI=)

---

[**Even though Election Day may seem far off, it’s absolutely critical that we execute these three focus areas every day from now until next November. Because in a toss-up race like ours, we don’t have a second to spare. So Peter, if you’re able, will you make a grassroots donation to help our campaign execute the strategy we need to re-elect Emilia?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63770243/407941608/-1747924743?refcode=em_fr_2023.05.24_b1_eshq_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzQ4NTViYS04MWZhLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sY7QYJkMmXa5W5G7Ysg_ayt2TtcWBA1lXOH996JrhGI=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ [$5 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63770248/407941609/-1747924743?refcode=em_fr_2023.05.24_b1_eshq_all-nd&amount=5&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzQ4NTViYS04MWZhLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sY7QYJkMmXa5W5G7Ysg_ayt2TtcWBA1lXOH996JrhGI=) | [$25 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63770251/407941610/-1747924743?refcode=em_fr_2023.05.24_b1_eshq_all-nd&amount=25&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzQ4NTViYS04MWZhLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sY7QYJkMmXa5W5G7Ysg_ayt2TtcWBA1lXOH996JrhGI=)

\- Attacked LGBTQ families

But I only have until midnight to raise $10,000 to stop them and protect our Democrats. | Raja represents Illinois in Congress. The son of Indian immigrants, Raja grew up for a time on food stamps and in public housing. He knows the struggles countless Americans face every day. body:
I wanted you to be one of the first people to know about this...It's official: I'M IN. | | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=0a1882fcf3c64c63846488ac36132c02&_e=9_hZKTA2PtWFDCOwsZhH0cgg-IiTuGpp45d42Z-D2RypME_ZT4ZZl1Y3t4prH4TfTHl8-NaPaC769nTHTjE5dZZNMNoI466Sm9pfEsKPcGbUcuXA77DlIuv0-nulaRtzXTJRAMGG4t6sl9BnDgZjOo_T0qrKJd-ekwbviJnYGRpRor33SMTI6OR5t1CWly2e-uvA5rBWJAG6VFllHlZe9BXO7cvvFA3-SseBQ_hZ5yuphs5cs1x1Hp4DXNKXih_E0el_1LIcglEoZJmy7x8bKKAV0_cg9R444-daLBykMAfWd0IZjHkNJnyq21CQbJ_Bl1RZ35nTPvim5_Dq2Ynp1S0-DsoAxE7TlvN5GZtvZLcu5YVYJWiSKIN-pJNkbuGSpZ3_IVx9SiK3j3Kh1dVzdy5hFaFZGvtPSrOC_okp7aM%3D)
---
Peter, It's official: I'M IN.

**I'm running for President of the United States. **
---
[**JOIN ME**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=0a1882fcf3c64c63846488ac36132c02&_e=9_hZKTA2PtWFDCOwsZhH0cgg-IiTuGpp45d42Z-D2RypME_ZT4ZZl1Y3t4prH4TfTHl8-NaPaC769nTHTjE5dZZNMNoI466Sm9pfEsKPcGbUcuXA77DlIuv0-nulaRtzXTJRAMGG4t6sl9BnDgZjOo_T0qrKJd-ekwbviJnYGRpRor33SMTI6OR5t1CWly2e-uvA5rBWJAG6VFllHlZe9BXO7cvvFA3-SseBQ_hZ5yuphs5cs1x1Hp4DXNKXih_ELQ65SQbob3I4CQwjEOvffPuE124qb8H3Ay2rHYyUuO1aJe2Ea7-q2ZlIwDopdUdrlqbFzvxr8BA5eE3C8j26A2ecQmM_2i92hhfv_tOjEuR3LYHbvqGnnSyEipzM20f4t2W-NcnxYB6TuPIzpnYlc-5CF-Fw3K73HqkdruRxRIE%3D)
---
Have you ever noticed how often Joe Biden tries to take potshots at Florida?

It’s because he HATES what we’re doing in the Sunshine State.

While he pushes the woke agenda, we’re fighting back with freedom.

Joe Biden is taking the country in the wrong direction. But I know I can turn it around.

The American people know it, too. That’s why they are ALREADY voting with their feet. Our population is booming in the free state of Florida.

Now, I want to put that choice on the ballot—but I need your support. ** **
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=0a1882fcf3c64c63846488ac36132c02&_e=9_hZKTA2PtWFDCOwsZhH0cgg-IiTuGpp45d42Z-D2RypME_ZT4ZZl1Y3t4prH4TfTHl8-NaPaC769nTHTjE5dZZNMNoI466Sm9pfEsKPcGbUcuXA77DlIuv0-nulaRtzXTJRAMGG4t6sl9BnDgZjOo_T0qrKJd-ekwbviJnYGRpRor33SMTI6OR5t1CWly2e-uvA5rBWJAG6VFllHlZe9BXO7cvvFA3-SseBQ_hZ5yuphs5cs1x1Hp4DXNKXih_EZIDTEBe65ULnuzYJAgz0fvKuiNzt8hdt3steAS5W7Vcahdjb1w8XUUnvve-mBc1rn7VhTt9PhcUcixBj3fC8z0tc_eNNW0ApBHxxvmZilHUrOGKMSALLoVrVp9yp53DXW0hPS2Wp68y6tyqVwOP8JrXda0Rn0jGIhZ1Yp-XOjVc%3D)
---
We sometimes take freedom for granted. You should not do that after the last few years. It is contested, and we have seen it wither on the vine in many places in our country.

But Florida was different. We chose facts over fear. We chose education over indoctrination. We chose law and order over rioting and disorder. Florida was a refuge of sanity when the world went mad.

We held the line when freedom hung in the balance.

We showed that we can — and must — revitalize America.

**I believe freedom is worth fighting for, and as your next President I promise I will never stop fighting for your freedom.** **[Will you fight alongside me?](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=0a1882fcf3c64c63846488ac36132c02&_e=9_hZKTA2PtWFDCOwsZhH0cgg-IiTuGpp45d42Z-D2RypME_ZT4ZZl1Y3t4prH4TfTHl8-NaPaC769nTHTjE5dZZNMNoI466Sm9pfEsKPcGbUcuXA77DlIuv0-nulaRtzXTJRAMGG4t6sl9BnDgZjOo_T0qrKJd-ekwbviJnYGRpRor33SMTI6OR5t1CWly2e-uvA5rBWJAG6VFllHlZe9BXO7cvvFA3-SseBQ_hZ5yuphs5cs1x1Hp4DXNKXih_Ev7CAX82QPg8AEGC_gUd8HRbwnjlizUQDMsSHcNiyh3Wfa4qssXYtXFmcH70m1DhROjCn9RxzwL9oKM0yT64szMNsdA5WETekRii3a2nQErEwMoNuHqlXqD92u124KoJ2xsiS_t0hf7EvG8Fktdp_M9AP_pmVflvC0Un50CYplMk%3D "Will you fight alongside me?")**
---
[**YES, I’M READY TO WIN**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=0a1882fcf3c64c63846488ac36132c02&_e=9_hZKTA2PtWFDCOwsZhH0cgg-IiTuGpp45d42Z-D2RypME_ZT4ZZl1Y3t4prH4TfTHl8-NaPaC769nTHTjE5dZZNMNoI466Sm9pfEsKPcGbUcuXA77DlIuv0-nulaRtzXTJRAMGG4t6sl9BnDgZjOo_T0qrKJd-ekwbviJnYGRpRor33SMTI6OR5t1CWly2e-uvA5rBWJAG6VFllHlZe9BXO7cvvFA3-SseBQ_hZ5yuphs5cs1x1Hp4DXNKXih_EIGMfSrVu_dkHWYxZxnfNOOPyCBZHitl6JjyRRfK8JMd7RcnfLvHF4BMLPiySEwahfWZ_KAmAX_smaD_POKwhg9lP3sla-Qk97s8Rbrgh-h-2nywvdhGBFcFUxERaB9asisddfOl69HlaldFheU5ikVGJy_zxCxr7vD8TeQ8Vdoc%3D)
---
And we can win, Peter.

I'll make sure we have an economy that works for working families, a secure border that works for our nation, and so much more. The battle won’t be easy and will require a lot of toil and sweat to get it all done. I’m excited to share my agenda for America with you over the course of this campaign.

**But here’s why I’m writing you today, Peter:[I want to ask you to become a Launch Day Donor to my presidential campaign and join our first team tele-townhall.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=0a1882fcf3c64c63846488ac36132c02&_e=9_hZKTA2PtWFDCOwsZhH0cgg-IiTuGpp45d42Z-D2RypME_ZT4ZZl1Y3t4prH4TfTHl8-NaPaC769nTHTjE5dZZNMNoI466Sm9pfEsKPcGbUcuXA77DlIuv0-nulaRtzXTJRAMGG4t6sl9BnDgZjOo_T0qrKJd-ekwbviJnYGRpRor33SMTI6OR5t1CWly2e-uvA5rBWJAG6VFllHlZe9BXO7cvvFA3-SseBQ_hZ5yuphs5cs1x1Hp4DXNKXih_EhkfmESm8kS5D6MMMZkVQRmeiZ5MjQNqvyIDzBW50YeJ3dhJ1LJQkCyHK2PhHCoHhpIfq8RxVTTwfNyVPi_ZlPMAgwr9kt8HlJSYGWZmM-SKgnVEfKvTkwgIshhm_bgf3kl3b2M5RFBTkTm5icI73a-YBrJk7r73vNi1-EZkYJNU%3D "I want to ask you to become a Launch Day Donor to my presidential campaign and join our first Team Teletownhall.")**

I promise you, unlike other campaigns, our grassroots fundraising program is built on the principle that our donors are a part of our team, not our personal piggybank.

**[I vow to treat you with respect: No smoke and mirrors, no fake matches, and no lies.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=0a1882fcf3c64c63846488ac36132c02&_e=9_hZKTA2PtWFDCOwsZhH0cgg-IiTuGpp45d42Z-D2RypME_ZT4ZZl1Y3t4prH4TfTHl8-NaPaC769nTHTjE5dZZNMNoI466Sm9pfEsKPcGbUcuXA77DlIuv0-nulaRtzXTJRAMGG4t6sl9BnDgZjOo_T0qrKJd-ekwbviJnYGRpRor33SMTI6OR5t1CWly2e-uvA5rBWJAG6VFllHlZe9BXO7cvvFA3-SseBQ_hZ5yuphs5cs1x1Hp4DXNKXih_EO-CS4C1ooz5vW_qh4DOaqHCXTiqoBF3jjvBauXQl29wgX4xF2MRxQLi2tuTQZzLiHYmH_5rAtUNvkQaOAQWP0rR03voK939ap5bMUshU9iPHkBi8eD2-ZX09ob7gDR1GG1gTQ_dyA7UtLp5JyXyuzHj1Hpjn087m_F_tR4UD4x0%3D "I vow to treat you with respect: No smoke and mirrors, no fake matches, and no lies.")**

Can I count on you?
---
[**DONATE NOW**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=0a1882fcf3c64c63846488ac36132c02&_e=9_hZKTA2PtWFDCOwsZhH0cgg-IiTuGpp45d42Z-D2RypME_ZT4ZZl1Y3t4prH4TfTHl8-NaPaC769nTHTjE5dZZNMNoI466Sm9pfEsKPcGbUcuXA77DlIuv0-nulaRtzXTJRAMGG4t6sl9BnDgZjOo_T0qrKJd-ekwbviJnYGRpRor33SMTI6OR5t1CWly2e-uvA5rBWJAG6VFllHlZe9BXO7cvvFA3-SseBQ_hZ5yuphs5cs1x1Hp4DXNKXih_EgPS7X8C9LAeqyoI8TLRz1AifDJUS0pRV47YSFNo35prQZw-yE6YGJbmcR1p7M7eV7NF3S5vtlO9dZGpyw0vgoVm4wGdV1R4BIfj8zt2q33KDlacim5F-tij3cmCQK7g-xLWS7KCjj0KpeUz7NJoB4YGe7P2QNQ_O1t-UBh3H6X0%3D)

| | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=0a1882fcf3c64c63846488ac36132c02&_e=9_hZKTA2PtWFDCOwsZhH0cgg-IiTuGpp45d42Z-D2RypME_ZT4ZZl1Y3t4prH4TfTHl8-NaPaC769nTHTjE5dZZNMNoI466Sm9pfEsKPcGbUcuXA77DlIuv0-nulaRtzXTJRAMGG4t6sl9BnDgZjOo_T0qrKJd-ekwbviJnYGRpRor33SMTI6OR5t1CWly2e-uvA5rBWJAG6VFllHlZe9BXO7cvvFA3-SseBQ_hZ5yuphs5cs1x1Hp4DXNKXih_E64FqF5vNlLTjlIRwN6er95hYdEFsrob-WvTXZCtzG1sTFuuB4Gjos1xIr3D0v1wDWN9FyycystHbpEGkKkRmWFlpH-WplegunmSHtKifiusmG5fiqzlYM_hi55m-laHZTgt9JVziA8_IbuHmUZhwMiiMyoZ06q0VkrNU46_LlZg%3D)
