Ron DeSantis _P.S I want to show you my appreciation for standing with me from Day 1 of this campaign. It’s why my team prepared gifts to thank our Day 1 donors.

If you chip in $47 by midnight on 5/25, we’ll send you a limited-edition Day 1 membership card and an invite to our first-ever team tele-townhall.

Make sure you get yours now at this secure link: **[https://dsnts.com/aexHpu](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=0a1882fcf3c64c63846488ac36132c02&_e=9_hZKTA2PtWFDCOwsZhH0cgg-IiTuGpp45d42Z-D2RypME_ZT4ZZl1Y3t4prH4TfTHl8-NaPaC769nTHTjE5dZZNMNoI466Sm9pfEsKPcGbUcuXA77DlIuv0-nulaRtzXTJRAMGG4t6sl9BnDgZjOo_T0qrKJd-ekwbviJnYGRpRor33SMTI6OR5t1CWly2e-uvA5rBWJAG6VFllHlZe9BXO7cvvFA3-SseBQ_hZ5yuphs5cs1x1Hp4DXNKXih_EOda2r7guHVSajK_J-1C8XDWYlL6I-jUWw20CBr4yGFzFCh7egcmPUbz8aqK7FjCfULOJh8pPounL2aoee3jFJrqqLDGq7TGQWxy2iSpaj3rAOUWCPe0LjJlJde_ze_XXWA84HMdq_kABS-UPsWmN9A0DccsMG3497rjV-7PRn_I%3D)**_

**Meet Ron DeSantis**

| | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=0a1882fcf3c64c63846488ac36132c02&_e=9_hZKTA2PtWFDCOwsZhH0cgg-IiTuGpp45d42Z-D2RypME_ZT4ZZl1Y3t4prH4TfTHl8-NaPaC769nTHTjE5dZZNMNoI466Sm9pfEsKPcGbUcuXA77DlIuv0-nulaRtzXTJRAMGG4t6sl9BnDgZjOo_T0qrKJd-ekwbviJnYGRpRor33SMTI6OR5t1CWly2e-uvA5rBWJAG6VFllHlZe9BXO7cvvFA3-SseBQ_hZ5yuphs5cs1x1Hp4DXNKXih_E484kM_S4cVBYq00qcjAaNE1luXouf-6Xp1kARmomKFpqHmF8yrA6A7iT39vvPsDmdVRosAV4i1RrnQJ9m10-t57Pfi2sn5qw70gXfYzZ6QjZdaFfbb7coM8T-HNK4edlWsqchupMFC360iCaz4Fez8jCkbyPCdvVVUivtmxYP9s%3D)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he graduated with honors and was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School. While at Harvard, he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq as an adviser to a U.S. Navy SEAL commander in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
| | Ron also served as a federal prosecutor, where he targeted and convicted child predators. He was elected to Congress in 2012 and advocated for congressional term limits and a balanced budget amendment. He also spearheaded oversight efforts to expose malfeasance in the IRS and in agencies involved in abusing their authority during the manufacturing of the Russia collusion conspiracy theory. Congressman DeSantis was also a leading champion for America’s veterans and helped enact reforms to the VA and place an emphasis on mental health.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award winning television host. Together, they’re the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules

* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).

* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.

* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.

* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Zak=20Malamed?=
subject: The path to taking back the House runs through New York
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zak for Congress
body:
#
**Last year, Republicans reclaimed the House majority -- but this year, we're going to take it back.**
I'm going to break down how we plan to do that and why this hinges on winning races across New York, but **especially here in NY-03.**
[**But before I do that, I 'm going to ask you to chip in $5. We expect Republicans to spend millions to defend MAGA Republicans like George Santos and hold onto the House, so we need the resources to go toe-to-toe with them, flip this seat blue, and take back the House. So, can I count on your $5 now?**](https://zakforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=30c2554cf0cbb2d4d7d50d7c7&id=51e8a5d0fc&e=15d98230e6)
In 2022, New York saw an unprecedented number of House seats flip red -- tipping the scales for Republicans to reclaim the House majority.
Since then, they've used their power to push an extreme, MAGA agenda through Congress that ignores the needs of everyday Americans and attempts to roll back any progress we've made over the last few years.
**The good news is** many of these same seats are considered toss-ups in 2024, including our district, NY-03. The way we move this seat from a toss-up to a victory for Democrats is by hitting the ground running.
For us, that means launching our voter outreach program, sharing my priorities with community members across the district, and ensuring voters know the truth about George Santos and the stakes of this race. That's why I have been showing up at events from Bayside, Queens to Bayville, Nassau County. To do that, we need the cash on hand to cover the costs of all these tools.
**Here 's how you can help.** George Santos and MAGA Republicans have deep-pocketed donors they can lean on -- **but we have you.** Our campaign is people-powered, which means every dollar donated has a huge impact.
[**So I 'm personally asking: will you chip in $5 to power our campaign, flip NY-03 blue, and help Democrats take back the House?**](https://zakforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=30c2554cf0cbb2d4d7d50d7c7&id=17b321fb9c&e=15d98230e6)
**[Chip in $5»](https://zakforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=30c2554cf0cbb2d4d7d50d7c7&id=09208e894c&e=15d98230e6)**
With gratitude,
**Zak Malamed**
Candidate for NY-03
[](https://zakforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=30c2554cf0cbb2d4d7d50d7c7&id=617a525150&e=15d98230e6)
**[Donate](https://zakforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=30c2554cf0cbb2d4d7d50d7c7&id=7dbdac7ff7&e=15d98230e6)**
---
Paid for by Zak for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://zakforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=30c2554cf0cbb2d4d7d50d7c7&id=9bec16b14b&e=15d98230e6&c=5daf401f6e). Mail us: Zak for Congress, PO Box 220421, Great Neck, NY 11022.

clean_body: = We can't believe it either, Peter, but May is already heading to an end. And with each month that passes by, we are nearing the end of this race – which is why we must use every moment to our advantage. = | = We have just ONE more week to hit our May fundraising goal. And, Peter, meeting our goal is crucial to our campaign's success – especially since Shawn is up against some steep competition, including a candidate endorsed by Trump. Louisiana has made so many great strides in the past several years, but it only takes one extremist in the governor's office to demolish our progress toward a better future for our state. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = = – Team Wilson | | = | = = Wilson for Louisiana P.O. subject: Tell State Legislatures: Ban the sale of assault weapons now!
body:
Add your name
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta1ccaa88-93cd-44fc-a480-c9b96c2662de/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, _**Sign if you agree: **[**If Congress won't act to protect our communities from gun violence, state legislatures must. Sign the petition urging state legislatures to pass legislation banning the sale of assault weapons.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T29b200b3-caa9-49da-ab89-7dffe247ee07/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)_ "Gun violence in this country is an epidemic and it is an international embarrassment."

That's what Pres. Biden said more than two years ago after a gunman opened fire in a FedEx facility in Indianapolis, Indiana, killing nine people.

Since then, in tragedy after tragedy around the country, countless additional lives have been taken by gunmen wielding assault weapons.

And while Pres. Biden is taking some meaningful steps through executive action to curb the gun violence epidemic, Congress has failed to do its part due to Republican obstruction.

Thankfully, state legislatures are starting to pick up the slack. In April, Washington Governor Jay Inslee signed into law legislation that bans the sale, manufacturing and distribution of more than 50 specific types of semiautomatic firearms.

By doing so, Washington became the 10th state to ban the sale of assault weapons, following the lead of California, Connecticut, Delaware, Hawaii, Illinois, Maryland, Massachusetts, New Jersey and New York.

[**If Congress won't act to protect our communities from gun violence, state legislatures must. Sign the petition urging state legislatures to pass legislation banning the sale of assault weapons.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc0b97a99-4e4f-470d-b346-9d290bfff02e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. clean_body: Add your name | | | | | | | | | | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can. | | | | | | | | Peter, Sign if you agree: "Gun violence in this country is an epidemic and it is an international embarrassment." That's what Pres. Biden said more than two years ago after a gunman opened fire in a FedEx facility in Indianapolis, Indiana, killing nine people. Since then, in tragedy after tragedy around the country, countless additional lives have been taken by gunmen wielding assault weapons. And while Pres. Biden is taking some meaningful steps through executive action to curb the gun violence epidemic, Congress has failed to do its part due to Republican obstruction. Thankfully, state legislatures are starting to pick up the slack. In April, Washington Governor Jay Inslee signed into law legislation that bans the sale, manufacturing and distribution of more than 50 specific types of semiautomatic firearms. By doing so, Washington became the 10th state to ban the sale of assault weapons, following the lead of California, Connecticut, Delaware, Hawaii, Illinois, Maryland, Massachusetts, New Jersey and New York. Cliff | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good ---|--- | | | | | Follow Us | | ---|--- | Blue Amp Strategies 1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212 513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com | Having trouble viewing this email? | | | | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! name: Mark Takano
subject: My heart is breaking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P
body:
They need us, Peter

| Peter, I'm shocked and saddened to see the recent wave of anti-LGBTQ legislation across the country. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63773343/407943806/-1462571503?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDlmOWNmMi04M2ZhLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4IuXWaQyPh3Argu27NoMEl4K_4z4Q0nEc8dPh2U7UeY=&emci=464f5dbd-66fa-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=649f9cf2-83fa-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=18839602) These attacks are often instigated by far-right leaders but aren’t reflected by the will of the people.

_Just recently a Nebraska state legislator who voted to pass an anti-trans bill admitted afterward that she “knocked doors for a year and no one brought this up”!_

The thing is these bills lead to REAL consequences for real people, something far-right legislators don’t seem to care about.

[**As a member of the LGBTQ+ community and co-Chair of the LGBT Equality Caucus, my heart breaks for the LGBTQ youth who will suffer because of these bigoted bills. I stand with LGBTQ youth and pledge to fight back against these hateful attacks. name: Ron DeSantis
subject: big announcement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
I wanted you to be one of the first people to know about this.

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](https://sptr.eomail6.com/f/a/ZIASzPwySyA722G_ZScS0Q~~/AAAHUQA~/RgRmURwUP0UgZTA1MWEwM2UwNTk4YmFlMmZhODdkZjljNDRhMjY5YzBEsmh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vZGVzYW50aXMvZ3JlYXQtYW1lcmljYW4tY29tZWJhY2stYXY_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1fJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1fcCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyMy0wNS0yNF9fSU1JTlBBX2hhX3JkX0FkVmljdG9yaXVtX0lNSU5fSU1JTl9ncmVhdGFtZXJpY2FuY29tZWJhY2thdl9mcl9XBXNwY2V1QgpkZhSXbmRncjnRUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAABZJg~~)
---
Peter,

It's official: I'M IN.

**I'm running for President of the United States. **
---
| | [JOIN ME](https://sptr.eomail6.com/f/a/ZIASzPwySyA722G_ZScS0Q~~/AAAHUQA~/RgRmURwUP0UgZTA1MWEwM2UwNTk4YmFlMmZhODdkZjljNDRhMjY5YzBEsmh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vZGVzYW50aXMvZ3JlYXQtYW1lcmljYW4tY29tZWJhY2stYXY_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1fJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1fcCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyMy0wNS0yNF9fSU1JTlBBX2hhX3JkX0FkVmljdG9yaXVtX0lNSU5fSU1JTl9ncmVhdGFtZXJpY2FuY29tZWJhY2thdl9mcl9XBXNwY2V1QgpkZhSXbmRncjnRUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAABZJg~~)
---
Have you ever noticed how often Joe Biden tries to take potshots at Florida?

It’s because he HATES what we’re doing in the Sunshine State.

While he pushes the woke agenda, we’re fighting back with freedom.

Joe Biden is taking the country in the wrong direction. But I know I can turn it around.

The American people know it, too. That’s why they are ALREADY voting with their feet. Our population is booming in the free state of Florida.

Now, I want to put that choice on the ballot—but I need your support. ** **
---
| [](https://sptr.eomail6.com/f/a/ZIASzPwySyA722G_ZScS0Q~~/AAAHUQA~/RgRmURwUP0UgZTA1MWEwM2UwNTk4YmFlMmZhODdkZjljNDRhMjY5YzBEsmh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vZGVzYW50aXMvZ3JlYXQtYW1lcmljYW4tY29tZWJhY2stYXY_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1fJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1fcCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyMy0wNS0yNF9fSU1JTlBBX2hhX3JkX0FkVmljdG9yaXVtX0lNSU5fSU1JTl9ncmVhdGFtZXJpY2FuY29tZWJhY2thdl9mcl9XBXNwY2V1QgpkZhSXbmRncjnRUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAABZJg~~)
---
We sometimes take freedom for granted. You should not do that after the last few years. It is contested, and we have seen it wither on the vine in many places in our country.

But Florida was different. We chose facts over fear. We chose education over indoctrination. We chose law and order over rioting and disorder. Florida was a refuge of sanity when the world went mad.

We held the line when freedom hung in the balance.

We showed that we can — and must — revitalize America.

**I believe freedom is worth fighting for, and as your next President I promise I will never stop fighting for your freedom.** **[Will you fight alongside me, Peter?](https://sptr.eomail6.com/f/a/ZIASzPwySyA722G_ZScS0Q~~/AAAHUQA~/RgRmURwUP0UgZTA1MWEwM2UwNTk4YmFlMmZhODdkZjljNDRhMjY5YzBEsmh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vZGVzYW50aXMvZ3JlYXQtYW1lcmljYW4tY29tZWJhY2stYXY_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1fJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1fcCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyMy0wNS0yNF9fSU1JTlBBX2hhX3JkX0FkVmljdG9yaXVtX0lNSU5fSU1JTl9ncmVhdGFtZXJpY2FuY29tZWJhY2thdl9mcl9XBXNwY2V1QgpkZhSXbmRncjnRUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAABZJg~~ "Will you fight alongside me?")**
---
| | [YES, I’M READY TO WIN](https://sptr.eomail6.com/f/a/ZIASzPwySyA722G_ZScS0Q~~/AAAHUQA~/RgRmURwUP0UgZTA1MWEwM2UwNTk4YmFlMmZhODdkZjljNDRhMjY5YzBEsmh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vZGVzYW50aXMvZ3JlYXQtYW1lcmljYW4tY29tZWJhY2stYXY_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1fJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1fcCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyMy0wNS0yNF9fSU1JTlBBX2hhX3JkX0FkVmljdG9yaXVtX0lNSU5fSU1JTl9ncmVhdGFtZXJpY2FuY29tZWJhY2thdl9mcl9XBXNwY2V1QgpkZhSXbmRncjnRUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAABZJg~~)
---
And we can win, Peter.

I'll make sure we have an economy that works for working families, a secure border that works for our nation, and so much more. The battle won’t be easy and will require a lot of toil and sweat to get it all done. I’m excited to share my agenda for America with you over the course of this campaign.

**But here’s why I’m writing you today:[I want to ask you to become a Launch Day Donor to my presidential campaign and join our first team tele-townhall.](https://sptr.eomail6.com/f/a/ZIASzPwySyA722G_ZScS0Q~~/AAAHUQA~/RgRmURwUP0UgZTA1MWEwM2UwNTk4YmFlMmZhODdkZjljNDRhMjY5YzBEsmh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vZGVzYW50aXMvZ3JlYXQtYW1lcmljYW4tY29tZWJhY2stYXY_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1fJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1fcCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyMy0wNS0yNF9fSU1JTlBBX2hhX3JkX0FkVmljdG9yaXVtX0lNSU5fSU1JTl9ncmVhdGFtZXJpY2FuY29tZWJhY2thdl9mcl9XBXNwY2V1QgpkZhSXbmRncjnRUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAABZJg~~ "I want to ask you to become a Launch Day Donor to my presidential campaign and join our first Team Teletownhall.")**

I promise you, unlike other campaigns, our grassroots fundraising program is built on the principle that our donors are a part of our team, not our personal piggybank.

**_[I vow to treat you with respect: No smoke and mirrors, no fake matches, and no lies.](https://sptr.eomail6.com/f/a/ZIASzPwySyA722G_ZScS0Q~~/AAAHUQA~/RgRmURwUP0UgZTA1MWEwM2UwNTk4YmFlMmZhODdkZjljNDRhMjY5YzBEsmh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vZGVzYW50aXMvZ3JlYXQtYW1lcmljYW4tY29tZWJhY2stYXY_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1fJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1fcCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyMy0wNS0yNF9fSU1JTlBBX2hhX3JkX0FkVmljdG9yaXVtX0lNSU5fSU1JTl9ncmVhdGFtZXJpY2FuY29tZWJhY2thdl9mcl9XBXNwY2V1QgpkZhSXbmRncjnRUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAABZJg~~ "I vow to treat you with respect: No smoke and mirrors, no fake matches, and no lies.")_**

Can I count on you?
---
| | [DONATE NOW](https://sptr.eomail6.com/f/a/ZIASzPwySyA722G_ZScS0Q~~/AAAHUQA~/RgRmURwUP0UgZTA1MWEwM2UwNTk4YmFlMmZhODdkZjljNDRhMjY5YzBEsmh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vZGVzYW50aXMvZ3JlYXQtYW1lcmljYW4tY29tZWJhY2stYXY_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1fJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1fcCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyMy0wNS0yNF9fSU1JTlBBX2hhX3JkX0FkVmljdG9yaXVtX0lNSU5fSU1JTl9ncmVhdGFtZXJpY2FuY29tZWJhY2thdl9mcl9XBXNwY2V1QgpkZhSXbmRncjnRUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAABZJg~~)
---
| [](https://sptr.eomail6.com/f/a/ZIASzPwySyA722G_ZScS0Q~~/AAAHUQA~/RgRmURwUP0UgZTA1MWEwM2UwNTk4YmFlMmZhODdkZjljNDRhMjY5YzBEsmh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vZGVzYW50aXMvZ3JlYXQtYW1lcmljYW4tY29tZWJhY2stYXY_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1fJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1fcCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyMy0wNS0yNF9fSU1JTlBBX2hhX3JkX0FkVmljdG9yaXVtX0lNSU5fSU1JTl9ncmVhdGFtZXJpY2FuY29tZWJhY2thdl9mcl9XBXNwY2V1QgpkZhSXbmRncjnRUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAABZJg~~)
---
In Freedom,

Ron DeSantis
---
_P.S I want to show you my appreciation for standing with me from Day 1 of this campaign. It’s why my team prepared gifts to thank our Day 1 donors.

If you chip in $47 by midnight on 5/25, we’ll send you a limited-edition Day 1 membership card and an invite to our first-ever team tele-townhall.

Make sure you get yours now at this secure link: **[https://dsnts.com/aexHpu](https://sptr.eomail6.com/f/a/ZIASzPwySyA722G_ZScS0Q~~/AAAHUQA~/RgRmURwUP0UgZTA1MWEwM2UwNTk4YmFlMmZhODdkZjljNDRhMjY5YzBEsmh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vZGVzYW50aXMvZ3JlYXQtYW1lcmljYW4tY29tZWJhY2stYXY_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1fJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1fcCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyMy0wNS0yNF9fSU1JTlBBX2hhX3JkX0FkVmljdG9yaXVtX0lNSU5fSU1JTl9ncmVhdGFtZXJpY2FuY29tZWJhY2thdl9mcl9XBXNwY2V1QgpkZhSXbmRncjnRUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAABZJg~~)**_
---
|

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](https://sptr.eomail6.com/f/a/ZIASzPwySyA722G_ZScS0Q~~/AAAHUQA~/RgRmURwUP0UgZTA1MWEwM2UwNTk4YmFlMmZhODdkZjljNDRhMjY5YzBEsmh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vZGVzYW50aXMvZ3JlYXQtYW1lcmljYW4tY29tZWJhY2stYXY_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1fJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1fcCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyMy0wNS0yNF9fSU1JTlBBX2hhX3JkX0FkVmljdG9yaXVtX0lNSU5fSU1JTl9ncmVhdGFtZXJpY2FuY29tZWJhY2thdl9mcl9XBXNwY2V1QgpkZhSXbmRncjnRUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAABZJg~~)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he graduated with honors and was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School. While at Harvard, he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq as an adviser to a U.S. Navy SEAL commander in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a federal prosecutor, where he targeted and convicted child predators. He was elected to Congress in 2012 and advocated for congressional term limits and a balanced budget amendment. He also spearheaded oversight efforts to expose malfeasance in the IRS and in agencies involved in abusing their authority during the manufacturing of the Russia collusion conspiracy theory. Congressman DeSantis was also a leading champion for America’s veterans and helped enact reforms to the VA and place an emphasis on mental health.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award winning television host. Together, they’re the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|
---
Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

---
| Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President

name: Jim Jordan
subject: I’m truly sorry
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress

One week from today is already the end of May, and I’m remiss to tell you that we’re WAY behind on our fundraising for not only the month but also the quarter.

Fellow Conservative,

One week from today is already the end of May, and **I’m remiss to tell you that we’re WAY behind on our fundraising for not only the month but also the quarter.**

With just seven days to play catch up before the end of month deadline, we’re writing to you in hopes that **[you’ll be able to come to our assistance](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=19b73a11666448bfb32f91cf7fd6524e&_e=bE1gazS--omlb4s190U3bheBLyPir7RdSaWsh_VBkbNC0Afsl6fa8pmVeS1e879Os1cxAy1A0DtxK9GYDfEOtxvnyg1gN9F17TTHZqeI-eLuIAYQZndyaUR68iQleKBg9ieme17OMzUQD2Y3ZuaAzmT6ACPBkGU3dXzLYgo9G3YPazSlW6OuckGN1dfvQE1fELeWlB4SgCVNlW_kR5hYlna9j_PgcKPBV8vwq4ynUnQavMlSzOsV2jwaERZdSqcmkYNOqf5eWmeP0Jj0kOqevMjkCDeH6jGo6-lsy4cMKZG3TiRniy5SoIb0wazevsR9vzrYGqzK8a329kH3QOH85pVetLEMA5GgPu8uNan93P5rZZXa6WDBWF8EMca1n_lWCs5ioHGAMdoymRfKXmGsfhWWZTF2U_XQhnTPru5mMdQ%3D)**.

How behind are we, you ask? Well, yesterday the email we sent raised just $1,500 – **in our budget we assumed that it would bring in north of $10,000.** So, suffice to say, we need this email to do perform substantially better.

**[Can I lean on you to donate $1 today](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=19b73a11666448bfb32f91cf7fd6524e&_e=bE1gazS--omlb4s190U3bheBLyPir7RdSaWsh_VBkbNC0Afsl6fa8pmVeS1e879Os1cxAy1A0DtxK9GYDfEOtxvnyg1gN9F17TTHZqeI-eLuIAYQZndyaUR68iQleKBg9ieme17OMzUQD2Y3ZuaAzmT6ACPBkGU3dXzLYgo9G3YPazSlW6OuckGN1dfvQE1fELeWlB4SgCVNlW_kR5hYlna9j_PgcKPBV8vwq4ynUnQavMlSzOsV2jwaERZdSqcmkYNOqf5eWmeP0Jj0kOqevKmW94HDUFz96pg7fiRbxvYsWhtYYv_D-xAinOoOh_ogmIYWV5qjy43UvrzW5n9Ivw_JBXPeONAppAjY1aWKkZSDoLvIweaxKs50d_016HIgReRWUYmB3c0mQmWAYk-JmW_8lLw-UFM8jUm1ik400Jo%3D)** given the that we’re mere days away from the May fundraising deadline and Republicans like me need all of the support we can get in the face of the constant attacks from the far left?

[**CHIP IN $1 OR MORE -> **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=19b73a11666448bfb32f91cf7fd6524e&_e=bE1gazS--omlb4s190U3bheBLyPir7RdSaWsh_VBkbNC0Afsl6fa8pmVeS1e879Os1cxAy1A0DtxK9GYDfEOtxvnyg1gN9F17TTHZqeI-eLuIAYQZndyaUR68iQleKBg9ieme17OMzUQD2Y3ZuaAzmT6ACPBkGU3dXzLYgo9G3YPazSlW6OuckGN1dfvQE1fELeWlB4SgCVNlW_kR5hYlna9j_PgcKPBV8vwq4ynUnQavMlSzOsV2jwaERZdSqcmkYNOqf5eWmeP0Jj0kOqevI9lEf7CnkB1DwYVZX9UrSDGdfia2cYdLrNsMTGU0XTJ2QBqlJT85PVI8ed2vtSXG6LENDOylidqsdcZvJkp38ZpXHiJQGGq3YVTHEL-pe9Q_TegTg1ZwR2hr6D-zXiFVCUR-iNwpTZJLHiy8_r181I%3D)
We’ve got our work cut out for us:
1. Raise $8,000+ from this email campaign
2. Withstand millions in attack ads against us

**[Your $1 contribution](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=19b73a11666448bfb32f91cf7fd6524e&_e=bE1gazS--omlb4s190U3bheBLyPir7RdSaWsh_VBkbNC0Afsl6fa8pmVeS1e879Os1cxAy1A0DtxK9GYDfEOtxvnyg1gN9F17TTHZqeI-eLuIAYQZndyaUR68iQleKBg9ieme17OMzUQD2Y3ZuaAzmT6ACPBkGU3dXzLYgo9G3YPazSlW6OuckGN1dfvQE1fELeWlB4SgCVNlW_kR5hYlna9j_PgcKPBV8vwq4ynUnQavMlSzOsV2jwaERZdSqcmkYNOqf5eWmeP0Jj0kOqevPduaQ8E9bmKlsQXElMHt53NmJXZnRSqUHPHGvVDNg-FCGJmV70LP5qGRhf8xWB4P8wtnnYTCI6nU4kZtb8I5MfAmY9LA1p-w11jMx_U1DirvnOTspICVzwSN3Su_Fgatoa9Zl_DTjh5eSe5O5odRdw%3D)** will certainly go a long way in helping me and my team make sure that we hit our fundraising goal this month. **[I promise you that your donation will not be used for any other purpose than to help us defend our four-seat majority](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=19b73a11666448bfb32f91cf7fd6524e&_e=bE1gazS--omlb4s190U3bheBLyPir7RdSaWsh_VBkbNC0Afsl6fa8pmVeS1e879Os1cxAy1A0DtxK9GYDfEOtxvnyg1gN9F17TTHZqeI-eLuIAYQZndyaUR68iQleKBg9ieme17OMzUQD2Y3ZuaAzmT6ACPBkGU3dXzLYgo9G3YPazSlW6OuckGN1dfvQE1fELeWlB4SgCVNlW_kR5hYlna9j_PgcKPBV8vwq4ynUnQavMlSzOsV2jwaERZdSqcmkYNOqf5eWmeP0Jj0kOqevJKFKtS5CkXl7_x-E4a9J_ebZbBxO4-P9wZ-f2lQLqdt92LABXFIrVkxY_hFARp5UCmrL1vVRfZwgJ2MEbd0wRmnukUTvFwPiRuPNhFepT0JdnTpm65mYoi7ipWHqcPUf7y5GV0Iteo8Beuip7SKbXw%3D)** ; your gift will help put us into the position of being able to lend other Republicans a helping hand as we work to keep our House majority heading into next year’s presidential election.

For liberty,

**About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

** [ ** JOIN JIM ➞ **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=19b73a11666448bfb32f91cf7fd6524e&_e=bE1gazS--omlb4s190U3bheBLyPir7RdSaWsh_VBkbNC0Afsl6fa8pmVeS1e879Os1cxAy1A0DtxK9GYDfEOtxvnyg1gN9F17TTHZqeI-eLuIAYQZndyaUR68iQleKBg9ieme17OMzUQD2Y3ZuaAzmT6ACPBkGU3dXzLYgo9G3YPazSlW6OuckGN1dfvQE1fELeWlB4SgCVNlW_kR5hYlna9j_PgcKPBV8vwq4ynUnQavMlSzOsV2jwaERZdSqcmkYNOqf5eWmeP0Jj0kOqevMK4S3Ys4hsiuUMqYbaGjEYNLxLk--2a5C81jXEJouGm_HBpGCRsrxRWdXfLz0SguiGVrOkTZjC-fyqKtOl533-Gozjds1L0EqEoWoYY7L3RoyaX_4gAD5dENNUaCDdqMbInP6VhgS_aohYy2Mu0JuU%3D)

body:
But we want YOU to know

|

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63775367/407946659/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDU0YzEzYy04N2ZhLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u_LCa_U3s_YVkUgZjT64tRj9J30VahrXi8EXfwmBfVI=&emci=6bab72d8-5cfa-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=cd54c13c-87fa-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=43566853)

| | MAGA extremist Florida Governor Ron DeSantis just announced his candidacy for president, and he wanted right-wing Twitter CEO Elon Musk to be the first to know.

Elon Musk, who brought dozens of white supremacists back to Twitter after they were banned, is thrilled that DeSantis is running. _**They’re both desperate to take our country backward and destroy our progress!**_

DeSantis has been teasing his presidential run for months, leaning into the most extreme GOP positions. He’s signed a draconian six-week abortion ban, cruelly targeted trans kids, censored public schools and attacked teachers, flooded the streets with guns, and let white supremacists run wild.

He wants to subject all Americans to his vicious, backward policies, and we can’t let him win!

**So here’s what we can do–start organizing right now to keep Georgia blue and make sure that no Republican–neither DeSantis nor Trump–can get anywhere near the presidency.**

[**_We need you in this fight to stop DeSantis’ far-right, fascist campaign. Georgia will be 2024’s closest and most important swing state. | | **🚨 _BREAKING:_ Ron DeSantis just announced his presidential campaign 🚨 ** **It’s official:** Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis has officially launched his presidential campaign – adding his name to the ever-growing list of GOP candidates gearing up to face Donald Trump in the Republican primary. DeSantis has made a name for himself by embracing and elevating far-right extremism. clean_body: Ron DeSantis has made a name for himself by embracing and elevating far-right extremism. He’s dangerous and he’s already gaining traction in the states. | | | | | 🚨 BREAKING: Ron DeSantis just announced his presidential campaign 🚨 It’s official: Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis has officially launched his presidential campaign – adding his name to the ever-growing list of GOP candidates gearing up to face Donald Trump in the Republican primary. DeSantis has made a name for himself by embracing and elevating far-right extremism. As governor of Florida, he’s worked with the state legislature to push Florida further to the right – signing bills restricting abortion access, targeting LGBTQ+ children, and expanding concealed carry. He’s dangerous. And he’s already gaining traction in the states –over 50 New Hampshire state legislators endorsed him BEFORE his announcement!** To protect our democracy from DeSantis’ brand of far-right extremism, we need to mobilize now to elect state Democrats who will stand up to Republican attacks on abortion access, voting rights, and the LGBTQ+ community. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Let’s meet this moment. name: John Fetterman
subject: No thanks, Ron
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
We gotta be ready to fight back.
#
Derek, ughhhhh.
**Ron DeSantis is officially running for President.**
It’s WILD that the new norm for Republicans are extreme MAGA candidates like Ron DeSantis, who want to rip away freedoms from yinz + youse — whether it’s banning life-saving abortion care or banning books from schools.
**[I’m going to fight like h*ll to re-elect Joe + protect our blue Senate majority, but this is a moment where we need support from the whole team. Rush a contribution to help us fight back against extreme Republicans like DeSantis.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230524-1?refcode=em20230524-1-8385&amount=5&refcode2=8385_434096_784PRG&akid=8385%2E434096%2E784PRG)**
**[Fight Back: Donate Now »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230524-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230524-8385&refcode2=8385_434096_784PRG&akid=8385%2E434096%2E784PRG)**
Ron DeSantis is campaigning on his “accomplishments” in Florida..and uh, no thanks, my dude. 😬😬😬
In Florida, DeSantis signed an outrageous six-week abortion ban that’s affecting millions of women.
And I can tell you right now that his attacks on public schools + teacher’s unions simply won’t fly, especially in PA.
**But like I said, DeSantis’ extreme BS is just the new normal for GOP politicians.** So we’ve gotta make sure we’re ready to fight back when dudes like Trump, DeSantis, and McConnell are laser-targeting states like Pennsylvania in the upcoming election.
**[What do you say? Will you pitch in $5 or more to fight back against extremists in the Republican Party? I’m counting on yinz guys today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230524-1?refcode=em20230524-1-8385&amount=5&refcode2=8385_434096_784PRG&akid=8385%2E434096%2E784PRG)**
**[Donate Now »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230524-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230524-8385&refcode2=8385_434096_784PRG&akid=8385%2E434096%2E784PRG)**
Thanks,
John
John Fetterman
U.S. Senator from Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230524-8385-footer&t=1&refcode2=8385_434096_784PRG&akid=8385%2E434096%2E784PRG)**

name: Bob Casey for Senate
subject: A big admission from Mitch McConnell
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=77%2E552475%2Eg8eu0U)
Peter, did you see what Mitch McConnell told CNN this month?
He’s focused on flipping four Senate seats in 2024 -- **and top of his list is Pennsylvania!**
That’s right. McConnell’s roadmap for Republicans to take back control of the Senate runs straight through PA.
**[National Republicans will pour millions into this race, so it’s critical we reach our upcoming end-of-month fundraising goal. Please donate $5 or more now to help us meet our $25,000 goal before it’s too late.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230524-1?refcode=em20230524-1&refcode2=77_552475_g8eu0U&akid=77%2E552475%2Eg8eu0U)**
Now that Mitch McConnell put this Senate seat in his crosshairs, we can expect national Republican mega-donors, special interests, and dark money groups to come together to fund an onslaught of ads attacking Bob Casey.
If we don’t fight back, their attacks could drown out our campaign — and worse, make Mitch McConnell’s dream of flipping Pennsylvania a reality.
**[We need to be ready no matter what the GOP spends — but we can only do that with supporters like you pitching in before critical deadlines. Will you make your first donation of $5 to help us reach our $25,000 end-of-month goal?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230524-1?refcode=em20230524-1&refcode2=77_552475_g8eu0U&akid=77%2E552475%2Eg8eu0U)**
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230524-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230524-1&refcode2=77_552475_g8eu0U&akid=77%2E552475%2Eg8eu0U)**
Thank you in advance for your support before our May 31st deadline.
Onward,
Bob Casey for Senate

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: Why your support matters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate

name: Brandon Presley
subject: re: a Democratic win in Mississippi
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
Accepting the title of governor is easy. Actually governing is a whole different animal.

| I want you to do me a favor, Peter.

Close your eyes for a second and imagine what Mississippi would look like with no more Tate Reeves.

I’ll tell you what I see — high-speed internet in every Mississippi household, a booming economy, extended Medicaid, and funded hospitals. A leader who will always put you above special interests, and not a single corruption scandal in sight.

Guess what? We’re just months away from making this a reality.

[_**But I could really use your help. We need to raise at least $10,000 online in the next 60 hours to build enough firepower to defeat Tate. Can you split a few dollars between me and Fight for Progress to crush our goal?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63775747/407948222/974202786?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230524-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNhYzYzMzVjLThiZmEtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=bwpScR3CAlyReS2QGOe74ZfvZHLiRvmFmmySr6a3pEY=)

Accepting the title of governor is easy. Actually governing is a whole different animal.

**My work as Mayor of Nettleton and on the Public Service Commission speaks for itself.** Unlike Reeves, I’ve stood up to the special interests and lobbyists. The big corporations. And everybody else who’s tried to screw over Mississippians one way or another.

Tate Reeves is just another politician who will do anything to keep his rich and powerful buddies happy. I won’t. I am ready to raise Cain and get to work for the people of Mississippi on day one.

We’ve still got a long road ahead until Election Day, so we need to keep our momentum going strong or risk losing our chance to shake up the business-as-usual politics here in the Magnolia State.

[_**What do you say, Peter? Can I count on your support before our deadline to help me defeat Tate Reeves? Split a donation now.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63775748/407948223/974202786?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230524-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNhYzYzMzVjLThiZmEtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=bwpScR3CAlyReS2QGOe74ZfvZHLiRvmFmmySr6a3pEY=)

clean_body: Accepting the title of governor is easy. Actually governing is a whole different animal. | I want you to do me a favor, Peter. Close your eyes for a second and imagine what Mississippi would look like with no more Tate Reeves. I’ll tell you what I see — high-speed internet in every Mississippi household, a booming economy, extended Medicaid, and funded hospitals. A leader who will always put you above special interests, and not a single corruption scandal in sight. Guess what? We’re just months away from making this a reality. = Accepting the title of governor is easy. Actually governing is a whole different animal. My work as Mayor of Nettleton and on the Public Service Commission speaks for itself. Unlike Reeves, I’ve stood up to the special interests and lobbyists. The big corporations. And everybody else who’s tried to screw over Mississippians one way or another. Tate Reeves is just another politician who will do anything to keep his rich and powerful buddies happy. I won’t. I am ready to raise Cain and get to work for the people of Mississippi on day one. We’ve still got a long road ahead until Election Day, so we need to keep our momentum going strong or risk losing our chance to shake up the business-as-usual politics here in the Magnolia State. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. | | = | = | = | = | = Let’s do this. name: Team Lucas Kunce
subject: The last 72 hours…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Some updates about the response to our newest ad and even more labor support lining up behind Lucas Kunce
#
It’s been a busy week for our team, Peter — and it’s only Wednesday!
**MONDAY MORNING,** we put out our newest ad featuring Jon Hamm in response to Josh Hawley’s new “Manhood” book. And from fundraising to social media, the response has been overwhelming.
**SINCE THEN,** the ad has gotten more than ONE MILLION views, a full play-through on MSNBC’s Morning Joe, and noticed by influential figures + news outlets in Missouri and all across the country. Just take a look for yourself:
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33473?refcode=em20230524-3167&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3167%2E614464%2Er4BKb4)
**AND YESTERDAY,** Lucas received his second major labor endorsement in less than a week — earning the support of the Missouri State Council of Fire Fighters in addition to UFCW Local 655, the largest private-sector local union in Missouri.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33473?refcode=em20230524-3167&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3167%2E614464%2Er4BKb4)
**Our grassroots movement to elect Lucas Kunce is gaining more and more momentum every day — and we can’t let it stall out now.**
GOP insiders at the NRSC have been on the attack because they know Lucas poses a real threat to their grip on Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat. So we need your help right now to keep fighting back and getting Lucas’ message in front of voters.
**[Will you chip in $10 or anything at all right now so we’ll have what it takes to defeat Josh Hawley and flip this U.S. Senate seat in 2024? Our campaign doesn’t take a cent from corporate PACs or shady mega-donors, so you know we mean it when we say any amount makes a big impact.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33473?refcode=em20230524-3167&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3167%2E614464%2Er4BKb4)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33474?refcode=em20230524-3167&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=4&akid=3167%2E614464%2Er4BKb4) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33474?refcode=em20230524-3167&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=5&akid=3167%2E614464%2Er4BKb4) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33474?refcode=em20230524-3167&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=6&akid=3167%2E614464%2Er4BKb4) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33474?refcode=em20230524-3167&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=7&akid=3167%2E614464%2Er4BKb4) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33474?refcode=em20230524-3167&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=8&akid=3167%2E614464%2Er4BKb4) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33474?refcode=em20230524-3167&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=9&akid=3167%2E614464%2Er4BKb4) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33473?refcode=em20230524-3167&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=3167%2E614464%2Er4BKb4)

Team Lucas

body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]
Peter,
Florida governor Ron DeSantis has just made it official: He's running to be our next president.
If you are a parent like us who cares about the future of the next generation, this should concern you.
Why?
*
He
signed
an
extreme
abortion
ban
into
law
*
He
has
stripped
away
voting
rights
*
He
punished
teachers
and
banned
books
*
He
has
attacked
LGBTQ+
students
Will you stand with us and help us amplify the voice of parents who are concerned about the future of the next generation? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsagainstdesantis]
Together, we can make sure he never steps foot in the oval office and fight for Democracy because our children deserve to grow up in a country that grants them more rights, not less than their grandparent's generation.
We may not have the mega millions of GOP super PACs, but we believe that our collective voice as parents and our people powered movement can stop this Republican takeover that not only threatens the future of our kids in this country, but also the future of our Democracy.
Please chip in what you can to help us amplify the issues concerning parents and support and train democratic pro-choice moms running for office in Florida up and down the ballot. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsagainstdesantis]
Thank you!

Thank you for everything!

name: Ron DeSantis for President
subject: big announcement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
Let's put the rumors to rest once and for all.

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=568ef60346da44a3a757c7f9f9fe9571&_e=G3BTBHFJ57BYXUJcWE34UqIxuqtYJfIMqHvyYnxhhl0izfTBGE995BCAdghW0p1bsUmJS0Fsb63__gyxXcUJinrcxdUG50WQwVlGSyRufOX5uAKi2bvC_IuwMTmRVv2g1F5aIGSaQR-HmRLH7mskTFIPKolAiiuPRZ2zvKuPusdiYasGVGrPmYUY5_OLkx5dNQQJQTlajfrtsddZGHDJhZoEVQruOTaczAjwFlfNRGLPd0BujPEzHyc8-7DlHkk2GSXdWXmZThybdfvSSvGgrFq9MBGnVVhGVv9lkmmdrAuW2hw-e1M4-mc7WOabQPG75Z-vEu4l_dYmhbqqAn8xDledpNcVxtDr12lz4-SWnVgTdpFEnO4XVN-yGOEpwA9Lr8w35Aqt3cwdA4JwhKnUf_jV_M30NjfeMzU2fCkcxn7jGwwCo9QwgQMHKked69eh)
---
Friend,

It's official: I'M IN.

**I'm running for President of the United States. **
---
| | [JOIN ME](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=568ef60346da44a3a757c7f9f9fe9571&_e=G3BTBHFJ57BYXUJcWE34UqIxuqtYJfIMqHvyYnxhhl0izfTBGE995BCAdghW0p1bsUmJS0Fsb63__gyxXcUJinrcxdUG50WQwVlGSyRufOX5uAKi2bvC_IuwMTmRVv2g1F5aIGSaQR-HmRLH7mskTFIPKolAiiuPRZ2zvKuPusdiYasGVGrPmYUY5_OLkx5dNQQJQTlajfrtsddZGHDJhZoEVQruOTaczAjwFlfNRGLPd0BujPEzHyc8-7DlHkk2GSXdWXmZThybdfvSSvGgrBEI7mBcFThWpRQgz-Tw30jPbMAXscuClk7KoeANUiNs5mKpm8jsMAR8U7P-VZ8hJtahxYNbEAKSwmON_LrbnGw1GsX3QT_JohV_UiiqK9PVp5YrlHOOzZmmolCxRC9_zlQ_OUpf_64HKpGp9IXLnNtBX2lNNwkakUloqlvUutuo)
---
Have you ever noticed how often Joe Biden tries to take potshots at Florida?

It's because he HATES what we're doing in the Sunshine State.

While he pushes the woke agenda, we're fighting back with freedom.

Joe Biden is taking the country in the wrong direction. But I know I can turn it around.

The American people know it, too. That's why they are ALREADY voting with their feet. Our population is booming in the free state of Florida.

Now, I want to put that choice on the ballot--but I need your support. ** **
---
| [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=568ef60346da44a3a757c7f9f9fe9571&_e=G3BTBHFJ57BYXUJcWE34UqIxuqtYJfIMqHvyYnxhhl0izfTBGE995BCAdghW0p1bsUmJS0Fsb63__gyxXcUJinrcxdUG50WQwVlGSyRufOX5uAKi2bvC_IuwMTmRVv2g1F5aIGSaQR-HmRLH7mskTFIPKolAiiuPRZ2zvKuPusdiYasGVGrPmYUY5_OLkx5dNQQJQTlajfrtsddZGHDJhZoEVQruOTaczAjwFlfNRGLPd0BujPEzHyc8-7DlHkk2GSXdWXmZThybdfvSSvGgrGekVEJfTrX5h8uRgdN_byRmngWFf5ptDwnfwzhcArKmBgJj7WEjuAVHQC8S6-RAJYbd7G_VgIFeBUEWbGQApPaU4BOwTaF_1n_9EbkQmN_c4aUf09dQ_coUhbqdAzquae9f763lqofbyKCSXQuFpaHHPkA110NRFeH7NcTZrKox)
---
We sometimes take freedom for granted. You should not do that after the last few years. It is contested, and we have seen it wither on the vine in many places in our country.

But Florida was different. We chose facts over fear. We chose education over indoctrination. We chose law and order over rioting and disorder. Florida was a refuge of sanity when the world went mad.

We held the line when freedom hung in the balance.

We showed that we can -- and must -- revitalize America.

**I believe freedom is worth fighting for, and as your next President I promise I will never stop fighting for your freedom.** **[Will you fight alongside me?](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=568ef60346da44a3a757c7f9f9fe9571&_e=G3BTBHFJ57BYXUJcWE34UqIxuqtYJfIMqHvyYnxhhl0izfTBGE995BCAdghW0p1bsUmJS0Fsb63__gyxXcUJinrcxdUG50WQwVlGSyRufOX5uAKi2bvC_IuwMTmRVv2g1F5aIGSaQR-HmRLH7mskTFIPKolAiiuPRZ2zvKuPusdiYasGVGrPmYUY5_OLkx5dNQQJQTlajfrtsddZGHDJhZoEVQruOTaczAjwFlfNRGLPd0BujPEzHyc8-7DlHkk2GSXdWXmZThybdfvSSvGgrGGvBMvDNYJ_jf4Vx-9J1j-0XFj5z8ai8J5u5mHaDI9yuMqhIaNLEuKOOmO0Nwn8xSAM9iV3P9CDUcf-RQDZvGevu8V3uifFaO7OPmni--27Iv5toQte_bHK8jn7sx1MQdfQVp67d5ARPHsySVEg-K7EPioIrF2tjkMKRxWKreYM "Will you fight alongside me?")**
---
| | [YES, I'M READY TO WIN](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=568ef60346da44a3a757c7f9f9fe9571&_e=G3BTBHFJ57BYXUJcWE34UqIxuqtYJfIMqHvyYnxhhl0izfTBGE995BCAdghW0p1bsUmJS0Fsb63__gyxXcUJinrcxdUG50WQwVlGSyRufOX5uAKi2bvC_IuwMTmRVv2g1F5aIGSaQR-HmRLH7mskTFIPKolAiiuPRZ2zvKuPusdiYasGVGrPmYUY5_OLkx5dNQQJQTlajfrtsddZGHDJhZoEVQruOTaczAjwFlfNRGLPd0BujPEzHyc8-7DlHkk2GSXdWXmZThybdfvSSvGgrJB_S4c93qImdl-ieeY3GmsBUxZ6lxXfbm8gyo-JEXOlkOeDNbuVaunIMKAamA05ivDXUXa_5CTp99lRwIXYmuOzm9z26nwl-YHvzG88UUaFasGhS_YHAmpOy0lQ0ggzgZK1PBbyNE-iL1VX4Ek4N8caGxEmpFwCOZeh45F6xDHc)
---
And we can win, Friend.

I'll make sure we have an economy that works for working families, a secure border that works for our nation, and so much more. The battle won't be easy and will require a lot of toil and sweat to get it all done. I'm excited to share my agenda for America with you over the course of this campaign.

**But here 's why I'm writing you today, Friend: [I want to ask you to become a Launch Day Donor to my presidential campaign and join our first team tele-townhall.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=568ef60346da44a3a757c7f9f9fe9571&_e=G3BTBHFJ57BYXUJcWE34UqIxuqtYJfIMqHvyYnxhhl0izfTBGE995BCAdghW0p1bsUmJS0Fsb63__gyxXcUJinrcxdUG50WQwVlGSyRufOX5uAKi2bvC_IuwMTmRVv2g1F5aIGSaQR-HmRLH7mskTFIPKolAiiuPRZ2zvKuPusdiYasGVGrPmYUY5_OLkx5dNQQJQTlajfrtsddZGHDJhZoEVQruOTaczAjwFlfNRGLPd0BujPEzHyc8-7DlHkk2GSXdWXmZThybdfvSSvGgrBpIcqLmqkJeXDHmjxfIn8_GJ4rXe9yAaHZdl4g47ePyoSuFOoI7jz_XUTd96sSvqQFWV38mN3boizUBchdOlNJplXq-Z7YHAtAI1ifYP_G9wGecfLWCZXjhzx0xKOOLbU3enx_iTRYliEeQdbajAHSpn_yN8jHqWWHDhNfeTNzQ "I want to ask you to become a Launch Day Donor to my presidential campaign and join our first Team Teletownhall.")**

| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he graduated with honors and was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School. While at Harvard, he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq as an adviser to a U.S. Navy SEAL commander in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a federal prosecutor, where he targeted and convicted child predators. He was elected to Congress in 2012 and advocated for congressional term limits and a balanced budget amendment. He also spearheaded oversight efforts to expose malfeasance in the IRS and in agencies involved in abusing their authority during the manufacturing of the Russia collusion conspiracy theory. Congressman DeSantis was also a leading champion for America's veterans and helped enact reforms to the VA and place an emphasis on mental health.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award winning television host. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
